papers.title: SemiFA: An Agentic Multi-Modal Framework for Autonomous Semiconductor Failure Analysis Report Generation
papers.abstract: Semiconductor failure analysis (FA) requires engineers to examine inspection images, correlate equipment telemetry, consult historical defect records, and write structured reports, a process that can consume several hours of expert time per case. We present SemiFA, an agentic multi-modal framework that autonomously generates structured FA reports from semiconductor inspection images in under one minute. SemiFA decomposes FA into a four-agent LangGraph pipeline: a DefectDescriber that classifies and narrates defect morphology using DINOv2 and LLaVA-1.6, a RootCauseAnalyzer that fuses SECS/GEM equipment telemetry with historically similar defects retrieved from a Qdrant vector database, a SeverityClassifier that assigns severity and estimates yield impact, and a RecipeAdvisor that proposes corrective process adjustments. A fifth node assembles a PDF report. We introduce SemiFA-930, a dataset of 930 annotated semiconductor defect images paired with structured FA narratives across nine defect classes, drawn from procedural synthesis, WM-811K, and MixedWM38. Our DINOv2-based classifier achieves 92.1% accuracy on 140 validation images (macro F1 = 0.917), and the full pipeline produces complete FA reports in 48 seconds on an NVIDIA A100-SXM4-40 GB GPU. A GPT-4o judge ablation across four modality conditions demonstrates that multi-modal fusion improves root cause reasoning by +0.86 composite points (1-5 scale) over an image-only baseline, with equipment telemetry as the more load-bearing modality. To our knowledge, SemiFA is the first system to integrate SECS/GEM equipment telemetry into a vision-language model pipeline for autonomous FA report generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出SemiFA，一个多智能体多模态框架，可在48秒内自动生成半导体失效分析报告，并引入SemiFA-930数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 半导体失效分析依赖工程师人工检查图像、关联设备遥测、查阅历史缺陷记录并撰写结构化报告，每个案例耗时数小时，效率低下且成本高昂。

papers.title: Explainable Graph Neural Networks for Interbank Contagion Surveillance: A Regulatory-Aligned Framework for the U.S. Banking Sector
papers.abstract: The Spatial-Temporal Graph Attention Network (ST-GAT) framework was created to serve as an explainable GNN-based solution for detecting bank distress early warning signs and for conducting macro-prudential surveillance of the interbank system in the United States. The ST-GAT framework models 8,103 FDIC insured institutions across 58 quarterly snapshots (2010Q1-2024Q2). Bilateral exposures were reconstructed from publicly available FDIC Call Reports using maximum entropy estimation to produce a dynamic directed weighted graph. The framework achieves the highest AUPRC among all GNN architectures (0.939 +/- 0.010), trailing only XGBoost (0.944). Ablation analysis confirms the BiLSTM temporal component contributes +0.020 AUPRC; temporal attention weights exhibit a monotonically decreasing pattern consistent with long-run structural vulnerability weighting. Permutation importance identifies ROA (0.309) and NPL Ratio (0.252) as dominant predictors, consistent with post-mortem analyses of the 2023 regional banking crisis. All data are publicly available FDIC Call Reports and FRED series; all code and results are released.

analysis.tldr: 提出可解释图神经网络ST-GAT用于美国银行间传染监测，在AUPRC上接近XGBoost，并识别出ROA和NPL比率为关键预测因子。
analysis.research_motivation: 银行间传染风险监测对宏观审慎监管至关重要，但现有方法缺乏可解释性或无法有效利用时空图结构。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可解释的图神经网络框架，用于早期检测银行困境并监控美国银行间系统的传染风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 提出ST-GAT框架，在银行间传染监测中达到最高AUPRC（0.939），仅次于XGBoost。
通过消融实验验证BiLSTM时间组件的贡献，并识别ROA和NPL比率为关键预测因子。
analysis.experiments: 在8,103家FDIC保险机构、58个季度快照（2010Q1-2024Q2）的数据上评估，AUPRC为0.939±0.010，消融实验显示BiLSTM贡献+0.020 AUPRC。
limitations: 可能依赖最大熵估计的准确性，实际风险暴露可能更复杂。

papers.title: Neural 3D Reconstruction of Planetary Surfaces from Descent-Phase Wide-Angle Imagery
papers.abstract: Digital elevation modeling of planetary surfaces is essential for studying past and ongoing geological processes. Wide-angle imagery acquired during spacecraft descent promises to offer a low-cost option for high-resolution terrain reconstruction. However, accurate 3D reconstruction from such imagery is challenging due to strong radial distortion and limited parallax from vertically descending, predominantly nadir-facing cameras. Conventional multi-view stereo exhibits limited depth range and reduced fidelity under these conditions and also lacks domain-specific priors. We present the first study of modern neural reconstruction methods for planetary descent imaging. We also develop a novel approach that incorporates an explicit neural height field representation, which provides a strong prior since planetary surfaces are generally continuous, smooth, solid, and free from floating objects. This study demonstrates that neural approaches offer a strong and competitive alternative to traditional multi-view stereo (MVS) methods. Experiments on simulated descent sequences over high-fidelity lunar and Mars terrains demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves increased spatial coverage while maintaining satisfactory estimation accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 首次将神经重建方法用于行星下降图像，提出显式神经高度场表示，在模拟月球和火星地形上优于传统MVS。
analysis.research_motivation: 行星表面数字高程建模对地质研究至关重要，下降阶段广角图像成本低但传统MVS因径向畸变和视差有限而精度不足，且缺乏领域先验。
analysis.problem: 从垂直下降、近天底视角的广角图像中准确重建行星表面三维地形。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统MVS在深度范围和保真度上受限，而神经方法结合高度场先验可提升空间覆盖和精度。

contributions: 首次将现代神经重建方法应用于行星下降成像场景。
提出显式神经高度场表示，利用领域先验提升重建性能。

limitations: 仅在模拟数据上验证，未在真实下降图像上测试。

papers.title: Shapley Value-Guided Adaptive Ensemble Learning for Explainable Financial Fraud Detection with U.S. Regulatory Compliance Validation
papers.abstract: Financial crime costs U.S. institutions over $32 billion each year. Although AI tools for fraud detection have become more advanced, their use in real-world systems still faces a major obstacle: many of these models operate as black boxes that cannot provide the transparent, auditable explanations required by regulations such as OCC Bulletin 2011-12 and Federal Reserve SR 11-7. This study makes three main contributions. First, it offers a thorough evaluation of explanation quality across faithfulness (sufficiency and comprehensiveness at k=5, 10, and 15) and stability (Kendall's W across 30 bootstrap samples). XGBoost paired with TreeExplainer achieves near-perfect stability (W=0.9912), while LSTM with DeepExplainer shows weak results (W=0.4962). Second, the paper introduces the SHAP-Guided Adaptive Ensemble (SGAE), which dynamically adjusts per-transaction ensemble weights based on SHAP attribution agreement, achieving the highest AUC-ROC among all tested models (0.8837 held-out; 0.9245 cross-validation). Third, a complete three-architecture evaluation of LSTM, Transformer, and GNN-GraphSAGE on the full 590,540-transaction IEEE-CIS dataset is provided, with GNN-GraphSAGE achieving AUC-ROC 0.9248 and F1=0.6013. All results are mapped directly to OCC, SR 11-7, and BSA-AML regulatory compliance requirements.

analysis.tldr: 提出SHAP引导的自适应集成学习框架，在金融欺诈检测中兼顾高精度与监管可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 金融欺诈每年造成超320亿美元损失，但现有AI模型多为黑箱，无法满足OCC 2011-12和SR 11-7等法规对透明可审计解释的要求。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持高检测精度的同时，提供符合美国监管合规要求的可解释欺诈检测模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: XGBoost+TreeExplainer稳定性接近完美（W=0.9912），而LSTM+DeepExplainer稳定性弱（W=0.4962），说明不同模型-解释器组合在解释质量上差异显著。
analysis.method: SHAP-Guided Adaptive Ensemble (SGAE)：基于每笔交易的SHAP归因一致性动态调整集成权重。
contributions: 对多种模型-解释器组合在忠实性（充分性、全面性）和稳定性（Kendall's W）上进行了系统评估。
提出SGAE自适应集成方法，在IEEE-CIS数据集上达到最高AUC-ROC（0.8837留出，0.9245交叉验证）。
提供LSTM、Transformer、GNN-GraphSAGE三种架构在59万笔交易上的完整评估，并映射到OCC、SR 11-7、BSA-AML监管要求。
analysis.experiments: 在IEEE-CIS数据集（590,540笔交易）上评估，报告了AUC-ROC、F1、解释忠实性和稳定性指标。
limitations: 仅针对金融欺诈检测场景，泛化性未验证。
SGAE的额外计算开销未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SHAP引导的自适应集成学习框架，在金融欺诈检测中兼顾高精度与监管可解释性。

papers.title: Applied AI-Enhanced RF Interference Rejection
papers.abstract: AI-enhanced interference rejection in radio frequency (RF) transmissions has recently attracted interest because deep learning approaches trained on both the signal of interest (SOI) and the signal mixture (SOI plus interference) can outperform traditional approaches which only consider the SOI. The goal is to detect, demodulate, and decode signals over a range of signal-to-interference-plus-noise (SINR) levels without having a detailed, design-level knowledge of the interfering signal or the propagation conditions. Our present AI interference suppression results are based on Autoregressive Transformer Decoder models which exhibit orders of magnitude faster throughput at inference time than WaveNet models developed in earlier work. As a specific example, we investigate an analog FM "Walkie Talkie" radio signal of interest in the presence of an Orthogonal Frequency-Division Multiplexing (OFDM) interferer. This type of interferer is near-ubiquitous in the current RF landscape. Our results clearly show the benefits of transformer-based interference mitigation in tactical settings. We show that unintelligible transmissions become intelligible via metrics such as Perceptual Evaluation of Speech Quality (PESQ), while overall latency is kept to a minimum using readily available lightweight GPUs such as a Jetson AGX Orin. We believe these same techniques can also be applied to a broader set of national security scenarios, as well as having commercial applications.

analysis.tldr: 用Transformer解码器实现RF干扰抑制，比WaveNet快几个数量级，在FM信号与OFDM干扰场景下提升语音可懂度。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统RF干扰抑制方法仅考虑目标信号，而深度学习方法可同时利用目标信号和混合信号，但现有模型（如WaveNet）推理速度慢，难以满足实时战术场景需求。
analysis.problem: 在低延迟约束下，对未知干扰信号和传播条件实现高效的RF干扰抑制，使不可懂传输变得可懂。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用自回归Transformer解码器模型进行干扰抑制，相比WaveNet模型在推理吞吐量上提升数个数量级。
contributions: 提出基于自回归Transformer解码器的RF干扰抑制方法，显著提升推理速度。
在FM信号与OFDM干扰的典型场景下，通过PESQ指标证明语音可懂度提升，并在轻量级GPU上实现低延迟。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟的FM信号与OFDM干扰混合数据上评估，使用PESQ指标衡量语音质量，并在Jetson AGX Orin GPU上测试延迟。
limitations: 仅测试了FM与OFDM一种干扰组合，泛化性未知。
未提供与其他最新AI方法的详细对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用Transformer解码器实现RF干扰抑制，比WaveNet快几个数量级，在FM信号与OFDM干扰场景下提升语音可懂度。

papers.title: Medical thinking with multiple images
papers.abstract: Large language models perform well on many medical QA benchmarks, but real clinical reasoning often requires integrating evidence across multiple images rather than interpreting a single view. We introduce MedThinkVQA, an expert-annotated benchmark for thinking with multiple images, where models must interpret each image, combine cross-view evidence, and answer diagnostic questions with intermediate supervision and step-level evaluation. The dataset contains 8,067 cases, including 720 test cases, with an average of 6.62 images per case, substantially denser than prior work, whose expert-level benchmarks use at most 1.43 images per case. On the test set, the best closed-source models, Claude-4.6-Opus, Gemini-3-Pro, and GPT-5.2-xhigh, reach only 57.2%, 55.3%, and 54.9% accuracy, while GPT-5-mini and GPT-5-nano reach 39.7% and 30.8%. Strong open-source models lag behind, led by Qwen3.5-397B-A17B at 52.2% and Qwen3.5-27B at 50.6%. Further analysis identifies grounded multi-image reasoning as the main bottleneck: models often fail to extract, align, and compose evidence across views before higher-level inference can help. Providing expert single-image cues and cross-image summaries improves performance, whereas replacing them with self-generated intermediates reduces accuracy. Step-level analysis shows that over 70% of errors arise from image reading and cross-view integration. Scaling results further show that additional inference-time computation helps only when visual grounding is already reliable; when early evidence extraction is weak, longer reasoning yields limited or unstable gains and can amplify misread cues. These results suggest that the key challenge is not reasoning length alone, but reliable mechanisms for grounding, aligning, and composing distributed evidence across real-world multimodal clinical inputs.

analysis.tldr: 提出多图像医学推理基准MedThinkVQA，揭示当前模型在跨图像证据整合上的瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学QA基准多基于单图像，而真实临床推理需要整合多图像证据，缺乏相应评测与分析方法。
analysis.problem: 多图像医学推理中模型难以提取、对齐和组合跨图像证据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型错误中超过70%来自图像读取和跨视图整合；提供专家单图像线索和跨图像摘要可提升性能，而自生成中间步骤反而降低准确率；推理时计算仅在视觉基础可靠时有效。
analysis.method: 构建MedThinkVQA基准，包含8067个病例（平均每例6.62张图像），提供中间监督和步骤级评估。
contributions: 提出多图像医学推理基准MedThinkVQA，具有高密度图像和专家标注。
系统分析揭示跨图像证据整合是主要瓶颈，并探索了干预策略和推理时缩放规律。
analysis.experiments: 在测试集上评估多个闭源和开源模型，最佳闭源模型准确率约57%，开源模型约52%；提供单图像线索和跨图像摘要可提升性能。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖医学领域，泛化性未知。
未提供具体模型架构细节或训练方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多图像医学推理基准MedThinkVQA，揭示当前模型在跨图像证据整合上的瓶颈。

papers.title: KV Packet: Recomputation-Free Context-Independent KV Caching for LLMs
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) rely heavily on Key-Value (KV) caching to minimize inference latency. However, standard KV caches are context-dependent: reusing a cached document in a new context requires recomputing KV states to account for shifts in attention distribution. Existing solutions such as CacheBlend, EPIC, and SAM-KV mitigate this issue by selectively recomputing a subset of tokens; however, they still incur non-negligible computational overhead (FLOPs) and increased Time-to-First-Token (TTFT) latency. In this paper, we propose KV Packet, a recomputation-free cache reuse framework that treats cached documents as immutable ``packets'' wrapped in light-weight trainable soft-token adapters, which are trained via self-supervised distillation to bridge context discontinuities. Experiments on Llama-3.1 and Qwen2.5 demonstrate that the proposed KV Packet method achieves near-zero FLOPs and lower TTFT than recomputation-based baselines, while retaining F1 scores comparable to those of the full recomputation baseline.

analysis.tldr: 提出KV Packet，一种免重算的上下文无关KV缓存复用框架，通过轻量可训练软token适配器实现零FLOPs和更低TTFT。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准KV缓存是上下文相关的，在新上下文中复用缓存文档需要重算KV状态，导致高计算开销和TTFT延迟。现有方法如CacheBlend等仍需选择性重算，无法完全消除开销。
analysis.problem: 如何实现免重算的上下文无关KV缓存复用，以消除计算开销并降低TTFT。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将缓存文档视为不可变"数据包"，包裹轻量可训练的软token适配器，通过自监督蒸馏训练以桥接上下文不连续性。
contributions: 提出KV Packet框架，实现免重算的KV缓存复用。
在Llama-3.1和Qwen2.5上验证，达到近零FLOPs和更低TTFT，同时F1分数与全重算基线相当。
analysis.experiments: 在Llama-3.1和Qwen2.5上进行实验，与重算基线对比FLOPs、TTFT和F1分数。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的上下文切换场景。
软token适配器的训练可能引入额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出KV Packet，一种免重算的上下文无关KV缓存复用框架，通过轻量可训练软token适配器实现零FLOPs和更低TTFT。

papers.title: Identifiability of Potentially Degenerate Gaussian Mixture Models With Piecewise Affine Mixing
papers.abstract: Causal representation learning (CRL) aims to identify the underlying latent variables from high-dimensional observations, even when variables are dependent with each other. We study this problem for latent variables that follow a potentially degenerate Gaussian mixture distribution and that are only observed through the transformation via a piecewise affine mixing function. We provide a series of progressively stronger identifiability results for this challenging setting in which the probability density functions are ill-defined because of the potential degeneracy. For identifiability up to permutation and scaling, we leverage a sparsity regularization on the learned representation. Based on our theoretical results, we propose a two-stage method to estimate the latent variables by enforcing sparsity and Gaussianity in the learned representations. Experiments on synthetic and image data highlight our method's effectiveness in recovering the ground-truth latent variables.

analysis.tldr: 提出在分段仿射混合下可识别潜在退化高斯混合模型的理论与方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 因果表征学习旨在从高维观测中识别潜在变量，但现有方法难以处理变量间依赖且混合函数为分段仿射的退化高斯混合场景。
analysis.problem: 在潜在变量服从退化高斯混合分布且观测通过分段仿射混合函数变换时，如何实现潜在变量的可识别性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两阶段方法：利用稀疏正则化实现置换和缩放可识别性，再通过强制稀疏性和高斯性估计潜在变量。
contributions: 在分段仿射混合下为退化高斯混合模型提供一系列渐强可识别性结果
提出基于稀疏正则化的两阶段估计方法，并在合成和图像数据上验证有效性
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据和图像数据上实验，表明方法能有效恢复真实潜在变量。
limitations: 理论结果可能依赖特定稀疏性假设
实验仅覆盖合成和简单图像数据，复杂场景未验证
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出在分段仿射混合下可识别潜在退化高斯混合模型的理论与方法。

papers.title: Multitasking Embedding for Embryo Blastocyst Grading Prediction (MEmEBG)
papers.abstract: Reliable evaluation of blastocyst quality is critical for the success of in vitro fertilization (IVF) treatments. Current embryo grading practices primarily rely on visual assessment of morphological features, which introduces subjectivity, inter-embryologist variability, and challenges in standardizing quality assurance. In this study, we propose a multitask embedding-based approach for the automated analysis and prediction of key blastocyst components, including the trophectoderm (TE), inner cell mass (ICM), and blastocyst expansion (EXP). The method leverages biological and physical characteristics extracted from images of day-5 human embryos. A pretrained ResNet-18 architecture, enhanced with an embedding layer, is employed to learn discriminative representations from a limited dataset and to automatically identify TE and ICM regions along with their corresponding grades, structures that are visually similar and inherently difficult to distinguish. Experimental results demonstrate the promise of the multitask embedding approach and potential for robust and consistent blastocyst quality assessment.

analysis.tldr: 提出多任务嵌入方法MEmEBG，利用预训练ResNet-18从胚胎图像中自动预测囊胚质量等级。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前胚胎分级依赖视觉形态评估，存在主观性强、胚胎学家间差异大、标准化困难等问题，亟需自动化、客观的评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从有限的胚胎图像数据中自动、准确地预测囊胚的滋养外胚层(TE)、内细胞团(ICM)和扩张程度(EXP)的等级。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用预训练ResNet-18架构并添加嵌入层，从第5天人类胚胎图像中学习判别性表示，通过多任务学习同时预测TE、ICM和EXP的等级。
contributions: 提出一种多任务嵌入方法MEmEBG，用于自动分析囊胚关键组件并预测其等级。
利用预训练ResNet-18和嵌入层在有限数据集上学习判别性特征，解决视觉相似结构的区分难题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集规模有限，可能影响模型泛化能力。
仅基于第5天胚胎图像，未考虑时间序列或其他模态信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多任务嵌入方法MEmEBG，利用预训练ResNet-18从胚胎图像中自动预测囊胚质量等级。

papers.title: Numerical Instability and Chaos: Quantifying the Unpredictability of Large Language Models
papers.abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into agentic workflows, their unpredictability stemming from numerical instability has emerged as a critical reliability issue. While recent studies have demonstrated the significant downstream effects of these instabilities, the root causes and underlying mechanisms remain poorly understood. In this paper, we present a rigorous analysis of how unpredictability is rooted in the finite numerical precision of floating-point representations, tracking how rounding errors propagate, amplify, or dissipate through Transformer computation layers. Specifically, we identify a chaotic "avalanche effect" in the early layers, where minor perturbations trigger binary outcomes: either rapid amplification or complete attenuation. Beyond specific error instances, we demonstrate that LLMs exhibit universal, scale-dependent chaotic behaviors characterized by three distinct regimes: 1) a stable regime, where perturbations fall below an input-dependent threshold and vanish, resulting in constant outputs; 2) a chaotic regime, where rounding errors dominate and drive output divergence; and 3) a signal-dominated regime, where true input variations override numerical noise. We validate these findings extensively across multiple datasets and model architectures.

analysis.tldr: LLM的数值不稳定性会导致混沌行为，表现为三种不同的预测性状态。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在智能体工作流中广泛应用，但其数值不稳定性引发的不可预测性成为关键可靠性问题，而根本原因和机制尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 量化LLM中因浮点数有限精度导致的数值不稳定性及其对输出不可预测性的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现早期层存在混沌“雪崩效应”，微小扰动要么快速放大要么完全衰减；LLM表现出三种尺度依赖的混沌状态：稳定态、混沌态和信号主导态。
analysis.method: 通过跟踪Transformer计算层中舍入误差的传播、放大或消散，分析浮点数有限精度导致的不可预测性，并识别三种混沌状态。
contributions: 揭示了LLM中数值不稳定性导致混沌行为的机制，包括早期层的雪崩效应。
提出了三种混沌状态的分类框架，并跨数据集和模型架构验证了其普遍性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集和模型架构上验证了发现。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有LLM架构或更大规模模型。
未提供缓解数值不稳定性的具体方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM的数值不稳定性会导致混沌行为，表现为三种不同的预测性状态。

papers.title: Inclusive Kitchen Design for Older Adults: Generative AI Visualizations to Support Mild Cognitive Impairment
papers.abstract: Mild Cognitive Impairment (MCI) affects 15-20% of adults aged 65 and older, often making kitchen navigation and independent living difficult, particularly in lower-income communities with limited access to professional design help. This study created an AI system that converts standard kitchen photos into MCI-friendly designs using the Home Design Guidelines (HDG). Stable Diffusion models, enhanced with DreamBooth LoRA and ControlNet, were trained on 100 kitchen images to produce realistic visualizations with open layouts, transparent cabinetry, better lighting, non-slip flooring, and less clutter. The models achieved moderate to high semantic alignment (normalized CLIP scores 0.69-0.79) and improved visual realism (GIQA scores 0.45-0.65). In a survey of 33 participants (51.5% caregivers, 36.4% older adults with MCI), the AI-modified kitchens were strongly preferred as more cognitively friendly (87.4% of 198 choices, p < .001). Participants reported high confidence in their kitchen choice selections (M = 5.92/7) and found the visualizations very helpful for home modifications (M = 6.27/7). Thematic analysis emphasized improved visibility, lower cognitive load, and greater independence. Overall, this AI tool provides a low-cost, scalable way for older adults and caregivers to visualize and implement DIY kitchen changes, supporting aging in place and resilience for those with MCI.

analysis.tldr: 利用生成式AI将厨房照片转换为适合轻度认知障碍老年人的无障碍设计，用户偏好显著。
analysis.research_motivation: 轻度认知障碍（MCI）影响15-20%的65岁以上老年人，厨房导航和独立生活困难，尤其低收入社区缺乏专业设计帮助，亟需低成本、可扩展的辅助工具。
analysis.problem: 如何利用生成式AI将普通厨房照片自动转换为符合MCI友好设计指南的视觉化方案，以支持老年人居家改造。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Stable Diffusion模型，结合DreamBooth LoRA和ControlNet，在100张厨房图像上微调，根据家庭设计指南（HDG）生成具有开放式布局、透明橱柜、更好照明、防滑地板和减少杂乱的逼真可视化图像。
contributions: 提出一个将生成式AI应用于MCI友好厨房设计的系统，实现低成本、可扩展的视觉化工具。
通过用户调查（33人）验证AI修改后的厨房在认知友好性上显著优于原图（87.4%偏好，p<.001），且参与者认为可视化对居家改造非常有帮助（M=6.27/7）。
analysis.experiments: 在100张厨房图像上训练，使用CLIP分数（0.69-0.79）和GIQA分数（0.45-0.65）评估语义对齐和视觉真实感；33名参与者（51.5%照护者，36.4%MCI老年人）的偏好调查显示AI修改厨房被强烈偏好。
limitations: 训练数据仅100张图像，可能限制泛化能力。
用户样本量较小（33人），且未包含实际居家改造后的长期效果评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用生成式AI将厨房照片转换为适合轻度认知障碍老年人的无障碍设计，用户偏好显著。

papers.title: InfiniteScienceGym: An Unbounded, Procedurally-Generated Benchmark for Scientific Analysis
papers.abstract: Large language models are emerging as scientific assistants, but evaluating their ability to reason from empirical data remains challenging. Benchmarks derived from published studies and human annotations inherit publication bias, known-knowledge bias, label noise, and substantial storage requirements. We present InfiniteScienceGym, a procedurally generated benchmark of scientific repositories paired with a verifiable question-answering task. From a seed, the simulator deterministically generates a self-contained repository with realistic directory structure, files, and tabular data, and a privileged QA generator produces both answerable and unanswerable questions with exact ground truth. This makes it possible to evaluate evidence-grounded reasoning, abstention, and tool-mediated analysis in a controlled setting without distributing a large static corpus. InfiniteScienceGym complements real scientific benchmarks by targeting blind spots and failure modes that are hard to evaluate using published datasets alone. Evaluating both proprietary and open-weight models, we find that none achieve more than 45% accuracy overall, that recognizing unanswerable questions remains a major weakness, and that stronger models tend to use tools more effectively rather than simply consuming more tokens.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个程序化生成的科学分析基准，用于评估LLM的证据推理和工具使用能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有科学分析基准存在出版偏见、已知知识偏见、标签噪声和存储需求大等问题，难以全面评估LLM从经验数据中推理的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个无偏见、可扩展且可验证的基准来评估LLM在科学分析中的证据推理、弃权判断和工具使用能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过程序化生成科学仓库（包含目录结构、文件和表格数据）和特权QA生成器，产生可回答和不可回答的问题，并附带精确真实答案。
contributions: 提出InfiniteScienceGym，一个程序化生成的科学分析基准，避免静态数据集的偏见和存储问题。
通过实验揭示当前LLM在科学推理中的弱点，特别是识别不可回答问题的能力不足。
analysis.experiments: 评估了专有和开源模型，发现所有模型准确率均低于45%，识别不可回答问题仍是主要弱点，且更强模型更善于使用工具而非单纯增加token。
limitations: 程序化生成可能无法完全模拟真实科学研究的复杂性和噪声。
基准任务可能偏向于特定类型的科学分析，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个程序化生成的科学分析基准，用于评估LLM的证据推理和工具使用能力。

papers.title: Towards Patient-Specific Deformable Registration in Laparoscopic Surgery
papers.abstract: Unsafe surgical care is a critical health concern, often linked to limitations in surgeon experience, skills, and situational awareness. Integrating patient-specific 3D models into the surgical field can enhance visualization, provide real-time anatomical guidance, and reduce intraoperative complications. However, reliably registering these models in general surgery remains challenging due to mismatches between preoperative and intraoperative organ surfaces, such as deformations and noise. To overcome these challenges, we introduce the first patient-specific non-rigid point cloud registration method, which leverages a novel data generation strategy to optimize outcomes for individual patients. Our approach combines a Transformer encoder-decoder architecture with overlap estimation and a dedicated matching module to predict dense correspondences, followed by a physics-based algorithm for registration. Experimental results on both synthetic and real data demonstrate that our patient-specific method significantly outperforms traditional agnostic approaches, achieving 45% Matching Score with 92% Inlier Ratio on synthetic data, highlighting its potential to improve surgical care.

analysis.tldr: 首个患者特异性非刚性点云配准方法，利用Transformer和物理算法提升腹腔镜手术中术前与术中模型的配准精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 不安全的手术护理是全球健康问题，常因医生经验、技能和情境意识不足导致。将患者特异性3D模型整合到手术视野可增强可视化、提供实时解剖指导并减少术中并发症，但术前与术中器官表面因变形和噪声难以可靠配准。
analysis.problem: 解决腹腔镜手术中术前与术中器官表面因变形和噪声导致的非刚性点云配准难题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出首个患者特异性非刚性点云配准方法，结合Transformer编码器-解码器架构、重叠估计和专用匹配模块预测密集对应点，再通过基于物理的算法进行配准，并采用新颖的数据生成策略优化个体患者结果。
contributions: 首次提出患者特异性非刚性点云配准方法，针对个体患者优化配准效果。
设计结合Transformer、重叠估计和匹配模块的架构，并集成基于物理的配准算法。
在合成和真实数据上显著优于传统通用方法，Matching Score达45%，Inlier Ratio达92%。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据上评估，患者特异性方法显著优于传统通用方法，合成数据上Matching Score为45%，Inlier Ratio为92%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量术前模型和术中数据采集。
物理算法计算开销可能较大，实时性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个患者特异性非刚性点云配准方法，利用Transformer和物理算法提升腹腔镜手术中术前与术中模型的配准精度。

papers.title: GeoLink: A 3D-Aware Framework Towards Better Generalization in Cross-View Geo-Localization
papers.abstract: Generalizable cross-view geo-localization aims to match the same location across views in unseen regions and conditions without GPS supervision. Its core difficulty lies in severe semantic inconsistency caused by viewpoint variation and poor generalization under domain shift. Existing methods mainly rely on 2D correspondence, but they are easily distracted by redundant shared information across views, leading to less transferable representations. To address this, we propose GeoLink, a 3D-aware semantic-consistent framework for Generalizable cross-view geo-localization. Specifically, we offline reconstruct scene point clouds from multi-view drone images using VGGT, providing stable structural priors. Based on these 3D anchors, we improve 2D representation learning in two complementary ways. A Geometric-aware Semantic Refinement module mitigates potentially redundant and view-biased dependencies in 2D features under 3D guidance. In addition, a Unified View Relation Distillation module transfers 3D structural relations to 2D features, improving cross-view alignment while preserving a 2D-only inference pipeline. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks show that GeoLink consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods and achieves superior generalization across unseen domains and diverse weather environments.

analysis.tldr: GeoLink通过3D点云先验增强2D特征，提升跨视角地理定位的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨视角地理定位在未见区域和条件下泛化困难，现有2D方法易受视角变化和域偏移影响，导致表征可迁移性差。
analysis.problem: 如何利用3D结构先验改进2D表征学习，实现跨视角地理定位的泛化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出2D方法易被冗余共享信息干扰，导致表征可迁移性差。
analysis.method: 离线重建场景点云作为3D锚点，通过几何感知语义精炼模块减少2D特征中的冗余和视角偏差，并通过统一视角关系蒸馏模块将3D结构关系迁移到2D特征，保持2D推理管线。
contributions: 提出GeoLink，首个利用3D点云先验增强2D表征的跨视角地理定位框架。
设计几何感知语义精炼和统一视角关系蒸馏两个互补模块，提升跨视角对齐和泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上，GeoLink一致优于现有方法，在未见域和多样天气环境下展现优越泛化性。
limitations: 依赖离线3D重建，可能增加预处理成本。
未讨论实时性要求高的场景适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GeoLink通过3D点云先验增强2D特征，提升跨视角地理定位的泛化能力。

papers.title: Magnitude Is All You Need? Rethinking Phase in Quantum Encoding of Complex SAR Data
papers.abstract: Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) data is inherently complex-valued, while quantum machine learning (QML) models operate in complex Hilbert spaces. This similarity suggests that using both the magnitude and phase of SAR data in quantum encoding should help automatic target recognition in SAR images. In this study, we test this assumption by comparing five encoding strategies for quantum models: magnitude-only encoding, joint magnitude-phase encoding, in-phase and quadrature encoding, preprocessed phase encoding, and a purely quantum architecture. All approaches are evaluated under a unified experimental setup on the MSTAR benchmark dataset. Surprisingly, we find that magnitude-only encoding performs better than phase-inclusive encodings in hybrid quantum-classical models. It achieves 99.57 percent accuracy on the 3-class task and 71.19 percent accuracy on the 8-class task, outperforming complex-valued alternatives under the same framework. Adding phase information provides little or no improvement and can sometimes degrade performance. However, in purely quantum models with only 184 to 224 trainable parameters and no classical neural-network layers, phase information becomes much more important, improving accuracy by up to 21.65 percentage points. These findings show that the usefulness of phase information depends not only on the data, but also on the architecture used to process it. Hybrid models can compensate for missing phase information through their classical components, while pure quantum models rely more strongly on phase information for class discrimination. The results provide practical guidance for encoding complex-valued data in quantum machine learning and highlight the importance of jointly designing encoding strategies and model architectures for current quantum systems.

analysis.tldr: 在量子编码中，仅使用SAR数据的幅度信息在混合量子-经典模型中表现优于包含相位信息的编码，但在纯量子模型中相位信息至关重要。
analysis.research_motivation: SAR数据天然是复数值，而量子机器学习在复希尔伯特空间中操作，因此直觉上同时使用幅度和相位进行量子编码应有助于目标识别，但实际效果未知。
analysis.problem: 探究在量子编码中，幅度和相位信息对SAR目标识别任务的有效性，以及不同模型架构下相位信息的作用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 混合量子-经典模型中，仅幅度编码优于包含相位的编码；纯量子模型中相位信息显著提升精度。
analysis.method: 比较五种量子编码策略（幅度仅、幅度-相位联合、同相/正交、预处理相位、纯量子架构），在统一实验设置下评估MSTAR数据集上的性能。
contributions: 发现混合量子-经典模型中仅幅度编码优于相位包含编码，挑战了相位信息必要的直觉。
揭示纯量子模型中相位信息的关键作用，为不同架构下的编码策略选择提供指导。
analysis.experiments: 在MSTAR基准数据集上进行3类和8类分类任务，报告了准确率。
limitations: 仅针对SAR数据，可能不适用于其他复值数据。
未探讨更大规模量子模型或不同噪声条件下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在量子编码中，仅使用SAR数据的幅度信息在混合量子-经典模型中表现优于包含相位信息的编码，但在纯量子模型中相位信息至关重要。

papers.title: SciFi: A Safe, Lightweight, User-Friendly, and Fully Autonomous Agentic AI Workflow for Scientific Applications
papers.abstract: Recent advances in agentic AI have enabled increasingly autonomous workflows, but existing systems still face substantial challenges in achieving reliable deployment in real-world scientific research. In this work, we present a safe, lightweight, and user-friendly agentic framework for the autonomous execution of well-defined scientific tasks. The framework combines an isolated execution environment, a three-layer agent loop, and a self-assessing do-until mechanism to ensure safe and reliable operation while effectively leveraging large language models of varying capability levels. By focusing on structured tasks with clearly defined context and stopping criteria, the framework supports end-to-end automation with minimal human intervention, enabling researchers to offload routine workloads and devote more effort to creative activities and open-ended scientific inquiry.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个安全、轻量、用户友好的自主科学任务执行框架，结合隔离环境、三层代理循环和自评估机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自主AI系统在真实科学研究中部署时面临可靠性挑战，需要更安全、轻量的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个安全、可靠且易于使用的自主代理框架，用于执行结构化的科学任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合隔离执行环境、三层代理循环和自评估do-until机制，利用不同能力级别的大语言模型。
contributions: 提出一个安全、轻量、用户友好的自主科学任务执行框架
设计了三层代理循环和自评估机制确保可靠运行
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅适用于结构化任务，对开放性问题支持有限
依赖LLM能力，可能受限于模型性能
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个安全、轻量、用户友好的自主科学任务执行框架，结合隔离环境、三层代理循环和自评估机制。

papers.title: Pareto-Optimal Offline Reinforcement Learning via Smooth Tchebysheff Scalarization
papers.abstract: Large language models can be aligned with human preferences through offline reinforcement learning (RL) on small labeled datasets. While single-objective alignment is well-studied, many real-world applications demand the simultaneous optimization of multiple conflicting rewards, e.g. optimizing both catalytic activity and specificity in protein engineering, or helpfulness and harmlessness for chatbots. Prior work has largely relied on linear reward scalarization, but this approach provably fails to recover non-convex regions of the Pareto front. In this paper, instead of scalarizing the rewards directly, we frame multi-objective RL itself as an optimization problem to be scalarized via smooth Tchebysheff scalarization, a recent technique that overcomes the shortcomings of linear scalarization. We use this formulation to derive Smooth Tchebysheff Optimization of Multi-Objective Preferences (STOMP), a novel offline RL algorithm that extends direct preference optimization to the multi-objective setting in a principled way by standardizing the individual rewards based on their observed distributions. We empirically validate STOMP on a range of protein engineering tasks by aligning three autoregressive protein language models on three laboratory datasets of protein fitness. Compared to state-of-the-art baselines, STOMP achieves the highest hypervolumes in eight of nine settings according to both offline off-policy and generative evaluations. We thus demonstrate that STOMP is a powerful, robust multi-objective alignment algorithm that can meaningfully improve post-trained models for multi-attribute protein optimization and beyond.

analysis.tldr: 提出STOMP算法，通过平滑切比雪夫标量化实现多目标离线强化学习，在蛋白质工程任务中优于基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实应用常需同时优化多个冲突奖励（如蛋白质工程中的催化活性和特异性），但现有线性标量化方法无法恢复帕累托前沿的非凸区域。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种离线强化学习算法，能够有效处理多目标偏好对齐，并覆盖非凸帕累托前沿。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 线性奖励标量化在非凸帕累托前沿上失效，导致无法找到某些最优折衷解。
analysis.method: 将多目标RL本身作为优化问题，通过平滑切比雪夫标量化进行标量，并基于奖励的观测分布标准化，扩展直接偏好优化到多目标设置。
contributions: 提出STOMP，一种基于平滑切比雪夫标量化的多目标离线RL算法。
在蛋白质工程任务上，STOMP在9个设置中的8个上实现了最高超体积。
analysis.experiments: 在三个蛋白质语言模型和三个实验室数据集上评估，对比多个基线，使用离线策略评估和生成评估。
limitations: 可能依赖奖励分布的准确估计。
未在非蛋白质领域验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出STOMP算法，通过平滑切比雪夫标量化实现多目标离线强化学习，在蛋白质工程任务中优于基线。

papers.title: 3DRealHead: Few-Shot Detailed Head Avatar
papers.abstract: The human face is central to communication. For immersive applications, the digital presence of a person should mirror the physical reality, capturing the users idiosyncrasies and detailed facial expressions. However, current 3D head avatar methods often struggle to faithfully reproduce the identity and facial expressions, despite having multi-view data or learned priors. Learning priors that capture the diversity of human appearances, especially, for regions with highly person-specific features, like the mouth and teeth region is challenging as the underlying training data is limited. In addition, many of the avatar methods are purely relying on 3D morphable model-based expression control which strongly limits expressivity. To address these challenges, we are introducing 3DRealHead, a few-shot head avatar reconstruction method with a novel expression control signal that is extracted from a monocular video stream of the subject. Specifically, the subject can take a few pictures of themselves, recover a 3D head avatar and drive it with a consumer-level webcam. The avatar reconstruction is enabled via a novel few-shot inversion process of a 3D human head prior which is represented as a Style U-Net that emits 3D Gaussian primitives which can be rendered under novel views. The prior is learned on the NeRSemble dataset. For animating the avatar, the U-Net is conditioned on 3DMM-based facial expression signals, as well as features of the mouth region extracted from the driving video. These additional mouth features allow us to recover facial expressions that cannot be represented by the 3DMM leading to a higher expressivity and closer resemblance to the physical reality.

analysis.tldr: 提出3DRealHead，一种少样本头部头像重建方法，通过新颖的表情控制信号和Style U-Net先验实现高保真重建与驱动。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D头部头像方法在忠实再现身份和面部表情方面存在困难，尤其是嘴部和牙齿等高度个性化区域，且依赖3DMM的表情控制限制了表现力。
analysis.problem: 如何从少量单目视频中重建高保真3D头部头像并实现富有表现力的表情驱动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出3DRealHead，包含一个基于Style U-Net的3D头部先验（在NeRSemble数据集上学习），通过少样本反演过程重建头像；表情控制结合3DMM信号和从驱动视频中提取的嘴部区域特征，增强表现力。
contributions: 提出一种少样本头部头像重建方法，仅需少量照片即可重建3D头像。
引入新颖的表情控制信号，融合3DMM和嘴部特征，提升表情表现力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖NeRSemble数据集，泛化到其他数据集或真实场景需验证。
少样本设置下对极端表情或遮挡的鲁棒性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出3DRealHead，一种少样本头部头像重建方法，通过新颖的表情控制信号和Style U-Net先验实现高保真重建与驱动。

papers.title: PatchPoison: Poisoning Multi-View Datasets to Degrade 3D Reconstruction
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has recently enabled highly photorealistic 3D reconstruction from casually captured multi-view images. However, this accessibility raises a privacy concern: publicly available images or videos can be exploited to reconstruct detailed 3D models of scenes or objects without the owner's consent. We present PatchPoison, a lightweight dataset-poisoning method that prevents unauthorized 3D reconstruction. Unlike global perturbations, PatchPoison injects a small high-frequency adversarial patch, a structured checkerboard, into the periphery of each image in a multi-view dataset. The patch is designed to corrupt the feature-matching stage of Structure-from-Motion (SfM) pipelines such as COLMAP by introducing spurious correspondences that systematically misalign estimated camera poses. Consequently, downstream 3DGS optimization diverges from the correct scene geometry. On the NeRF-Synthetic benchmark, inserting a 12 X 12 pixel patch increases reconstruction error by 6.8x in LPIPS, while the poisoned images remain unobtrusive to human viewers. PatchPoison requires no pipeline modifications, offering a practical, "drop-in" preprocessing step for content creators to protect their multi-view data.

analysis.tldr: PatchPoison通过在图像边缘注入微小对抗性贴片，破坏SfM特征匹配，阻止未经授权的3D重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 多视图图像公开后易被用于未经授权的3D重建，侵犯隐私，现有方法缺乏轻量级、实用的保护手段。
analysis.problem: 如何在不影响人类视觉感知的前提下，通过数据集投毒阻止基于SfM和3DGS的3D重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高频对抗性贴片可引入虚假特征匹配，导致SfM相机位姿估计系统性偏差，进而使3DGS优化偏离正确几何。
analysis.method: 在多视图数据集每张图像的边缘注入结构化棋盘格高频对抗性贴片，破坏SfM特征匹配阶段。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级、即插即用的数据集投毒方法PatchPoison，无需修改重建管线。
在NeRF-Synthetic基准上，12×12像素贴片使LPIPS重建误差提升6.8倍，且贴片对人类观察者不显眼。
analysis.experiments: 在NeRF-Synthetic基准上评估，插入12×12像素贴片后LPIPS误差提升6.8倍。
limitations: 仅针对基于SfM的管线，可能不适用于其他3D重建方法。
贴片大小和位置对效果的影响未充分探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PatchPoison通过在图像边缘注入微小对抗性贴片，破坏SfM特征匹配，阻止未经授权的3D重建。

papers.title: Exploration and Exploitation Errors Are Measurable for Language Model Agents
papers.abstract: Language Model (LM) agents are increasingly used in complex open-ended decision-making tasks, from AI coding to physical AI. A core requirement in these settings is the ability to both explore the problem space and exploit acquired knowledge effectively. However, systematically distinguishing and quantifying exploration and exploitation from observed actions without access to the agent's internal policy remains challenging. To address this, we design controllable environments inspired by practical embodied AI scenarios. Each environment consists of a partially observable 2D grid map and an unknown task Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG). The map generation can be programmatically adjusted to emphasize exploration or exploitation difficulty. To enable policy-agnostic evaluation, we design a metric to quantify exploration and exploitation errors from agent's actions. We evaluate a variety of frontier LM agents and find that even state-of-the-art models struggle on our task, with different models exhibiting distinct failure modes. We further observe that reasoning models solve the task more effectively and show both exploration and exploitation can be significantly improved through minimal harness engineering. We release our code \href{https://github.com/jjj-madison/measurable-explore-exploit}{here}.

analysis.tldr: 提出可量化语言模型智能体探索与利用错误的指标和可控环境，发现前沿模型在该任务上表现不佳，且推理模型更有效。
analysis.research_motivation: LM智能体在复杂决策任务中需平衡探索与利用，但缺乏系统方法从外部行为中区分和量化这两种错误，阻碍了模型评估和改进。
analysis.problem: 如何设计可控环境和策略无关的指标，以量化LM智能体在决策任务中的探索与利用错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计基于部分可观测2D网格地图和未知任务有向无环图（DAG）的可控环境，通过程序化调整地图生成来强调探索或利用难度；提出策略无关的指标，从智能体动作中量化探索和利用错误。
contributions: 设计了可控环境，可独立调节探索和利用难度，用于评估LM智能体。
提出了策略无关的指标，用于量化探索和利用错误。
实验发现前沿LM智能体在该任务上表现不佳，推理模型更有效，且通过最小化工程改进可显著提升探索和利用能力。
analysis.experiments: 评估了多种前沿LM智能体，发现即使最先进的模型也表现困难，不同模型有不同失败模式；推理模型更有效；通过最小化工程改进可显著提升探索和利用。
limitations: 环境基于2D网格和DAG，可能无法完全代表真实世界任务的复杂性。
指标可能依赖于特定环境设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可量化语言模型智能体探索与利用错误的指标和可控环境，发现前沿模型在该任务上表现不佳，且推理模型更有效。

papers.title: Lyra 2.0: Explorable Generative 3D Worlds
papers.abstract: Recent advances in video generation enable a new paradigm for 3D scene creation: generating camera-controlled videos that simulate scene walkthroughs, then lifting them to 3D via feed-forward reconstruction techniques. This generative reconstruction approach combines the visual fidelity and creative capacity of video models with 3D outputs ready for real-time rendering and simulation. Scaling to large, complex environments requires 3D-consistent video generation over long camera trajectories with large viewpoint changes and location revisits, a setting where current video models degrade quickly. Existing methods for long-horizon generation are fundamentally limited by two forms of degradation: spatial forgetting and temporal drifting. As exploration proceeds, previously observed regions fall outside the model's temporal context, forcing the model to hallucinate structures when revisited. Meanwhile, autoregressive generation accumulates small synthesis errors over time, gradually distorting scene appearance and geometry. We present Lyra 2.0, a framework for generating persistent, explorable 3D worlds at scale. To address spatial forgetting, we maintain per-frame 3D geometry and use it solely for information routing -- retrieving relevant past frames and establishing dense correspondences with the target viewpoints -- while relying on the generative prior for appearance synthesis. To address temporal drifting, we train with self-augmented histories that expose the model to its own degraded outputs, teaching it to correct drift rather than propagate it. Together, these enable substantially longer and 3D-consistent video trajectories, which we leverage to fine-tune feed-forward reconstruction models that reliably recover high-quality 3D scenes.

analysis.tldr: Lyra 2.0 通过信息路由和自增强历史训练，实现长轨迹、3D一致的视频生成，进而重建可探索的3D世界。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成模型在长相机轨迹、大视角变化和位置重访时，会出现空间遗忘和时间漂移，导致3D不一致，限制了大规模3D场景的生成。
analysis.problem: 如何生成长轨迹、3D一致的视频，以支持从视频重建大规模、可探索的3D世界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 长程生成中，空间遗忘导致重访区域结构幻觉，时间漂移使外观和几何逐渐失真。
analysis.method: 维护每帧3D几何用于信息路由（检索相关帧并建立稠密对应），同时使用自增强历史训练（暴露模型于自身退化输出）来纠正漂移。
contributions: 提出信息路由机制，利用3D几何检索历史帧并建立对应，缓解空间遗忘。
提出自增强历史训练策略，让模型学习纠正时间漂移。
实现长轨迹、3D一致的视频生成，并微调前馈重建模型以恢复高质量3D场景。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖前馈重建模型的质量，可能受限于其泛化能力。
信息路由的计算开销可能较大，影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Lyra 2.0 通过信息路由和自增强历史训练，实现长轨迹、3D一致的视频生成，进而重建可探索的3D世界。

papers.title: Dive into Claude Code: The Design Space of Today's and Future AI Agent Systems
papers.abstract: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that can run shell commands, edit files, and call external services on behalf of the user. This study describes its comprehensive architecture by analyzing the publicly available TypeScript source code and further comparing it with OpenClaw, an independent open-source AI agent system that answers many of the same design questions from a different deployment context. Our analysis identifies five human values, philosophies, and needs that motivate the architecture (human decision authority, safety and security, reliable execution, capability amplification, and contextual adaptability) and traces them through thirteen design principles to specific implementation choices. The core of the system is a simple while-loop that calls the model, runs tools, and repeats. Most of the code, however, lives in the systems around this loop: a permission system with seven modes and an ML-based classifier, a five-layer compaction pipeline for context management, four extensibility mechanisms (MCP, plugins, skills, and hooks), a subagent delegation mechanism with worktree isolation, and append-oriented session storage. A comparison with OpenClaw, a multi-channel personal assistant gateway, shows that the same recurring design questions produce different architectural answers when the deployment context changes: from per-action safety classification to perimeter-level access control, from a single CLI loop to an embedded runtime within a gateway control plane, and from context-window extensions to gateway-wide capability registration. We finally identify six open design directions for future agent systems, grounded in recent empirical, architectural, and policy literature.

analysis.tldr: 通过分析Claude Code和OpenClaw的架构，揭示AI Agent系统的设计空间与未来方向。
analysis.research_motivation: AI Agent系统（如Claude Code）正快速发展，但其架构设计缺乏系统性分析，不同部署场景下的设计权衡尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地描述和比较AI Agent系统的架构设计，并提炼出通用的设计原则和未来方向。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但指出不同部署上下文（如Claude Code的CLI循环 vs OpenClaw的网关控制平面）会导致相同设计问题产生不同架构答案。
analysis.method: 通过分析Claude Code的公开TypeScript源码，并与开源系统OpenClaw对比，识别出5个人类价值/需求、13条设计原则，并映射到具体实现选择。
contributions: 识别出驱动AI Agent架构的5个人类价值/需求（人类决策权、安全与保障、可靠执行、能力增强、上下文适应性）。
提出13条设计原则并追踪到具体实现，包括权限系统、上下文管理管道、扩展机制、子代理委派等。
通过对比Claude Code和OpenClaw，揭示部署上下文对架构选择的影响。
基于实证、架构和政策文献，指出6个未来Agent系统的开放设计方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 分析仅基于公开源码，可能未覆盖内部设计决策。
对比仅涉及两个系统，通用性有待更多案例验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过分析Claude Code和OpenClaw的架构，揭示AI Agent系统的设计空间与未来方向。

papers.title: SceneCritic: A Symbolic Evaluator for 3D Indoor Scene Synthesis
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs) increasingly generate indoor scenes through intermediate structures such as layouts and scene graphs, yet evaluation still relies on LLM or VLM judges that score rendered views, making judgments sensitive to viewpoint, prompt phrasing, and hallucination. When the evaluator is unstable, it becomes difficult to determine whether a model has produced a spatially plausible scene or whether the output score reflects the choice of viewpoint, rendering, or prompt. We introduce SceneCritic, a symbolic evaluator for floor-plan-level layouts. SceneCritic's constraints are grounded in SceneOnto, a structured spatial ontology we construct by aggregating indoor scene priors from 3D-FRONT, ScanNet, and Visual Genome. SceneOnto traverses this ontology to jointly verify semantic, orientation, and geometric coherence across object relationships, providing object-level and relationship-level assessments that identify specific violations and successful placements. Furthermore, we pair SceneCritic with an iterative refinement test bed that probes how models build and revise spatial structure under different critic modalities: a rule-based critic using collision constraints as feedback, an LLM critic operating on the layout as text, and a VLM critic operating on rendered observations. Through extensive experiments, we show that (a) SceneCritic aligns substantially better with human judgments than VLM-based evaluators, (b) text-only LLMs can outperform VLMs on semantic layout quality, and (c) image-based VLM refinement is the most effective critic modality for semantic and orientation correction.

analysis.tldr: 提出符号评估器SceneCritic，基于空间本体SceneOnto验证3D室内布局的语义、朝向和几何一致性，比VLM评估更稳定且更符合人类判断。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM/VLM评估器依赖渲染视图打分，易受视角、提示措辞和幻觉影响，导致评估不稳定，难以区分模型真实能力与评估偏差。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个稳定、可解释且与人类判断一致的3D室内场景布局评估器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM评估器对视角和提示敏感，纯文本LLM在语义布局质量上可超越VLM，基于图像的VLM精修在语义和朝向修正上最有效。
analysis.method: 构建空间本体SceneOnto（聚合3D-FRONT、ScanNet、Visual Genome的室内场景先验），并基于此设计符号评估器SceneCritic，联合验证语义、朝向和几何一致性，提供对象级和关系级评估。
contributions: 提出SceneCritic，一种基于空间本体的符号评估器，用于3D室内布局评估。
构建SceneOnto，一个结构化空间本体，聚合多数据集室内场景先验。
通过实验证明SceneCritic比VLM评估器更符合人类判断，并揭示不同评估模态的优劣。
analysis.experiments: 在3D室内场景合成任务上，对比SceneCritic与VLM评估器，验证其与人类判断的一致性；并分析不同critic模态（规则、LLM、VLM）在迭代精修中的效果。
limitations: SceneOnto的覆盖范围可能受限于所用数据集，泛化到新场景类型需扩展本体。
符号评估器可能无法捕捉视觉细节（如纹理、光照）的合理性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出符号评估器SceneCritic，基于空间本体SceneOnto验证3D室内布局的语义、朝向和几何一致性，比VLM评估更稳定且更符合人类判断。

papers.title: Generative Refinement Networks for Visual Synthesis
papers.abstract: While diffusion models dominate the field of visual generation, they are computationally inefficient, applying a uniform computational effort regardless of different complexity. In contrast, autoregressive (AR) models are inherently complexity-aware, as evidenced by their variable likelihoods, but are often hindered by lossy discrete tokenization and error accumulation. In this work, we introduce Generative Refinement Networks (GRN), a next-generation visual synthesis paradigm to address these issues. At its core, GRN addresses the discrete tokenization bottleneck through a theoretically near-lossless Hierarchical Binary Quantization (HBQ), achieving a reconstruction quality comparable to continuous counterparts. Built upon HBQ's latent space, GRN fundamentally upgrades AR generation with a global refinement mechanism that progressively perfects and corrects artworks -- like a human artist painting. Besides, GRN integrates an entropy-guided sampling strategy, enabling complexity-aware, adaptive-step generation without compromising visual quality. On the ImageNet benchmark, GRN establishes new records in image reconstruction (0.56 rFID) and class-conditional image generation (1.81 gFID). We also scale GRN to more challenging text-to-image and text-to-video generation, delivering superior performance on an equivalent scale. We release all models and code to foster further research on GRN.

analysis.tldr: 提出生成式精炼网络（GRN），通过近无损层次二值量化（HBQ）和全局精炼机制，实现高效、自适应的视觉生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型计算效率低，对所有样本施加统一计算量；自回归模型虽能感知复杂度，但受限于有损离散分词和误差累积。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种视觉生成范式，既能像自回归模型一样感知复杂度，又能避免离散分词的信息损失和误差累积，同时保持高效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出生成式精炼网络（GRN），核心包括：1）层次二值量化（HBQ）实现近无损离散化；2）基于HBQ潜空间的全局精炼机制，逐步修正生成结果；3）熵引导采样策略，实现复杂度感知的自适应步数生成。
contributions: 提出GRN范式，结合自回归模型的复杂度感知与扩散模型的精炼能力。
设计HBQ量化方法，实现近无损离散分词，重建质量媲美连续方法。
在ImageNet图像重建和类条件生成上创下新纪录，并扩展到文本到图像/视频生成。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet上，图像重建rFID为0.56，类条件生成gFID为1.81；并扩展到文本到图像和文本到视频生成，性能优于同等规模模型。
limitations: 可能对超大规模生成任务的计算开销仍需验证。
熵引导采样策略的鲁棒性未在摘要中充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出生成式精炼网络（GRN），通过近无损层次二值量化（HBQ）和全局精炼机制，实现高效、自适应的视觉生成。

papers.title: Visual Preference Optimization with Rubric Rewards
papers.abstract: The effectiveness of Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) depends on preference data that reflect the quality differences that matter in multimodal tasks. Existing pipelines often rely on off-policy perturbations or coarse outcome-based signals, which are not well suited to fine-grained visual reasoning. We propose rDPO, a preference optimization framework based on instance-specific rubrics. For each image-instruction pair, we create a checklist-style rubric of essential and additional criteria to score responses from any possible policies. The instruction-rubric pool is built offline and reused during the construction of on-policy data. On public reward modeling benchmarks, rubric-based prompting massively improves a 30B-A3B judge and brings it close to GPT-5.4. On public downstream benchmarks, rubric-based filtering raises the macro average to 82.69, whereas outcome-based filtering drops it to 75.82 from 81.14. When evaluating scalability on a comprehensive benchmark, rDPO achieves 61.01, markedly outperforming the style-constrained baseline (52.36) and surpassing the 59.48 base model. Together, these results show that visual preference optimization benefits from combining on-policy data construction with instance-specific criterion-level feedback.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于实例特定评分标准的视觉偏好优化框架rDPO，显著提升多模态任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有DPO方法依赖离策略扰动或粗粒度结果信号，难以捕捉细粒度视觉推理中的质量差异，导致偏好数据质量不足。
analysis.problem: 如何为多模态任务构建细粒度、实例特定的偏好反馈以优化视觉偏好学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于评分标准的提示大幅提升奖励模型性能；基于评分标准的过滤优于基于结果的过滤；结合在线数据构建与实例级标准反馈能显著提升下游任务表现。
analysis.method: 提出rDPO框架，为每个图像-指令对创建清单式评分标准（包含必要和附加标准），离线构建指令-评分标准池并在在线数据构建中复用，通过评分标准奖励进行偏好优化。
contributions: 提出基于实例特定评分标准的视觉偏好优化框架rDPO
在奖励建模和下游基准上验证了评分标准反馈的有效性，并展示了可扩展性优势
analysis.experiments: 在公开奖励建模基准上，基于评分标准的提示使30B-A3B评判模型接近GPT-5.4；在下游基准上，基于评分标准的过滤将宏平均提升至82.69（基于结果的过滤降至75.82）；在综合基准上，rDPO达到61.01，优于风格约束基线（52.36）和基础模型（59.48）。
limitations: 评分标准构建依赖人工或自动生成，可能引入偏差
框架在更广泛任务上的泛化性有待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于实例特定评分标准的视觉偏好优化框架rDPO，显著提升多模态任务性能。

papers.title: Conflated Inverse Modeling to Generate Diverse and Temperature-Change Inducing Urban Vegetation Patterns
papers.abstract: Urban areas are increasingly vulnerable to thermal extremes driven by rapid urbanization and climate change. Traditionally, thermal extremes have been monitored using Earth-observing satellites and numerical modeling frameworks. For example, land surface temperature derived from Landsat or Sentinel imagery is commonly used to characterize surface heating patterns. These approaches operate as forward models, translating radiative observations or modeled boundary conditions into estimates of surface thermal states. While forward models can predict land surface temperature from vegetation and urban form, the inverse problem of determining spatial vegetation configurations that achieve a desired regional temperature shift remains largely unexplored. This task is inherently underdetermined, as multiple spatial vegetation patterns can yield similar aggregated temperature responses. Conventional regression and deterministic neural networks fail to capture this ambiguity and often produce averaged solutions, particularly under data-scarce conditions. We propose a conflated inverse modeling framework that combines a predictive forward model with a diffusion-based generative inverse model to produce diverse, physically plausible image-based vegetation patterns conditioned on specific temperature goals. Our framework maintains control over thermal outcomes while enabling diverse spatial vegetation configurations, even when such combinations are absent from training data. Altogether, this work introduces a controllable inverse modeling approach for urban climate adaptation that accounts for the inherent diversity of the problem. Code is available at the GitHub repository.

analysis.tldr: 提出融合逆建模框架，用扩散模型生成多样且物理合理的城市植被布局以实现目标温度变化。
analysis.research_motivation: 城市热极端问题日益严重，传统前向模型只能从植被预测温度，但逆问题（设计植被布局实现目标温度）因多解性未被充分探索，现有回归和确定性神经网络无法处理这种模糊性。
analysis.problem: 如何从目标温度变化逆向生成多样且物理合理的城市植被空间布局。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 逆问题具有内在欠定性：多种植被模式可产生相似温度响应，传统方法在数据稀缺时倾向于平均解。
analysis.method: 融合逆建模框架：结合预测性前向模型（估计温度）与基于扩散的生成性逆模型（以目标温度为条件生成植被模式），实现可控且多样的生成。
contributions: 首次将逆建模引入城市植被布局设计，解决温度调控的多解性问题。
提出融合前向与扩散生成模型的框架，在保持温度控制的同时生成多样且物理合理的植被模式。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖前向模型的精度，误差会传播到生成结果。
生成模式在真实城市中的可实施性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出融合逆建模框架，用扩散模型生成多样且物理合理的城市植被布局以实现目标温度变化。

papers.title: Representation geometry shapes task performance in vision-language modeling for CT enterography
papers.abstract: Computed tomography (CT) enterography is a primary imaging modality for assessing inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), yet the representational choices that best support automated analysis of this modality are unknown. We present the first study of vision-language transfer learning on abdominal CT enterography and identify two main findings. First, mean pooling of slice embeddings gives better categorical disease assessment (59.2\% three-class accuracy), whereas attention pooling gives better cross-modal retrieval (0.235 text-to-image MRR). This pattern holds across all LoRA configurations tested and suggests that the two aggregators emphasize different properties of the learned representation. Second, per-slice tissue contrast matters more than broader spatial coverage: multi-window RGB encoding, which maps complementary Hounsfield Unit windows to RGB channels, outperforms all strategies that increase spatial coverage through multiplanar sampling, and in this setting adding coronal and sagittal views reduces classification performance. For report generation, fine-tuning without retrieval context yields within-1 severity accuracy at the prevalence-matched chance level (70.4\% vs.\ 71\% random), suggesting little learned ordering beyond the class distribution. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) improves this across all configurations, scoring 7--14 percentage points above the chance baseline and improving ordinal MAE from 0.98 to 0.80--0.89. A three-teacher pseudolabel framework enables all comparisons without expert annotations. Together, these findings provide the first baselines for this underexplored modality and offer practical guidance for building vision-language systems for volumetric medical imaging.

analysis.tldr: 首次研究腹部CT肠造影的视觉-语言迁移学习，发现池化策略和窗口编码对任务性能有显著影响。
analysis.research_motivation: CT肠造影是评估炎症性肠病的主要影像方式，但支持该模态自动分析的表征选择尚不清楚，缺乏相关基准。
analysis.problem: 探索CT肠造影中视觉-语言表征的几何结构如何影响下游任务性能，并建立首个基线。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 平均池化利于分类，注意力池化利于跨模态检索；多窗口RGB编码优于增加空间覆盖的策略；添加冠状面和矢状面会降低分类性能；报告生成中微调无检索上下文时仅达到随机水平。
analysis.method: 采用视觉-语言迁移学习，比较平均池化与注意力池化、多窗口RGB编码与多平面采样，并引入三教师伪标签框架进行无专家标注的比较。
contributions: 首次对腹部CT肠造影进行视觉-语言迁移学习研究，提供首个基线。
揭示池化策略和窗口编码对分类与检索性能的不同影响，为体素医学影像的视觉-语言系统提供实用指导。
analysis.experiments: 在CT肠造影数据集上评估分类、跨模态检索和报告生成任务，使用LoRA配置，报告了准确率、MRR和MAE等指标。
limitations: 仅针对CT肠造影单一模态，泛化性未知。
伪标签框架可能引入噪声，影响比较的准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次研究腹部CT肠造影的视觉-语言迁移学习，发现池化策略和窗口编码对任务性能有显著影响。

papers.title: See, Point, Refine: Multi-Turn Approach to GUI Grounding with Visual Feedback
papers.abstract: Computer Use Agents (CUAs) fundamentally rely on graphical user interface (GUI) grounding to translate language instructions into executable screen actions, but editing-level grounding in dense coding interfaces, where sub-pixel accuracy is required to interact with dense IDE elements, remains underexplored. Existing approaches typically rely on single-shot coordinate prediction, which lacks a mechanism for error correction and often fails in high-density interfaces. In this technical report, we conduct an empirical study of pixel-precise cursor localization in coding environments. Instead of a single-step execution, our agent engages in an iterative refinement process, utilizing visual feedback from previous attempts to reach the target element. This closed-loop grounding mechanism allows the agent to self-correct displacement errors and adapt to dynamic UI changes. We evaluate our approach across GPT-5.4, Claude, and Qwen on a suite of complex coding benchmarks, demonstrating that multi-turn refinement significantly outperforms state-of-the-art single-shot models in both click precision and overall task success rate. Our results suggest that iterative visual reasoning is a critical component for the next generation of reliable software engineering agents. Code: https://github.com/microsoft/precision-cua-bench.

analysis.tldr: 提出多轮视觉反馈的GUI定位方法，通过迭代修正提升密集编码界面中的点击精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有GUI定位方法多为单次坐标预测，缺乏纠错机制，在密集编码界面（如IDE）中难以达到亚像素级精度，限制了计算机使用代理的可靠性。
analysis.problem: 解决密集编码界面中像素级光标定位的编辑级接地问题，克服单次预测无法纠错的局限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单次预测在密集界面中常因位移误差和动态UI变化而失败，多轮迭代利用视觉反馈可自纠正错误。
analysis.method: 多轮迭代精炼框架：代理根据前一次尝试的视觉反馈（如光标位置截图）逐步调整坐标，形成闭环接地机制。
contributions: 首次系统研究密集编码界面中的像素级GUI接地问题
提出多轮视觉反馈迭代精炼方法，实现自纠错和动态适应
在多个模型和基准上验证多轮方法显著优于单次预测
analysis.experiments: 在GPT-5.4、Claude和Qwen上使用复杂编码基准评估，多轮精炼在点击精度和任务成功率上均显著超越现有单次模型。
limitations: 仅针对编码界面，通用性未验证
多轮迭代可能增加推理延迟
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多轮视觉反馈的GUI定位方法，通过迭代修正提升密集编码界面中的点击精度。

papers.title: PAL: Personal Adaptive Learner
papers.abstract: AI-driven education platforms have made some progress in personalisation, yet most remain constrained to static adaptation--predefined quizzes, uniform pacing, or generic feedback--limiting their ability to respond to learners' evolving understanding. This shortfall highlights the need for systems that are both context-aware and adaptive in real time. We introduce PAL (Personal Adaptive Learner), an AI-powered platform that transforms lecture videos into interactive learning experiences. PAL continuously analyzes multimodal lecture content and dynamically engages learners through questions of varying difficulty, adjusting to their responses as the lesson unfolds. At the end of a session, PAL generates a personalized summary that reinforces key concepts while tailoring examples to the learner's interests. By uniting multimodal content analysis with adaptive decision-making, PAL contributes a novel framework for responsive digital learning. Our work demonstrates how AI can move beyond static personalization toward real-time, individualized support, addressing a core challenge in AI-enabled education.

analysis.tldr: PAL是一个将讲座视频转化为交互式学习体验的AI平台，通过多模态内容分析和自适应决策实现实时个性化学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI教育平台大多局限于静态适应（如预定义测验、统一节奏），无法实时响应学习者不断变化的理解状态，缺乏上下文感知和实时自适应能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够实时分析多模态讲座内容、动态调整问题难度并生成个性化总结的AI教育系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PAL平台：持续分析多模态讲座内容，动态生成不同难度的问题并根据学习者回答调整；会话结束后生成个性化总结，强化关键概念并定制示例。
contributions: 提出PAL框架，将多模态内容分析与自适应决策结合，实现实时个性化学习支持。
展示了AI从静态个性化向实时、个体化支持的转变，解决了AI教育中的核心挑战。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏大规模用户实证评估。
多模态分析的实时性和准确性可能受限于计算资源。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PAL是一个将讲座视频转化为交互式学习体验的AI平台，通过多模态内容分析和自适应决策实现实时个性化学习。

papers.title: Rethinking On-Policy Distillation of Large Language Models: Phenomenology, Mechanism, and Recipe
papers.abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) has become a core technique in the post-training of large language models, yet its training dynamics remain poorly understood. This paper provides a systematic investigation of OPD dynamics and mechanisms. We first identify that two conditions govern whether OPD succeeds or fails: (i) the student and teacher should share compatible thinking patterns; and (ii) even with consistent thinking patterns and higher scores, the teacher must offer genuinely new capabilities beyond what the student has seen during training. We validate these findings through weak-to-strong reverse distillation, showing that same-family 1.5B and 7B teachers are distributionally indistinguishable from the student's perspective. Probing into the token-level mechanism, we show that successful OPD is characterized by progressive alignment on high-probability tokens at student-visited states, a small shared token set that concentrates most of the probability mass (97%-99%). We further propose two practical strategies to recover failing OPD: off-policy cold start and teacher-aligned prompt selection. Finally, we show that OPD's apparent free lunch of dense token-level reward comes at a cost, raising the question of whether OPD can scale to long-horizon distillation.

analysis.tldr: 系统研究大语言模型同策略蒸馏的动态机制，揭示成功条件与失败模式，并提出恢复策略。
analysis.research_motivation: 同策略蒸馏（OPD）已成为大语言模型后训练的核心技术，但其训练动态和内在机制尚不明确，缺乏系统性理解。
analysis.problem: 揭示OPD成功或失败的条件，并探索其token级机制，以指导实际应用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现两个关键条件：师生需共享兼容的思维模式；教师需提供学生未见过的真正新能力。弱到强反向蒸馏实验表明，同族模型在分布上对学生不可区分。成功OPD表现为高概率token的渐进对齐，共享token集集中了97%-99%的概率质量。
analysis.method: 通过弱到强反向蒸馏实验验证条件，利用token级探针分析机制，提出离策略冷启动和教师对齐提示选择两种恢复策略。
contributions: 识别出OPD成功/失败的两个关键条件，并通过实验验证。
揭示OPD的token级机制：高概率token渐进对齐和共享token集集中概率质量。
提出两种实用策略恢复失败的OPD：离策略冷启动和教师对齐提示选择。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有模型规模和架构。
恢复策略的通用性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统研究大语言模型同策略蒸馏的动态机制，揭示成功条件与失败模式，并提出恢复策略。

papers.title: Predicting Blastocyst Formation in IVF: Integrating DINOv2 and Attention-Based LSTM on Time-Lapse Embryo Images
papers.abstract: The selection of the optimal embryo for transfer is a critical yet challenging step in in vitro fertilization (IVF), primarily due to its reliance on the manual inspection of extensive time-lapse imaging data. A key obstacle in this process is predicting blastocyst formation from the limited number of daily images available. Many clinics also lack complete time-lapse systems, so full videos are often unavailable. In this study, we aimed to predict which embryos will develop into blastocysts using limited daily images from time-lapse recordings. We propose a novel hybrid model that combines DINOv2, a transformer-based vision model, with an enhanced long short-term memory (LSTM) network featuring a multi-head attention layer. DINOv2 extracts meaningful features from embryo images, and the LSTM model then uses these features to analyze embryo development over time and generate final predictions. We tested our model on a real dataset of 704 embryo videos. The model achieved 96.4% accuracy, surpassing existing methods. It also performs well with missing frames, making it valuable for many IVF laboratories with limited imaging systems. Our approach can assist embryologists in selecting better embryos more efficiently and with greater confidence.

analysis.tldr: 提出DINOv2+注意力LSTM混合模型，利用有限延时胚胎图像预测囊胚形成，准确率达96.4%。
analysis.research_motivation: IVF中胚胎选择依赖人工检查大量延时成像数据，耗时且主观；许多诊所缺乏完整延时系统，难以获取全视频，因此需要一种仅用有限日常图像即可准确预测囊胚形成的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从有限的每日延时胚胎图像中预测哪些胚胎能发育成囊胚。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 混合模型：DINOv2（基于Transformer的视觉模型）提取图像特征，增强型LSTM（含多头注意力层）分析时序特征并预测。
contributions: 首次将DINOv2与注意力LSTM结合用于胚胎囊胚形成预测。
在704个胚胎视频的真实数据集上达到96.4%准确率，优于现有方法。
模型对缺失帧鲁棒，适用于缺乏完整延时系统的IVF实验室。
analysis.experiments: 在704个胚胎视频的真实数据集上测试，准确率96.4%，并验证了缺失帧下的性能。
limitations: 数据集规模相对较小（704个视频），可能限制泛化性。
仅预测囊胚形成，未涉及胚胎质量的其他指标。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DINOv2+注意力LSTM混合模型，利用有限延时胚胎图像预测囊胚形成，准确率达96.4%。

papers.title: Bilevel Late Acceptance Hill Climbing for the Electric Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem
papers.abstract: This paper tackles the Electric Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (E-CVRP) through a bilevel optimization framework that handles routing and charging decisions separately or jointly depending on the search stage. By analyzing their interaction, we introduce a surrogate objective at the upper level to guide the search and accelerate convergence. A bilevel Late Acceptance Hill Climbing algorithm (b-LAHC) is introduced that operates through three phases: greedy descent, neighborhood exploration, and final solution refinement. b-LAHC operates with fixed parameters, eliminating the need for complex adaptation while remaining lightweight and effective. Extensive experiments on the IEEE WCCI-2020 benchmark show that b-LAHC achieves superior or competitive performance against eight state-of-the-art algorithms. Under a fixed evaluation budget, it attains near-optimal solutions on small-scale instances and sets 9/10 new best-known results on large-scale benchmarks, improving existing records by an average of 1.07%. Moreover, the strong correlation (though not universal) observed between the surrogate objective and the complete cost justifies the use of the surrogate objective while still necessitating a joint solution of both levels, thereby validating the effectiveness of the proposed bilevel framework and highlighting its potential for efficiently solving large-scale routing problems with a hierarchical structure.

analysis.tldr: 提出双层次晚接受爬山算法(b-LAHC)求解电动容量车辆路径问题，在基准测试上取得9/10新最优结果。
analysis.research_motivation: 电动车辆路径问题中路由与充电决策相互耦合，现有方法需复杂参数调整或难以平衡搜索效率与解质量。
analysis.problem: 如何高效联合优化电动容量车辆路径问题中的路由与充电决策，并加速收敛。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到代理目标与完整成本之间存在强相关性（虽非普遍），表明代理目标可引导搜索，但仍需联合求解两个层次。
analysis.method: 提出双层次晚接受爬山算法(b-LAHC)，包含贪婪下降、邻域探索和最终解精炼三个阶段，使用固定参数，通过上层代理目标引导搜索。
contributions: 提出双层次优化框架，根据搜索阶段分离或联合处理路由与充电决策。
引入代理目标加速收敛，并设计b-LAHC算法，无需复杂参数调整。
在WCCI-2020基准上取得9/10新最优结果，平均改进1.07%。
analysis.experiments: 在IEEE WCCI-2020基准上与8种最先进算法对比，小规模实例获得近最优解，大规模实例9/10新最优。
limitations: 代理目标与完整成本的相关性并非普遍，可能在某些实例上失效。
方法仅在电动容量车辆路径问题上验证，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization

papers.title: From Handwriting to Structured Data: Benchmarking AI Digitisation of Handwritten Forms
papers.abstract: Manual digitisation of structured handwritten documents is slow and costly. We benchmark 17 leading frontier multi-modal large language models and open-source models against a very challenging real-world medical form that mixes dates; structured, printed text; hand-written responses and significant variability challenges. None of the smaller or older models perform well but the latest Google and OpenAI models reach accuracies around $85\%$ with weighted F1 scores $\simeq 90\%$ across the discrete or predefined fields despite the very challenging nature of the responses. Clear task specific strengths emerge: GPT 5.4 excels in noisy date extraction as well as reliability with the lowest hallucination rate ($6\%$). Claude Sonnet 4.6 had the best average performance across formatted fields (dates and numerical values), while Gemini 3.1 delivered the best overall performance, with the lowest free text error rates (WER = $0.50$ and CER = $0.31$) and the strongest results across discrete classification metrics. We further show that prompt optimisation dramatically improves macro precision, recall and F1 by over $60\%$, but has little impact on weighted metrics (only $\sim2-5\%$ improvement). These results provide evidence that the rapid improvements of multimodal large language models offer a compelling pathway toward fully automated digitisation of complex handwritten workflows that is particularly relevant in low- and middle-income countries.

analysis.tldr: 基准测试17个前沿多模态大模型在复杂手写医疗表单数字化上的表现，发现最新模型准确率约85%，提示优化可大幅提升宏观指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 手动数字化结构化手写文档耗时且成本高，尤其在低收入和中等收入国家，亟需自动化方案。
analysis.problem: 评估多模态大模型在复杂手写表单（混合日期、印刷文本、手写回复）上的数字化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 小型或旧模型表现不佳；最新Google和OpenAI模型在离散字段上准确率约85%，加权F1约90%；GPT 5.4在噪声日期提取和低幻觉率（6%）上表现优异；Claude Sonnet 4.6在格式化字段上平均性能最佳；Gemini 3.1在自由文本错误率（WER=0.50, CER=0.31）和离散分类指标上最强；提示优化可大幅提升宏观指标（>60%），但对加权指标影响小（2-5%）。
analysis.method: 对17个前沿多模态大模型（包括GPT、Claude、Gemini等）在真实世界医疗表单上进行基准测试，并分析提示优化的影响。
contributions: 系统评估了17个多模态大模型在复杂手写表单数字化上的性能，揭示了不同模型的任务特定优势。
证明了提示优化可显著提升宏观指标，但对加权指标影响有限，为实际部署提供了指导。
analysis.experiments: 在真实医疗表单上测试，包含日期、结构化印刷文本、手写回复等挑战，报告了准确率、F1、WER、CER、幻觉率等指标。
limitations: 仅针对单一医疗表单领域，泛化性需进一步验证。
未涉及模型在更多样化手写风格和语言上的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基准测试17个前沿多模态大模型在复杂手写医疗表单数字化上的表现，发现最新模型准确率约85%，提示优化可大幅提升宏观指标。

papers.title: Lightning OPD: Efficient Post-Training for Large Reasoning Models with Offline On-Policy Distillation
papers.abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) is an effective post-training paradigm for large language models but requires a live teacher server throughout training, resulting in substantial infrastructure overhead. We investigate whether OPD can be performed offline by precomputing teacher log-probabilities once over SFT rollouts and reusing them during training. We find that naively doing so fails to reliably match standard OPD, and trace the root cause to a previously overlooked condition we term teacher consistency, requiring that the same teacher be used for both supervised fine-tuning and OPD. Violating this condition introduces a gradient bias that degrades performance for both offline and online OPD. Building on this insight, we propose Lightning OPD, an offline on-policy distillation framework that enforces teacher consistency and eliminates the need for a live teacher server entirely. We prove that, under teacher consistency, Lightning OPD shares the same optimum as standard OPD, with bounded gradient discrepancy and an implicit regularization effect that helps prevent policy drift. Experiments on math reasoning and code generation show that Lightning OPD achieves comparable performance to standard OPD while delivering 4.0x higher training efficiency. Starting from an SFT-initialized Qwen3-8B-Base model, Lightning OPD reaches 69.9% on AIME 2024 in just 30 GPU hours. Lightning OPD further scales to MoE architectures, training Qwen3-30B-A3B to 71.0% on AIME 2024 on a single 8xH100 node, substantially lowering the barrier for academic research on LLM post-training. Our code is released at https://github.com/jet-ai-projects/Lightning-OPD.

analysis.tldr: 提出Lightning OPD，通过教师一致性条件实现离线同策略蒸馏，消除实时教师服务器需求，在数学推理和代码生成上达到与标准OPD相当的性能，训练效率提升4倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 同策略蒸馏（OPD）对大型语言模型后训练有效，但需要实时教师服务器，基础设施开销大，限制了学术研究。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用实时教师服务器的情况下，实现与标准OPD性能相当的离线同策略蒸馏。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现朴素离线OPD失败的原因是违反了教师一致性条件，即监督微调和OPD必须使用同一教师，否则会产生梯度偏差导致性能下降。
analysis.method: 提出Lightning OPD框架，通过预计算教师对数概率并强制教师一致性，实现离线同策略蒸馏，理论证明在教师一致性下与标准OPD有相同最优解和有界梯度偏差。
contributions: 识别并形式化了教师一致性条件，解释了离线OPD失败的根本原因。
提出Lightning OPD，一种无需实时教师服务器的离线同策略蒸馏框架，理论保证性能。
实验证明在数学推理和代码生成上性能与标准OPD相当，训练效率提升4倍，并扩展到MoE架构。
analysis.experiments: 在数学推理（AIME 2024等）和代码生成任务上，使用Qwen3-8B-Base和Qwen3-30B-A3B模型，Lightning OPD达到与标准OPD相当的性能，训练效率提升4倍。
limitations: 可能依赖SFT rollout的质量，若SFT数据分布偏移可能影响效果。
仅验证了数学和代码领域，其他任务泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Lightning OPD，通过教师一致性条件实现离线同策略蒸馏，消除实时教师服务器需求，在数学推理和代码生成上达到与标准OPD相当的性能，训练效率提升4倍。

papers.title: One Token Away from Collapse: The Fragility of Instruction-Tuned Helpfulness
papers.abstract: Instruction-tuned large language models produce helpful, structured responses, but how robust is this helpfulness under trivial constraints? We show that simple lexical constraints (banning a single punctuation character or common word) cause instruction-tuned LLMs to collapse their responses, losing 14--48\% of comprehensiveness across seven models spanning five families (7B--70B, open- and closed-weight). A blinded human evaluation with 10 STEM-trained evaluators confirms genuine content loss, with information criteria degrading $1.5$--$2.3\times$ more than surface criteria, a finding corroborated by over 4,100 automated pairwise comparisons (77--100\% baseline preference) across three LLM judges from two model families. Diagnostic analysis identifies this as a \emph{planning failure}: two-pass generation recovers 59--96\% of response length, and linear probes on prompt representations predict response length with $R^2 = 0.51$--$0.94$ before generation begins. The same probes yield negative $R^2$ on base models, confirming that instruction tuning introduces the representational structure underlying the collapse. Base models show no systematic degradation under identical constraints, demonstrating that instruction tuning couples task competence to narrow surface-form templates. The effect extends to realistic deployment constraints (preamble suppression, corporate tone guidelines, legal compliance hedging, accessibility requirements) causing comparable degradation ($-$22\% to $-$34\%), with suppressing the conversational opener alone (``Certainly!'') causing 40\% collapse on our most fragile model despite restricting only the opening tokens. We further show that standard independent LLM-as-judge evaluation detects only a 3.5\% quality drop where pairwise evaluation reveals 23\%, exposing a methodological blind spot in current evaluation practice.

analysis.tldr: 指令微调的大语言模型在简单词汇约束下会崩溃，损失14-48%的全面性，根源是规划失败。
analysis.research_motivation: 指令微调使LLM产生有用、结构化的回复，但其鲁棒性在微小约束下是否可靠尚不清楚，这对实际部署中的安全性和可靠性至关重要。
analysis.problem: 研究指令微调LLM在简单词汇约束（如禁止单个标点或常见词）下回复全面性崩溃的现象及其原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 简单词汇约束导致指令微调模型回复全面性下降14-48%，盲人评估确认内容损失是表面损失的1.5-2.3倍；诊断发现这是规划失败：两阶段生成可恢复59-96%长度，线性探针在生成前即可预测回复长度（R²=0.51-0.94），而基础模型无此现象，表明指令微调引入了脆弱的结构。
analysis.method: 通过施加简单词汇约束（如禁止句号或单词'the'）测试指令微调LLM的回复全面性，使用盲人评估和自动化LLM裁判对比，并通过线性探针分析表征结构。
contributions: 揭示指令微调LLM在简单词汇约束下回复全面性显著下降的现象，跨7个模型验证。
诊断出根本原因是规划失败，而非表面词汇缺失，并通过探针实验证明指令微调引入了脆弱表征结构。
发现标准LLM裁判评估低估了退化程度，暴露了评估方法的盲点。
analysis.experiments: 在7个模型（7B-70B，开源和闭源）上进行实验，包括盲人评估（10名STEM评估者）和超过4100次自动化成对比较（3个LLM裁判），以及线性探针分析。
limitations: 约束类型仅限于词汇层面，未探索更复杂的语义约束。
探针分析仅针对回复长度，未深入内容质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 指令微调的大语言模型在简单词汇约束下会崩溃，损失14-48%的全面性，根源是规划失败。

papers.title: Agentic Discovery with Active Hypothesis Exploration for Visual Recognition
papers.abstract: We introduce HypoExplore, an agentic framework that formulates neural architecture discovery for visual recognition as a hypothesis-driven scientific inquiry.
