analysis.research_motivation: LLM智能体在通用推理任务上表现良好，但在复杂真实场景中难以可靠利用任务结构、关键约束和先验经验，现有方法主要依赖预训练知识或静态提示，缺乏从经验中学习的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM智能体从过去任务中提取可复用的知识资产，并将其迁移到新任务中，实现更结构化的分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于案例的学习框架，将过去任务的经验转化为可复用的知识资产（包括任务相关知识、分析提示和操作技能），智能体在新任务中检索并应用这些资产。
contributions: 提出一种基于案例的学习框架，使LLM智能体能够从真实案例中提取并复用知识。
在包含六个复杂任务类别的统一基准上验证了方法的有效性，尤其在高复杂度任务上优势明显。
analysis.experiments: 在包含六个复杂任务类别的统一基准上，与Zero-Shot、Few-Shot、Checklist Prompt和Rule Memory基线对比，方法在所有任务上表现一致强劲，在每项任务上匹配或超越最佳基线，复杂任务上增益更明显。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量案例库的构建。
跨任务迁移的泛化边界未充分探讨。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于案例的学习框架，让LLM智能体从真实案例中提取可复用知识，提升复杂任务表现。

papers.title: Information-Theoretic Optimization for Task-Adapted Compressed Sensing Magnetic Resonance Imaging
papers.abstract: Task-adapted compressed sensing magnetic resonance imaging (CS-MRI) is emerging to address the specific demands of downstream clinical tasks with significantly fewer k-space measurements than required by Nyquist sampling. However, existing task-adapted CS-MRI methods suffer from the uncertainty problem for medical diagnosis and cannot achieve adaptive sampling in end-to-end optimization with reconstruction or clinical tasks. To address these limitations, we propose the first task-adapted CS-MRI from the information-theoretic perspective to simultaneously achieve probabilistic inference for uncertainty prediction and adapt to arbitrary sampling ratios and versatile clinical applications. Specifically, we formalize the task-adapted CS-MRI optimization problem by maximizing the mutual information between undersampled k-space measurements and clinical tasks to enable probabilistic inference for addressing the uncertainty problem. We leverage amortized optimization and construct tractable variational bounds for mutual information to jointly optimize sampling, reconstruction, and task-inference models, which enables flexible sampling ratio control using a single end-to-end trained model. Furthermore, the proposed framework addresses two kinds of distinct clinical scenarios within a unified approach, i.e., i) joint task and reconstruction, where reconstruction serves as an auxiliary process to enhance task performance; and ii) task implementation with suppressed reconstruction, applicable for privacy protection. Extensive experiments on large-scale MRI datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves highly competitive performance on standard metrics like Dice compared to deterministic counterpart but provides better distribution matching to the ground-truth posterior distribution as measured by the generalized energy distance (GED).

analysis.tldr: 提出首个信息论视角的任务自适应压缩感知MRI框架，通过最大化互信息实现不确定性预测与自适应采样。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有任务自适应CS-MRI方法存在医学诊断的不确定性问题，且无法在端到端优化中实现自适应采样，限制了临床应用的可靠性和灵活性。
analysis.problem: 如何同时实现不确定性预测、自适应采样比率和统一多种临床场景的任务自适应CS-MRI优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过最大化欠采样k空间测量与临床任务之间的互信息，利用摊销优化构建互信息的可处理变分界，联合优化采样、重建和任务推理模型，实现单一端到端模型下的灵活采样比率控制。
contributions: 首次从信息论角度提出任务自适应CS-MRI框架，实现概率推理以解决不确定性问题。
提出统一框架处理两种临床场景：联合任务与重建、抑制重建的任务实现（隐私保护）。
analysis.experiments: 在大规模MRI数据集上，所提框架在Dice等标准指标上与确定性方法性能相当，但在广义能量距离（GED）上更好地匹配真实后验分布。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模高质量标注数据。
变分界近似可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个信息论视角的任务自适应压缩感知MRI框架，通过最大化互信息实现不确定性预测与自适应采样。

papers.title: MISID: A Multimodal Multi-turn Dataset for Complex Intent Recognition in Strategic Deception Games
papers.abstract: Understanding human intent in complex multi-turn interactions remains a fundamental challenge in human-computer interaction and behavioral analysis. While existing intent recognition datasets focus mainly on single utterances or simple dialogues, real-world scenarios often involve sophisticated strategic interactions where participants must maintain complex deceptive narratives over extended periods. To address this gap, we introduce MISID, a comprehensive multimodal, multi-turn, and multi-participant benchmark for intent recognition. Sourced from high-stakes social strategy games, MISID features a fine-grained, two-tier multi-dimensional annotation scheme tailored for long-context discourse analysis and evidence-based causal tracking. Our systematic evaluation of state-of-the-art Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) on MISID reveals critical deficiencies in complex scenarios, including text-prior visual hallucination, impaired cross-modal synergy, and limited capacity in chaining causal cues. Consequently, we propose FRACTAM as a baseline framework. Using a ``Decouple-Anchor-Reason'' paradigm, FRACTAM reduces text bias by extracting pure unimodal factual representations, employs two-stage retrieval for long-range factual anchoring, and constructs explicit cross-modal evidence chains. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FRACTAM enhances mainstream models' performance in complex strategic tasks, improving hidden intent detection and inference while maintaining robust perceptual accuracy. Our dataset is available at https://naislab.cn/datasets/MISID.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态多轮欺骗游戏意图识别数据集MISID及基线框架FRACTAM，揭示MLLM在复杂策略交互中的缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有意图识别数据集多聚焦于单轮或简单对话，无法应对真实世界中需要长期维持复杂欺骗叙事的策略交互场景。
analysis.problem: 缺乏面向复杂多轮策略交互的多模态意图识别基准，且现有MLLM在此类场景下存在文本先验视觉幻觉、跨模态协同不足、因果线索链能力有限等问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MLLM在复杂策略场景中表现出文本先验视觉幻觉、跨模态协同受损、因果线索链能力受限等关键缺陷。
analysis.method: 提出FRACTAM框架，采用“解耦-锚定-推理”范式：提取纯单模态事实表示以减少文本偏差，两阶段检索实现长程事实锚定，构建显式跨模态证据链。
contributions: 构建了MISID，首个面向复杂策略欺骗游戏的多模态多轮多参与者意图识别基准，具有细粒度二维多层次标注方案。
系统评估了多种SOTA MLLM在MISID上的表现，揭示了其在复杂场景中的关键缺陷。
提出FRACTAM基线框架，通过解耦-锚定-推理范式有效提升主流模型在复杂策略任务中的隐藏意图检测与推理能力。
analysis.experiments: 在MISID数据集上对多种主流MLLM进行系统评估，并验证FRACTAM框架能提升隐藏意图检测与推理性能，同时保持稳健的感知准确性。
limitations: 数据集来源于特定社交策略游戏，可能无法完全覆盖真实世界所有欺骗场景。
FRACTAM框架的额外模块可能增加计算开销，摘要未提及效率对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态多轮欺骗游戏意图识别数据集MISID及基线框架FRACTAM，揭示MLLM在复杂策略交互中的缺陷。

papers.title: Risk-Calibrated Learning: Minimizing Fatal Errors in Medical AI
papers.abstract: Deep learning models often achieve expert-level accuracy in medical image classification but suffer from a critical flaw: semantic incoherence. These high-confidence mistakes that are semantically incoherent (e.g., classifying a malignant tumor as benign) fundamentally differ from acceptable errors which stem from visual ambiguity. Unlike safe, fine-grained disagreements, these fatal failures erode clinical trust. To address this, we propose Risk-Calibrated Learning, a technique that explicitly distinguishes between visual ambiguity (fine-grained errors) and catastrophic structural errors. By embedding a confusion-aware clinical severity matrix M into the optimization landscape, our method suppresses critical errors (false negatives) without requiring complex architectural changes. We validate our approach in four different imaging modalities: Brain Tumor MRI, ISIC 2018 (Dermoscopy), BreaKHis (Breast Histopathology), and SICAPv2 (Prostate Histopathology). Extensive experiments demonstrate that our Risk-Calibrated Loss consistently reduces the Critical Error Rate (CER) for all four datasets, achieving relative safety improvements ranging from 20.0% (on breast histopathology) to 92.4% (on prostate histopathology) compared to state-of-the-art baselines such as Focal Loss. These results confirm that our method offers a superior safety-accuracy trade-off across both CNN and Transformer architectures.

analysis.tldr: 提出风险校准学习，通过嵌入临床严重性矩阵来区分视觉模糊与结构错误，显著降低医学AI中的致命错误率。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分类中，深度学习模型虽达到专家级准确率，但存在语义不一致的高置信度错误（如将恶性肿瘤误判为良性），这类致命错误不同于视觉模糊导致的合理误差，会严重损害临床信任。现有方法未明确区分这两种错误类型。
analysis.problem: 如何显式区分视觉模糊导致的细粒度错误与灾难性的结构错误，并优先抑制致命错误（尤其是假阴性），以提升医学AI的安全性和临床可信度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，高置信度但语义不一致的错误（如恶性误判为良性）是致命错误，而视觉模糊导致的错误是可接受的；现有损失函数（如Focal Loss）未针对这种差异进行优化。
analysis.method: 提出Risk-Calibrated Learning，通过将混淆感知的临床严重性矩阵M嵌入优化目标，在不改变模型架构的前提下，在损失函数中惩罚致命错误（如假阴性），实现安全性与准确性的更好权衡。
contributions: 首次提出区分视觉模糊错误与灾难性结构错误的医学AI安全框架。
设计Risk-Calibrated Loss，通过临床严重性矩阵显式抑制致命错误，无需架构修改。
在四种不同模态的医学图像数据集上验证，相比Focal Loss等基线，致命错误率降低20.0%至92.4%。
analysis.experiments: 在Brain Tumor MRI、ISIC 2018（皮肤镜）、BreaKHis（乳腺组织病理）和SICAPv2（前列腺组织病理）四个数据集上，使用CNN和Transformer架构进行实验，与Focal Loss等SOTA基线对比，Critical Error Rate (CER)相对降低20.0%至92.4%。
limitations: 严重性矩阵M需要领域专家手动定义，可能引入主观偏差。
仅在图像分类任务上验证，未涉及分割或检测等更复杂任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出风险校准学习，通过嵌入临床严重性矩阵来区分视觉模糊与结构错误，显著降低医学AI中的致命错误率。

papers.title: BID-LoRA: A Parameter-Efficient Framework for Continual Learning and Unlearning
papers.abstract: Recent advances in deep learning underscore the need for systems that can not only acquire new knowledge through Continual Learning (CL) but also remove outdated, sensitive, or private information through Machine Unlearning (MU). However, while CL methods are well-developed, MU techniques remain in early stages, creating a critical gap for unified frameworks that depend on both capabilities. We find that naively combining existing CL and MU approaches results in knowledge leakage a gradual degradation of foundational knowledge across repeated adaptation cycles. To address this, we formalize Continual Learning Unlearning (CLU) as a unified paradigm with three key goals: (i) precise deletion of unwanted knowledge, (ii) efficient integration of new knowledge while preserving prior information, and (iii) minimizing knowledge leakage across cycles. We propose Bi-Directional Low-Rank Adaptation (BID-LoRA), a novel framework featuring three dedicated adapter pathways-retain, new, and unlearn applied to attention layers, combined with escape unlearning that pushes forget-class embeddings to positions maximally distant from retained knowledge, updating only 5% of parameters. Experiments on CIFAR-100 show that BID-LoRA outperforms CLU baselines across multiple adaptation cycles. We further evaluate on CASIA-Face100, a curated face recognition subset, demonstrating practical applicability to real-world identity management systems where new users must be enrolled and withdrawn users removed.

analysis.tldr: 提出BID-LoRA框架，通过三条低秩适配器路径实现持续学习与机器遗忘的统一，仅更新5%参数。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有持续学习方法成熟但机器遗忘技术尚处早期，缺乏统一框架；简单组合两者会导致知识泄漏，即基础知识在反复适应中逐渐退化。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一的参数高效框架，同时实现精确删除旧知识、高效整合新知识并最小化跨周期知识泄漏。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，简单组合现有CL和MU方法会导致知识泄漏（knowledge leakage），即基础知识的逐渐退化。
analysis.method: 提出BID-LoRA，包含三条专用适配器路径（保留、新知识、遗忘）应用于注意力层，结合逃逸遗忘（escape unlearning）将遗忘类嵌入推向远离保留知识的位置，仅更新5%参数。
contributions: 形式化持续学习与遗忘（CLU）统一范式，明确三个关键目标。
提出BID-LoRA框架，通过三条适配器路径和逃逸遗忘实现参数高效的CLU。
在CIFAR-100和CASIA-Face100上验证有效性，展示实际身份管理应用潜力。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-100上，BID-LoRA在多个适应周期中优于CLU基线；在CASIA-Face100（人脸识别子集）上验证了实际身份管理场景的适用性。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅在图像分类和面部识别数据集上验证，未涉及其他模态或更复杂任务。
仅更新5%参数，可能在大规模或长序列任务中遗忘能力受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BID-LoRA框架，通过三条低秩适配器路径实现持续学习与机器遗忘的统一，仅更新5%参数。

papers.title: Brain-DiT: A Universal Multi-state fMRI Foundation Model with Metadata-Conditioned Pretraining
papers.abstract: Current fMRI foundation models primarily rely on a limited range of brain states and mismatched pretraining tasks, restricting their ability to learn generalized representations across diverse brain states. We present \textit{Brain-DiT}, a universal multi-state fMRI foundation model pretrained on 349,898 sessions from 24 datasets spanning resting, task, naturalistic, disease, and sleep states. Unlike prior fMRI foundation models that rely on masked reconstruction in the raw-signal space or a latent space, \textit{Brain-DiT} adopts metadata-conditioned diffusion pretraining with a Diffusion Transformer (DiT), enabling the model to learn multi-scale representations that capture both fine-grained functional structure and global semantics. Across extensive evaluations and ablations on 7 downstream tasks, we find consistent evidence that diffusion-based generative pretraining is a stronger proxy than reconstruction or alignment, with metadata-conditioned pretraining further improving downstream performance by disentangling intrinsic neural dynamics from population-level variability. We also observe that downstream tasks exhibit distinct preferences for representational scale: ADNI classification benefits more from global semantic representations, whereas age/sex prediction comparatively relies more on fine-grained local structure. Code and parameters of Brain-DiT are available at \href{https://github.com/REDMAO4869/Brain-DiT}{Link}.

analysis.tldr: Brain-DiT 提出元数据条件扩散预训练，构建多状态 fMRI 基础模型，在7个下游任务上优于重建/对齐方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 fMRI 基础模型局限于少数脑状态且预训练任务不匹配，难以学习跨多样脑状态的通用表征。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大规模多状态 fMRI 数据预训练一个能捕获多尺度表征的通用基础模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散生成预训练比重建或对齐更优；元数据条件预训练通过解耦内在神经动态与群体变异进一步提升性能；下游任务对表征尺度有不同偏好。
analysis.method: 采用元数据条件扩散预训练，使用 Diffusion Transformer (DiT) 在 349,898 个扫描会话上预训练，覆盖静息态、任务态、自然刺激、疾病和睡眠状态。
contributions: 构建了包含24个数据集、349,898个会话的多状态 fMRI 预训练数据集。
提出元数据条件扩散预训练方法，学习多尺度表征。
在7个下游任务上验证了扩散预训练优于重建和对齐，并揭示了任务对表征尺度的偏好。
analysis.experiments: 在7个下游任务（包括 ADNI 分类、年龄/性别预测等）上进行评估和消融实验，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能未探索其他生成模型（如流匹配）的对比。
元数据条件的设计可能对缺失元数据的场景不鲁棒。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Brain-DiT 提出元数据条件扩散预训练，构建多状态 fMRI 基础模型，在7个下游任务上优于重建/对齐方法。

papers.title: A hierarchical spatial-aware algorithm with efficient reinforcement learning for human-robot task planning and allocation in production
papers.abstract: In advanced manufacturing systems, humans and robots collaborate to conduct the production process. Effective task planning and allocation (TPA) is crucial for achieving high production efficiency, yet it remains challenging in complex and dynamic manufacturing environments. The dynamic nature of humans and robots, particularly the need to consider spatial information (e.g., humans' real-time position and the distance they need to move to complete a task), substantially complicates TPA. To address the above challenges, we decompose production tasks into manageable subtasks. We then implement a real-time hierarchical human-robot TPA algorithm, including a high-level agent for task planning and a low-level agent for task allocation. For the high-level agent, we propose an efficient buffer-based deep Q-learning method (EBQ), which reduces training time and enhances performance in production problems with long-term and sparse reward challenges. For the low-level agent, a path planning-based spatially aware method (SAP) is designed to allocate tasks to the appropriate human-robot resources, thereby achieving the corresponding sequential subtasks. We conducted experiments on a complex real-time production process in a 3D simulator. The results demonstrate that our proposed EBQ&SAP method effectively addresses human-robot TPA problems in complex and dynamic production processes.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层空间感知算法EBQ&SAP，结合强化学习与路径规划，解决人机协作生产中的任务规划与分配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 复杂动态制造环境中，人机协作任务规划与分配（TPA）面临空间信息动态变化（如人员实时位置、移动距离）的挑战，现有方法难以兼顾长期稀疏奖励与实时分配效率。
analysis.problem: 如何在复杂动态生产环境中，实现高效的人机任务规划与分配，同时考虑空间信息约束和长期稀疏奖励问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出分层算法：高层采用基于经验回放的深度Q学习（EBQ）进行任务规划，低层采用路径规划的空间感知方法（SAP）进行任务分配。
contributions: 提出EBQ方法，通过缓冲区机制减少训练时间并提升长期稀疏奖励场景下的性能。
提出SAP方法，利用路径规划实现空间感知的任务分配。
在3D仿真器上验证了算法在复杂动态生产过程中的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在复杂实时生产过程的3D仿真器上进行实验，结果表明EBQ&SAP方法有效解决了人机TPA问题。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 实验仅在仿真环境中进行，未在真实生产线上验证。
未讨论算法在极端动态或大规模场景下的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层空间感知算法EBQ&SAP，结合强化学习与路径规划，解决人机协作生产中的任务规划与分配问题。

papers.title: OFA-Diffusion Compression: Compressing Diffusion Model in One-Shot Manner
papers.abstract: The Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DPM) achieves remarkable performance in image generation, while its increasing parameter size and computational overhead hinder its deployment in practical applications. To improve this, the existing literature focuses on obtaining a smaller model with a fixed architecture through model compression. However, in practice, DPMs usually need to be deployed on various devices with different resource constraints, which leads to multiple compression processes, incurring significant overhead for repeated training. To obviate this, we propose a once-for-all (OFA) compression framework for DPMs that yields different subnetworks with various computations in a one-shot training manner. The existing OFA framework typically involves massive subnetworks with different parameter sizes, while such a huge candidate space slows the optimization. Thus, we propose to restrict the candidate subnetworks with a certain set of parameter sizes, where each size corresponds to a specific subnetwork. Specifically, to construct each subnetwork with a given size, we gradually allocate the maintained channels by their importance. Furthermore, we propose a reweighting strategy to balance the optimization process of different subnetworks. Experimental results show that our approach can produce compressed DPMs for various sizes with significantly lower training overhead while achieving satisfactory performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种一次训练即可生成多种尺寸子网络的扩散模型压缩框架，显著降低重复训练开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型参数和计算开销大，实际部署中需针对不同资源约束的设备多次压缩，重复训练成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何通过一次训练获得多种计算量的子网络，避免为不同设备重复压缩扩散模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有一次训练框架包含大量不同参数大小的子网络，候选空间过大导致优化缓慢。
analysis.method: 限制候选子网络为特定参数大小集合，按重要性逐步分配保留通道以构建指定大小的子网络，并采用重加权策略平衡不同子网络的优化。
contributions: 提出一种一次训练即可生成多种尺寸子网络的扩散模型压缩框架。
设计基于通道重要性的子网络构建方法和重加权优化策略。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的扩散模型架构。
子网络性能与全尺寸模型相比可能有差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种一次训练即可生成多种尺寸子网络的扩散模型压缩框架，显著降低重复训练开销。

papers.title: Safe reinforcement learning with online filtering for fatigue-predictive human-robot task planning and allocation in production
papers.abstract: Human-robot collaborative manufacturing, a core aspect of Industry 5.0, emphasizes ergonomics to enhance worker well-being. This paper addresses the dynamic human-robot task planning and allocation (HRTPA) problem, which involves determining when to perform tasks and who should execute them to maximize efficiency while ensuring workers' physical fatigue remains within safe limits. The inclusion of fatigue constraints, combined with production dynamics, significantly increases the complexity of the HRTPA problem. Traditional fatigue-recovery models in HRTPA often rely on static, predefined hyperparameters. However, in practice, human fatigue sensitivity varies daily due to factors such as changed work conditions and insufficient sleep. To better capture this uncertainty, we treat fatigue-related parameters as inaccurate and estimate them online based on observed fatigue progression during production. To address these challenges, we propose PF-CD3Q, a safe reinforcement learning (safe RL) approach that integrates the particle filter with constrained dueling double deep Q-learning for real-time fatigue-predictive HRTPA. Specifically, we first develop PF-based estimators to track human fatigue and update fatigue model parameters in real-time. These estimators are then integrated into CD3Q by making task-level fatigue predictions during decision-making and excluding tasks that exceed fatigue limits, thereby constraining the action space and formulating the problem as a constrained Markov decision process (CMDP).

analysis.tldr: 提出一种安全强化学习方法，通过在线滤波实时估计工人疲劳参数，实现人机协作任务规划与分配中的疲劳约束。
analysis.research_motivation: 人机协作制造中，工人疲劳动态变化且难以精确建模，传统静态疲劳模型无法适应日常波动，导致效率与安全难以平衡。
analysis.problem: 如何在考虑工人疲劳实时变化和不确定性的情况下，动态规划人机任务分配，既保证效率又确保疲劳不超限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 工人疲劳敏感性每日变化（如工作条件、睡眠不足），传统静态参数模型无法准确捕捉这种不确定性。
analysis.method: 提出PF-CD3Q方法，结合粒子滤波（PF）在线估计疲劳参数，并集成到约束双深度Q网络（CD3Q）中，通过任务级疲劳预测排除超限动作，将问题建模为约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP）。
contributions: 提出基于粒子滤波的在线疲劳参数估计方法，实时跟踪工人疲劳状态。
将疲劳预测与约束强化学习结合，实现安全的人机任务规划与分配。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖疲劳模型的准确性，在线估计存在误差累积风险。
方法在复杂生产场景下的可扩展性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种安全强化学习方法，通过在线滤波实时估计工人疲劳参数，实现人机协作任务规划与分配中的疲劳约束。

papers.title: Hypergraph-State Collaborative Reasoning for Multi-Object Tracking
papers.abstract: Motion reasoning serves as the cornerstone of multi-object tracking (MOT), as it enables consistent association of targets across frames. However, existing motion estimation approaches face two major limitations: (1) instability caused by noisy or probabilistic predictions, and (2) vulnerability under occlusion, where trajectories often fragment once visual cues disappear. To overcome these issues, we propose a collaborative reasoning framework that enhances motion estimation through joint inference among multiple correlated objects. By allowing objects with similar motion states to mutually constrain and refine each other, our framework stabilizes noisy trajectories and infers plausible motion continuity even when target is occluded. To realize this concept, we design HyperSSM, an architecture that integrates Hypergraph computation and a State Space Model (SSM) for unified spatial-temporal reasoning. The Hypergraph module captures spatial motion correlations through dynamic hyperedges, while the SSM enforces temporal smoothness via structured state transitions. This synergistic design enables simultaneous optimization of spatial consensus and temporal coherence, resulting in robust and stable motion estimation. Extensive experiments on four mainstream and diverse benchmarks(MOT17, MOT20, DanceTrack, and SportsMOT) covering various motion patterns and scene complexities, demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance across a wide range of tracking scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出HyperSSM框架，通过超图与状态空间模型协同推理，提升多目标跟踪中运动估计的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 多目标跟踪中运动估计易受噪声和遮挡影响，导致轨迹不稳定或断裂，现有方法难以同时处理空间相关性和时间平滑性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多个相关目标的运动状态进行联合推理，以稳定噪声轨迹并推断遮挡下的运动连续性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有运动估计方法存在两个主要局限：噪声或概率预测导致的不稳定性，以及遮挡下轨迹易断裂。
analysis.method: 提出HyperSSM架构，集成超图计算和状态空间模型：超图模块通过动态超边捕获空间运动相关性，SSM通过结构化状态转换强制时间平滑性，实现空间一致性与时间连贯性的联合优化。
contributions: 提出协同推理框架，利用多个相关目标的运动状态相互约束和细化，增强运动估计的鲁棒性。
设计HyperSSM架构，融合超图与状态空间模型，统一时空推理。
在四个主流基准上取得SOTA性能，覆盖多种运动模式和场景复杂度。
analysis.experiments: 在MOT17、MOT20、DanceTrack和SportsMOT四个基准上评估，涵盖不同运动模式和场景复杂度，达到SOTA。
limitations: 摘要未提及计算复杂度或实时性分析。
可能对极端遮挡或快速运动场景的泛化能力需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HyperSSM框架，通过超图与状态空间模型协同推理，提升多目标跟踪中运动估计的鲁棒性。

papers.title: TRACE: A Conversational Framework for Sustainable Tourism Recommendation with Agentic Counterfactual Explanations
papers.abstract: Traditional conversational travel recommender systems primarily optimize for user relevance and convenience, often reinforcing popular, overcrowded destinations and carbon-intensive travel choices. To address this, we present TRACE (Tourism Recommendation with Agentic Counterfactual Explanations), a multi-agent, LLM-based framework that promotes sustainable tourism through interactive nudging. TRACE uses a modular orchestrator-worker architecture where specialized agents elicit latent sustainability preferences, construct structured user personas, and generate recommendations that balance relevance with environmental impact. A key innovation lies in its use of agentic counterfactual explanations and LLM-driven clarifying questions, which together surface greener alternatives and refine understanding of intent, fostering user reflection without coercion. User studies and semantic alignment analyses demonstrate that TRACE effectively supports sustainable decision-making while preserving recommendation quality and interactive responsiveness. TRACE is implemented on Google's Agent Development Kit, with full code, Docker setup, prompts, and a publicly available demo video to ensure reproducibility. A project summary, including all resources, prompts, and demo access, is available at https://ashmibanerjee.github.io/trace-chatbot.

analysis.tldr: TRACE 是一个基于多智能体 LLM 的对话框架，通过反事实解释和澄清问题促进可持续旅游推荐。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统对话式旅游推荐系统主要优化用户相关性和便利性，往往强化热门拥挤目的地和高碳出行选择，缺乏对可持续性的考虑。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持推荐质量和交互响应性的同时，通过对话式推荐系统有效促进用户的可持续旅游决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 TRACE 框架，采用模块化的编排器-工作者架构，包含多个专门智能体：一个智能体挖掘潜在可持续偏好，一个构建结构化用户画像，一个生成平衡相关性与环境影响的推荐；核心创新是使用智能体反事实解释和 LLM 驱动的澄清问题，揭示更绿色的替代方案并细化意图理解。
contributions: 提出 TRACE，一个多智能体 LLM 框架，通过交互式助推促进可持续旅游推荐。
引入智能体反事实解释和 LLM 驱动的澄清问题，以揭示绿色替代方案并促进用户反思。
analysis.experiments: 用户研究和语义对齐分析表明 TRACE 有效支持可持续决策，同时保持推荐质量和交互响应性。
limitations: 可能依赖 LLM 的推理能力，在复杂场景下解释质量可能不稳定。
用户研究规模有限，未提及跨文化或大规模部署验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TRACE 是一个基于多智能体 LLM 的对话框架，通过反事实解释和澄清问题促进可持续旅游推荐。

papers.title: Validity-Calibrated Reasoning Distillation
papers.abstract: Reasoning distillation aims to transfer multi-step reasoning capabilities from large language models to smaller, more efficient ones. While recent methods have shown promising gains, they typically rely on static teacher-student hierarchies and frame distillation as trajectory imitation. This is misaligned with the structure of reasoning, where intermediate steps are often locally under-specified: global correctness constrains the final answer, but does not uniquely determine each intermediate move. We propose validity-calibrated reasoning distillation, a framework that treats reasoning distillation as a problem of local learning-signal allocation rather than path alignment. Instead of enforcing token-level imitation, we compare the student's and teacher's proposed next-step actions under the same prefix and use their relative local validity to modulate the strength of the distillation update. This yields a dynamic, context-dependent supervision mechanism that preserves the teacher's structural guidance while adapting update strength to local reasoning quality. Across mathematical reasoning, code generation, and instruction-following benchmarks, our method consistently outperforms strong distillation baselines. These results indicate that effective LLM reasoning distillation is governed not by rigid trajectory imitation, but by principled, locally calibrated allocation of learning signal.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于局部有效性校准的推理蒸馏方法，通过动态调整蒸馏强度提升小模型推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有推理蒸馏方法将蒸馏视为轨迹模仿，忽略了推理过程中中间步骤的局部不确定性，导致学习信号分配不合理。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种动态、上下文相关的蒸馏机制，使小模型在推理过程中获得更有效的学习信号。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 推理中间步骤通常局部欠指定，全局正确性约束最终答案但不唯一确定中间步骤，因此刚性轨迹模仿与推理结构不匹配。
analysis.method: 提出有效性校准推理蒸馏框架，比较学生和教师在相同前缀下的下一步动作，利用相对局部有效性调制蒸馏更新强度。
contributions: 提出一种动态、上下文相关的蒸馏机制，替代静态轨迹模仿。
在数学推理、代码生成和指令遵循基准上超越强蒸馏基线。
analysis.experiments: 在数学推理、代码生成和指令遵循基准上评估，方法一致优于强蒸馏基线。
limitations: 可能依赖教师模型质量，弱教师下效果未知。
局部有效性度量可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于局部有效性校准的推理蒸馏方法，通过动态调整蒸馏强度提升小模型推理能力。

papers.title: Human-Centric Topic Modeling with Goal-Prompted Contrastive Learning and Optimal Transport
papers.abstract: Existing topic modeling methods, from LDA to recent neural and LLM-based approaches, which focus mainly on statistical coherence, often produce redundant or off-target topics that miss the user's underlying intent. We introduce Human-centric Topic Modeling, \emph{Human-TM}), a novel task formulation that integrates a human-provided goal directly into the topic modeling process to produce interpretable, diverse and goal-oriented topics. To tackle this challenge, we propose the \textbf{G}oal-prompted \textbf{C}ontrastive \textbf{T}opic \textbf{M}odel with \textbf{O}ptimal \textbf{T}ransport (GCTM-OT), which first uses LLM-based prompting to extract goal candidates from documents, then incorporates these into semantic-aware contrastive learning via optimal transport for topic discovery. Experimental results on three public subreddit datasets show that GCTM-OT outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in topic coherence and diversity while significantly improving alignment with human-provided goals, paving the way for more human-centric topic discovery systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出以人为中心的主题建模任务，通过目标提示对比学习和最优传输实现更符合用户意图的主题发现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有主题建模方法（如LDA、神经方法、LLM方法）主要关注统计一致性，常产生冗余或偏离目标的主题，无法捕捉用户潜在意图。
analysis.problem: 如何将用户提供的目标直接融入主题建模过程，生成可解释、多样且目标导向的主题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GCTM-OT模型：先用LLM提示从文档中提取目标候选，再通过最优传输将这些目标融入语义感知的对比学习中进行主题发现。
contributions: 提出Human-TM任务，将人类目标直接集成到主题建模中。
提出GCTM-OT方法，结合LLM提示、对比学习和最优传输实现目标导向的主题建模。
analysis.experiments: 在三个公开subreddit数据集上实验，GCTM-OT在主题连贯性和多样性上优于基线，并显著提升与人类目标的对齐。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM提示的质量和计算成本。
最优传输可能增加模型复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出以人为中心的主题建模任务，通过目标提示对比学习和最优传输实现更符合用户意图的主题发现。

papers.title: Broadening the Applicability of Conditional Syntax Splitting for Reasoning from Conditional Belief Bases
papers.abstract: In nonmonotonic reasoning from conditional belief bases, an inference operator satisfying syntax splitting postulates allows for taking only the relevant parts of a belief base into account, provided that the belief base splits into subbases based on disjoint signatures. Because such disjointness is rare in practice, safe conditional syntax splitting has been proposed as a generalization of syntax splitting, allowing the conditionals in the subbases to share some atoms. Recently this overlap of conditionals has been shown to be limited to trivial, self-fulfilling conditionals. In this article, we propose a generalization of safe conditional syntax splittings that broadens the applicability of splitting postulates. In contrast to safe conditional syntax splitting, our generalized notion supports syntax splittings of a belief base Δ where the subbases of Δ may share atoms and nontrivial conditionals. We illustrate how this new notion overcomes limitations of previous splitting concepts, and we identify genuine splittings, separating them from simple splittings that do not provide benefits for inductive inference from Δ. We introduce adjusted inference postulates based on our generalization of conditional syntax splitting, and we evaluate several popular inductive inference operators with respect to these postulates. Furthermore, we show that, while every inductive inference operator satisfying generalized conditional syntax splitting also satisfies conditional syntax splitting, the reverse does not hold.

analysis.tldr: 提出广义条件语法分裂，放宽了分裂后子基共享原子和条件句的限制，扩展了非单调推理中分裂公理的适用性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有条件语法分裂要求子基基于不相交签名，实际中罕见；安全条件语法分裂虽允许共享原子，但仅限于平凡条件句，限制了分裂公理的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何放宽条件语法分裂的限制，使子基可以共享非平凡条件句，从而扩展分裂公理在条件信念库推理中的适用性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出广义条件语法分裂，允许子基共享原子和非平凡条件句；区分真正分裂与简单分裂；基于此调整推理公设，并评估多种归纳推理算子。
contributions: 提出广义条件语法分裂，克服了先前分裂概念的限制，支持子基共享非平凡条件句。
引入真正分裂与简单分裂的区分，并调整推理公设，证明广义分裂公设蕴含原分裂公设但反之不成立。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未在真实大规模信念库上验证效率。
广义分裂的识别算法可能复杂。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出广义条件语法分裂，放宽了分裂后子基共享原子和条件句的限制，扩展了非单调推理中分裂公理的适用性。

papers.title: PromptEcho: Annotation-Free Reward from Vision-Language Models for Text-to-Image Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) can improve the prompt following capability of text-to-image (T2I) models, yet obtaining high-quality reward signals remains challenging: CLIP Score is too coarse-grained, while VLM-based reward models (e.g., RewardDance) require costly human-annotated preference data and additional fine-tuning. We propose PromptEcho, a reward construction method that requires \emph{no} annotation and \emph{no} reward model training. Given a generated image and a guiding query, PromptEcho computes the token-level cross-entropy loss of a frozen VLM with the original prompt as the label, directly extracting the image-text alignment knowledge encoded during VLM pretraining. The reward is deterministic, computationally efficient, and improves automatically as stronger open-source VLMs become available. For evaluation, we develop DenseAlignBench, a benchmark of concept-rich dense captions for rigorously testing prompt following capability. Experimental results on two state-of-the-art T2I models (Z-Image and QwenImage-2512) demonstrate that PromptEcho achieves substantial improvements on DenseAlignBench (+26.8pp / +16.2pp net win rate), along with consistent gains on GenEval, DPG-Bench, and TIIFBench without any task-specific training. Ablation studies confirm that PromptEcho comprehensively outperforms inference-based scoring with the same VLM, and that reward quality scales with VLM size. We will open-source the trained models and the DenseAlignBench.

analysis.tldr: PromptEcho 利用冻结 VLM 的交叉熵损失作为免标注奖励信号，显著提升 T2I 模型的提示遵循能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习可提升 T2I 模型的提示遵循能力，但现有奖励信号如 CLIP Score 过于粗糙，而基于 VLM 的奖励模型需要昂贵的人工标注偏好数据和额外微调，限制了实用性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖人工标注和奖励模型训练的情况下，为 T2I 强化学习提供高质量、细粒度的奖励信号。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PromptEcho 使用冻结的 VLM，以原始提示为标签，计算生成图像与查询的 token 级交叉熵损失作为奖励，直接提取 VLM 预训练中编码的图像-文本对齐知识。
contributions: 提出 PromptEcho，一种免标注、免训练的奖励构建方法，利用冻结 VLM 的交叉熵损失作为 T2I 强化学习的奖励信号。
构建 DenseAlignBench 基准，包含概念丰富的密集描述，用于严格测试提示遵循能力。
在多个 T2I 模型和基准上验证 PromptEcho 的有效性，并展示奖励质量随 VLM 规模提升而提高。
analysis.experiments: 在 Z-Image 和 QwenImage-2512 两个 SOTA T2I 模型上实验，DenseAlignBench 净胜率分别提升 26.8pp 和 16.2pp，在 GenEval、DPG-Bench、TIIFBench 上也有持续提升，无需任务特定训练。消融实验表明 PromptEcho 优于同 VLM 的推理式评分，且奖励质量随 VLM 规模增大而提高。
limitations: 依赖 VLM 的预训练知识，可能对 VLM 未覆盖的领域或概念效果有限。
交叉熵损失作为奖励可能无法完全捕捉图像-文本对齐的细微差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PromptEcho 利用冻结 VLM 的交叉熵损失作为免标注奖励信号，显著提升 T2I 模型的提示遵循能力。

papers.title: Learning Chain Of Thoughts Prompts for Predicting Entities, Relations, and even Literals on Knowledge Graphs
papers.abstract: Knowledge graph embedding (KGE) models perform well on link prediction but struggle with unseen entities, relations, and especially literals, limiting their use in dynamic, heterogeneous graphs. In contrast, pretrained large language models (LLMs) generalize effectively through prompting. We reformulate link prediction as a prompt learning problem and introduce RALP, which learns string-based chain-of-thought (CoT) prompts as scoring functions for triples. Using Bayesian Optimization through MIPRO algorithm, RALP identifies effective prompts from fewer than 30 training examples without gradient access. At inference, RALP predicts missing entities, relations or whole triples and assigns confidence scores based on the learned prompt. We evaluate on transductive, numerical, and OWL instance retrieval benchmarks. RALP improves state-of-the-art KGE models by over 5% MRR across datasets and enhances generalization via high-quality inferred triples. On OWL reasoning tasks with complex class expressions (e.g., $\exists hasChild.Female$, $\geq 5 \; hasChild.Female$), it achieves over 88% Jaccard similarity. These results highlight prompt-based LLM reasoning as a flexible alternative to embedding-based methods. We release our implementation, training, and evaluation pipeline as open source: https://github.com/dice-group/RALP .

analysis.tldr: 将知识图谱链接预测转化为提示学习问题，用贝叶斯优化学习链式思维提示，无需梯度即可从少量样本中学习，显著提升泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 知识图谱嵌入模型在链接预测上表现良好，但难以处理未见实体、关系及字面量，限制了其在动态、异构图中的应用；而预训练大语言模型通过提示能有效泛化。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大语言模型的提示学习能力，以少量训练样本和无需梯度访问的方式，实现知识图谱中实体、关系乃至字面量的预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RALP方法，将链接预测重新定义为提示学习问题，学习基于字符串的链式思维提示作为三元组的评分函数；通过MIPRO算法进行贝叶斯优化，从少于30个训练样本中识别有效提示，推理时预测缺失元素并分配置信度。
contributions: 提出RALP，将链接预测转化为提示学习问题，利用LLM的链式思维提示进行预测。
使用贝叶斯优化（MIPRO）从少量样本中学习提示，无需梯度访问。
在直推、数值和OWL实例检索基准上，RALP在MRR上比最先进的KGE模型提升超过5%，并在OWL推理任务上达到88%以上的Jaccard相似度。
analysis.experiments: 在直推、数值和OWL实例检索基准上评估，RALP在MRR上比最先进的KGE模型提升超过5%，在OWL推理任务上达到88%以上的Jaccard相似度。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的推理能力，对LLM选择敏感。
贝叶斯优化可能在大规模图谱上计算开销较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将知识图谱链接预测转化为提示学习问题，用贝叶斯优化学习链式思维提示，无需梯度即可从少量样本中学习，显著提升泛化能力。

papers.title: Listening Deepfake Detection: A New Perspective Beyond Speaking-Centric Forgery Analysis
papers.abstract: Existing deepfake detection research has primarily focused on scenarios where the manipulated subject is actively speaking, i.e., generating fabricated content by altering the speaker's appearance or voice. However, in realistic interaction settings, attackers often alternate between falsifying speaking and listening states to mislead their targets, thereby enhancing the realism and persuasiveness of the scenario. Although the detection of 'listening deepfakes' remains largely unexplored and is hindered by a scarcity of both datasets and methodologies, the relatively limited quality of synthesized listening reactions presents an excellent breakthrough opportunity for current deepfake detection efforts. In this paper, we present the task of Listening Deepfake Detection (LDD). We introduce ListenForge, the first dataset specifically designed for this task, constructed using five Listening Head Generation (LHG) methods. To address the distinctive characteristics of listening forgeries, we propose MANet, a Motion-aware and Audio-guided Network that captures subtle motion inconsistencies in listener videos while leveraging speaker's audio semantics to guide cross-modal fusion. Extensive experiments demonstrate that existing Speaking Deepfake Detection (SDD) models perform poorly in listening scenarios. In contrast, MANet achieves significantly superior performance on ListenForge. Our work highlights the necessity of rethinking deepfake detection beyond the traditional speaking-centric paradigm and opens new directions for multimodal forgery analysis in interactive communication settings. The dataset and code are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/LDD-B4CB.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个‘倾听深度伪造检测’任务，构建专用数据集ListenForge并设计运动感知音频引导网络MANet，突破传统以说话为中心的伪造检测范式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度伪造检测聚焦于说话状态下的伪造，但真实交互中攻击者常交替伪造倾听与说话状态以增强可信度，而倾听伪造检测因缺乏数据集和方法尚未被探索。
analysis.problem: 解决倾听场景下深度伪造检测任务，应对倾听伪造视频中细微运动不一致性及跨模态融合挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出倾听伪造的合成质量相对较低，为检测提供了突破机会；现有说话伪造检测模型在倾听场景下表现差。
analysis.method: 提出MANet，包含运动感知模块捕捉倾听视频中的细微运动不一致性，并利用说话者音频语义引导跨模态融合。
contributions: 首次定义倾听深度伪造检测（LDD）任务，并构建首个专用数据集ListenForge（基于5种倾听头部生成方法）。
提出MANet网络，通过运动感知和音频引导融合有效检测倾听伪造，显著优于现有说话伪造检测模型。
analysis.experiments: 在ListenForge数据集上进行了大量实验，表明现有说话伪造检测模型在倾听场景下表现差，而MANet性能显著优越。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 数据集规模可能有限，仅基于5种生成方法，泛化性待验证。
方法依赖说话者音频，在纯视觉或无声场景下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个‘倾听深度伪造检测’任务，构建专用数据集ListenForge并设计运动感知音频引导网络MANet，突破传统以说话为中心的伪造检测范式。

papers.title: TimeSAF: Towards LLM-Guided Semantic Asynchronous Fusion for Time Series Forecasting
papers.abstract: Despite the recent success of large language models (LLMs) in time-series forecasting, most existing methods still adopt a Deep Synchronous Fusion strategy, where dense interactions between textual and temporal features are enforced at every layer of the network. This design overlooks the inherent granularity mismatch between modalities and leads to what we term semantic perceptual dissonance: high-level abstract semantics provided by the LLM become inappropriately entangled with the low-level, fine-grained numerical dynamics of time series, making it difficult for semantic priors to effectively guide forecasting. To address this issue, we propose TimeSAF, a new framework based on hierarchical asynchronous fusion. Unlike synchronous approaches, TimeSAF explicitly decouples unimodal feature learning from cross-modal interaction. It introduces an independent cross-modal semantic fusion trunk, which uses learnable queries to aggregate global semantics from the temporal and prompt backbones in a bottom-up manner, and a stage-wise semantic refinement decoder that asynchronously injects these high-level signals back into the temporal backbone. This mechanism provides stable and efficient semantic guidance while avoiding interference with low-level temporal dynamics. Extensive experiments on standard long-term forecasting benchmarks show that TimeSAF significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, and further exhibits strong generalization in both few-shot and zero-shot transfer settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出异步融合框架TimeSAF，解决LLM时序预测中语义与数值特征的粒度失配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM时序预测方法采用深度同步融合策略，强制文本与时序特征逐层交互，忽略了模态间的粒度差异，导致语义感知失调，难以有效利用语义先验指导预测。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM引导时序预测中同步融合导致的语义与数值特征纠缠问题，实现高效稳定的语义引导。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 同步融合中高层抽象语义与低层细粒度数值动态不恰当纠缠，称为语义感知失调，阻碍语义先验有效指导预测。
analysis.method: 提出TimeSAF框架，包含独立跨模态语义融合主干（通过可学习查询自底向上聚合全局语义）和阶段式语义精炼解码器（异步注入高层信号到时序主干），实现非对称异步融合。
contributions: 首次提出异步融合策略解决LLM时序预测中的语义感知失调问题
设计层次化异步融合框架，包含独立语义融合主干和阶段式精炼解码器
在长期预测基准上显著超越SOTA，并在少样本和零样本迁移中表现强泛化性
analysis.experiments: 在标准长期预测基准上实验，TimeSAF显著优于SOTA基线，并在少样本和零样本迁移中展现强泛化性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定LLM架构，迁移至其他LLM需适配
异步融合增加模型复杂度，推理效率待评估
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出异步融合框架TimeSAF，解决LLM时序预测中语义与数值特征的粒度失配问题。

papers.title: Contextual Multi-Task Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Reef Monitoring
papers.abstract: Although autonomous underwater vehicles promise the capability of marine ecosystem monitoring, their deployment is fundamentally limited by the difficulty of controlling vehicles under highly uncertain and non-stationary underwater dynamics. To address these challenges, we employ a data-driven reinforcement learning approach to compensate for unknown dynamics and task variations.Traditional single-task reinforcement learning has a tendency to overfit the training environment, thus, limit the long-term usefulness of the learnt policy. Hence, we propose to use a contextual multi-task reinforcement learning paradigm instead, allowing us to learn controllers that can be reused for various tasks, e.g., detecting oysters in one reef and detecting corals in another. We evaluate whether contextual multi-task reinforcement learning can efficiently learn robust and generalisable control policies for autonomous underwater reef monitoring. We train a single context-dependent policy that is able to solve multiple related monitoring tasks in a simulated reef environment in HoloOcean. In our experiments, we empirically evaluate the contextual policies regarding sample-efficiency, zero-shot generalisation to unseen tasks, and robustness to varying water currents. By utilising multi-task reinforcement learning, we aim to improve the training effectiveness, as well as the reusability of learnt policies to take a step towards more sustainable procedures in autonomous reef monitoring.

analysis.tldr: 提出上下文多任务强化学习框架，提升自主水下航行器在珊瑚礁监测中的策略泛化性与鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主水下航行器在海洋生态系统监测中潜力巨大，但水下动力学高度不确定且非平稳，传统单任务强化学习易过拟合训练环境，限制了策略的长期实用性。
analysis.problem: 如何学习可复用、鲁棒且泛化的控制策略，以应对不同水下监测任务（如检测不同礁区的生物）和动态环境（如水流变化）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用上下文多任务强化学习范式，训练一个依赖于上下文（任务标识）的策略，使其能同时解决多个相关的监测任务。
contributions: 提出将上下文多任务强化学习应用于自主水下礁监测，以提升策略的样本效率和泛化能力。
在HoloOcean模拟环境中验证了上下文策略在零样本泛化、样本效率和对水流变化的鲁棒性方面的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在HoloOcean模拟礁环境中进行实验，评估上下文策略的样本效率、零样本泛化到未见任务的能力以及对变化水流的鲁棒性。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅在模拟环境中验证，未在真实水下场景测试。
未讨论任务数量增加时策略的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出上下文多任务强化学习框架，提升自主水下航行器在珊瑚礁监测中的策略泛化性与鲁棒性。

papers.title: RPRA: Predicting an LLM-Judge for Efficient but Performant Inference
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) face a fundamental trade-off between computational efficiency (e.g., number of parameters) and output quality, especially when deployed on computationally limited devices such as phones or laptops. One way to address this challenge is by following the example of humans and have models ask for help when they believe they are incapable of solving a problem on their own; we can overcome this trade-off by allowing smaller models to respond to queries when they believe they can provide good responses, and deferring to larger models when they do not believe they can. To this end, in this paper, we investigate the viability of Predict-Answer/Act (PA) and Reason-Predict-Reason-Answer/Act (RPRA) paradigms where models predict -- prior to responding -- how an LLM judge would score their output. We evaluate three approaches: zero-shot prediction, prediction using an in-context report card, and supervised fine-tuning. Our results show that larger models (particularly reasoning models) perform well when predicting generic LLM judges zero-shot, while smaller models can reliably predict such judges well after being fine-tuned or provided with an in-context report card. Altogether, both approaches can substantially improve the prediction accuracy of smaller models, with report cards and fine-tuning achieving mean improvements of up to 55% and 52% across datasets, respectively. These findings suggest that models can learn to predict their own performance limitations, paving the way for more efficient and self-aware AI systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出RPRA范式，让模型在回答前预测LLM裁判的评分，从而在资源受限设备上实现高效推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在计算资源有限的设备（如手机、笔记本电脑）上面临效率与质量的权衡，需要一种机制让模型在不确定时请求帮助。
analysis.problem: 如何让模型在回答前准确预测自身输出质量，以便决定是否由小模型回答或交由大模型处理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 大模型（尤其是推理模型）在零样本预测LLM裁判评分时表现良好，而小模型通过微调或上下文报告卡可显著提升预测准确性。
analysis.method: 提出Predict-Answer/Act (PA)和Reason-Predict-Reason-Answer/Act (RPRA)范式，模型在生成回答前先预测LLM裁判的评分，采用零样本预测、上下文报告卡和微调三种方式。
contributions: 提出PA和RPRA范式，让模型在推理前预测自身输出质量。
实验证明报告卡和微调可分别将小模型预测准确性提升55%和52%。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上评估三种预测方法，报告卡和微调分别实现平均提升55%和52%。
limitations: 依赖LLM裁判的评分标准，可能引入裁判偏差。
仅验证了预测评分，未在真实推理系统中测试端到端效率提升。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RPRA范式，让模型在回答前预测LLM裁判的评分，从而在资源受限设备上实现高效推理。

papers.title: Calibration-Aware Policy Optimization for Reasoning LLMs
papers.abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) enhances LLM reasoning but often induces overconfidence, where incorrect responses yield lower perplexity than correct ones, degrading relative calibration as described by the Area Under the Curve (AUC). Existing approaches either yield limited improvements in calibration or sacrifice gains in reasoning accuracy. We first prove that this degradation in GRPO-style algorithms stems from their uncertainty-agnostic advantage estimation, which inevitably misaligns optimization gradients with calibration. This leads to improved accuracy at the expense of degraded calibration. We then propose Calibration-Aware Policy Optimization (CAPO). It adopts a logistic AUC surrogate loss that is theoretically consistent and admits regret bound, enabling uncertainty-aware advantage estimation. By further incorporating a noise masking mechanism, CAPO achieves stable learning dynamics that jointly optimize calibration and accuracy. Experiments on multiple mathematical reasoning benchmarks show that CAPO-1.5B significantly improves calibration by up to 15% while achieving accuracy comparable to or better than GRPO, and further boosts accuracy on downstream inference-time scaling tasks by up to 5%. Moreover, when allowed to abstain under low-confidence conditions, CAPO achieves a Pareto-optimal precision-coverage trade-off, highlighting its practical value for hallucination mitigation.

analysis.tldr: 提出校准感知策略优化（CAPO），在提升LLM推理准确率的同时显著改善置信度校准。
analysis.research_motivation: GRPO等策略优化方法在提升LLM推理能力时会导致过度自信，即错误回答的困惑度低于正确回答，损害校准性能；现有方法要么校准改进有限，要么牺牲推理准确率。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲推理准确率的前提下，改善GRPO风格策略优化算法导致的校准退化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: GRPO算法中不确定性无关的优势估计会不可避免地使优化梯度与校准错位，导致准确率提升但校准退化。
analysis.method: 提出校准感知策略优化（CAPO），采用逻辑AUC替代损失（理论一致且具有遗憾界），实现不确定性感知的优势估计；并引入噪声掩蔽机制，实现稳定学习动态，联合优化校准和准确率。
contributions: 理论证明了GRPO风格算法中校准退化的根源在于不确定性无关的优势估计。
提出CAPO方法，通过逻辑AUC损失和噪声掩蔽机制联合优化校准与准确率。
在数学推理基准上，CAPO-1.5B将校准提升高达15%，准确率持平或优于GRPO，并在下游推理时缩放任务中准确率提升高达5%。
在低置信度下允许弃权时，CAPO实现了帕累托最优的精度-覆盖率权衡，有助于缓解幻觉。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数学推理基准上评估，CAPO-1.5B校准提升高达15%，准确率与GRPO相当或更优，下游推理时缩放任务准确率提升高达5%。
limitations: 实验仅在1.5B规模模型上进行，更大规模模型效果未知。
主要针对数学推理任务，其他领域泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出校准感知策略优化（CAPO），在提升LLM推理准确率的同时显著改善置信度校准。

papers.title: GeoAlign: Geometric Feature Realignment for MLLM Spatial Reasoning
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have exhibited remarkable performance in various visual tasks, yet still struggle with spatial reasoning. Recent efforts mitigate this by injecting geometric features from 3D foundation models, but rely on static single-layer extractions. We identify that such an approach induces a task misalignment bias: the geometric features naturally evolve towards 3D pretraining objectives, which may contradict the heterogeneous spatial demands of MLLMs, rendering any single layer fundamentally insufficient. To resolve this, we propose GeoAlign, a novel framework that dynamically aggregates multi-layer geometric features to realign with the actual demands. GeoAlign constructs a hierarchical geometric feature bank and leverages the MLLM's original visual tokens as content-aware queries to perform layer-wise sparse routing, adaptively fetching the suitable geometric features for each patch. Extensive experiments on VSI-Bench, ScanQA, and SQA3D demonstrate that our compact 4B model effectively achieves state-of-the-art performance, even outperforming larger existing MLLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出GeoAlign框架，通过动态聚合多层几何特征并利用内容感知路由，显著提升MLLM空间推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在空间推理任务中表现不佳，现有方法注入3D基础模型的几何特征时采用静态单层提取，导致任务错配偏差，限制了性能。
analysis.problem: 如何解决静态单层几何特征与MLLM异构空间需求之间的任务错配偏差，实现几何特征的有效对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出静态单层几何特征会自然向3D预训练目标演化，与MLLM的空间需求矛盾，任何单层都本质上不足。
analysis.method: GeoAlign构建分层几何特征库，利用MLLM原始视觉token作为内容感知查询，进行逐层稀疏路由，动态聚合多层几何特征。
contributions: 识别了静态单层几何特征注入导致的任务错配偏差问题
提出GeoAlign框架，通过动态多层聚合和内容感知路由实现特征重对齐
在多个基准上达到SOTA，4B模型超越更大模型
analysis.experiments: 在VSI-Bench、ScanQA和SQA3D上进行实验，4B模型达到SOTA，超越更大MLLM。
limitations: 可能依赖3D基础模型的质量
稀疏路由机制可能增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GeoAlign框架，通过动态聚合多层几何特征并利用内容感知路由，显著提升MLLM空间推理能力。

papers.title: KnowRL: Boosting LLM Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning with Minimal-Sufficient Knowledge Guidance
papers.abstract: RLVR improves reasoning in large language models, but its effectiveness is often limited by severe reward sparsity on hard problems. Recent hint-based RL methods mitigate sparsity by injecting partial solutions or abstract templates, yet they typically scale guidance by adding more tokens, which introduce redundancy, inconsistency, and extra training overhead. We propose \textbf{KnowRL} (Knowledge-Guided Reinforcement Learning), an RL training framework that treats hint design as a minimal-sufficient guidance problem. During RL training, KnowRL decomposes guidance into atomic knowledge points (KPs) and uses Constrained Subset Search (CSS) to construct compact, interaction-aware subsets for training. We further identify a pruning interaction paradox -- removing one KP may help while removing multiple such KPs can hurt -- and explicitly optimize for robust subset curation under this dependency structure. We train KnowRL-Nemotron-1.5B from OpenMath-Nemotron-1.5B. Across eight reasoning benchmarks at the 1.5B scale, KnowRL-Nemotron-1.5B consistently outperforms strong RL and hinting baselines. Without KP hints at inference, KnowRL-Nemotron-1.5B reaches 70.08 average accuracy, already surpassing Nemotron-1.5B by +9.63 points; with selected KPs, performance improves to 74.16, establishing a new state of the art at this scale. The model, curated training data, and code are publicly available at https://github.com/Hasuer/KnowRL.

analysis.tldr: KnowRL通过最小充分知识引导的强化学习，有效缓解奖励稀疏问题，显著提升LLM推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: RLVR在提升LLM推理时，硬问题上的奖励稀疏性严重限制了效果；现有基于提示的方法通过注入部分解或抽象模板来缓解，但通常通过增加token来扩展引导，引入冗余、不一致和额外训练开销。
analysis.problem: 如何设计最小充分的引导知识，在强化学习中高效提升LLM推理性能，同时避免冗余和训练开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现了一个剪枝交互悖论：移除一个知识点可能有益，但移除多个这样的知识点反而有害，表明知识点之间存在依赖结构。
analysis.method: 提出KnowRL框架，将引导分解为原子知识点（KP），使用约束子集搜索（CSS）构建紧凑、交互感知的子集进行训练，并针对依赖结构优化鲁棒子集选择。
contributions: 提出KnowRL，将提示设计视为最小充分引导问题，通过原子知识点和约束子集搜索实现高效RL训练。
识别并建模了剪枝交互悖论，优化了依赖结构下的鲁棒子集选择。
在1.5B规模上，KnowRL-Nemotron-1.5B在8个推理基准上超越强基线和提示方法，达到新SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在8个推理基准上评估1.5B模型，KnowRL-Nemotron-1.5B在无KP提示时平均准确率70.08，超过Nemotron-1.5B 9.63点；有KP提示时达74.16，建立新SOTA。
limitations: 方法依赖知识点的分解质量，可能对复杂任务分解有挑战。
实验仅在1.5B规模进行，更大规模效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: KnowRL通过最小充分知识引导的强化学习，有效缓解奖励稀疏问题，显著提升LLM推理能力。

papers.title: Habitat-GS: A High-Fidelity Navigation Simulator with Dynamic Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Training embodied AI agents depends critically on the visual fidelity of simulation environments and the ability to model dynamic humans. Current simulators rely on mesh-based rasterization with limited visual realism, and their support for dynamic human avatars, where available, is constrained to mesh representations, hindering agent generalization to human-populated real-world scenarios. We present Habitat-GS, a navigation-centric embodied AI simulator extended from Habitat-Sim that integrates 3D Gaussian Splatting scene rendering and drivable gaussian avatars while maintaining full compatibility with the Habitat ecosystem. Our system implements a 3DGS renderer for real-time photorealistic rendering and supports scalable 3DGS asset import from diverse sources. For dynamic human modeling, we introduce a gaussian avatar module that enables each avatar to simultaneously serve as a photorealistic visual entity and an effective navigation obstacle, allowing agents to learn human-aware behaviors in realistic settings. Experiments on point-goal navigation demonstrate that agents trained on 3DGS scenes achieve stronger cross-domain generalization, with mixed-domain training being the most effective strategy. Evaluations on avatar-aware navigation further confirm that gaussian avatars enable effective human-aware navigation. Finally, performance benchmarks validate the system's scalability across varying scene complexity and avatar counts.

analysis.tldr: 提出Habitat-GS，将3D高斯泼溅场景渲染和可驱动高斯化身集成到Habitat-Sim中，实现高保真导航仿真。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有仿真器基于网格光栅化，视觉真实感有限，且动态人体建模仅支持网格表示，阻碍智能体泛化到有人类场景。
analysis.problem: 如何构建高视觉保真度、支持动态人体建模的导航仿真环境，以提升具身智能体在真实场景中的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在Habitat-Sim基础上集成3DGS渲染器和可驱动高斯化身模块，支持实时逼真渲染和多样化3DGS资产导入，化身同时作为视觉实体和导航障碍物。
contributions: 提出Habitat-GS，首个将3DGS场景渲染和可驱动高斯化身集成到Habitat-Sim的导航仿真器。
实验证明基于3DGS场景训练的智能体在跨域泛化上更强，混合域训练最有效，且高斯化身支持有效的人感知导航。
analysis.experiments: 在点目标导航和化身感知导航任务上评估，验证了跨域泛化能力和人感知导航有效性，并测试了系统在不同场景复杂度和化身数量下的可扩展性。
limitations: 可能未涉及其他类型动态物体（如车辆）的建模。
3DGS渲染的计算开销可能限制大规模场景实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Habitat-GS，将3D高斯泼溅场景渲染和可驱动高斯化身集成到Habitat-Sim中，实现高保真导航仿真。

papers.title: Neural Dynamic GI: Random-Access Neural Compression for Temporal Lightmaps in Dynamic Lighting Environments
papers.abstract: High-quality global illumination (GI) in real-time rendering is commonly achieved using precomputed lighting techniques, with lightmap as the standard choice. To support GI for static objects in dynamic lighting environments, multiple lightmaps at different lighting conditions need to be precomputed, which incurs substantial storage and memory overhead. To overcome this limitation, we propose Neural Dynamic GI (NDGI), a novel compression technique specifically designed for temporal lightmap sets. Our method utilizes multi-dimensional feature maps and lightweight neural networks to integrate the temporal information instead of storing multiple sets explicitly, which significantly reduces the storage size of lightmaps. Additionally, we introduce a block compression (BC) simulation strategy during the training process, which enables BC compression on the final generated feature maps and further improves the compression ratio. To enable efficient real-time decompression, we also integrate a virtual texturing (VT) system with our neural representation. Compared with prior methods, our approach achieves high-quality dynamic GI while maintaining remarkably low storage and memory requirements, with only modest real-time decompression overhead. To facilitate further research in this direction, we will release our temporal lightmap dataset precomputed in multiple scenes featuring diverse temporal variations.

analysis.tldr: 提出NDGI，一种针对动态光照环境下时序光照贴图的随机存取神经压缩方法，大幅降低存储需求。
analysis.research_motivation: 实时渲染中高质量全局光照常依赖预计算光照贴图，但动态光照环境需存储多组光照贴图，导致存储和内存开销巨大。
analysis.problem: 如何高效压缩动态光照环境下的时序光照贴图集合，在保持高质量渲染的同时显著降低存储和内存占用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用多维特征图和轻量神经网络整合时序信息，替代显式存储多组光照贴图；引入训练时的块压缩模拟策略以提升压缩比；结合虚拟纹理系统实现高效实时解压缩。
contributions: 提出NDGI，一种针对时序光照贴图的随机存取神经压缩技术，显著降低存储需求。
引入块压缩模拟策略，进一步改善压缩比。
集成虚拟纹理系统，实现低开销的实时解压缩。
将发布多场景时序光照贴图数据集以促进后续研究。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于预计算光照场景，对完全动态场景的泛化性未知。
实时解压缩开销虽小，但可能在高分辨率或复杂场景下成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NDGI，一种针对动态光照环境下时序光照贴图的随机存取神经压缩方法，大幅降低存储需求。

papers.title: Efficient Semantic Image Communication for Traffic Monitoring at the Edge
papers.abstract: Many visual monitoring systems operate under strict communication constraints, where transmitting full-resolution images is impractical and often unnecessary. In such settings, visual data is often used for object presence, spatial relationships, and scene context rather than exact pixel fidelity. This paper presents two semantic image communication pipelines for traffic monitoring, MMSD and SAMR, that reduce transmission cost while preserving meaningful visual information. MMSD (Multi-Modal Semantic Decomposition) targets very high compression together with data confidentiality, since sensitive pixel content is not transmitted. It replaces the original image with compact semantic representations, namely segmentation maps, edge maps, and textual descriptions, and reconstructs the scene at the receiver using a diffusion-based generative model. SAMR (Semantic-Aware Masking Reconstruction) targets higher visual quality while maintaining strong compression. It selectively suppresses non-critical image regions according to semantic importance before standard JPEG encoding and restores the missing content at the receiver through generative inpainting. Both designs follow an asymmetric sender-receiver architecture, where lightweight processing is performed at the edge and computationally intensive reconstruction is offloaded to the server. On a Raspberry Pi~5, the edge-side processing time is about 15s for MMSD and 9s for SAMR. Experimental results show average transmitted-data reductions of 99% for MMSD and 99.1% for SAMR. In addition, MMSD achieves lower payload size than the recent SPIC baseline while preserving strong semantic consistency, whereas SAMR provides a better quality-compression trade-off than standard JPEG and SQ-GAN under comparable operating conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出两种语义图像通信管道MMSD和SAMR，在边缘端实现高压缩比传输，同时保留交通监控场景的语义信息。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉监控系统常受通信带宽限制，传输全分辨率图像不切实际且不必要，而现有方法在极高压缩比下难以兼顾语义一致性和视觉质量。
analysis.problem: 如何在边缘设备上实现高效语义图像通信，在极低传输数据量下保留交通监控所需的语义信息（如物体存在、空间关系）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两种非对称编解码架构：MMSD通过多模态语义分解（分割图、边缘图、文本描述）替代原始图像，接收端用扩散模型重建；SAMR根据语义重要性选择性掩蔽非关键区域，经JPEG编码后由生成式修复恢复。
contributions: 提出MMSD和SAMR两种语义图像通信管道，实现99%以上传输数据缩减。
在Raspberry Pi 5上验证边缘端轻量处理可行性（MMSD约15s，SAMR约9s）。
analysis.experiments: 在交通监控场景下，MMSD平均传输数据减少99%，SAMR减少99.1%；MMSD在极低负载下优于SPIC基线，SAMR在质量-压缩权衡上优于标准JPEG和SQ-GAN。
limitations: 边缘端处理时间较长（秒级），可能不适用于实时性要求极高的场景。
重建质量依赖生成模型能力，复杂场景下语义一致性可能下降。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两种语义图像通信管道MMSD和SAMR，在边缘端实现高压缩比传输，同时保留交通监控场景的语义信息。

papers.title: SOAR: Self-Correction for Optimal Alignment and Refinement in Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: The post-training pipeline for diffusion models currently has two stages: supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on curated data and reinforcement learning (RL) with reward models. A fundamental gap separates them. SFT optimizes the denoiser only on ground-truth states sampled from the forward noising process; once inference deviates from these ideal states, subsequent denoising relies on out-of-distribution generalization rather than learned correction, exhibiting the same exposure bias that afflicts autoregressive models, but accumulated along the denoising trajectory instead of the token sequence. RL can in principle address this mismatch, yet its terminal reward signal is sparse, suffers from credit-assignment difficulty, and risks reward hacking. We propose SOAR (Self-Correction for Optimal Alignment and Refinement), a bias-correction post-training method that fills this gap. Starting from a real sample, SOAR performs a single stop-gradient rollout with the current model, re-noises the resulting off-trajectory state, and supervises the model to steer back toward the original clean target. The method is on-policy, reward-free, and provides dense per-timestep supervision with no credit-assignment problem. On SD3.5-Medium, SOAR improves GenEval from 0.70 to 0.78 and OCR from 0.64 to 0.67 over SFT, while simultaneously raising all model-based preference scores. In controlled reward-specific experiments, SOAR surpasses Flow-GRPO in final metric value on both aesthetic and text-image alignment tasks, despite having no access to a reward model. Since SOAR's base loss subsumes the standard SFT objective, it can directly replace SFT as a stronger first post-training stage after pretraining, while remaining fully compatible with subsequent RL alignment.

analysis.tldr: 提出SOAR方法，通过自校正解决扩散模型后训练中SFT与RL的差距，无需奖励模型即可提升生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型后训练中SFT和RL存在根本差距：SFT仅在真实噪声状态上优化，导致推理时暴露偏差；RL奖励稀疏且存在信用分配和奖励破解问题。
analysis.problem: 如何弥合SFT与RL之间的差距，提供密集、无奖励的逐时间步监督，同时避免暴露偏差和信用分配问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SFT在推理时因偏离训练分布而依赖分布外泛化，暴露偏差沿去噪轨迹累积；RL的终端奖励信号稀疏且易导致奖励破解。
analysis.method: 从真实样本出发，用当前模型执行单次停止梯度 rollout，对得到的偏离轨迹状态重新加噪，然后监督模型将其校正回原始干净目标。
contributions: 提出SOAR，一种无奖励、在策略的偏差校正后训练方法，提供密集逐时间步监督。
在SD3.5-Medium上，SOAR在GenEval和OCR上超越SFT，同时提升所有基于模型的偏好分数。
SOAR在无奖励模型情况下，在美学和文本-图像对齐任务上超越Flow-GRPO。
analysis.experiments: 在SD3.5-Medium上评估，SOAR将GenEval从0.70提升至0.78，OCR从0.64提升至0.67；在奖励特定实验中，SOAR在美学和文本-图像对齐任务上超越Flow-GRPO。
limitations: 可能依赖初始模型质量，对弱模型效果未知。
仅验证了文本到图像生成，其他模态（如视频）未测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SOAR方法，通过自校正解决扩散模型后训练中SFT与RL的差距，无需奖励模型即可提升生成质量。

papers.title: Every Picture Tells a Dangerous Story: Memory-Augmented Multi-Agent Jailbreak Attacks on VLMs
papers.abstract: The rapid evolution of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) has catalyzed unprecedented capabilities in artificial intelligence; however, this continuous modal expansion has inadvertently exposed a vastly broadened and unconstrained adversarial attack surface. Current multimodal jailbreak strategies primarily focus on surface-level pixel perturbations and typographic attacks or harmful images; however, they fail to engage with the complex semantic structures intrinsic to visual data. This leaves the vast semantic attack surface of original, natural images largely unscrutinized. Driven by the need to expose these deep-seated semantic vulnerabilities, we introduce \textbf{MemJack}, a \textbf{MEM}ory-augmented multi-agent \textbf{JA}ilbreak atta\textbf{CK} framework that explicitly leverages visual semantics to orchestrate automated jailbreak attacks. MemJack employs coordinated multi-agent cooperation to dynamically map visual entities to malicious intents, generate adversarial prompts via multi-angle visual-semantic camouflage, and utilize an Iterative Nullspace Projection (INLP) geometric filter to bypass premature latent space refusals. By accumulating and transferring successful strategies through a persistent Multimodal Experience Memory, MemJack maintains highly coherent extended multi-turn jailbreak attack interactions across different images, thereby improving the attack success rate (ASR) on new images. Extensive empirical evaluations across full, unmodified COCO val2017 images demonstrate that MemJack achieves a 71.48\% ASR against Qwen3-VL-Plus, scaling to 90\% under extended budgets. Furthermore, to catalyze future defensive alignment research, we will release \textbf{MemJack-Bench}, a comprehensive dataset comprising over 113,000 interactive multimodal jailbreak attack trajectories, establishing a vital foundation for developing inherently robust VLMs.

analysis.tldr: MemJack通过多智能体协作与记忆增强，利用视觉语义实现高效多轮越狱攻击，在COCO数据集上对Qwen3-VL-Plus达到71.48%攻击成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM越狱方法仅关注表面像素扰动或有害图像，未能利用自然图像中复杂的语义结构，导致大量语义攻击面未被探索。
analysis.problem: 如何利用视觉语义信息自动化生成多轮越狱攻击，以暴露VLM在自然图像上的深层语义漏洞。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MemJack框架，包含多智能体协作（映射视觉实体到恶意意图、多角度视觉语义伪装生成对抗提示）、INLP几何过滤器绕过潜在空间拒绝，以及持久多模态经验记忆实现跨图像策略迁移。
contributions: 提出MemJack，首个利用视觉语义进行多智能体协作的自动化多轮越狱攻击框架。
在完整COCO val2017图像上对Qwen3-VL-Plus实现71.48%攻击成功率，扩展预算下可达90%。
发布MemJack-Bench数据集，包含超过113,000条交互式多模态越狱攻击轨迹，促进防御对齐研究。
analysis.experiments: 在完整未修改的COCO val2017图像上进行评估，对Qwen3-VL-Plus达到71.48% ASR，扩展预算下达到90%。
limitations: 仅针对Qwen3-VL-Plus进行实验，未验证在其他VLM上的泛化性。
攻击成功率可能受限于特定模型架构和防御机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MemJack通过多智能体协作与记忆增强，利用视觉语义实现高效多轮越狱攻击，在COCO数据集上对Qwen3-VL-Plus达到71.48%攻击成功率。

papers.title: DeepTest Tool Competition 2026: Benchmarking an LLM-Based Automotive Assistant
papers.abstract: This report summarizes the results of the first edition of the Large Language Model (LLM) Testing competition, held as part of the DeepTest workshop at ICSE 2026. Four tools competed in benchmarking an LLM-based car manual information retrieval application, with the objective of identifying user inputs for which the system fails to appropriately mention warnings contained in the manual. The testing solutions were evaluated based on their effectiveness in exposing failures and the diversity of the discovered failure-revealing tests. We report on the experimental methodology, the competitors, and the results.

analysis.tldr: DeepTest 2026 竞赛报告：四个工具竞相测试 LLM 汽车手册问答系统的安全警告遗漏问题。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 在安全关键领域（如汽车手册问答）的应用中，可能遗漏重要警告信息，导致安全隐患，亟需有效的测试方法来暴露此类失败。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地生成用户输入，使 LLM 汽车手册问答系统未能正确提及手册中的安全警告。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 组织竞赛，四个工具针对 LLM 汽车手册问答系统生成测试输入，评估其暴露失败的能力和测试多样性。
contributions: 首次举办 LLM 测试竞赛，为汽车手册问答系统提供标准化测试基准。
比较了四种测试工具在暴露安全警告遗漏方面的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对汽车手册问答场景，泛化性未知。
未披露具体工具细节和失败模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DeepTest 2026 竞赛报告：四个工具竞相测试 LLM 汽车手册问答系统的安全警告遗漏问题。

papers.title: LLM-Guided Prompt Evolution for Password Guessing
papers.abstract: Passwords still remain a dominant authentication method, yet their security is routinely subverted by predictable user choices and large-scale credential leaks. Automated password guessing is a key tool for stress-testing password policies and modeling attacker behavior. This paper applies LLM-driven evolutionary computation to automatically optimize prompts for the LLM password guessing framework. Using OpenEvolve, an open-source system combining MAP-Elites quality-diversity search with an island population model we evolve prompts that maximize cracking rate on a RockYou-derived test set. We evaluate three configurations: a local setup with Qwen3 8B, a single compact cloud model Gemini-2.5 Flash, and a two-model ensemble of frontier LLMs. The approach raises the cracking rates from 2.02\% to 8.48\%. Character distribution analysis further confirms how evolved prompts produce statistically more realistic passwords. Automated prompt evolution is a low-barrier yet effective way to strengthen LLM-based password auditing and underlining how attack pipelines show tendency via automated improvements.

analysis.tldr: 用LLM驱动进化计算自动优化密码猜测提示词，将破解率从2.02%提升至8.48%。
analysis.research_motivation: 密码仍是主流认证方式，但用户选择可预测且大规模凭证泄露频发，自动化密码猜测是评估密码策略和建模攻击行为的关键工具，现有LLM密码猜测框架依赖人工设计提示词，效率低且效果有限。
analysis.problem: 如何自动优化LLM密码猜测框架的提示词以最大化破解率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用OpenEvolve系统，结合MAP-Elites质量多样性搜索和岛屿种群模型，通过LLM驱动进化计算自动演化提示词，在RockYou测试集上优化破解率。
contributions: 提出LLM驱动的提示词进化方法，自动优化密码猜测提示词。
在三种配置（本地Qwen3 8B、单云Gemini-2.5 Flash、双模型集成）下验证有效性，破解率从2.02%提升至8.48%。
analysis.experiments: 在RockYou测试集上评估三种配置，报告破解率从2.02%提升至8.48%，并通过字符分布分析验证进化提示词生成更真实的密码。
limitations: 仅基于RockYou数据集，可能不泛化到其他密码分布。
未讨论计算成本或进化收敛速度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用LLM驱动进化计算自动优化密码猜测提示词，将破解率从2.02%提升至8.48%。

papers.title: Spatial-Spectral Adaptive Fidelity and Noise Prior Reduction Guided Hyperspectral Image Denoising
papers.abstract: The core challenge of hyperspectral image denoising is striking the right balance between data fidelity and noise prior modeling. Most existing methods place too much emphasis on the intrinsic priors of the image while overlooking diverse noise assumptions and the dynamic trade-off between fidelity and priors. To address these issues, we propose a denoising framework that integrates noise prior reduction and a spatial-spectral adaptive fidelity term. This framework considers comprehensive noise priors with fewer parameters and introduces an adaptive weight tensor to dynamically balance the fidelity and prior regularization terms. Within this framework, we further develop a fast and robust pixel-wise model combined with the representative coefficient total variation regularizer to accurately remove mixed noise in HSIs. The proposed method not only efficiently handles various types of noise but also accurately captures the spectral low-rank structure and local smoothness of HSIs. An efficient optimization algorithm based on the alternating direction method of multipliers is designed to ensure stable and fast convergence. Extensive experiments on simulated and real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed model achieves superior denoising performance while maintaining competitive computational efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合噪声先验缩减与空间-光谱自适应保真项的高光谱图像去噪框架，在模拟和真实数据集上取得优异性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 高光谱图像去噪的核心挑战在于平衡数据保真度与噪声先验建模，现有方法过度强调图像固有先验而忽略多样噪声假设及保真度与先验的动态权衡。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个既能处理多种噪声类型又能动态平衡保真项与先验正则项的高光谱图像去噪方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法过度强调图像固有先验，忽略噪声假设的多样性和保真度与先验的动态权衡。
analysis.method: 提出集成噪声先验缩减和空间-光谱自适应保真项的去噪框架，引入自适应权重张量动态平衡保真项与先验正则项，结合代表性系数全变分正则器构建快速鲁棒的像素级模型，并采用ADMM优化算法。
contributions: 提出一种集成噪声先验缩减和空间-光谱自适应保真项的去噪框架，能处理多种噪声类型。
引入自适应权重张量动态平衡保真项与先验正则项，并设计高效ADMM优化算法确保稳定快速收敛。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟和真实数据集上进行大量实验，结果表明所提模型在去噪性能和计算效率上均具有优势。
limitations: 可能对极端噪声或复杂场景的泛化能力有待进一步验证。
优化算法复杂度可能随图像尺寸增加而上升。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合噪声先验缩减与空间-光谱自适应保真项的高光谱图像去噪框架，在模拟和真实数据集上取得优异性能。

papers.title: KumoRFM-2: Scaling Foundation Models for Relational Learning
papers.abstract: We introduce KumoRFM-2, the next iteration of a pre-trained foundation model for relational data. KumoRFM-2 supports in-context learning as well as fine-tuning and is applicable to a wide range of predictive tasks. In contrast to tabular foundation models, KumoRFM-2 natively operates on relational data, processing one or more connected tables simultaneously without manual table flattening or target variable generation, all while preserving temporal consistency. KumoRFM-2 leverages a large corpus of synthetic and real-world data to pre-train across four axes: the row and column dimensions at the individual table level, and the foreign key and cross-sample dimensions at the database level. In contrast to its predecessor, KumoRFM-2 injects task information as early as possible, enabling sharper selection of task-relevant columns and improved robustness to noisy data. Through extensive experiments on 41 challenging benchmarks and analysis around expressivity and sensitivity, we demonstrate that KumoRFM-2 outperforms supervised and foundational approaches by up to 8%, while maintaining strong performance under extreme settings of cold start and noisy data. To our knowledge, this is the first time a few-shot foundation model has been shown to surpass supervised approaches on common benchmark tasks, with performance further improving upon fine-tuning. Finally, while KumoRFM-1 was limited to small-scale in-memory datasets, KumoRFM-2 scales to billion-scale relational datasets.

analysis.tldr: KumoRFM-2 是一个针对关系数据的预训练基础模型，支持上下文学习和微调，在41个基准测试中超越监督方法达8%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有表格基础模型无法原生处理关系数据，需要手动展平或生成目标变量，且难以保持时间一致性，限制了预测任务的性能。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能原生处理多表关系数据、支持上下文学习和微调、且可扩展至大规模数据集的基础模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: KumoRFM-2 在合成和真实数据上沿四个轴预训练：行、列（表级），外键、跨样本（数据库级），并尽早注入任务信息以增强列选择鲁棒性。
contributions: 首个在常见基准任务上少样本基础模型超越监督方法的关系学习模型。
支持原生多表处理、时间一致性保持，并扩展至十亿级数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在41个挑战性基准上评估，KumoRFM-2 在冷启动和噪声数据下仍保持强性能，微调后进一步提升。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模合成数据生成，真实场景泛化性待验证。
模型架构细节和计算开销未在摘要中说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: KumoRFM-2 是一个针对关系数据的预训练基础模型，支持上下文学习和微调，在41个基准测试中超越监督方法达8%。

papers.title: ELoG-GS: Dual-Branch Gaussian Splatting with Luminance-Guided Enhancement for Extreme Low-light 3D Reconstruction
papers.abstract: This paper presents our approach to the NTIRE 2026 3D Restoration and Reconstruction Challenge (Track 1), which focuses on reconstructing high-quality 3D representations from degraded multi-view inputs. The challenge involves recovering geometrically consistent and photorealistic 3D scenes in extreme low-light environments. To address this task, we propose Extreme Low-light Optimized Gaussian Splatting (ELoG-GS), a robust low-light 3D reconstruction pipeline that integrates learning-based point cloud initialization and luminance-guided color enhancement for stable and photorealistic Gaussian Splatting. Our method incorporates both geometry-aware initialization and photometric adaptation strategies to improve reconstruction fidelity under challenging conditions. Extensive experiments on the NTIRE Track 1 benchmark demonstrate that our approach significantly improves reconstruction quality over the baselines, achieving superior visual fidelity and geometric consistency. The proposed method provides a practical solution for robust 3D reconstruction in real-world degraded scenarios. In the final testing phase, our method achieved a PSNR of 18.6626 and an SSIM of 0.6855 on the official platform leaderboard. Code is available at https://github.com/lyh120/FSGS_EAPGS.

analysis.tldr: 提出ELoG-GS，一种结合学习点云初始化和亮度引导增强的双分支高斯泼溅方法，用于极端低光3D重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 极端低光环境下多视图输入退化严重，现有3D重建方法难以恢复几何一致且逼真的场景，亟需鲁棒的低光重建方案。
analysis.problem: 从极端低光的多视图输入中重建高质量、几何一致且逼真的3D场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ELoG-GS，包含学习点云初始化（几何感知）和亮度引导颜色增强（光度适应）的双分支高斯泼溅管道。
contributions: 提出ELoG-GS，一种针对极端低光环境的鲁棒3D重建管道。
集成学习点云初始化和亮度引导颜色增强，提升重建保真度。
在NTIRE 2026 Track 1基准上取得领先性能，PSNR 18.6626，SSIM 0.6855。
analysis.experiments: 在NTIRE 2026 Track 1基准上进行实验，与基线相比显著提升视觉保真度和几何一致性，最终测试PSNR 18.6626，SSIM 0.6855。
