analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ELoG-GS，一种结合学习点云初始化和亮度引导增强的双分支高斯泼溅方法，用于极端低光3D重建。

papers.title: Relaxing Anchor-Frame Dominance for Mitigating Hallucinations in Video Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Recent Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) have demonstrated strong capability in video understanding, yet they still suffer from hallucinations. Existing mitigation methods typically rely on training, input modification, auxiliary guidance, or additional decoding procedures, while largely overlooking a more fundamental challenge. During generation, Video-LLMs tend to over-rely on a limited portion of temporal evidence, leading to temporally imbalanced evidence aggregation across the video. To address this issue, we investigate a decoder-side phenomenon in which the model exhibits a temporally imbalanced concentration pattern. We term the frame with the highest aggregated frame-level attention mass the anchor frame. We find that this bias is largely independent of the input video and instead appears to reflect a persistent, model-specific structural or positional bias, whose over-dominance is closely associated with hallucination-prone generation. Motivated by this insight, we propose Decoder-side Temporal Rebalancing (DTR), a training-free, layer-selective inference method that rebalances temporal evidence allocation in middle-to-late decoder layers without altering visual encoding or requiring auxiliary models. DTR adaptively calibrates decoder-side visual attention to alleviate temporally imbalanced concentration and encourage under-attended frames to contribute more effectively to response generation. In this way, DTR guides the decoder to ground its outputs in temporally broader and more balanced video evidence. Extensive experiments on hallucination and video understanding benchmarks show that DTR consistently improves hallucination robustness across diverse Video-LLM families, while preserving competitive video understanding performance and high inference efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的解码端时间重平衡方法，缓解视频大语言模型因锚帧主导导致的幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频大语言模型在生成时过度依赖少量时间证据（锚帧），导致时间证据聚合不平衡，引发幻觉，现有方法多从训练或输入修改入手，忽视了这一解码端根本问题。
analysis.problem: 视频大语言模型解码时存在时间不平衡的注意力集中现象，锚帧主导导致幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现模型存在与输入视频无关的、模型特定的结构性或位置性偏差，锚帧的过度主导与幻觉生成密切相关。
analysis.method: 提出解码端时间重平衡（DTR），一种无需训练、层选择的推理方法，在中后解码层自适应校准视觉注意力，重新平衡时间证据分配，鼓励低关注帧更有效参与生成。
contributions: 揭示视频大语言模型解码端锚帧主导现象及其与幻觉的关联
提出无需训练的解码端时间重平衡方法DTR，有效缓解幻觉
analysis.experiments: 在幻觉和视频理解基准上，DTR在多种视频大语言模型家族中一致提升幻觉鲁棒性，同时保持竞争性的视频理解性能和高推理效率。
limitations: 可能对极长视频或复杂时间依赖场景效果有限
层选择策略可能需针对不同模型微调
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的解码端时间重平衡方法，缓解视频大语言模型因锚帧主导导致的幻觉。

papers.title: PDF-GS: Progressive Distractor Filtering for Robust 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have enabled impressive real-time photorealistic rendering. However, conventional training pipelines inherently assume full multi-view consistency among input images, which makes them sensitive to distractors that violate this assumption and cause visual artifacts. In this work, we revisit an underexplored aspect of 3DGS: its inherent ability to suppress inconsistent signals. Building on this insight, we propose PDF-GS (Progressive Distractor Filtering for Robust 3D Gaussian Splatting), a framework that amplifies this self-filtering property through a progressive multi-phase optimization. The progressive filtering phases gradually remove distractors by exploiting discrepancy cues, while the following reconstruction phase restores fine-grained, view-consistent details from the purified Gaussian representation. Through this iterative refinement, PDF-GS achieves robust, high-fidelity, and distractor-free reconstructions, consistently outperforming baselines across diverse datasets and challenging real-world conditions. Moreover, our approach is lightweight and easily adaptable to existing 3DGS frameworks, requiring no architectural changes or additional inference overhead, leading to a new state-of-the-art performance. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/kangrnin/PDF-GS.

analysis.tldr: PDF-GS通过渐进式多阶段优化放大3DGS的自我过滤能力，实现鲁棒的无干扰物重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 3DGS在真实场景中易受动态物体、遮挡等干扰物影响，导致视觉伪影，现有方法缺乏对此问题的系统性处理。
analysis.problem: 如何在不改变架构的前提下，使3DGS对输入图像中的不一致信号（干扰物）具有鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到3DGS本身具有抑制不一致信号的固有特性，但该能力未被充分利用。
analysis.method: 提出渐进式多阶段优化框架PDF-GS，包含渐进过滤阶段（利用差异线索逐步移除干扰物）和重建阶段（从纯化高斯表示中恢复细粒度、视图一致的细节）。
contributions: 首次系统探索并利用3DGS的自我过滤属性来抑制干扰物。
提出渐进式多阶段优化框架，无需架构修改或额外推理开销。
在多个数据集和真实场景中达到新SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集和真实场景中与基线方法对比，PDF-GS持续优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能对极端动态场景或大面积遮挡处理有限。
渐进式优化可能增加训练时间。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PDF-GS通过渐进式多阶段优化放大3DGS的自我过滤能力，实现鲁棒的无干扰物重建。

papers.title: StructDiff: A Structure-Preserving and Spatially Controllable Diffusion Model for Single-Image Generation
papers.abstract: This paper introduces StructDiff, a generative framework based on a single-scale diffusion model for single-image generation. Single-image generation aims to synthesize diverse samples with similar visual content to the source image by capturing its internal statistics, without relying on external data. However, existing methods often struggle to preserve the structural layout, especially for images with large rigid objects or strict spatial constraints. Moreover, most approaches lack spatial controllability, making it difficult to guide the structure or placement of generated content. To address these challenges, StructDiff introduces an \textit{adaptive receptive field} module to maintain both global and local distributions. Building on this foundation, StructDiff incorporates 3D positional encoding (PE) as a spatial prior, allowing flexible control over positions, scale, and local details of generated objects. To our knowledge, this spatial control capability represents the first exploration of PE-based manipulation in single-image generation. Furthermore, we propose a novel evaluation criterion for single-image generation based on large language models (LLMs). This criterion specifically addresses the limitations of existing objective metrics and the high labor costs associated with user studies. StructDiff also demonstrates broad applicability across downstream tasks, such as text-guided image generation, image editing, outpainting, and paint-to-image synthesis. Extensive experiments demonstrate that StructDiff outperforms existing methods in structural consistency, visual quality, and spatial controllability. The project page is available at https://butter-crab.github.io/StructDiff/.

analysis.tldr: StructDiff 提出基于单尺度扩散模型的结构保持与空间可控单图像生成框架，引入自适应感受野和3D位置编码实现灵活控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 单图像生成需从单张图像捕获内部统计信息以合成多样样本，但现有方法难以保持结构布局且缺乏空间可控性，限制了在具有大刚性物体或严格空间约束场景下的应用。
analysis.problem: 解决单图像生成中结构保持困难与空间可控性缺失的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在处理大刚性物体或严格空间约束时结构布局保持不佳，且多数方法无法灵活控制生成内容的位置、尺度和局部细节。
analysis.method: 基于单尺度扩散模型，引入自适应感受野模块维持全局与局部分布，并融入3D位置编码作为空间先验，实现位置、尺度和局部细节的灵活控制；同时提出基于LLM的新评估标准。
contributions: 提出自适应感受野模块以保持单图像生成中的全局与局部结构分布。
首次将3D位置编码用于单图像生成的空间控制，实现位置、尺度和局部细节的灵活操控。
提出基于LLM的评估标准，克服现有客观指标局限和用户研究的高成本。
analysis.experiments: 在结构一致性、视觉质量和空间可控性上，StructDiff 优于现有方法，并在文本引导生成、图像编辑、外绘和绘画转图像等下游任务中展示广泛适用性。
limitations: 可能对高度纹理化或非刚性物体结构保持效果有限。
3D位置编码的引入可能增加模型复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: StructDiff 提出基于单尺度扩散模型的结构保持与空间可控单图像生成框架，引入自适应感受野和3D位置编码实现灵活控制。

papers.title: Cross-Modal Knowledge Distillation for PET-Free Amyloid-Beta Detection from MRI
papers.abstract: Detecting amyloid-$β$ (A$β$) positivity is crucial for early diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease but typically requires PET imaging, which is costly, invasive, and not widely accessible, limiting its use for population-level screening. We address this gap by proposing a PET-guided knowledge distillation framework that enables A$β$ prediction from MRI alone, without requiring non-imaging clinical covariates or PET at inference. Our approach employs a BiomedCLIP-based teacher model that learns PET-MRI alignment via cross-modal attention and triplet contrastive learning with PET-informed (Centiloid-aware) online negative sampling. An MRI-only student then mimics the teacher via feature-level and logit-level distillation. Evaluated across four MRI contrasts (T1w, T2w, FLAIR, T2*) and two independent datasets, our approach demonstrates effective knowledge transfer (best AUC: 0.74 on OASIS-3, 0.68 on ADNI) while maintaining interpretability and eliminating the need for clinical variables. Saliency analysis confirms that predictions focus on anatomically relevant cortical regions, supporting the clinical viability of PET-free A$β$ screening. Code is available at https://github.com/FrancescoChiumento/pet-guided-mri-amyloid-detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出PET引导的知识蒸馏框架，仅用MRI预测淀粉样蛋白阳性，无需PET或临床协变量。
analysis.research_motivation: 检测Aβ阳性对阿尔茨海默病早期诊断至关重要，但通常需要PET成像，成本高、有创且不易获取，限制了人群筛查。
analysis.problem: 如何仅从MRI数据预测Aβ阳性，避免对PET和临床协变量的依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于BiomedCLIP的教师模型通过跨模态注意力和三元组对比学习学习PET-MRI对齐，学生模型仅用MRI通过特征级和logit级蒸馏模仿教师。
contributions: 提出首个PET引导的MRI-only Aβ检测知识蒸馏框架，无需临床协变量。
在四个MRI对比和两个独立数据集上验证有效性，最佳AUC分别为0.74和0.68。
analysis.experiments: 在OASIS-3和ADNI数据集上评估，使用T1w、T2w、FLAIR、T2*四种MRI对比，最佳AUC为0.74和0.68。
limitations: AUC值中等，可能不足以用于临床诊断。
仅在两个数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PET引导的知识蒸馏框架，仅用MRI预测淀粉样蛋白阳性，无需PET或临床协变量。

papers.title: IDEA: An Interpretable and Editable Decision-Making Framework for LLMs via Verbal-to-Numeric Calibration
papers.abstract: Large Language Models are increasingly deployed for decision-making, yet their adoption in high-stakes domains remains limited by miscalibrated probabilities, unfaithful explanations, and inability to incorporate expert knowledge precisely. We propose IDEA, a framework that extracts LLM decision knowledge into an interpretable parametric model over semantically meaningful factors. Through joint learning of verbal-to-numerical mappings and decision parameters via EM, correlated sampling that preserves factor dependencies, and direct parameter editing with mathematical guarantees, IDEA produces calibrated probabilities while enabling quantitative human-AI collaboration. Experiments across five datasets show IDEA with Qwen-3-32B (78.6%) outperforms DeepSeek R1 (68.1%) and GPT-5.2 (77.9%), achieving perfect factor exclusion and exact calibration -- precision unattainable through prompting alone. The implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/leonbig/IDEA.

analysis.tldr: 提出IDEA框架，通过将LLM决策知识提取为可解释参数模型，实现校准概率和可编辑决策。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在高风险决策中因概率校准差、解释不可信、无法精确融入专家知识而受限。
analysis.problem: 如何从LLM中提取可解释、可编辑的决策知识，同时保证概率校准和因子依赖保持。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过EM算法联合学习语言到数值的映射和决策参数，利用相关采样保持因子依赖，并支持带数学保证的直接参数编辑。
contributions: 提出可解释可编辑的决策框架IDEA，将LLM知识转化为参数化模型
通过EM和相关性采样实现校准概率与精确因子排除
analysis.experiments: 在五个数据集上，IDEA (Qwen-3-32B) 以78.6%准确率超越DeepSeek R1 (68.1%)和GPT-5.2 (77.9%)，实现完美因子排除和精确校准。
limitations: 可能依赖特定LLM架构
因子定义需要领域知识
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出IDEA框架，通过将LLM决策知识提取为可解释参数模型，实现校准概率和可编辑决策。

papers.title: Adaptive Query Routing: A Tier-Based Framework for Hybrid Retrieval Across Financial, Legal, and Medical Documents
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become the standard paradigm for grounding Large Language Model outputs in external knowledge. Lumer et al. [1] presented the first systematic evaluation comparing vector-based agentic RAG against hierarchical node-based reasoning systems for financial document QA across 1,200 SEC filings, finding vector-based systems achieved a 68% win rate. Concurrently, the PageIndex framework [2] demonstrated 98.7% accuracy on FinanceBench through purely reasoning-based retrieval. This paper extends their work by: (i) implementing and evaluating three retrieval architectures: Vector RAG, Tree Reasoning, and the proposed Adaptive Hybrid Retrieval (AHR) across financial, legal, and medical domains; (ii) introducing a four-tier query complexity benchmark; and (iii) employing GPT-4-powered LLM-as-judge evaluation. Experiments reveal that Tree Reasoning achieves the highest overall score (0.900), but no single paradigm dominates across all tiers: Vector RAG wins on multi-document synthesis (Tier 4, score 0.900), while the Hybrid AHR achieves the best performance on cross-reference (0.850) and multi-section queries (0.929). Cross-reference recall reaches 100% for tree-based and hybrid approaches versus 91.7% for vector search, quantifying a critical capability gap. Validation on FinanceBench (150 expert-annotated questions on real SEC 10-K and 10-Q filings) confirms and strengthens these findings: Tree Reasoning scores 0.938, Hybrid AHR 0.901, and Vector RAG 0.821, with the Tree--Vector quality gap widening to 11.7 percentage points on real-world documents. These findings support the development of adaptive retrieval systems that dynamically select strategies based on query complexity and document structure. All code and data are publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应混合检索框架AHR，在金融、法律、医学文档上对比三种检索架构，发现树推理在整体上最优，但不同查询复杂度下各有优势。
analysis.research_motivation: RAG已成为LLM外部知识获取的标准范式，但现有研究缺乏对向量检索与层次化推理系统在多个领域和查询复杂度下的系统比较，且未考虑自适应策略。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能够根据查询复杂度和文档结构动态选择检索策略的混合检索框架，以提升跨领域文档问答的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现没有单一范式在所有查询层级上占优：向量RAG在多文档综合查询（Tier 4）上最优，树推理在整体得分最高，混合AHR在交叉引用和多节查询上表现最佳；树推理和混合方法的交叉引用召回率达100%，而向量搜索仅91.7%。
analysis.method: 提出自适应混合检索（AHR）框架，结合向量检索和树推理，并引入四层查询复杂度基准（Tier 1-4），使用GPT-4作为裁判进行评估。
contributions: 在金融、法律、医学三个领域系统评估了向量RAG、树推理和自适应混合检索三种架构。
引入四层查询复杂度基准，揭示了不同检索范式在不同复杂度下的性能差异。
在FinanceBench上验证了树推理和混合方法的优势，并公开了代码和数据。
analysis.experiments: 在金融（SEC文件）、法律和医学文档上进行了实验，使用1200份SEC文件、150个专家标注的FinanceBench问题，采用GPT-4裁判评估。
limitations: 仅基于GPT-4作为裁判，可能引入模型偏见。
未讨论自适应策略的具体实现细节和计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应混合检索框架AHR，在金融、法律、医学文档上对比三种检索架构，发现树推理在整体上最优，但不同查询复杂度下各有优势。

papers.title: Evolution-Inspired Sample Competition for Deep Neural Network Optimization
papers.abstract: Conventional deep network training generally optimizes all samples under a largely uniform learning paradigm, without explicitly modeling the heterogeneous competition among them. Such an oversimplified treatment can lead to several well-known issues, including bias under class imbalance, insufficient learning of hard samples, and the erroneous reinforcement of noisy samples. In this work, we present \textit{Natural Selection} (NS), a novel evolution-inspired optimization method that explicitly incorporates competitive interactions into deep network training. Unlike conventional sample reweighting strategies that rely mainly on predefined heuristics or static criteria, NS estimates the competitive status of each sample in a group-wise context and uses it to adaptively regulate its training contribution. Specifically, NS first assembles multiple samples into a composite image and rescales it to the original input size for model inference. Based on the resulting predictions, a natural selection score is computed for each sample to characterize its relative competitive variation within the constructed group. These scores are then used to dynamically reweight the sample-wise loss, thereby introducing an explicit competition-driven mechanism into the optimization process. In this way, NS provides a simple yet effective means of moving beyond uniform sample treatment and enables more adaptive and balanced model optimization. Extensive experiments on 12 public datasets across four image classification tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. Moreover, NS is compatible with diverse network architectures and does not depend on task-specific assumptions, indicating its strong generality and practical potential. The code will be made publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 受进化启发的样本竞争机制，通过组内竞争得分动态调整样本权重，提升深度网络优化效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统深度网络训练对所有样本采用统一学习范式，未建模样本间的异质竞争，导致类别不平衡偏差、难样本学习不足和噪声样本错误强化等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何显式地将样本间的竞争交互引入深度网络优化，实现自适应、平衡的样本加权。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Natural Selection (NS)方法：将多个样本组合成复合图像并缩放至原始输入尺寸进行推理，基于预测结果计算每个样本的自然选择得分（表征其在组内的相对竞争变化），并动态重加权样本损失。
contributions: 提出进化启发的样本竞争优化方法NS，显式建模样本间竞争交互。
在12个公开数据集、4种图像分类任务上验证有效性，兼容多种网络架构且无需任务特定假设。
analysis.experiments: 在12个公开数据集、4种图像分类任务上进行实验，验证了方法的有效性。
limitations: 复合图像的构造方式可能引入额外计算开销。
竞争得分的计算依赖于组内样本构成，组大小和选择策略需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 受进化启发的样本竞争机制，通过组内竞争得分动态调整样本权重，提升深度网络优化效果。

papers.title: Scalable Trajectory Generation for Whole-Body Mobile Manipulation
papers.abstract: Robots deployed in unstructured environments must coordinate whole-body motion -- simultaneously moving a mobile base and arm -- to interact with the physical world. This coupled mobility and dexterity yields a state space that grows combinatorially with scene and object diversity, demanding datasets far larger than those sufficient for fixed-base manipulation. Yet existing acquisition methods, including teleoperation and planning, are either labor-intensive or computationally prohibitive at scale. The core bottleneck is the lack of a scalable pipeline for generating large-scale, physically valid, coordinated trajectory data across diverse embodiments and environments. Here we introduce AutoMoMa, a GPU-accelerated framework that unifies AKR modeling, which consolidates base, arm, and object kinematics into a single chain, with parallelized trajectory optimization. AutoMoMa achieves 5,000 episodes per GPU-hour (over $80\times$ faster than CPU-based baselines), producing a dataset of over 500k physically valid trajectories spanning 330 scenes, diverse articulated objects, and multiple robot embodiments. Prior datasets were forced to compromise on scale, diversity, or kinematic fidelity; AutoMoMa addresses all three simultaneously. Training downstream IL policies further reveals that even a single articulated-object task requires tens of thousands of demonstrations for SOTA methods to reach $\approx 80\%$ success, confirming that data scarcity -- not algorithmic limitations -- has been the binding constraint. AutoMoMa thus bridges high-performance planning and reliable IL-based control, providing the infrastructure previously missing for coordinated mobile manipulation research. By making large-scale, kinematically valid training data practical, AutoMoMa showcases generalizable whole-body robot policies capable of operating in the diverse, unstructured settings of the real world.

analysis.tldr: AutoMoMa 是一个 GPU 加速框架，通过统一运动学建模和并行轨迹优化，实现大规模全身移动操作轨迹的高效生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人在非结构化环境中需要协调全身运动，但现有数据采集方法（如遥操作和规划）要么劳动密集，要么计算成本过高，导致缺乏大规模、物理有效的协调轨迹数据。
analysis.problem: 如何高效生成大规模、物理有效、覆盖多种场景和机器人的全身移动操作轨迹数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 AutoMoMa 框架，结合 AKR 建模（将基座、手臂和物体运动学统一为单链）和 GPU 并行轨迹优化。
contributions: 提出 AutoMoMa，一个 GPU 加速的全身移动操作轨迹生成框架，速度比 CPU 基线快 80 倍以上。
生成包含超过 50 万条物理有效轨迹的数据集，覆盖 330 个场景、多种铰接物体和机器人形态。
实验表明，即使单个铰接物体任务也需要数万条演示才能达到约 80% 的成功率，证实数据稀缺是主要瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 在多个场景和机器人形态上生成轨迹，并训练下游模仿学习策略，验证了数据规模对成功率的影响。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的移动操作任务，泛化性有待验证。
未讨论生成轨迹的多样性或最优性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AutoMoMa 是一个 GPU 加速框架，通过统一运动学建模和并行轨迹优化，实现大规模全身移动操作轨迹的高效生成。

papers.title: Cross-Attentive Multiview Fusion of Vision-Language Embeddings
papers.abstract: Vision-language models have been key to the development of open-vocabulary 2D semantic segmentation. Lifting these models from 2D images to 3D scenes, however, remains a challenging problem. Existing approaches typically back-project and average 2D descriptors across views, or heuristically select a single representative one, often resulting in suboptimal 3D representations. In this work, we introduce a novel multiview transformer architecture that cross-attends across vision-language descriptors from multiple viewpoints and fuses them into a unified per-3D-instance embedding. As a second contribution, we leverage multiview consistency as a self-supervision signal for this fusion, which significantly improves performance when added to a standard supervised target-class loss. Our Cross-Attentive Multiview Fusion, which we denote with its acronym CAMFusion, not only consistently outperforms naive averaging or single-view descriptor selection, but also achieves state-of-the-art results on 3D semantic and instance classification benchmarks, including zero-shot evaluations on out-of-domain datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出跨注意力多视图融合架构，将2D视觉-语言描述符融合为统一的3D实例嵌入，实现3D语义分割SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 将2D视觉-语言模型提升到3D场景时，现有方法（如反投影平均或启发式选择单视图）导致3D表示次优，亟需更有效的多视图融合策略。
analysis.problem: 如何从多个视图的2D视觉-语言描述符中融合出高质量的3D实例嵌入，以提升开放词汇3D语义分割性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出跨注意力多视图融合（CAMFusion）架构，使用跨注意力机制融合多视图描述符，并利用多视图一致性作为自监督信号辅助训练。
contributions: 提出跨注意力多视图融合架构，有效融合多视图视觉-语言描述符为统一3D实例嵌入。
利用多视图一致性作为自监督信号，提升融合性能，在3D语义和实例分类基准上达到SOTA，包括零样本评估。
analysis.experiments: 在3D语义和实例分类基准上评估，包括零样本跨域数据集，CAMFusion优于平均池化和单视图选择，达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖多视图输入，单视图场景下不适用。
跨注意力机制计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出跨注意力多视图融合架构，将2D视觉-语言描述符融合为统一的3D实例嵌入，实现3D语义分割SOTA。

papers.title: Cross-Cultural Simulation of Citizen Emotional Responses to Bureaucratic Red Tape Using LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Improving policymaking is a central concern in public administration. Prior human subject studies reveal substantial cross-cultural differences in citizens' emotional responses to red tape during policy implementation. While LLM agents offer opportunities to simulate human-like responses and reduce experimental costs, their ability to generate culturally appropriate emotional responses to red tape remains unverified. To address this gap, we propose an evaluation framework for assessing LLMs' emotional responses to red tape across diverse cultural contexts. As a pilot study, we apply this framework to a single red-tape scenario. Our results show that all models exhibit limited alignment with human emotional responses, with notably weaker performance in Eastern cultures. Cultural prompting strategies prove largely ineffective in improving alignment. We further introduce \textbf{RAMO}, an interactive interface for simulating citizens' emotional responses to red tape and for collecting human data to improve models. The interface is publicly available at https://ramo-chi.ivia.ch.

analysis.tldr: LLM在模拟不同文化下公民对官僚程序的情绪反应时表现不佳，尤其在东方文化中。
analysis.research_motivation: 公共管理中政策制定需考虑公民情绪反应，但跨文化差异大，传统实验成本高；LLM虽可模拟人类反应，但其跨文化情绪模拟能力未经验证。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM在跨文化背景下对官僚程序（red tape）产生文化适宜情绪反应的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有模型与人类情绪反应对齐有限，东方文化下表现更弱；文化提示策略基本无效。
analysis.method: 提出评估框架，针对单一官僚场景进行试点研究，并开发交互界面RAMO用于模拟和收集人类数据。
contributions: 提出评估LLM跨文化情绪反应能力的框架
通过实验揭示LLM在东方文化下情绪模拟的不足
开发RAMO交互界面以促进数据收集和模型改进
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及所有模型表现有限。
limitations: 仅基于单一官僚场景，泛化性有限
未深入分析模型失败原因或提出有效改进方法
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在模拟不同文化下公民对官僚程序的情绪反应时表现不佳，尤其在东方文化中。

papers.title: A Two-Stage LLM Framework for Accessible and Verified XAI Explanations
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used to translate the technical outputs of eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) methods into accessible natural-language explanations. However, existing approaches often lack guarantees of accuracy, faithfulness, and completeness. At the same time, current efforts to evaluate such narratives remain largely subjective or confined to post-hoc scoring, offering no safeguards to prevent flawed explanations from reaching end-users. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a Two-Stage LLM Meta-Verification Framework that consists of (i) an Explainer LLM that converts raw XAI outputs into natural-language narratives, (ii) a Verifier LLM that assesses them in terms of faithfulness, coherence, completeness, and hallucination risk, and (iii) an iterative refeed mechanism that uses the Verifier's feedback to refine and improve them. Experiments across five XAI techniques and datasets, using three families of open-weight LLMs, show that verification is crucial for filtering unreliable explanations while improving linguistic accessibility compared with raw XAI outputs. In addition, the analysis of the Entropy Production Rate (EPR) during the refinement process indicates that the Verifier's feedback progressively guides the Explainer toward more stable and coherent reasoning. Overall, the proposed framework provides an efficient pathway toward more trustworthy and democratized XAI systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出两阶段LLM元验证框架，通过解释器与验证器迭代提升XAI解释的准确性和可访问性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM生成的XAI自然语言解释缺乏准确性、忠实性和完整性保证，且评估方法主观或事后，无法防止错误解释到达用户。
analysis.problem: 如何生成既准确忠实又易于理解的自然语言XAI解释，并确保其质量可控。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段LLM元验证框架：解释器LLM将原始XAI输出转为自然语言叙述，验证器LLM评估忠实性、连贯性、完整性和幻觉风险，并通过迭代反馈机制优化解释。
contributions: 提出包含解释器、验证器和迭代反馈的两阶段LLM框架，提升XAI解释的准确性和可访问性。
通过熵产生率分析揭示验证器反馈引导解释器向更稳定连贯推理的过程。
analysis.experiments: 在五种XAI技术和数据集上，使用三个开源LLM家族进行实验，验证了框架在过滤不可靠解释和提升语言可访问性方面的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖验证器LLM自身的可靠性，存在验证偏差风险。
迭代反馈机制可能增加计算开销，实时性受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两阶段LLM元验证框架，通过解释器与验证器迭代提升XAI解释的准确性和可访问性。

papers.title: When Does Data Augmentation Help? Evaluating LLM and Back-Translation Methods for Hausa and Fongbe NLP
papers.abstract: Data scarcity limits NLP development for low-resource African languages. We evaluate two data augmentation methods -- LLM-based generation (Gemini 2.5 Flash) and back-translation (NLLB-200) -- for Hausa and Fongbe, two West African languages that differ substantially in LLM generation quality. We assess augmentation on named entity recognition (NER) and part-of-speech (POS) tagging using MasakhaNER 2.0 and MasakhaPOS benchmarks. Our results reveal that augmentation effectiveness depends on task type rather than language or LLM quality alone. For NER, neither method improves over baseline for either language; LLM augmentation reduces Hausa NER by 0.24% F1 and Fongbe NER by 1.81% F1. For POS tagging, LLM augmentation improves Fongbe by 0.33% accuracy, while back-translation improves Hausa by 0.17%; back-translation reduces Fongbe POS by 0.35% and has negligible effect on Hausa POS. The same LLM-generated synthetic data produces opposite effects across tasks for Fongbe -- hurting NER while helping POS -- suggesting task structure governs augmentation outcomes more than synthetic data quality. These findings challenge the assumption that LLM generation quality predicts augmentation success, and provide actionable guidance: data augmentation should be treated as a task-specific intervention rather than a universally beneficial preprocessing step.

analysis.tldr: 数据增强效果取决于任务类型而非语言或LLM生成质量，对NER无效甚至有害，对POS有微弱提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 低资源非洲语言NLP发展受限于数据稀缺，数据增强是常用缓解手段，但LLM生成和回译方法在不同语言和任务上的有效性缺乏系统评估。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM生成和回译两种数据增强方法在豪萨语和丰贝语的NER和POS任务上的效果，并探究影响增强效果的关键因素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 同一LLM生成的合成数据对丰贝语NER和POS产生相反效果（NER下降1.81% F1，POS提升0.33%），表明任务结构比合成数据质量更能决定增强效果。
analysis.method: 使用LLM（Gemini 2.5 Flash）生成和回译（NLLB-200）两种方法进行数据增强，在MasakhaNER 2.0和MasakhaPOS基准上评估NER和POS性能。
contributions: 揭示数据增强效果主要取决于任务类型而非语言或LLM生成质量。
提供具体实验证据：NER任务上两种增强方法均无效甚至有害，POS任务上仅有微弱提升。
挑战了“LLM生成质量高则增强效果好”的普遍假设。
analysis.experiments: 在豪萨语和丰贝语的NER和POS任务上进行了实验，使用MasakhaNER 2.0和MasakhaPOS基准，报告了F1和准确率变化。
limitations: 仅评估两种增强方法和两个任务，泛化性有限。
未深入分析任务结构如何影响增强效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 数据增强效果取决于任务类型而非语言或LLM生成质量，对NER无效甚至有害，对POS有微弱提升。

papers.title: MODIX: A Training-Free Multimodal Information-Driven Positional Index Scaling for Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in multimodal understanding, yet their positional encoding mechanisms remain suboptimal. Existing approaches uniformly assign positional indices to all tokens, overlooking variations in information density within and across modalities, which leads to inefficient attention allocation where redundant visual regions dominate while informative content is underrepresented. We identify positional granularity as an implicit resource and propose MODIX (Multimodal Information-Driven Positional IndeX Scaling), a training-free framework that dynamically adapts positional strides based on modality-specific contributions. MODIX jointly models intra-modal density via covariance-based entropy and inter-modal interaction via cross-modal alignment to derive unified scores, which rescale positional indices to allocate finer granularity to informative modalities while compressing redundant ones, without requiring any modification to model parameters or architecture. Experiments across diverse architectures and benchmarks demonstrate that MODIX consistently improves multimodal reasoning and adaptively reallocates attention according to task-dependent information distributions, suggesting that positional encoding should be treated as an adaptive resource in Transformers for multimodal sequence modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的模态信息驱动位置索引缩放方法，动态调整位置步长以改善VLM注意力分配。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM对所有token统一分配位置索引，忽略了模态内和跨模态的信息密度差异，导致冗余视觉区域主导注意力，而信息丰富区域被忽视。
analysis.problem: VLM中位置编码机制未考虑信息密度差异，造成注意力分配低效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出统一位置索引导致冗余视觉区域主导注意力，信息丰富内容被低估。
analysis.method: MODIX：基于协方差熵的模态内密度和跨模态对齐的模态间交互联合建模，得到统一分数，动态缩放位置索引，无需训练或修改模型参数。
contributions: 识别位置粒度作为隐式资源，提出训练无关的MODIX框架。
通过模态信息驱动的位置索引缩放，自适应重新分配注意力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模态信息度量（协方差熵）的有效性。
未在极长序列或极端冗余场景下验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的模态信息驱动位置索引缩放方法，动态调整位置步长以改善VLM注意力分配。

papers.title: Technical Report -- A Context-Sensitive Multi-Level Similarity Framework for First-Order Logic Arguments: An Axiomatic Study
papers.abstract: Similarity in formal argumentation has recently gained attention due to its significance in problems such as argument aggregation in semantics and enthymeme decoding. While existing approaches focus on propositional logic, we address the richer setting of First-Order Logic (FOL), where similarity must account for structured content. We introduce a comprehensive framework for FOL argument similarity, built upon: (1) an extended axiomatic foundation; (2) a four-level parametric model covering predicates, literals, clauses, and formulae similarity; (3) two model families, one syntax-sensitive via language models, both integrating contextual weights for nuanced and explainable similarity; and (4) formal constraints enforcing desirable properties.

analysis.tldr: 提出一阶逻辑论证的多层次相似性框架，包含公理基础和参数化模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有形式论证相似性研究局限于命题逻辑，无法处理一阶逻辑的结构化内容，而一阶逻辑在语义聚合和省略推理解码等任务中具有重要应用。
analysis.problem: 如何定义和计算一阶逻辑论证之间的相似性，使其既能捕捉结构化内容，又满足可解释性和形式约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建了包含扩展公理基础、四层参数化模型（谓词、文字、子句、公式）、两个模型家族（其中一种通过语言模型实现语法敏感）以及形式约束的框架，并集成上下文权重。
contributions: 提出了首个面向一阶逻辑论证的相似性框架，覆盖多层次结构。
建立了扩展的公理基础，并设计了两个模型家族以实现可解释的相似性度量。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏大规模实证验证。
框架的复杂度可能影响实际计算效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一阶逻辑论证的多层次相似性框架，包含公理基础和参数化模型。

papers.title: Orthogonal Subspace Projection for Continual Machine Unlearning via SVD-Based LoRA
papers.abstract: Continual machine unlearning aims to remove the influence of data that should no longer be retained, while preserving the usefulness of the model on everything else. This setting becomes especially difficult when deletion requests arrive sequentially, because the model must repeatedly adapt without erasing previously retained knowledge. Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) offers an efficient way to implement such updates, but naively combining many sequential LoRA modules leads to parameter collision, causing \textit{strong interference} between tasks. We propose a static alternative based on Singular Value Decomposition (SVD)-guided orthogonal subspace projection. Our method constrains each new LoRA update during training so that it lies in the orthogonal complement of the subspaces used by earlier unlearning tasks. This preserves task isolation without requiring dynamic routing at deployment. Experiments on CIFAR-100 with ResNet-20 and on MNIST show stable behavior across long sequences of unlearning tasks. After thirty sequential unlearning tasks, state-of-the-art static fusion reduces retained accuracy from 60.39\% to 12.70\%, whereas the proposed in-training constrained optimization maintains baseline performance ($\sim$58.1\%) while preserving strong unlearning efficacy.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于SVD引导的正交子空间投影方法，解决持续机器遗忘中LoRA参数冲突问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 持续机器遗忘需要模型在顺序删除数据请求下反复适应，但现有LoRA方法因参数冲突导致任务间严重干扰，影响模型性能。
analysis.problem: 持续机器遗忘中顺序LoRA模块的参数碰撞导致任务间干扰，降低模型保留知识的稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，简单组合多个顺序LoRA模块会导致参数碰撞，引起任务间强干扰；实验显示SOTA静态融合在30个遗忘任务后保留准确率从60.39%降至12.70%。
analysis.method: 基于SVD引导的正交子空间投影，在训练时将每个新LoRA更新约束在先前遗忘任务子空间的正交补中，实现任务隔离。
contributions: 提出一种静态替代方法，通过SVD引导的正交子空间投影避免顺序LoRA的参数碰撞。
在CIFAR-100和MNIST上验证，30个顺序遗忘任务后仍保持基线性能（约58.1%），同时保持强遗忘效果。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-100（ResNet-20）和MNIST上评估，经过30个顺序遗忘任务，方法保持约58.1%的保留准确率，而SOTA静态融合降至12.70%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于LoRA的模型更新，泛化性需进一步验证。
SVD分解可能带来额外计算开销，未在更大规模模型上测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于SVD引导的正交子空间投影方法，解决持续机器遗忘中LoRA参数冲突问题。

papers.title: CoD-Lite: Real-Time Diffusion-Based Generative Image Compression
papers.abstract: Recent advanced diffusion methods typically derive strong generative priors by scaling diffusion transformers. However, scaling fails to generalize when adapted for real-time compression scenarios that demand lightweight models. In this paper, we explore the design of real-time and lightweight diffusion codecs by addressing two pivotal questions. First, does diffusion pre-training benefit lightweight diffusion codecs? Through systematic analysis, we find that generation-oriented pre-training is less effective at small model scales whereas compression-oriented pre-training yields consistently better performance. Second, are transformers essential? We find that while global attention is crucial for standard generation, lightweight convolutions suffice for compression-oriented diffusion when paired with distillation. Guided by these findings, we establish a one-step lightweight convolution diffusion codec that achieves real-time $60$~FPS encoding and $42$~FPS decoding at 1080p. Further enhanced by distillation and adversarial learning, the proposed codec reduces bitrate by 85\% at a comparable FID to MS-ILLM, bridging the gap between generative compression and practical real-time deployment. Codes are released at https://github.com/microsoft/GenCodec/tree/main/CoD_Lite

analysis.tldr: 提出实时轻量级扩散图像编解码器CoD-Lite，通过压缩导向预训练和轻量卷积实现60 FPS编码/42 FPS解码，比特率降低85%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散压缩方法依赖大规模Transformer，难以满足实时轻量级部署需求，亟需探索轻量级扩散编解码器的设计原则。
analysis.problem: 如何设计实时、轻量级的扩散图像压缩模型，同时保持生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 生成导向预训练在小模型上效果差，而压缩导向预训练持续更优；全局注意力对压缩非必需，轻量卷积配合蒸馏即可。
analysis.method: 提出CoD-Lite，采用压缩导向预训练、轻量卷积架构、单步扩散蒸馏，并结合对抗学习。
contributions: 揭示扩散预训练和注意力机制在轻量级压缩场景下的关键发现
提出实时轻量级扩散编解码器，实现60 FPS编码/42 FPS解码，比特率降低85%
analysis.experiments: 在FID指标上与MS-ILLM比较，比特率降低85%且FID相当；未提供其他数据集或消融实验细节。
limitations: 可能仅在特定分辨率（1080p）和特定数据集上验证
单步蒸馏可能限制生成多样性
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出实时轻量级扩散图像编解码器CoD-Lite，通过压缩导向预训练和轻量卷积实现60 FPS编码/42 FPS解码，比特率降低85%。

papers.title: Semantically Stable Image Composition Analysis via Saliency and Gradient Vector Flow Fusion
papers.abstract: The reliable computational assessment of photographic composition requires features that are discriminative of spatial layout yet robust to semantic content. This paper proposes a low-level representation grounded in the assumption that composition can be understood as the flow of visual attention across geometric structure. We introduce VFCNet, which fuses saliency and edge information into a gradient vector flow (GVF) field. The model computes dual-stream GVF representations, integrates them via attention, and extracts multi-scale flow features with a DINOv3 backbone. VFCNet achieves state-of-the-art performance on the PICD benchmark (CDA-1: 0.683, CDA-2: 0.629), improving by 33.1\% and 36.1\% over the previous best method. We also show that a simple classifier on self-supervised DINOv3 features substantially outperforms more sophisticated, composition-specialized models. Code is available at https://github.com/ADadras/VFCNet

analysis.tldr: 提出VFCNet，融合显著性和边缘信息为梯度向量流场，用于图像构图评估，在PICD基准上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像构图评估方法难以同时区分空间布局和语义内容，需要一种对语义鲁棒的低层表示。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种对语义内容鲁棒、能有效评估图像构图的计算特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: VFCNet：融合显著图和边缘信息生成梯度向量流（GVF）场，通过双流GVF表示和注意力机制集成，利用DINOv3骨干提取多尺度流特征。
contributions: 提出基于GVF的低层构图表示，融合显著性和边缘信息。
VFCNet在PICD基准上实现SOTA，CDA-1和CDA-2分别提升33.1%和36.1%。
发现简单分类器在自监督DINOv3特征上优于复杂构图专用模型。
analysis.experiments: 在PICD基准上评估，CDA-1: 0.683, CDA-2: 0.629，相比之前最佳方法提升33.1%和36.1%。
limitations: 仅针对图像构图评估，未涉及其他视觉任务。
依赖DINOv3预训练特征，可能受限于其表示能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VFCNet，融合显著性和边缘信息为梯度向量流场，用于图像构图评估，在PICD基准上取得SOTA。

papers.title: Balanced Aggregation: Understanding and Fixing Aggregation Bias in GRPO
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a central paradigm for improving reasoning and code generation in large language models, and GRPO-style training is widely adopted for its simplicity and effectiveness. However, an important design choice remains underexplored: how token-level policy gradient terms are aggregated within each sampled group. Standard GRPO uses sequence aggregation, while recent work has advocated token aggregation as a better alternative. We show that these two rules induce different optimization biases: token aggregation introduces sign-length coupling, while sequence aggregation implicitly downweights longer responses through sequence-level equal weighting. To address this tension, we propose \textbf{Balanced Aggregation (BA)}, a simple drop-in replacement that computes token-level means separately within the positive and negative subsets and then combines them with sequence-count-based weights. Experiments with Qwen2.5-Math-7B and Qwen3-1.7B on DAPO-17k and Polaris, evaluated on six reasoning and coding benchmarks, show that BA consistently improves training stability and final performance over standard token and sequence aggregation. Our analysis further shows that the relative effectiveness of token and sequence aggregation is largely governed by response-length variation and the positive-negative length gap, highlighting aggregation as a critical design dimension in GRPO-style RLVR.

analysis.tldr: 提出平衡聚合方法，解决GRPO中token聚合与序列聚合的偏差问题，提升推理与代码生成性能。
analysis.research_motivation: GRPO风格的强化学习在提升大语言模型推理和代码生成中广泛应用，但token级策略梯度项的聚合方式（序列聚合与token聚合）存在未被充分研究的偏差，影响训练稳定性和最终性能。
analysis.problem: GRPO训练中token级策略梯度聚合方式（序列聚合与token聚合）引入不同的优化偏差，导致训练不稳定或性能下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: token聚合引入符号-长度耦合，序列聚合通过序列级等权隐式降低长响应的权重；两种聚合的相对有效性受响应长度变化和正负长度差距影响。
analysis.method: 提出平衡聚合（BA），在正负子集内分别计算token级均值，然后用序列计数权重组合，作为标准聚合的即插即用替代。
contributions: 揭示了GRPO中序列聚合与token聚合的不同优化偏差及其影响因素。
提出平衡聚合方法，在多个基准上提升训练稳定性和最终性能。
analysis.experiments: 使用Qwen2.5-Math-7B和Qwen3-1.7B在DAPO-17k和Polaris数据集上，基于六个推理和代码基准评估，BA一致优于标准token和序列聚合。
limitations: 方法仅在数学和代码任务上验证，其他领域效果未知。
未讨论超参数（如正负子集划分阈值）的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出平衡聚合方法，解决GRPO中token聚合与序列聚合的偏差问题，提升推理与代码生成性能。

papers.title: NTIRE 2026 The 3rd Restore Any Image Model (RAIM) Challenge: Professional Image Quality Assessment (Track 1)
papers.abstract: In this paper, we present an overview of the NTIRE 2026 challenge on the 3rd Restore Any Image Model in the Wild, specifically focusing on Track 1: Professional Image Quality Assessment. Conventional Image Quality Assessment (IQA) typically relies on scalar scores. By compressing complex visual characteristics into a single number, these methods fundamentally struggle to distinguish subtle differences among uniformly high-quality images. Furthermore, they fail to articulate why one image is superior, lacking the reasoning capabilities required to provide guidance for vision tasks. To bridge this gap, recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) offer a promising paradigm. Inspired by this potential, our challenge establishes a novel benchmark exploring the ability of MLLMs to mimic human expert cognition in evaluating high-quality image pairs. Participants were tasked with overcoming critical bottlenecks in professional scenarios, centering on two primary objectives: (1) Comparative Quality Selection: reliably identifying the visually superior image within a high-quality pair; and (2) Interpretative Reasoning: generating grounded, expert-level explanations that detail the rationale behind the selection. In total, the challenge attracted nearly 200 registrations and over 2,500 submissions. The top-performing methods significantly advanced the state of the art in professional IQA. The challenge dataset is available at https://github.com/narthchin/RAIM-PIQA, and the official homepage is accessible at https://www.codabench.org/competitions/12789/.

analysis.tldr: NTIRE 2026挑战赛Track 1：利用多模态大语言模型进行专业图像质量评估，要求模型在高质量图像对中选出更优者并给出专家级解释。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统IQA使用标量分数，无法区分高质量图像间的细微差异，且缺乏可解释性，无法为视觉任务提供指导。
analysis.problem: 如何让MLLM像人类专家一样评估高质量图像对，实现比较性质量选择和可解释性推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建基准数据集和挑战赛，要求参赛模型完成两项任务：比较质量选择和可解释性推理。
contributions: 建立了专业图像质量评估的新基准，探索MLLM模拟人类专家认知的能力。
组织了大规模挑战赛，吸引了近200个注册和超过2500次提交，推动了专业IQA领域的发展。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅关注高质量图像对，对低质量图像评估的泛化性未知。
解释性推理的质量评估标准可能主观。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NTIRE 2026挑战赛Track 1：利用多模态大语言模型进行专业图像质量评估，要求模型在高质量图像对中选出更优者并给出专家级解释。

papers.title: Whole-Body Mobile Manipulation using Offline Reinforcement Learning on Sub-optimal Controllers
papers.abstract: Mobile Manipulation (MoMa) of articulated objects, such as opening doors, drawers, and cupboards, demands simultaneous, whole-body coordination between a robot's base and arms. Classical whole-body controllers (WBCs) can solve such problems via hierarchical optimization, but require extensive hand-tuned optimization and remain brittle. Learning-based methods, on the other hand, show strong generalization capabilities but typically rely on expensive whole-body teleoperation data or heavy reward engineering. We observe that even a sub-optimal WBC is a powerful structural prior: it can be used to collect data in a constrained, task-relevant region of the state-action space, and its behavior can still be improved upon using offline reinforcement learning. Building on this, we propose WHOLE-MoMa, a two-stage pipeline that first generates diverse demonstrations by randomizing a lightweight WBC, and then applies offline RL to identify and stitch together improved behaviors via a reward signal. To support the expressive action-chunked diffusion policies needed for complex coordination tasks, we extend offline implicit Q-learning with Q-chunking for chunk-level critic evaluation and advantage-weighted policy extraction. On three tasks of increasing difficulty using a TIAGo++ mobile manipulator in simulation, WHOLE-MoMa significantly outperforms WBC, behavior cloning, and several offline RL baselines. Policies transfer directly to the real robot without finetuning, achieving 80% success in bimanual drawer manipulation and 68% in simultaneous cupboard opening and object placement, all without any teleoperated or real-world training data.

analysis.tldr: 利用次优全身控制器收集数据，通过离线强化学习提升移动操作性能，无需遥操作或真实训练数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 移动操作需要全身协调，经典控制器需手工调参且脆弱，学习方法依赖昂贵数据或奖励工程，现有方法难以兼顾泛化与效率。
analysis.problem: 如何利用次优全身控制器作为先验，通过离线强化学习提升移动操作策略，避免遥操作数据和真实环境训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 次优WBC虽性能有限，但能高效收集状态-动作空间中受限但任务相关的数据，其行为可通过离线RL进一步改进。
analysis.method: 提出WHOLE-MoMa两阶段流水线：先随机化轻量WBC生成多样化演示，再应用离线RL（扩展隐式Q学习，引入Q-chunking进行块级评论家评估和优势加权策略提取）优化行为。
contributions: 提出利用次优WBC作为结构先验，结合离线RL提升移动操作性能的框架
扩展隐式Q学习，提出Q-chunking支持动作块扩散策略的离线训练
在仿真和真实机器人上验证，无需遥操作或真实数据即可实现高成功率
analysis.experiments: 在TIAGo++移动操作臂上完成三个难度递增的任务，与WBC、行为克隆和多种离线RL基线对比，WHOLE-MoMa显著更优；策略直接迁移到真实机器人，双抽屉操作成功率80%，同时开柜门和放物体成功率68%。
limitations: 依赖WBC的初始数据质量，极端复杂任务可能需更多随机化
仿真到真实的迁移未考虑动态环境变化
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用次优全身控制器收集数据，通过离线强化学习提升移动操作性能，无需遥操作或真实训练数据。

papers.title: From Attenuation to Attention: Variational Information Flow Manipulation for Fine-Grained Visual Perception
papers.abstract: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in general visual understanding, they frequently falter in fine-grained perception tasks that require identifying tiny objects or discerning subtle visual relationships. We attribute this limitation to Visual Attenuation: a phenomenon where sparse fine-grained visual signals are prematurely suppressed or diluted by dominant textual tokens during network propagation, resulting in a "loss of focus" during the deep-level decision-making process. Existing input-centric solutions fail to fundamentally reverse this intrinsic mechanism of information loss. To address this challenge, we propose the Variational Information Flow (VIF) framework. Adopting a probabilistic perspective, VIF leverages a Conditional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE) to model the visual saliency relevant to the question-answer pair as a latent distribution. As a plug-and-play module, VIF can be integrated into existing architectures. Extensive evaluations across diverse benchmarks, covering General VQA, fine-grained perception, and visual grounding, demonstrate that VIF yields competitive improvements over previous methods, validating its effectiveness in enhancing the fine-grained perception of MLLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出变分信息流（VIF）框架，通过CVAE建模视觉显著性分布，缓解多模态大模型在细粒度感知中的视觉衰减问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在通用视觉理解上表现优异，但在细粒度感知任务（如识别微小物体或细微视觉关系）中频繁失败，现有输入级方案无法从根本上逆转信息损失的内在机制。
analysis.problem: 多模态大模型在细粒度视觉感知中因视觉衰减（Visual Attenuation）导致稀疏细粒度信号被主导文本标记过早抑制或稀释，造成深度决策过程中的焦点丢失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到视觉衰减现象：稀疏的细粒度视觉信号在网络传播中被主导文本标记过早抑制或稀释，导致深度决策时失去焦点。
analysis.method: 提出变分信息流（VIF）框架，采用概率视角，利用条件变分自编码器（CVAE）将与问答对相关的视觉显著性建模为潜在分布，作为即插即用模块集成到现有架构中。
contributions: 识别并形式化了多模态大模型中的视觉衰减现象。
提出VIF框架，通过CVAE建模视觉显著性分布以增强细粒度感知。
在多个基准上验证了VIF的有效性，包括通用VQA、细粒度感知和视觉定位。
analysis.experiments: 在通用VQA、细粒度感知和视觉定位等多个基准上进行评估，VIF相比先前方法取得竞争性改进。
limitations: 摘要未提及计算开销或推理速度的影响。
可能依赖高质量问答对来训练CVAE，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出变分信息流（VIF）框架，通过CVAE建模视觉显著性分布，缓解多模态大模型在细粒度感知中的视觉衰减问题。

papers.title: Topology-Aware Reasoning over Incomplete Knowledge Graph with Graph-Based Soft Prompting
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown remarkable capabilities across various tasks but remain prone to hallucinations in knowledge-intensive scenarios. Knowledge Base Question Answering (KBQA) mitigates this by grounding generation in Knowledge Graphs (KGs). However, most multi-hop KBQA methods rely on explicit edge traversal, making them fragile to KG incompleteness. In this paper, we proposed a novel graph-based soft prompting framework that shifts the reasoning paradigm from node-level path traversal to subgraph-level reasoning. Specifically, we employ a Graph Neural Network (GNN) to encode extracted structural subgraphs into soft prompts, enabling LLM to reason over richer structural context and identify relevant entities beyond immediate graph neighbors, thereby reducing sensitivity to missing edges. Furthermore, we introduce a two-stage paradigm that reduces computational cost while preserving good performance: a lightweight LLM first leverages the soft prompts to identify question-relevant entities and relations, followed by a more powerful LLM for evidence-aware answer generation. Experiments on four multi-hop KBQA benchmarks show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on three of them, demonstrating its effectiveness. Code is available at the repository: https://github.com/Wangshuaiia/GraSP.

analysis.tldr: 提出图软提示框架，将KBQA从节点级路径遍历转为子图级推理，缓解知识图谱不完整性问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在知识密集型场景中易产生幻觉，知识库问答通过知识图谱缓解此问题，但现有方法依赖显式边遍历，对图谱不完整敏感。
analysis.problem: 多跳知识库问答中，知识图谱不完整导致基于边遍历的推理方法脆弱。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用图神经网络编码提取的结构子图为软提示，使LLM在更丰富的结构上下文中推理，并采用两阶段范式：轻量LLM识别相关实体和关系，强大LLM生成答案。
contributions: 提出图软提示框架，将推理从节点级路径遍历转为子图级推理，降低对缺失边的敏感性。
设计两阶段范式，在保持性能的同时降低计算成本。
analysis.experiments: 在四个多跳KBQA基准上，三个达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖子图提取质量，对噪声子图鲁棒性未知。
两阶段范式可能引入额外延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出图软提示框架，将KBQA从节点级路径遍历转为子图级推理，缓解知识图谱不完整性问题。

papers.title: SEATrack: Simple, Efficient, and Adaptive Multimodal Tracker
papers.abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) in multimodal tracking reveals a concerning trend where recent performance gains are often achieved at the cost of inflated parameter budgets, which fundamentally erodes PEFT's efficiency promise. In this work, we introduce SEATrack, a Simple, Efficient, and Adaptive two-stream multimodal tracker that tackles this performance-efficiency dilemma from two complementary perspectives. We first prioritize cross-modal alignment of matching responses, an underexplored yet pivotal factor that we argue is essential for breaking the trade-off. Specifically, we observe that modality-specific biases in existing two-stream methods generate conflicting matching attention maps, thereby hindering effective joint representation learning. To mitigate this, we propose AMG-LoRA, which seamlessly integrates Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) for domain adaptation with Adaptive Mutual Guidance (AMG) to dynamically refine and align attention maps across modalities. We then depart from conventional local fusion approaches by introducing a Hierarchical Mixture of Experts (HMoE) that enables efficient global relation modeling, effectively balancing expressiveness and computational efficiency in cross-modal fusion. Equipped with these innovations, SEATrack advances notable progress over state-of-the-art methods in balancing performance with efficiency across RGB-T, RGB-D, and RGB-E tracking tasks. \href{https://github.com/AutoLab-SAI-SJTU/SEATrack}{\textcolor{cyan}{Code is available}}.

analysis.tldr: 提出SEATrack，通过AMG-LoRA对齐跨模态匹配响应和HMoE高效融合，在RGB-T/D/E跟踪中实现性能与效率的平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态跟踪中参数高效微调（PEFT）的性能提升常以参数预算膨胀为代价，破坏了效率承诺，亟需解决性能-效率困境。
analysis.problem: 现有双流多模态跟踪方法中，模态特定偏差导致匹配注意力图冲突，阻碍联合表征学习；局部融合方法缺乏全局关系建模，效率与表达力难以平衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到双流方法中模态特定偏差产生冲突的匹配注意力图，这是阻碍有效联合表征学习的关键因素。
analysis.method: 提出SEATrack，包含两个互补模块：1) AMG-LoRA，将LoRA与自适应互引导（AMG）结合，动态对齐跨模态注意力图；2) 层次化混合专家（HMoE），实现高效全局关系建模，替代局部融合。
contributions: 首次揭示跨模态匹配响应对齐是打破性能-效率权衡的关键因素，并观察到模态特定偏差导致注意力冲突。
提出AMG-LoRA，无缝集成LoRA域适应与自适应互引导，动态对齐注意力图。
提出HMoE，实现高效全局关系建模，平衡跨模态融合的表达力与计算效率。
在RGB-T、RGB-D、RGB-E跟踪任务上超越现有方法，实现性能与效率的更好平衡。
analysis.experiments: 在RGB-T、RGB-D、RGB-E跟踪任务上评估，与最先进方法比较，展示了性能与效率的平衡优势。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅在特定多模态跟踪场景（RGB-T/D/E）验证，泛化性未知。
AMG-LoRA和HMoE的额外计算开销在极端资源受限设备上可能仍显不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SEATrack，通过AMG-LoRA对齐跨模态匹配响应和HMoE高效融合，在RGB-T/D/E跟踪中实现性能与效率的平衡。

papers.title: Lit2Vec: A Reproducible Workflow for Building a Legally Screened Chemistry Corpus from S2ORC for Downstream Retrieval and Text Mining
papers.abstract: We present Lit2Vec, a reproducible workflow for constructing and validating a chemistry corpus from the Semantic Scholar Open Research Corpus using conservative, metadata-based license screening. Using this workflow, we assembled an internal study corpus of 582,683 chemistry-specific full-text research articles with structured full text, token-aware paragraph chunks, paragraph-level embeddings generated with the intfloat/e5-large-v2 model, and record-level metadata including abstracts and licensing information. To support downstream retrieval and text-mining use cases, an eligible subset of the corpus was additionally enriched with machine-generated brief summaries and multi-label subfield annotations spanning 18 chemistry domains. Licensing was screened using metadata from Unpaywall, OpenAlex, and Crossref, and the resulting corpus was technically validated for schema compliance, embedding reproducibility, text quality, and metadata completeness. The primary contribution of this work is a reproducible workflow for corpus construction and validation, together with its associated schema and reproducibility resources. The released materials include the code, reconstruction workflow, schema, metadata/provenance artifacts, and validation outputs needed to reproduce the corpus from pinned public upstream resources. Public redistribution of source-derived text and broad text-derived representations is outside the scope of the general release. Researchers can reproduce the workflow by using the released pipeline with publicly available upstream datasets and metadata services.

analysis.tldr: Lit2Vec 提供了一个可复现的工作流，用于从 S2ORC 构建经过法律许可筛选的化学语料库，支持下游检索和文本挖掘。
analysis.research_motivation: 化学领域缺乏大规模、可合法使用的全文语料库，现有语料库的许可信息不透明，限制了文本挖掘和检索应用。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可复现、法律合规的化学全文语料库，并支持下游检索和文本挖掘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于 S2ORC，利用 Unpaywall、OpenAlex 和 Crossref 的元数据进行保守的许可筛选，构建包含结构化全文、分块嵌入和元数据的化学语料库，并添加机器生成的摘要和多标签子领域注释。
contributions: 提出一个可复现的语料库构建与验证工作流，包括代码、模式、元数据和验证输出。
构建了一个包含 582,683 篇化学全文文章的内部研究语料库，并公开了重建工作流。
analysis.experiments: 技术验证包括模式合规性、嵌入可复现性、文本质量和元数据完整性。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 语料库的文本和表示不公开分发，仅提供重建工作流。
许可筛选基于元数据，可能遗漏部分合法内容。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Lit2Vec 提供了一个可复现的工作流，用于从 S2ORC 构建经过法律许可筛选的化学语料库，支持下游检索和文本挖掘。

papers.title: Latent Planning Emerges with Scale
papers.abstract: LLMs can perform seemingly planning-intensive tasks, like writing coherent stories or functioning code, without explicitly verbalizing a plan; however, the extent to which they implicitly plan is unknown. In this paper, we define latent planning as occurring when LLMs possess internal planning representations that (1) cause the generation of a specific future token or concept, and (2) shape preceding context to license said future token or concept. We study the Qwen-3 family (0.6B-14B) on simple planning tasks, finding that latent planning ability increases with scale. Models that plan possess features that represent a planned-for word like "accountant", and cause them to output "an" rather than "a"; moreover, even the less-successful Qwen-3 4B-8B have nascent planning mechanisms. On the more complex task of completing rhyming couplets, we find that models often identify a rhyme ahead of time, but even large models seldom plan far ahead. However, we can elicit some planning that increases with scale when steering models towards planned words in prose. In sum, we offer a framework for measuring planning and mechanistic evidence of how models' planning abilities grow with scale.

analysis.tldr: LLM的隐式规划能力随模型规模增大而涌现，可通过内部表征预测未来词元。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解LLM在复杂任务中是否隐含规划，以及规划能力如何随规模变化，对模型可解释性和能力评估至关重要。
analysis.problem: LLM在执行看似需要规划的任务时，是否真正进行隐式规划，以及规划能力如何随模型规模增长。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：隐式规划能力随模型规模增大而增强；较小模型（4B-8B）已出现初步规划机制；在复杂任务（如押韵对句）中，模型常提前识别韵脚，但很少进行远距离规划；通过引导模型朝向规划词，可激发随规模增长的规划能力。
analysis.method: 定义隐式规划为内部表征同时满足两个条件：预测未来词元并塑造前文上下文；在Qwen-3系列（0.6B-14B）上设计简单规划任务（如冠词选择）和复杂任务（押韵对句），通过分析内部特征和干预实验测量规划能力。
contributions: 提出隐式规划的定义和测量框架
提供机制性证据表明LLM的规划能力随规模增长
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen-3系列（0.6B-14B）上进行简单规划任务（如冠词选择）和复杂任务（押韵对句）的实验，通过特征分析和干预验证规划机制。
limitations: 仅研究Qwen-3系列，可能不适用于其他架构
复杂任务中远距离规划能力有限，未探索更大模型或训练策略
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM的隐式规划能力随模型规模增大而涌现，可通过内部表征预测未来词元。

papers.title: Deepfakes at Face Value: Image and Authority
papers.abstract: Deepfakes are synthetic media that superimpose or generate someone's likeness on to pre-existing sound, images, or videos using deep learning methods. Existing accounts of the wrongs involved in creating and distributing deepfakes focus on the harms they cause or the non-normative interests they violate. However, these approaches do not explain how deepfakes can be wrongful even when they cause no harm or set back any other non-normative interest. To address this issue, this paper identifies a neglected reason why deepfakes are wrong: they can subvert our legitimate interests in having authority over the permissible uses of our image and the governance of our identity. We argue that deepfakes are wrong when they usurp our authority to determine the provenance of our own agency by exploiting our biometric features as a generative resource. In particular, we have a specific right against the algorithmic conscription of our identity. We refine the scope of this interest by distinguishing between permissible forms of appropriation, such as artistic depiction, from wrongful algorithmic simulation.

analysis.tldr: 本文从权威视角论证深度伪造的伦理错误：它篡夺了个人对自身形象使用的合法权威。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有关于深度伪造伦理问题的讨论主要聚焦于其造成的伤害或侵犯的非规范性利益，但无法解释为何深度伪造即使未造成实际伤害或利益损失也可能是错误的。
analysis.problem: 解释深度伪造在未造成伤害或侵犯非规范性利益时为何仍然错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过哲学论证，提出深度伪造的错误在于篡夺个人对自身形象使用的合法权威，并区分了可允许的挪用（如艺术描绘）与错误的算法模拟。
contributions: 识别出深度伪造错误的一个被忽视原因：它破坏了我们对自己形象使用和身份治理的合法权威。
提出并界定了反对算法征用个人身份的具体权利。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 论证主要基于哲学分析，缺乏实证支持。
对“合法权威”和“算法征用”的界定可能引发进一步争议。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文从权威视角论证深度伪造的伦理错误：它篡夺了个人对自身形象使用的合法权威。

papers.title: KG-Reasoner: A Reinforced Model for End-to-End Multi-Hop Knowledge Graph Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit strong abilities in natural language understanding and generation, yet they struggle with knowledge-intensive reasoning. Structured Knowledge Graphs (KGs) provide an effective form of external knowledge representation and have been widely used to enhance performance in classical Knowledge Base Question Answering (KBQA) tasks. However, performing precise multi-hop reasoning over KGs for complex queries remains highly challenging. Most existing approaches decompose the reasoning process into a sequence of isolated steps executed through a fixed pipeline. While effective to some extent, such designs constrain reasoning flexibility and fragment the overall decision process, often leading to incoherence and the loss of critical intermediate information from earlier steps. In this paper, we introduce KG-Reasoner, an end-to-end framework that integrates multi-step reasoning into a unified "thinking" phase of a Reasoning LLM. Through Reinforcement Learning (RL), the LLM is trained to internalize the KG traversal process, enabling it to dynamically explore reasoning paths, and perform backtracking when necessary. Experiments on eight multi-hop and knowledge-intensive reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that KG-Reasoner achieves competitive or superior performance compared to the state-of-the-art methods. Codes are available at the repository: https://github.com/Wangshuaiia/KG-Reasoner.

analysis.tldr: KG-Reasoner 通过强化学习将知识图谱多跳推理整合到 LLM 的思考阶段，实现端到端推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将多跳推理分解为固定流水线步骤，限制了推理灵活性并导致中间信息丢失。
analysis.problem: 如何让 LLM 在知识图谱上执行精确且灵活的多跳推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将多步推理整合到推理 LLM 的统一思考阶段，通过强化学习训练 LLM 内化知识图谱遍历过程，支持动态探索和回溯。
contributions: 提出端到端框架 KG-Reasoner，将多跳推理统一到 LLM 的思考阶段。
通过强化学习训练 LLM 内化 KG 遍历，支持动态路径探索和回溯。
analysis.experiments: 在八个多跳和知识密集型推理基准上达到与 SOTA 相当或更优的性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的知识图谱。
强化学习训练可能不稳定或需要大量计算资源。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: KG-Reasoner 通过强化学习将知识图谱多跳推理整合到 LLM 的思考阶段，实现端到端推理。

papers.title: Elastic Net Regularization and Gabor Dictionary for Classification of Heart Sound Signals using Deep Learning
papers.abstract: In this article, we propose the optimization of the resolution of time-frequency atoms and the regularization of fitting models to obtain better representations of heart sound signals. This is done by evaluating the classification performance of deep learning (DL) networks in discriminating five heart valvular conditions based on a new class of time-frequency feature matrices derived from the fitting models. We inspect several combinations of resolution and regularization, and the optimal one is that provides the highest performance. To this end, a fitting model is obtained based on a heart sound signal and an overcomplete dictionary of Gabor atoms using elastic net regularization of linear models. We consider two different DL architectures, the first mainly consisting of a 1D convolutional neural network (CNN) layer and a long short-term memory (LSTM) layer, while the second is composed of 1D and 2D CNN layers followed by an LSTM layer. The networks are trained with two algorithms, namely stochastic gradient descent with momentum (SGDM) and adaptive moment (ADAM). Extensive experimentation has been conducted using a database containing heart sound signals of five heart valvular conditions. The best classification accuracy of $98.95\%$ is achieved with the second architecture when trained with ADAM and feature matrices derived from optimal models obtained with a Gabor dictionary consisting of atoms with high-time low-frequency resolution and imposing sparsity on the models.

analysis.tldr: 利用弹性网络正则化和Gabor字典优化心音信号时频表示，结合深度学习实现高精度心瓣膜疾病分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 心音信号分类对心脏瓣膜疾病诊断至关重要，但现有方法在时频表示分辨率和模型正则化方面存在不足，影响分类性能。
analysis.problem: 如何通过优化时频原子的分辨率和拟合模型的正则化，获得更好的心音信号表示，并利用深度学习网络实现五种心瓣膜疾病的高精度分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于弹性网络正则化的线性模型，从心音信号和过完备Gabor字典中获取拟合模型，生成时频特征矩阵；采用两种深度学习架构（1D CNN+LSTM和1D/2D CNN+LSTM），使用SGDM和ADAM优化器训练。
contributions: 提出结合弹性网络正则化和Gabor字典优化时频表示的方法，提升心音信号分类性能。
通过实验确定最优的时频原子分辨率和正则化组合，实现98.95%的分类准确率。
analysis.experiments: 使用包含五种心瓣膜疾病的心音信号数据库进行实验，比较不同分辨率、正则化、网络架构和优化器的组合，最佳准确率98.95%。
limitations: 仅针对五种心瓣膜疾病，泛化性需进一步验证。
依赖过完备Gabor字典，计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用弹性网络正则化和Gabor字典优化心音信号时频表示，结合深度学习实现高精度心瓣膜疾病分类。

papers.title: Social Learning Strategies for Evolved Virtual Soft Robots
papers.abstract: Optimizing the body and brain of a robot is a coupled challenge: the morphology determines what control strategies are effective, while the control parameters influence how well the morphology performs. This joint optimization can be done through nested loops of evolutionary and learning processes, where the control parameters of each robot are learned independently. However, the control parameters learned by one robot may contain valuable information for others. Thus, we introduce a social learning approach in which robots can exploit optimized parameters from their peers to accelerate their own brain optimization. Within this framework, we systematically investigate how the selection of teachers, deciding which and how many robots to learn from, affects performance, experimenting with virtual soft robots in four tasks and environments. In particular, we study the effect of inheriting experience from morphologically similar robots due to the tightly coupled body and brain in robot optimization. Our results confirm the effectiveness of building on others' experience, as social learning clearly outperforms learning from scratch under equivalent computational budgets. In addition, while the optimal teacher selection strategy remains open, our findings suggest that incorporating knowledge from multiple teachers can yield more consistent and robust improvements.

analysis.tldr: 在虚拟软机器人进化优化中引入社会学习策略，利用同伴优化参数加速学习，实验表明优于从零学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人形态与控制的联合优化计算成本高，且每个机器人的控制参数独立学习，忽略了同伴参数中的潜在价值。
analysis.problem: 如何设计社会学习策略（教师选择机制）以有效利用同伴优化参数加速虚拟软机器人的控制优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 社会学习显著优于从零学习；从多个教师学习比单个教师更稳健；形态相似性影响学习效果。
analysis.method: 提出社会学习框架，机器人可从同伴中继承优化参数，系统研究教师选择策略（选择哪些机器人、数量）对性能的影响。
contributions: 首次在虚拟软机器人进化优化中引入社会学习策略。
系统实验揭示了教师选择策略对性能的影响，发现多教师学习更稳健。
analysis.experiments: 在四个任务和环境中对虚拟软机器人进行实验，比较社会学习与从零学习，并测试不同教师选择策略。
limitations: 最优教师选择策略仍不明确。
实验仅在虚拟软机器人上进行，未在实体机器人验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在虚拟软机器人进化优化中引入社会学习策略，利用同伴优化参数加速学习，实验表明优于从零学习。

papers.title: T2I-BiasBench: A Multi-Metric Framework for Auditing Demographic and Cultural Bias in Text-to-Image Models
papers.abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) generative models achieve impressive visual fidelity but inherit and amplify demographic imbalances and cultural biases embedded in training data. We introduce T2I-BiasBench, a unified evaluation framework of thirteen complementary metrics that jointly captures demographic bias, element omission, and cultural collapse in diffusion models - the first framework to address all three dimensions simultaneously. We evaluate three open-source models - Stable Diffusion v1.5, BK-SDM Base, and Koala Lightning - against Gemini 2.5 Flash (RLHF-aligned) as a reference baseline. The benchmark comprises 1,574 generated images across five structured prompt categories. T2I-BiasBench integrates six established metrics with seven additional measures: four newly proposed (Composite Bias Score, Grounded Missing Rate, Implicit Element Missing Rate, Cultural Accuracy Ratio) and three adapted (Hallucination Score, Vendi Score, CLIP Proxy Score). Three key findings emerge: (1) Stable Diffusion v1.5 and BK-SDM exhibit bias amplification (>1.0) in beauty-related prompts; (2) contextual constraints such as surgical PPE substantially attenuate professional-role gender bias (Doctor CBS = 0.06 for SD v1.5); and (3) all models, including RLHF-aligned Gemini, collapse to a narrow set of cultural representations (CAS: 0.54-1.00), confirming that alignment techniques do not resolve cultural coverage gaps. T2I-BiasBench is publicly released to support standardized, fine-grained bias evaluation of generative models. The project page is available at: https://gyanendrachaubey.github.io/T2I-BiasBench/

analysis.tldr: 提出T2I-BiasBench，一个包含13个互补指标的框架，用于审计文本到图像模型的人口统计和文化偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本到图像模型在训练数据中继承并放大了人口统计失衡和文化偏见，现有评估框架缺乏同时覆盖人口统计偏见、元素遗漏和文化崩溃三个维度的统一方法。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地评估和比较不同文本到图像模型在人口统计偏见、元素遗漏和文化崩溃三个维度上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现：(1) Stable Diffusion v1.5和BK-SDM在美相关提示中表现出偏见放大(>1.0)；(2) 上下文约束（如手术PPE）显著减弱专业角色性别偏见；(3) 所有模型（包括RLHF对齐的Gemini）都坍缩到狭窄的文化表征集，表明对齐技术未解决文化覆盖缺口。
analysis.method: 提出T2I-BiasBench框架，整合6个已有指标和7个额外指标（4个新提出：复合偏见分数、基础缺失率、隐式元素缺失率、文化准确率；3个改编：幻觉分数、Vendi分数、CLIP代理分数），在5个结构化提示类别上生成1574张图像进行评估。
contributions: 首次提出同时覆盖人口统计偏见、元素遗漏和文化崩溃三个维度的统一评估框架T2I-BiasBench。
引入4个新指标和3个改编指标，共13个互补指标。
通过实验揭示现有模型在文化表征上的系统性缺陷，并公开框架以支持标准化偏见评估。
analysis.experiments: 评估了三个开源模型（Stable Diffusion v1.5, BK-SDM Base, Koala Lightning）与Gemini 2.5 Flash（RLHF对齐）作为参考基线，使用1574张生成图像和5个提示类别。
limitations: 仅评估了有限数量的模型，可能不涵盖所有最新模型。
文化偏见的定义和指标可能受限于特定文化背景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出T2I-BiasBench，一个包含13个互补指标的框架，用于审计文本到图像模型的人口统计和文化偏见。

papers.title: Audio Source Separation in Reverberant Environments using $β$-divergence based Nonnegative Factorization
papers.abstract: In Gaussian model-based multichannel audio source separation, the likelihood of observed mixtures of source signals is parametrized by source spectral variances and by associated spatial covariance matrices. These parameters are estimated by maximizing the likelihood through an Expectation-Maximization algorithm and used to separate the signals by means of multichannel Wiener filtering. We propose to estimate these parameters by applying nonnegative factorization based on prior information on source variances. In the nonnegative factorization, spectral basis matrices can be defined as the prior information. The matrices can be either extracted or indirectly made available through a redundant library that is trained in advance. In a separate step, applying nonnegative tensor factorization, two algorithms are proposed in order to either extract or detect the basis matrices that best represent the power spectra of the source signals in the observed mixtures. The factorization is achieved by minimizing the $β$-divergence through multiplicative update rules. The sparsity of factorization can be controlled by tuning the value of $β$. Experiments show that sparsity, rather than the value assigned to $β$ in the training, is crucial in order to increase the separation performance. The proposed method was evaluated in several mixing conditions. It provides better separation quality with respect to other comparable algorithms.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于β散度的非负矩阵/张量分解，利用先验谱基矩阵实现混响环境下的多通道音频源分离。
analysis.research_motivation: 混响环境下多通道音频源分离是语音处理中的关键问题，传统高斯模型参数估计方法依赖EM算法，但缺乏对源谱结构的先验利用，导致分离性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用源谱方差先验信息（如预训练谱基矩阵）提升混响环境下多通道音频源分离的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现稀疏性比β散度参数值对分离性能提升更关键。
analysis.method: 基于β散度最小化的非负矩阵/张量分解，通过乘性更新规则估计源谱方差参数，并利用先验谱基矩阵（提取或从冗余库检测）进行分离。
contributions: 提出将非负矩阵/张量分解与先验谱基矩阵结合用于多通道音频源分离。
通过β散度控制稀疏性，并揭示稀疏性比β值对性能影响更大。
analysis.experiments: 在多种混响条件下评估，相比同类算法分离质量更优。
limitations: 依赖预训练谱基库，可能限制对未知声源的泛化能力。
未讨论实时性及计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于β散度的非负矩阵/张量分解，利用先验谱基矩阵实现混响环境下的多通道音频源分离。

papers.title: Mining Large Language Models for Low-Resource Language Data: Comparing Elicitation Strategies for Hausa and Fongbe
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are trained on data contributed by low-resource language communities, yet the linguistic knowledge encoded in these models remains accessible only through commercial APIs. This paper investigates whether strategic prompting can extract usable text data from LLMs for two West African languages: Hausa (Afroasiatic, approximately 80 million speakers) and Fongbe (Niger-Congo, approximately 2 million speakers). We systematically compare six elicitation task types across two commercial LLMs (GPT-4o Mini and Gemini 2.5 Flash). GPT-4o Mini extracts 6-41 times more usable target-language words per API call than Gemini. Optimal strategies differ by language: Hausa benefits from functional text and dialogue, while Fongbe requires constrained generation prompts. We release all generated corpora and code.

analysis.tldr: 通过策略性提示从LLM中提取低资源语言数据，发现GPT-4o Mini优于Gemini，且最优策略因语言而异。
analysis.research_motivation: 低资源语言数据稀缺，而LLM虽经训练但语言知识仅通过商业API访问，研究如何有效提取这些数据具有重要应用价值。
analysis.problem: 如何通过策略性提示从LLM中提取低资源语言（豪萨语和丰贝语）的可用文本数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: GPT-4o Mini每次API调用提取的可用目标语言词数比Gemini多6-41倍；豪萨语受益于功能文本和对话，而丰贝语需要约束生成提示。
analysis.method: 系统比较六种提示任务类型（如功能文本、对话、约束生成等）在两种商业LLM（GPT-4o Mini和Gemini 2.5 Flash）上的提取效果。
contributions: 首次系统比较多种提示策略从LLM中提取低资源语言数据的效果
发现GPT-4o Mini在提取效率上显著优于Gemini，且最优策略因语言而异
公开生成的语料库和代码
analysis.experiments: 在豪萨语和丰贝语上，使用六种提示任务类型对GPT-4o Mini和Gemini 2.5 Flash进行对比实验，评估每次API调用提取的可用目标语言词数。
limitations: 仅评估两种商业LLM，可能不适用于其他模型
仅针对两种西非语言，泛化性有限

papers.title: From Kinematics to Dynamics: Learning to Refine Hybrid Plans for Physically Feasible Execution
papers.abstract: In many robotic tasks, agents must traverse a sequence of spatial regions to complete a mission. Such problems are inherently mixed discrete-continuous: a high-level action sequence and a physically feasible continuous trajectory. The resulting trajectory and action sequence must also satisfy problem constraints such as deadlines, time windows, and velocity or acceleration limits. While hybrid temporal planners attempt to address this challenge, they typically model motion using linear (first-order) dynamics, which cannot guarantee that the resulting plan respects the robot's true physical constraints. Consequently, even when the high-level action sequence is fixed, producing a dynamically feasible trajectory becomes a bi-level optimization problem. We address this problem via reinforcement learning in continuous space. We define a Markov Decision Process that explicitly incorporates analytical second-order constraints and use it to refine first-order plans generated by a hybrid planner. Our results show that this approach can reliably recover physical feasibility and effectively bridge the gap between a planner's initial first-order trajectory and the dynamics required for real execution.

analysis.tldr: 用强化学习将混合规划器的一阶轨迹精炼为满足二阶动力学约束的可行轨迹。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人任务中混合离散-连续规划常使用一阶动力学模型，无法保证真实物理约束，导致规划轨迹不可执行。
analysis.problem: 如何将混合规划器生成的一阶轨迹精炼为满足二阶动力学约束的物理可行轨迹。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 定义包含二阶分析约束的马尔可夫决策过程，通过连续空间强化学习精炼一阶规划轨迹。
contributions: 提出用强化学习桥接一阶规划与二阶动力学约束的框架
在混合规划中显式引入二阶约束并验证可行性恢复效果

papers.title: Intelligent ROI-Based Vehicle Counting Framework for Automated Traffic Monitoring
papers.abstract: Accurate vehicle counting through video surveillance is crucial for efficient traffic management. However, achieving high counting accuracy while ensuring computational efficiency remains a challenge. To address this, we propose a fully automated, video-based vehicle counting framework designed to optimize both computational efficiency and counting accuracy. Our framework operates in two distinct phases: \textit{estimation} and \textit{prediction}. In the estimation phase, the optimal region of interest (ROI) is automatically determined using a novel combination of three models based on detection scores, tracking scores, and vehicle density. This adaptive approach ensures compatibility with any detection and tracking method, enhancing the framework's versatility. In the prediction phase, vehicle counting is efficiently performed within the estimated ROI. We evaluated our framework on benchmark datasets like UA-DETRAC, GRAM, CDnet 2014, and ATON. Results demonstrate exceptional accuracy, with most videos achieving 100\% accuracy, while also enhancing computational efficiency, making processing up to four times faster than full-frame processing. The framework outperforms existing techniques, especially in complex multi-road scenarios, demonstrating robustness and superior accuracy. These advancements make it a promising solution for real-time traffic monitoring.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于自动ROI估计的两阶段车辆计数框架，在多个基准上实现100%准确率并提速4倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有车辆计数方法难以同时兼顾高精度和计算效率，尤其在复杂多道路场景下。
analysis.problem: 如何在保证高计数精度的同时提升视频车辆计数的计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：估计阶段通过检测分数、跟踪分数和车辆密度的组合自动确定最优ROI；预测阶段在估计的ROI内高效计数。
contributions: 提出一种自动ROI估计方法，兼容任意检测和跟踪方法。
在多个基准数据集上实现100%准确率，并加速处理至全帧处理的4倍。
analysis.experiments: 在UA-DETRAC、GRAM、CDnet 2014和ATON数据集上评估，多数视频达到100%准确率，处理速度提升4倍。
limitations: 可能依赖检测和跟踪方法的性能。
未提及在极端拥挤或遮挡场景下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
