papers.title: Euler-inspired Decoupling Neural Operator for Efficient Pansharpening
papers.abstract: Pansharpening aims to synthesize high-resolution multispectral (HR-MS) images by fusing the spatial textures of panchromatic (PAN) images with the spectral information of low-resolution multispectral (LR-MS) images. While recent deep learning paradigms, especially diffusion-based operators, have pushed the performance boundaries, they often encounter spectral-spatial blurring and prohibitive computational costs due to their stochastic nature and iterative sampling. In this paper, we propose the Euler-inspired Decoupling Neural Operator (EDNO), a physics-inspired framework that redefines pansharpening as a continuous functional mapping in the frequency domain. Departing from conventional Cartesian feature processing, our EDNO leverages Euler's formula to transform features into a polar coordinate system, enabling a novel explicit-implicit interaction mechanism. Specifically, we develop the Euler Feature Interaction Layer (EFIL), which decouples the fusion task into two specialized modules: 1) Explicit Feature Interaction Module, utilizing a linear weighting scheme to simulate phase rotation for adaptive geometric alignment; and 2) Implicit Feature Interaction Module, employing a feed-forward network to model spectral distributions for superior color consistency. By operating in the frequency domain, EDNO inherently captures global receptive fields while maintaining discretization-invariance. Experimental results on the three datasets demonstrate that EDNO offers a superior efficiency-performance balance compared to heavyweight architectures.

analysis.tldr: 提出欧拉启发的解耦神经算子，将全色锐化建模为频域连续函数映射，实现高效融合。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习方法（尤其是扩散模型）在全色锐化中面临光谱-空间模糊和高计算成本的问题，亟需高效且性能优越的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在全色锐化中同时保持高空间纹理保真度和光谱一致性，并降低计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散模型因随机性和迭代采样导致光谱-空间模糊及高昂计算成本。
analysis.method: 提出欧拉启发解耦神经算子（EDNO），利用欧拉公式将特征变换到极坐标系，通过显式-隐式交互机制解耦融合任务：显式模块模拟相位旋转进行几何对齐，隐式模块建模光谱分布保持颜色一致性。
contributions: 提出EDNO框架，将全色锐化重新定义为频域连续函数映射，实现全局感受野和离散不变性。
设计欧拉特征交互层（EFIL），通过显式-隐式解耦机制分别处理几何对齐和光谱一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在三个数据集上验证，EDNO相比重型架构实现了更优的效率-性能平衡。
limitations: 可能对频域变换的数值稳定性敏感。
未在极低分辨率或极端光谱场景下测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出欧拉启发的解耦神经算子，将全色锐化建模为频域连续函数映射，实现高效融合。

papers.title: CIA: Inferring the Communication Topology from LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems
papers.abstract: LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in solving complex tasks. Central to MAS is the communication topology which governs how agents exchange information internally. Consequently, the security of communication topologies has attracted increasing attention. In this paper, we investigate a critical privacy risk: MAS communication topologies can be inferred under a restrictive black-box setting, exposing system vulnerabilities and posing significant intellectual property threats. To explore this risk, we propose Communication Inference Attack (CIA), a novel attack that constructs new adversarial queries to induce intermediate agents' reasoning outputs and models their semantic correlations through the proposed global bias disentanglement and LLM-guided weak supervision. Extensive experiments on MAS with optimized communication topologies demonstrate the effectiveness of CIA, achieving an average AUC of 0.87 and a peak AUC of up to 0.99, thereby revealing the substantial privacy risk in MAS.

analysis.tldr: 提出通信拓扑推断攻击（CIA），在黑盒设置下从LLM多智能体系统中推断通信拓扑，揭示隐私风险。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM多智能体系统的通信拓扑决定内部信息交换方式，其安全性日益重要，但现有研究忽视了拓扑本身作为隐私泄露渠道的风险。
analysis.problem: 在黑盒限制下推断LLM多智能体系统的通信拓扑，暴露系统漏洞和知识产权威胁。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出通信推断攻击（CIA），构造对抗性查询诱导中间智能体推理输出，通过全局偏差解缠和LLM引导弱监督建模语义相关性。
contributions: 首次研究LLM多智能体系统通信拓扑的隐私风险，提出黑盒推断攻击CIA。
在优化拓扑的多智能体系统上验证有效性，平均AUC 0.87，峰值AUC 0.99。
analysis.experiments: 在具有优化通信拓扑的多智能体系统上进行实验，CIA平均AUC为0.87，峰值AUC达0.99。

analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations

papers.title: Enhancing Clustering: An Explainable Approach via Filtered Patterns
papers.abstract: Machine learning has become a central research area, with increasing attention devoted to explainable clustering, also known as conceptual clustering, which is a knowledge-driven unsupervised learning paradigm that partitions data into $θ$ disjoint clusters, where each cluster is described by an explicit symbolic representation, typically expressed as a closed pattern or itemset. By providing human-interpretable cluster descriptions, explainable clustering plays an important role in explainable artificial intelligence and knowledge discovery. Recent work improved clustering quality by introducing k-relaxed frequent patterns (k-RFPs), a pattern model that relaxes strict coverage constraints through a generalized kcover definition. This framework integrates constraint-based reasoning, using SAT solvers for pattern generation, with combinatorial optimization, using Integer Linear Programming (ILP) for cluster selection. Despite its effectiveness, this approach suffers from a critical limitation: multiple distinct k-RFPs may induce identical k-covers, leading to redundant symbolic representations that unnecessarily enlarge the search space and increase computational complexity during cluster construction. In this paper, we address this redundancy through a pattern reduction framework. Our contributions are threefold. First, we formally characterize the conditions under which distinct k-RFPs induce identical kcovers, providing theoretical foundations for redundancy detection. Second, we propose an optimization strategy that removes redundant patterns by retaining a single representative pattern for each distinct k-cover. Third, we investigate the interpretability and representativeness of the patterns selected by the ILP model by analyzing their robustness with respect to their induced clusters. Extensive experiments conducted on several real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach significantly reduces the pattern search space, improves computational efficiency, preserves and enhances in some cases the quality of the resulting clusters.

analysis.tldr: 通过过滤冗余k-RFP模式提升可解释聚类的效率与质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 可解释聚类（概念聚类）通过符号化描述提升AI可解释性，但现有基于k-RFP的方法存在冗余模式导致搜索空间大、计算复杂的问题。
analysis.problem: 解决k-RFP模式中不同模式可能诱导相同k-cover导致的冗余问题，减少搜索空间并提升计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多个不同的k-RFP可能产生相同的k-cover，导致冗余符号表示，增大搜索空间和计算复杂度。
analysis.method: 提出模式约简框架：形式化刻画冗余条件，保留每个k-cover的单一代表模式，并分析ILP所选模式的鲁棒性。
contributions: 形式化刻画不同k-RFP诱导相同k-cover的条件，提供冗余检测的理论基础。
提出优化策略，通过保留每个k-cover的单一代表模式去除冗余。
分析ILP所选模式的可解释性和代表性，验证其鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个真实数据集上实验，表明方法显著减少模式搜索空间、提升计算效率，并在某些情况下保持或增强聚类质量。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于k-RFP的特定聚类框架。
鲁棒性分析可能局限于特定ILP模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过过滤冗余k-RFP模式提升可解释聚类的效率与质量。

papers.title: Operationalising the Right to be Forgotten in LLMs: A Lightweight Sequential Unlearning Framework for Privacy-Aligned Deployment in Politically Sensitive Environments
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in politically sensitive environments, where memorisation of personal data or confidential content raises regulatory concerns under frameworks such as the GDPR and its Right to be Forgotten. Translating such legal principles into large-scale generative systems presents significant technical challenges. We introduce a lightweight sequential unlearning framework that explicitly separates retention and suppression objectives. The method first stabilises benign capabilities through positive fine-tuning, then applies layer-restricted negative fine-tuning to suppress designated sensitive patterns while preserving general language competence. Experiments on the SemEval-2025 LLM Unlearning benchmark demonstrate effective behavioural suppression with minimal impact on factual accuracy and fluency. GPT-2 exhibits greater robustness than DistilGPT-2, highlighting the role of model capacity in privacy-aligned adaptation. We position sequential unlearning as a practical and reproducible mechanism for operationalising data erasure requirements in politically deployed LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级顺序遗忘框架，通过分离保留与抑制目标实现LLM中的隐私遗忘，在政治敏感环境中符合被遗忘权要求。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在政治敏感环境中部署时，记忆个人数据或机密内容会引发GDPR等法规下的隐私问题，现有方法难以在保持模型能力的同时有效遗忘特定信息。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著损害模型通用语言能力的前提下，高效实现LLM中对指定敏感模式的遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: GPT-2比DistilGPT-2表现出更强的鲁棒性，表明模型容量影响隐私对齐的适应性。
analysis.method: 轻量级顺序遗忘框架：先通过正微调稳定良性能力，再应用层限制负微调抑制指定敏感模式，同时保持通用语言能力。
contributions: 提出一种分离保留与抑制目标的顺序遗忘框架，实现轻量级隐私遗忘。
在SemEval-2025 LLM Unlearning基准上验证了方法的有效性，并分析了模型容量对遗忘效果的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在SemEval-2025 LLM Unlearning基准上进行实验，展示了有效的行为抑制，对事实准确性和流畅性影响最小。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的敏感模式，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论框架在更大规模模型上的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种轻量级顺序遗忘框架，通过分离保留与抑制目标实现LLM中的隐私遗忘，在政治敏感环境中符合被遗忘权要求。

papers.title: Skyline-First Traversal as a Control Mechanism for Multi-Criteria Graph Search
papers.abstract: In multi-criteria graph traversal, paths are compared via Pareto dominance, an ordering that identifies which paths are non-dominated, but says nothing about which path to expand next or when the search may stop. As a result, existing approaches rely on external mechanisms-heuristics, scalarization, or population-based exploration while Pareto dominance remains confined to passive roles such as pruning or ranking. This paper shows that, under constrained cost models, finite cost grids, Markovian transitions, and a nonzero progress measure, Pareto geometry alone is sufficient to drive both scheduling and termination. We show that extracting exclusively from the first Pareto layer, the skyline, induces a deterministic descent in a discrete completion potential, ensuring monotone progress toward solution completion. In parallel, a vector lower-bound certificate provides a stopping condition that guarantees dominance coverage of all remaining traversals without requiring a predefined number of solutions. Our analysis establishes deterministic potential descent, certified termination via dominance coverage, a uniform bound on layer width induced by cost-grid geometry, and greedy cost-space dispersion within the skyline. The resulting framework operates without scalarization, heuristic guidance, or probabilistic models, and repositions Pareto dominance from a passive filter to a deterministic driver of search.

analysis.tldr: 提出天际线优先遍历作为多准则图搜索的控制机制，无需启发式或标量化即可驱动调度与终止。
analysis.research_motivation: 多准则图搜索中，帕累托支配仅用于剪枝或排序，缺乏内在的搜索控制和终止机制，现有方法依赖外部启发式、标量化或种群探索。
analysis.problem: 如何利用帕累托几何本身来驱动多准则图搜索的调度和终止，而不依赖外部机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在约束成本模型、有限成本网格、马尔可夫转移和非零进展度量下，帕累托几何足以驱动调度和终止。
analysis.method: 提出天际线优先遍历，仅从第一帕累托层（天际线）提取路径，实现离散完成势的确定性下降；同时使用向量下界证书作为停止条件，保证所有剩余遍历的支配覆盖。
contributions: 证明了在约束条件下，帕累托几何可独立驱动搜索调度和终止。
建立了确定性势下降、基于支配覆盖的认证终止、成本网格几何导致的层宽一致界以及天际线内的贪婪成本空间分散。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法依赖于特定的成本模型假设（有限成本网格、马尔可夫转移等），可能不适用于更一般的场景。
未在真实世界数据集或大规模图上进行实验验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出天际线优先遍历作为多准则图搜索的控制机制，无需启发式或标量化即可驱动调度与终止。

papers.title: X-VC: Zero-shot Streaming Voice Conversion in Codec Space
papers.abstract: Zero-shot voice conversion (VC) aims to convert a source utterance into the voice of an unseen target speaker while preserving its linguistic content. Although recent systems have improved conversion quality, building zero-shot VC systems for interactive scenarios remains challenging because high-fidelity speaker transfer and low-latency streaming inference are difficult to achieve simultaneously. In this work, we present X-VC, a zero-shot streaming VC system that performs one-step conversion in the latent space of a pretrained neural codec. X-VC uses a dual-conditioning acoustic converter that jointly models source codec latents and frame-level acoustic conditions derived from target reference speech, while injecting utterance-level target speaker information through adaptive normalization. To reduce the mismatch between training and inference, we train the model with generated paired data and a role-assignment strategy that combines standard, reconstruction, and reversed modes. For streaming inference, we further adopt a chunkwise inference scheme with overlap smoothing that is aligned with the segment-based training paradigm of the codec. Experiments on Seed-TTS-Eval show that X-VC achieves the best streaming WER in both English and Chinese, strong speaker similarity in same-language and cross-lingual settings, and substantially lower offline real-time factor than the compared baselines. These results suggest that codec-space one-step conversion is a practical approach for building high-quality low-latency zero-shot VC systems. Our audio samples, code and checkpoints are released at https://github.com/Jerrister/X-VC.

analysis.tldr: X-VC 在编解码器潜空间实现零样本流式语音转换，兼顾高保真与低延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有零样本语音转换系统难以同时实现高保真音色迁移和低延迟流式推理，限制了交互场景应用。
analysis.problem: 构建同时满足高保真说话人迁移和低延迟流式推理的零样本语音转换系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在预训练神经编解码器潜空间中进行一步转换，使用双条件声学转换器联合建模源编解码器潜变量和帧级声学条件，通过自适应归一化注入话语级目标说话人信息；采用生成配对数据和角色分配策略训练，以及分块推理与重叠平滑实现流式。
contributions: 提出 X-VC，首个在编解码器潜空间实现零样本流式语音转换的系统。
设计双条件声学转换器与角色分配训练策略，减少训练-推理不匹配。
在 Seed-TTS-Eval 上取得最佳流式 WER 和强说话人相似度，且离线实时因子显著降低。
analysis.experiments: 在 Seed-TTS-Eval 上评估，X-VC 在英文和中文上取得最佳流式 WER，在同语言和跨语言设置中说话人相似度强，离线实时因子显著低于基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定编解码器架构，泛化性需验证。
流式推理的延迟和资源消耗未详细分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: X-VC 在编解码器潜空间实现零样本流式语音转换，兼顾高保真与低延迟。

papers.title: Fun-TSG: A Function-Driven Multivariate Time Series Generator with Variable-Level Anomaly Labeling
papers.abstract: Reliable evaluation of anomaly detection methods in multivariate time series remains an open challenge, largely due to the limitations of existing benchmark datasets. Current resources often lack fine-grained anomaly annotations, do not provide explicit intervariable and temporal dependencies, and offer little insight into the underlying generative mechanisms. These shortcomings hinder the development and rigorous comparison of detection models, especially those targeting interpretable and variable-specific outputs. To address this gap, we introduce Fun-TSG, a fully customizable time series generator designed to support high-quality evaluation of anomaly detection systems. Our tool enables both fully automated generation, based on randomly sampled dependency structures and anomaly types, and manual generation through user-defined equations and anomaly configurations. In both cases, it provides full transparency over the data generation process, including access to ground-truth anomaly labels at the variable and timestamp levels. Fun-TSG supports the creation of diverse, interpretable, and reproducible benchmarking scenarios, enabling fine-grained performance analysis for both classical and modern anomaly detection models.

analysis.tldr: Fun-TSG 是一个函数驱动的多元时间序列生成器，支持变量级异常标注，用于提升异常检测方法的评估质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有异常检测基准数据集缺乏细粒度异常标注、变量间和时间依赖关系不明确，且生成机制不透明，阻碍了可解释和变量级检测模型的发展与严格比较。
analysis.problem: 如何生成具有细粒度变量级异常标签、明确依赖关系和透明生成过程的多元时间序列数据，以支持异常检测方法的可靠评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Fun-TSG 支持全自动生成（基于随机采样的依赖结构和异常类型）和手动生成（通过用户定义方程和异常配置），提供数据生成过程的完全透明性，包括变量和时间戳级别的真实异常标签。
contributions: 提出一个可定制的多元时间序列生成器，支持变量级异常标注和透明生成过程。
提供全自动和手动两种生成模式，支持创建多样化、可解释和可复现的基准测试场景。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未涵盖所有真实世界异常模式。
生成数据的真实性可能受限于预设函数和依赖结构。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Fun-TSG 是一个函数驱动的多元时间序列生成器，支持变量级异常标注，用于提升异常检测方法的评估质量。

papers.title: Scaling Exposes the Trigger: Input-Level Backdoor Detection in Text-to-Image Diffusion Models via Cross-Attention Scaling
papers.abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models have achieved remarkable success in image synthesis, but their reliance on large-scale data and open ecosystems introduces serious backdoor security risks. Existing defenses, particularly input-level methods, are more practical for deployment but often rely on observable anomalies that become unreliable under stealthy, semantics-preserving trigger designs. As modern backdoor attacks increasingly embed triggers into natural inputs, these methods degrade substantially, raising a critical question: can more stable, implicit, and trigger-agnostic differences between benign and backdoor inputs be exploited for detection? In this work, we address this challenge from an active probing perspective. We introduce controlled scaling perturbations on cross-attention and uncover a novel phenomenon termed Cross-Attention Scaling Response Divergence (CSRD), where benign and backdoor inputs exhibit systematically different response evolution patterns across denoising steps. Building on this insight, we propose SET, an input-level backdoor detection framework that constructs response-offset features under multi-scale perturbations and learns a compact benign response space from a small set of clean samples. Detection is then performed by measuring deviations from this learned space, without requiring prior knowledge of the attack or access to model training. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SET consistently outperforms existing baselines across diverse attack methods, trigger types, and model settings, with particularly strong gains under stealthy implicit-trigger scenarios. Overall, SET improves AUROC by 9.1% and ACC by 6.5% over the best baseline, highlighting its effectiveness and robustness for practical deployment.

analysis.tldr: 通过交叉注意力缩放扰动，揭示良性输入与后门输入在去噪步骤中的响应差异，实现无需攻击先验知识的输入级后门检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型面临后门攻击威胁，现有输入级检测方法在隐蔽、语义保持的触发器设计下性能大幅下降，亟需更稳定、隐式且与触发器无关的检测方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖攻击先验知识或模型训练的情况下，利用良性输入与后门输入之间更稳定的隐式差异进行有效检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现交叉注意力缩放响应发散（CSRD）现象：良性输入和后门输入在去噪步骤中表现出系统不同的响应演化模式。
analysis.method: 提出SET框架，通过多尺度交叉注意力缩放扰动构建响应偏移特征，从少量干净样本学习紧凑的良性响应空间，通过偏离该空间的程度进行检测。
contributions: 发现CSRD现象，揭示良性与后门输入在交叉注意力缩放下的响应差异。
提出SET检测框架，无需攻击先验知识或模型训练，仅需少量干净样本。
在多种攻击方法、触发器类型和模型设置下，SET显著优于现有基线，AUROC提升9.1%，ACC提升6.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在多种攻击方法、触发器类型和模型设置下进行实验，SET在隐蔽隐式触发器场景下表现突出，AUROC提升9.1%，ACC提升6.5%。
limitations: 可能依赖交叉注意力机制的可访问性，对不提供该机制的模型不适用。
需要少量干净样本，在完全无干净样本的场景下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过交叉注意力缩放扰动，揭示良性输入与后门输入在去噪步骤中的响应差异，实现无需攻击先验知识的输入级后门检测。

papers.title: DiffusionPrint: Learning Generative Fingerprints for Diffusion-Based Inpainting Localization
papers.abstract: Modern diffusion-based inpainting models pose significant challenges for image forgery localization (IFL), as their full regeneration pipelines reconstruct the entire image via a latent decoder, disrupting the camera-level noise patterns that existing forensic methods rely on. We propose DiffusionPrint, a patch-level contrastive learning framework that learns a forensic signal robust to the spectral distortions introduced by latent decoding. It exploits the fact that inpainted regions generated by the same model share a consistent generative fingerprint, using this as a self-supervisory signal. DiffusionPrint trains a convolutional backbone via a MoCo-style objective with cross-category hard negative mining and a generator-aware classification head, producing a forensic feature map that serves as a highly discriminative secondary modality in fusion-based IFL frameworks. Integrated into TruFor, MMFusion, and a lightweight fusion baseline, DiffusionPrint consistently improves localization across multiple generative models, with gains of up to +28% on mask types unseen during fine-tuning and confirmed generalization to unseen generative architectures. Code is available at https://github.com/mever-team/diffusionprint

analysis.tldr: 提出DiffusionPrint，通过对比学习学习扩散模型修复区域的生成指纹，提升图像伪造定位性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代扩散修复模型会破坏传统取证方法依赖的相机级噪声模式，导致图像伪造定位困难。
analysis.problem: 如何学习对扩散模型修复区域鲁棒的取证信号，以准确进行图像伪造定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散修复模型通过潜在解码器重建整个图像，破坏了相机级噪声模式；但同一模型生成的修复区域共享一致的生成指纹。
analysis.method: 基于MoCo风格的对比学习框架，结合跨类别难负样本挖掘和生成器感知分类头，学习补丁级生成指纹。
contributions: 提出DiffusionPrint，一种学习扩散模型生成指纹的对比学习框架。
将生成指纹作为融合IFL框架的辅助模态，在多个模型上提升定位性能，最高提升28%。
analysis.experiments: 在多个生成模型上评估，集成到TruFor、MMFusion和轻量级融合基线中，在未见过的掩码类型上提升高达+28%，并泛化到未见过的生成架构。
limitations: 可能依赖特定扩散模型架构，对未知模型泛化性需进一步验证。
对比学习框架可能对负样本选择敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DiffusionPrint，通过对比学习学习扩散模型修复区域的生成指纹，提升图像伪造定位性能。

papers.title: A Regulatory Governance Framework for AI-Driven Financial Fraud Detection in U.S. Banking: Integrating OCC, SR 11-7, CFPB, and FinCEN Compliance Requirements for Model Development, Validation, and Monitoring Lifecycles
papers.abstract: U.S. financial institutions deploying AI-based fraud detection face a fragmented compliance landscape spanning four regulatory frameworks -- OCC Bulletin 2011-12, SR 11-7, the CFPB AI circular, and FinCEN BSA/SAR requirements -- with no integrated governance life cycle connecting these requirements to model development, validation, and monitoring practice. This paper presents the Regulatory Governance Framework for AI-Driven Financial Fraud Detection (RGF-AFFD), a three-tier governance architecture empirically anchored in a multi-study empirical program. Using the IEEE-CIS dataset (590,540 transactions) and ULB benchmark (284,807 transactions), we benchmark six architectures including an LSTM+XGBoost ensemble, and conduct ablation, temporal drift, SHAP interpretability, and BISG fairness analyses. The LSTM+XGBoost ensemble achieves ROC-AUC of 0.9289 (F1: 0.6360) with a benefit-cost ratio of 6:1. XGBoost demonstrates the strongest temporal stability (delta-AUC = -0.0017 versus -0.0626 for LSTM). The RDT-FG Regulatory Digital Twin meta-model translates metrics into four regulator-specific health scores and a composite Regulatory Fitness Index for continuous compliance monitoring. The RGF-AFFD is the first integrated deployment blueprint to simultaneously satisfy OCC, SR 11-7, CFPB, and FinCEN requirements, supported by a community bank implementation vignette and four evidence-based policy recommendations.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个整合美国四大金融监管框架的AI反欺诈治理框架，并在两个数据集上验证了LSTM+XGBoost集成模型的有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 美国金融机构在部署AI反欺诈系统时面临OCC、SR 11-7、CFPB和FinCEN四个监管框架的碎片化合规要求，缺乏统一的治理生命周期来连接这些要求与模型开发、验证和监控实践。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个集成治理框架，使AI驱动的金融欺诈检测模型同时满足多个美国监管机构的合规要求，并实现有效的模型开发、验证和持续监控。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析，但指出当前合规环境碎片化，缺乏集成治理生命周期。
analysis.method: 提出RGF-AFFD三层治理架构，包括基准测试六种架构（如LSTM+XGBoost集成）、消融实验、时间漂移分析、SHAP可解释性和BISG公平性分析，并引入RDT-FG监管数字孪生元模型将指标转化为四个监管特定健康评分和复合监管适应性指数。
contributions: 首次提出同时满足OCC、SR 11-7、CFPB和FinCEN要求的集成治理框架RGF-AFFD。
通过大规模实验验证了LSTM+XGBoost集成模型在欺诈检测中的有效性（ROC-AUC 0.9289，效益成本比6:1），并分析了时间稳定性和公平性。
analysis.experiments: 使用IEEE-CIS数据集（590,540笔交易）和ULB基准数据集（284,807笔交易），对六种架构进行基准测试、消融实验、时间漂移分析、SHAP可解释性和BISG公平性分析。
limitations: 实验仅基于两个公开数据集，可能无法完全代表真实银行场景的多样性。
框架的社区银行实施案例可能不适用于大型跨国银行。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个整合美国四大金融监管框架的AI反欺诈治理框架，并在两个数据集上验证了LSTM+XGBoost集成模型的有效性。

papers.title: IAD-Unify: A Region-Grounded Unified Model for Industrial Anomaly Segmentation, Understanding, and Generation
papers.abstract: Real-world industrial inspection requires not only localizing defects, but also explaining them in natural language and generating controlled defect edits. However, existing approaches fail to jointly support all three capabilities within a unified framework and evaluation protocol. We propose IAD-Unify, a dual-encoder unified framework in which a frozen DINOv2-based region expert supplies precise anomaly evidence to a shared Qwen3.5-4B vision-language backbone via lightweight token injection, jointly enabling anomaly segmentation, region-grounded understanding, and mask-guided generation. To enable unified evaluation, we further construct Anomaly-56K, a comprehensive unified multi-task IAD evaluation platform, spanning 59,916 images across 24 categories and 104 defect variants. Controlled ablations yield four findings: (i) region grounding is the decisive mechanism for understanding, removing it degrades location accuracy by >76 pp; (ii) predicted-region performance closely matches oracle, confirming deployment viability; (iii) region-grounded generation achieves the best full-image fidelity and masked-region perceptual quality; and (iv) pre-initialized joint training improves understanding at negligible generation cost (-0.16 dB). IAD-Unify further achieves strong performance on the MMAD benchmark, including categories unseen during training, demonstrating robust cross-category generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一框架IAD-Unify，通过区域专家注入实现工业异常分割、理解和生成三合一。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业检测需要同时定位缺陷、用自然语言解释缺陷并生成可控缺陷编辑，但现有方法无法在一个统一框架和评估协议下支持这三种能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个统一的模型，同时支持工业异常分割、区域理解与掩码引导生成，并建立统一的评估基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 消融实验发现：(i) 区域接地是理解的关键机制，移除后定位准确度下降超过76个百分点；(ii) 预测区域性能接近真实区域，验证了部署可行性；(iii) 区域接地生成在全图保真度和掩码区域感知质量上最佳；(iv) 预初始化联合训练以极小的生成代价（-0.16 dB）提升了理解能力。
analysis.method: 双编码器统一框架：冻结的DINOv2区域专家通过轻量级token注入向共享的Qwen3.5-4B视觉语言骨干提供精确异常证据，联合实现分割、理解和生成。
contributions: 提出IAD-Unify，首个统一支持工业异常分割、区域理解和掩码引导生成的框架。
构建Anomaly-56K，包含59,916张图像、24个类别和104种缺陷变体的多任务评估平台。
通过消融实验揭示区域接地机制的关键作用，并验证了预测区域部署的可行性。
analysis.experiments: 在Anomaly-56K和MMAD基准上评估，包括训练中未见类别，展示了强跨类别泛化能力。
limitations: 依赖冻结的DINOv2区域专家，可能限制对新型缺陷的适应性。
生成质量在极端缺陷场景下可能仍需提升。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一框架IAD-Unify，通过区域专家注入实现工业异常分割、理解和生成三合一。

papers.title: FreqFormer: Hierarchical Frequency-Domain Attention with Adaptive Spectral Routing for Long-Sequence Video Diffusion Transformers
papers.abstract: Long-sequence video diffusion transformers hit a quadratic self-attention cost that dominates runtime and memory for very long token sequences. Most efficient attention methods use one approximation everywhere, yet video features are spectrally structured: low frequencies carry global layout and coarse motion; high frequencies carry texture and fine detail. We present FreqFormer, a frequency-aware heterogeneous attention framework. Token features are split into spectral bands with different operators: dense global attention on compressed low-frequency content, structured block-sparse attention on mid frequencies, and sliding-window local attention on high frequencies. A lightweight spectral routing network allocates heads across bands using layer statistics and the diffusion timestep, shifting compute toward global structure early in denoising and detail later. Cross-band summary tokens provide cheap residual exchange. FreqFormer is paired with a fused GPU execution plan that co-schedules dense, sparse, and local branches to cut kernel launches and memory traffic. We give a consistent complexity model, an orthonormal-decomposition view of approximation, and simulation-based systems numbers (throughput, arithmetic intensity, memory traffic, duration scaling). In simulations from 64K to 1M tokens, FreqFormer substantially reduces estimated attention FLOPs and KV-related memory traffic versus dense attention while keeping a hardware-friendly pattern, supporting spectrally structured heterogeneous attention as a practical direction for long-video diffusion transformers.

analysis.tldr: FreqFormer通过频域自适应稀疏注意力机制，在长序列视频扩散Transformer中大幅降低计算和内存开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 长序列视频扩散Transformer的自注意力计算复杂度随序列长度二次增长，成为运行时和内存瓶颈。现有高效注意力方法对所有位置使用统一近似，忽略了视频特征在频域上的结构性差异（低频含全局布局，高频含细节纹理）。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种频域感知的异构注意力框架，在保持硬件友好性的同时，显著降低长序列视频扩散Transformer的注意力计算和内存开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视频特征在频域上具有结构性：低频承载全局布局和粗略运动，高频承载纹理和细节。扩散去噪过程中，早期需要全局结构，后期需要细节。
analysis.method: 提出FreqFormer，将token特征按频带拆分，对低频压缩后使用密集全局注意力，中频使用结构化块稀疏注意力，高频使用滑动窗口局部注意力；轻量级谱路由网络根据层统计量和扩散时间步分配注意力头到不同频带；跨频带摘要token提供廉价残差交换；配合融合GPU执行计划协同调度密集、稀疏和局部分支。
contributions: 提出频域感知的异构注意力框架FreqFormer，利用视频频域结构特性降低注意力复杂度。
设计轻量级谱路由网络，根据层统计量和扩散时间步动态分配注意力头到不同频带。
提供一致性复杂度模型、正交分解视角和基于仿真的系统性能数据，验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅给出从64K到1M token的仿真数据，显示FreqFormer相比密集注意力显著降低了估计的注意力FLOPs和KV相关内存流量。
limitations: 目前仅提供仿真数据，缺乏真实视频生成任务上的端到端实验验证。
路由网络和异构注意力机制的实现复杂度可能带来额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FreqFormer通过频域自适应稀疏注意力机制，在长序列视频扩散Transformer中大幅降低计算和内存开销。

papers.title: A Hybrid Architecture for Benign-Malignant Classification of Mammography ROIs
papers.abstract: Accurate characterization of suspicious breast lesions in mammography is important for early diagnosis and treatment planning. While Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are effective at extracting local visual patterns, they are less suited to modeling long-range dependencies. Vision Transformers (ViTs) address this limitation through self-attention, but their quadratic computational cost can be prohibitive. This paper presents a hybrid architecture that combines EfficientNetV2-M for local feature extraction with Vision Mamba, a State Space Model (SSM), for efficient global context modeling. The proposed model performs binary classification of abnormality-centered mammography regions of interest (ROIs) from the CBIS-DDSM dataset into benign and malignant classes. By combining a strong CNN backbone with a linear-complexity sequence model, the approach achieves strong lesion-level classification performance in an ROI-based setting.

analysis.tldr: 结合CNN和状态空间模型实现乳腺X光ROI良恶性分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 乳腺X光检查中准确区分良恶性病变对早期诊断和治疗至关重要，但现有方法存在局限：CNN擅长局部特征但难以建模长程依赖，ViT虽能处理全局依赖但计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持计算效率的同时，有效结合局部和全局特征进行乳腺X光ROI的良恶性分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混合架构，使用EfficientNetV2-M提取局部特征，Vision Mamba（状态空间模型）进行高效全局上下文建模，对CBIS-DDSM数据集中的ROI进行二分类。
contributions: 提出一种结合CNN和状态空间模型的混合架构用于乳腺X光ROI分类。
在CBIS-DDSM数据集上实现了强病变级分类性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集（CBIS-DDSM）上验证，泛化性未知。
未与更多基线方法（如纯ViT）进行详细比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 结合CNN和状态空间模型实现乳腺X光ROI良恶性分类。

papers.title: RetentiveKV: State-Space Memory for Uncertainty-Aware Multimodal KV Cache Eviction
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models face severe challenges in computational efficiency and memory consumption due to the substantial expansion of the visual KV cache when processing long visual contexts. Existing KV cache compression methods typically rely on the "persistence of importance" hypothesis to prune tokens. However, this approach proves fragile in multimodal settings due to two key issues: 1) Visual tokens display "deferred importance," initially exhibiting low salience but becoming pivotal during later decoding, which can lead to premature eviction. 2) Discrete pruning disrupts the inherent spatial continuity of visual cues. To address these challenges, we propose RetentiveKV, an entropy-driven KV cache optimization method that reformulates KV eviction from "discrete context truncation" to "continuous memory evolution" based on State Space Models. Our method leverages information entropy to quantify the information potential of low-attention tokens and integrates tokens scheduled for eviction into a continuous state space through entropy-guided state transitions, enabling their dynamic reactivation when semantic relevance arises during subsequent decoding. Extensive experiments on multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that RetentiveKV achieves 5.0 times KV cache compression and 1.5 times decoding acceleration.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于状态空间模型和熵驱动的KV缓存淘汰方法，将离散截断转为连续记忆演化，实现5倍压缩和1.5倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型处理长视觉上下文时，视觉KV缓存急剧膨胀导致计算和内存瓶颈；现有压缩方法依赖“重要性持久性”假设，在多模态场景下因视觉token的延迟重要性和离散剪枝破坏空间连续性而失效。
analysis.problem: 多模态大模型中视觉KV缓存的高效压缩问题，需解决视觉token延迟重要性和离散剪枝破坏空间连续性的挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到视觉token具有“延迟重要性”，初始低显著性但在后续解码中变得关键；离散剪枝会破坏视觉线索的固有空间连续性。
analysis.method: 提出RetentiveKV，一种基于状态空间模型（SSM）的熵驱动KV缓存优化方法。利用信息熵量化低注意力token的信息潜力，通过熵引导的状态转移将待淘汰token集成到连续状态空间中，使其在后续解码中能动态重新激活。
contributions: 揭示了多模态KV缓存压缩中视觉token延迟重要性和离散剪枝破坏空间连续性的问题
提出RetentiveKV方法，将KV淘汰从离散截断转变为基于SSM的连续记忆演化
在多模态基准上实现5倍KV缓存压缩和1.5倍解码加速
analysis.experiments: 在多模态基准上进行实验，摘要未提供具体数据集和对比方法细节。
limitations: 可能依赖特定多模态模型架构
熵引导状态转移的计算开销未明确讨论
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于状态空间模型和熵驱动的KV缓存淘汰方法，将离散截断转为连续记忆演化，实现5倍压缩和1.5倍加速。

papers.title: Decoding by Perturbation: Mitigating MLLM Hallucinations via Dynamic Textual Perturbation
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models frequently suffer from inference hallucinations, partially stemming from language priors dominating visual evidence. Existing training-free mitigation methods either perturb the visual representation and deviate from the natural image distribution, or enforce intrusive manipulations that compromise the model's inherent generative fluency. We introduce a novel perspective that multimodal hallucination manifests as the hypersensitivity of visual grounding to textual phrasing during the decoding phase. Building on this insight, we propose Decoding by Perturbation (DeP), a training-free framework mitigating prior-induced hallucinations via controlled textual interventions. DeP employs a dynamic probe applying multi-level textual perturbations to elicit latent language priors. Leveraging attention variance, it enhances stable evidence regions while suppressing suspicious noise in the feature space. Furthermore, it constructs an interpretable prior drift direction using logits statistics to counteract probability biases from textual co-occurrences. Extensive experiments confirm DeP effectively reduces hallucinations and achieves superior performance across multiple benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态文本扰动方法DeP，在解码阶段抑制多模态大模型的幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在推理时经常产生幻觉，部分原因是语言先验主导了视觉证据。现有免训练方法要么扰动视觉表示偏离自然图像分布，要么强制干预损害生成流畅性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不损害生成流畅性的前提下，通过训练自由的方法抑制多模态大模型中的语言先验主导的幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多模态幻觉表现为解码阶段视觉基础对文本措辞的超敏感性。
analysis.method: 提出Decoding by Perturbation (DeP)框架，通过动态探针施加多级文本扰动以引出潜在语言先验，利用注意力方差增强稳定证据区域并抑制可疑噪声，同时基于logits统计构建可解释的先验漂移方向以抵消文本共现概率偏差。
contributions: 提出从文本扰动角度缓解多模态幻觉的新视角。
设计训练自由的DeP框架，通过动态文本扰动和注意力方差机制有效抑制幻觉。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上验证DeP有效减少幻觉并取得优越性能。
limitations: 可能对特定类型的文本扰动敏感。
未讨论计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态文本扰动方法DeP，在解码阶段抑制多模态大模型的幻觉。

papers.title: RACF: A Resilient Autonomous Car Framework with Object Distance Correction
papers.abstract: Autonomous vehicles are increasingly deployed in safety-critical applications, where sensing failures or cyberphysical attacks can lead to unsafe operations resulting in human loss and/or severe physical damages. Reliable real-time perception is therefore critically important for their safe operations and acceptability. For example, vision-based distance estimation is vulnerable to environmental degradation and adversarial perturbations, and existing defenses are often reactive and too slow to promptly mitigate their impacts on safe operations. We present a Resilient Autonomous Car Framework (RACF) that incorporates an Object Distance Correction Algorithm (ODCA) to improve perception-layer robustness through redundancy and diversity across a depth camera, LiDAR, and physics-based kinematics. Within this framework, when obstacle distance estimation produced by depth camera is inconsistent, a cross-sensor gate activates the correction algorithm to fix the detected inconsistency. We have experiment with the proposed resilient car framework and evaluate its performance on a testbed implemented using the Quanser QCar 2 platform. The presented framework achieved up to 35% RMSE reduction under strong corruption and improves stop compliance and braking latency, while operating in real time. These results demonstrate a practical and lightweight approach to resilient perception for safety-critical autonomous driving

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合深度相机、LiDAR和运动学冗余的弹性自动驾驶框架，通过跨传感器门控触发距离校正，在强干扰下实现35%的RMSE降低。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶安全关键应用中，视觉距离估计易受环境退化和对抗扰动影响，现有防御方法反应慢且难以实时缓解危害。
analysis.problem: 如何通过传感器冗余与多样性，实时检测并修正深度相机产生的障碍物距离估计不一致问题，提升感知层鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出弹性自动驾驶框架RACF，包含目标距离校正算法ODCA，利用深度相机、LiDAR和基于物理的运动学模型实现冗余与多样性；当深度相机距离估计不一致时，跨传感器门控激活校正算法。
contributions: 提出一种结合深度相机、LiDAR和运动学的弹性感知框架RACF，用于实时检测和修正距离估计不一致。
在Quanser QCar 2平台上实验验证，强干扰下RMSE降低35%，并改善停车合规性和制动延迟。
analysis.experiments: 在Quanser QCar 2平台测试，强干扰下RMSE降低35%，停车合规性和制动延迟改善，且实时运行。
limitations: 仅在单一平台测试，泛化性未知。
未讨论对抗攻击场景下的具体鲁棒性边界。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合深度相机、LiDAR和运动学冗余的弹性自动驾驶框架，通过跨传感器门控触发距离校正，在强干扰下实现35%的RMSE降低。

papers.title: DeferredSeg: A Multi-Expert Deferral Framework for Trustworthy Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Segmentation models based on deep neural networks demonstrate strong generalization for medical image segmentation. However, they often exhibit overconfidence or underconfidence, leading to unreliable confidence scores for segmentation masks, especially in ambiguous regions. This undermines the trustworthiness required for clinical deployment. Motivated by the learning-to-defer (L2D) paradigm, we introduce DeferredSeg, a deferral-aware segmentation framework, i.e., a Human--AI collaboration system that determines whether to defer predictions to human experts in specific regions. DeferredSeg extends the base segmentor with an aggregated deferral predictor and additional routing channels that dynamically route each pixel to either the base segmentor or a human expert. To train this routing efficiently, we introduce a pixel-wise surrogate collaboration loss that supervises deferral decisions. In addition, to preserve spatial coherence within deferral regions, we propose a spatial-coherence loss that enforces smooth deferral masks, thereby enhancing reliability. Beyond single-expert deferral, we further extend the framework to a multi-expert setting by introducing multiple discrepancy experts for collaborative decision-making. To prevent overloading or underutilizing individual experts, we further design a load-balancing penalty that evenly distributes workload across expert branches. We evaluate DeferredSeg on three challenging medical datasets using MedSAM and CENet as the base segmentor for fair comparison. Experimental results show that DeferredSeg consistently outperforms the baseline, demonstrating its effectiveness for trustworthy dense medical segmentation. Moreover, the proposed framework is model-agnostic and can be readily applied to other segmentation architectures.

analysis.tldr: 提出DeferredSeg框架，通过学习-延迟范式实现医学图像分割中像素级的人机协作，提升可信度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学图像分割模型在模糊区域常出现置信度不可靠的问题，影响临床部署的可信度。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可信的医学图像分割系统，使其在不确定区域能主动将决策延迟给人类专家。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: DeferredSeg框架：在基础分割器上增加聚合延迟预测器和路由通道，通过像素级代理协作损失和空间一致性损失训练路由决策，并扩展至多专家场景，引入负载均衡惩罚。
contributions: 提出DeferredSeg，一个基于学习-延迟的医学图像分割人机协作框架。
设计像素级代理协作损失和空间一致性损失，实现高效且空间平滑的延迟决策。
扩展至多专家设置，并引入负载均衡惩罚避免专家过载或闲置。
analysis.experiments: 在三个医学数据集上使用MedSAM和CENet作为基础分割器进行评估，结果显示DeferredSeg一致优于基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的人类专家标注用于训练。
多专家场景下的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DeferredSeg框架，通过学习-延迟范式实现医学图像分割中像素级的人机协作，提升可信度。

papers.title: Security and Resilience in Autonomous Vehicles: A Proactive Design Approach
papers.abstract: Autonomous vehicles (AVs) promise efficient, clean and cost-effective transportation systems, but their reliance on sensors, wireless communications, and decision-making systems makes them vulnerable to cyberattacks and physical threats. This chapter presents novel design techniques to strengthen the security and resilience of AVs. We first provide a taxonomy of potential attacks across different architectural layers, from perception and control manipulation to Vehicle-to-Any (V2X) communication exploits and software supply chain compromises. Building on this analysis, we present an AV Resilient architecture that integrates redundancy, diversity, and adaptive reconfiguration strategies, supported by anomaly- and hash-based intrusion detection techniques. Experimental validation on the Quanser QCar platform demonstrates the effectiveness of these methods in detecting depth camera blinding attacks and software tampering of perception modules. The results highlight how fast anomaly detection combined with fallback and backup mechanisms ensures operational continuity, even under adversarial conditions. By linking layered threat modeling with practical defense implementations, this work advances AV resilience strategies for safer and more trustworthy autonomous vehicles.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合冗余、多样性和自适应重配置的AV弹性架构，在Quanser QCar平台上验证了对深度相机致盲攻击和软件篡改的检测效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶汽车依赖传感器、无线通信和决策系统，易受网络攻击和物理威胁，现有防御方法缺乏系统性的分层威胁建模与实用防御实现结合。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种系统性的安全与弹性架构，以抵御针对自动驾驶汽车不同架构层的多种攻击，并确保在攻击下仍能保持操作连续性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AV弹性架构，集成冗余、多样性和自适应重配置策略，并采用基于异常和哈希的入侵检测技术。
contributions: 提供了跨不同架构层的潜在攻击分类法。
提出了一种结合冗余、多样性和自适应重配置的AV弹性架构。
在Quanser QCar平台上实验验证了深度相机致盲攻击和软件篡改检测的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在Quanser QCar平台上进行实验，验证了深度相机致盲攻击和感知模块软件篡改的检测方法，结果显示快速异常检测结合回退和备份机制能确保操作连续性。
limitations: 实验仅在单一平台（Quanser QCar）上进行，泛化性有待验证。
未提及对更复杂攻击（如协同攻击）的防御效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合冗余、多样性和自适应重配置的AV弹性架构，在Quanser QCar平台上验证了对深度相机致盲攻击和软件篡改的检测效果。

papers.title: Dual-Modality Anchor-Guided Filtering for Test-time Prompt Tuning
papers.abstract: Test-Time Prompt Tuning (TPT) adapts vision-language models using augmented views, but its effectiveness is hindered by the challenge of determining which views are beneficial. Standard entropy-based filtering relies on the internal confidence scores of the model, which are often miscalibrated under distribution shift, assigning high confidence to irrelevant crops or background regions while ignoring semantic content. To address this, we propose a dual-modality anchor-guided framework that grounds view selection in semantic evidence. We introduce a text anchor from attribute-rich descriptions, to provide fine-grained class semantics, and an adaptive image anchor that captures evolving test-time statistics. Using these anchors, we filter views based on alignment and confidence, ensuring that only informative views guide adaptation. Moreover, we treat the anchors as auxiliary predictive heads and combine their predictions with the original output in a confidence-weighted ensemble, yielding a stable supervision signal for prompt updates. Extensive experiments on 15 benchmark datasets demonstrate new state-of-the-art performance, highlighting the contribution of anchor-guided supervision as a foundation for robust prompt updates.

analysis.tldr: 提出双模态锚点引导的测试时提示微调方法，通过文本和图像锚点过滤视图，提升分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 测试时提示微调依赖增强视图，但现有基于熵的过滤方法在分布偏移下置信度校准差，易忽略语义内容，导致效果受限。
analysis.problem: 如何有效筛选有益视图以提升测试时提示微调在分布偏移下的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准熵过滤在分布偏移下置信度校准差，高置信度分配给无关裁剪或背景区域，忽略语义内容。
analysis.method: 提出双模态锚点引导框架：引入文本锚点（属性丰富描述）和自适应图像锚点（捕获测试时统计），基于对齐和置信度过滤视图，并将锚点作为辅助预测头进行置信度加权集成。
contributions: 提出双模态锚点引导的视图过滤方法，利用文本和图像锚点提供语义证据。
设计锚点作为辅助预测头的置信度加权集成策略，提供稳定监督信号。
analysis.experiments: 在15个基准数据集上取得新最优结果，摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 依赖属性丰富描述的文本锚点，可能对描述质量敏感。
自适应图像锚点更新可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双模态锚点引导的测试时提示微调方法，通过文本和图像锚点过滤视图，提升分布偏移下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Agent-GWO: Collaborative Agents for Dynamic Prompt Optimization in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in complex reasoning tasks, while recent prompting strategies such as Chain-of-Thought (CoT) have further elevated their performance in handling complex logical problems. Despite these advances, high-quality reasoning remains heavily reliant on manual static prompts and is sensitive to decoding configurations and task distributions, leading to performance fluctuations and limited transferability. Existing automatic prompt optimization methods typically adopt single-agent local search, failing to simultaneously optimize prompts and decoding hyperparameters within a unified framework to achieve stable global improvements. To address this limitation, we propose Agent-GWO, a dynamic prompt optimization framework for complex reasoning. Specifically, we unify prompt templates and decoding hyperparameters as inheritable agent configurations. By leveraging the leader-follower mechanism of the Grey Wolf Optimizer (GWO), we automatically select three leader agents ($α$, $β$, and $δ$) to guide the collaborative updates of the remaining agents, enabling iterative convergence toward robust optimal reasoning configurations that can be seamlessly integrated for inference. Extensive experiments on multiple mathematical and hybrid reasoning benchmarks across diverse LLM backbones show that Agent-GWO consistently improves accuracy and stability over existing prompt optimization methods. The code will be released publicly.

analysis.tldr: 提出Agent-GWO框架，利用灰狼优化器的领导者-追随者机制协同优化提示模板与解码超参数，提升LLM推理的准确性与稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM推理依赖人工静态提示，对解码配置和任务分布敏感，导致性能波动和迁移性差；自动提示优化方法多为单智能体局部搜索，无法同时优化提示与超参数以实现全局稳定改进。
analysis.problem: 如何在一个统一框架内同时优化提示模板和解码超参数，实现LLM复杂推理任务的全局稳定性能提升。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出单智能体局部搜索方法无法同时优化提示和超参数，导致性能波动和迁移性有限。
analysis.method: 将提示模板和解码超参数统一为可继承的智能体配置，利用灰狼优化器的领导者-追随者机制，自动选择三个领导者智能体（α、β、δ）指导其余智能体协同更新，迭代收敛到鲁棒的最优推理配置。
contributions: 提出Agent-GWO，首个将提示模板与解码超参数统一优化的动态提示框架。
引入灰狼优化器的领导者-追随者机制实现多智能体协同搜索，提升推理准确性和稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数学和混合推理基准上，使用多种LLM骨干网络进行实验，结果显示Agent-GWO在准确性和稳定性上持续优于现有提示优化方法。
limitations: 可能依赖初始智能体配置的质量。
灰狼优化器的收敛速度可能受问题维度影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Agent-GWO框架，利用灰狼优化器的领导者-追随者机制协同优化提示模板与解码超参数，提升LLM推理的准确性与稳定性。

papers.title: Chain-of-Models Pre-Training: Rethinking Training Acceleration of Vision Foundation Models
papers.abstract: In this paper, we present Chain-of-Models Pre-Training (CoM-PT), a novel performance-lossless training acceleration method for vision foundation models (VFMs). This approach fundamentally differs from existing acceleration methods in its core motivation: rather than optimizing each model individually, CoM-PT is designed to accelerate the training pipeline at the model family level, scaling efficiently as the model family expands. Specifically, CoM-PT establishes a pre-training sequence for the model family, arranged in ascending order of model size, called model chain. In this chain, only the smallest model undergoes standard individual pre-training, while the other models are efficiently trained through sequential inverse knowledge transfer from their smaller predecessors by jointly reusing the knowledge in the parameter space and the feature space. As a result, CoM-PT enables all models to achieve performance that is mostly superior to standard individual training while significantly reducing training cost, and this is extensively validated across 45 datasets spanning zero-shot and fine-tuning tasks. Notably, its efficient scaling property yields a remarkable phenomenon: training more models even results in higher efficiency. For instance, when pre-training on CC3M: i) given ViT-L as the largest model, progressively prepending smaller models to the model chain reduces computational complexity by up to 72%; ii) within a fixed model size range, as the VFM family scales across 3, 4, and 7 models, the acceleration ratio of CoM-PT exhibits a striking leap: from 4.13X to 5.68X and 7.09X. Since CoM-PT is naturally agnostic to specific pre-training paradigms, we open-source the code to spur further extensions in more computationally intensive scenarios, such as large language model pre-training.

analysis.tldr: 提出模型链预训练（CoM-PT），通过序列逆知识迁移加速视觉基础模型族训练，性能不降反升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有训练加速方法针对单个模型优化，无法在模型族扩展时高效缩放，导致大规模视觉基础模型训练成本高昂。
analysis.problem: 如何在不损失性能的前提下，实现视觉基础模型族训练管线的整体加速，并随模型族规模扩大保持高效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：训练更多模型反而效率更高（如模型族从3个扩展到7个，加速比从4.13X提升至7.09X）；模型链中仅最小模型需完整预训练，其余通过知识迁移获得更优性能。
analysis.method: 构建按模型大小升序排列的模型链，仅最小模型独立预训练，其余模型通过参数空间和特征空间的逆知识迁移从较小前驱模型高效训练。
contributions: 提出CoM-PT，一种性能无损的模型族级训练加速方法，具有高效缩放特性。
在45个数据集上验证了CoM-PT在零样本和微调任务中性能优于标准独立训练，同时显著降低计算成本。
analysis.experiments: 在CC3M数据集上预训练，使用ViT-L作为最大模型，逐步添加更小模型至模型链可降低高达72%的计算复杂度；模型族规模从3增至7时，加速比从4.13X升至7.09X。
limitations: 当前验证限于视觉基础模型，未在语言模型等场景实验。
逆知识迁移的机制可能对模型架构差异敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出模型链预训练（CoM-PT），通过序列逆知识迁移加速视觉基础模型族训练，性能不降反升。

papers.title: Heuristic Classification of Thoughts Prompting (HCoT): Integrating Expert System Heuristics for Structured Reasoning into Large Language Models
papers.abstract: This paper addresses two limitations of large language models (LLMs) in solving complex problems: (1) their reasoning processes exhibit Bayesian-like stochastic generation, where each token is sampled from a context-dependent probability distribution, leading to inherently random decision trajectories rather than deterministic planning; (2) the reasoning and decision-making mechanisms are statically decoupled, meaning dynamically retrieved domain knowledge fails to dynamically adjust the underlying reasoning strategy. These dual deficiencies result in initial decisions lacking strategic anchoring and reasoning chains often failing to converge on correct solutions, as stochastic generation lacks mechanisms for trajectory correction or knowledge-guided optimization during sequential reasoning. To resolve these issues, we propose a problem-solving method integrated into the LLM's generation process to guide reasoning. This method, compatible with numerous LLMs and featuring reusable solutions, is grounded in a novel Heuristic-Classification-of-Thoughts prompting schema (HCoT). HCoT synergizes the LLM's reasoning ability with a structured problem space via a heuristic classification model that controls the reasoning process and provides reusable abstract solutions. Evaluated on two complex inductive reasoning tasks with ill-defined search spaces, HCoT outperforms existing approaches (e.g., Tree-of-Thoughts and Chain-of-Thoughts prompting) in performance. On the well-structured 24 Game task, HCoT demonstrates significantly higher token efficiency compared to the state-of-the-art Tree-of-Thoughts-Breadth-First-Search. In terms of both accuracy and token usage, HCoT achieves a Pareto frontier balance, offering a strong trade-off between performance and computational cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出HCoT提示方法，将专家系统启发式分类与LLM推理结合，在复杂推理任务中提升性能与token效率。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在复杂问题求解中存在随机生成和推理与决策静态解耦的缺陷，导致初始决策缺乏策略锚定且推理链难以收敛。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM在复杂推理任务中推理过程随机性高、缺乏知识引导和策略调整机制的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM推理呈现贝叶斯式随机生成，决策轨迹非确定性；推理与决策机制静态解耦，动态知识无法调整推理策略。
analysis.method: 提出Heuristic-Classification-of-Thoughts (HCoT)提示模式，通过启发式分类模型控制推理过程并提供可复用的抽象解决方案。
contributions: 提出HCoT提示方法，融合专家系统启发式分类与LLM推理能力。
在复杂归纳推理任务上超越现有方法（如ToT、CoT），并在24点任务中实现更高的token效率。
analysis.experiments: 在两个复杂归纳推理任务和一个24点游戏任务上评估，HCoT在性能和token效率上均优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有明确定义问题空间的任务。
启发式分类模型的设计可能依赖领域知识。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HCoT提示方法，将专家系统启发式分类与LLM推理结合，在复杂推理任务中提升性能与token效率。

papers.title: Preventing Safety Drift in Large Language Models via Coupled Weight and Activation Constraints
papers.abstract: Safety alignment in Large Language Models (LLMs) remains highly fragile during fine-tuning, where even benign adaptation can degrade pre-trained refusal behaviors and enable harmful responses. Existing defenses typically constrain either weights or activations in isolation, without considering their coupled effects on safety. In this paper, we first theoretically demonstrate that constraining either weights or activations alone is insufficient for safety preservation. To robustly preserve safety alignment, we propose Coupled Weight and Activation Constraints (CWAC), a novel approach that simultaneously enforces a precomputed safety subspace on weight updates and applies targeted regularization to safety-critical features identified by sparse autoencoders. Extensive experiments across four widely used LLMs and diverse downstream tasks show that CWAC consistently achieves the lowest harmful scores with minimal impact on fine-tuning accuracy, substantially outperforming strong baselines even under high harmful data ratios.

analysis.tldr: 提出耦合权重与激活约束（CWAC）方法，同时约束权重更新和关键安全特征，防止LLM微调中的安全漂移。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM的安全对齐在微调中极易退化，即使良性适应也可能破坏预训练的拒绝行为，导致有害响应。现有方法孤立地约束权重或激活，忽略了它们对安全的耦合效应。
analysis.problem: 微调过程中LLM安全对齐的脆弱性，以及现有约束方法无法同时考虑权重和激活耦合影响的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出耦合权重与激活约束（CWAC），同时施加预计算的安全子空间约束于权重更新，并对稀疏自编码器识别的安全关键特征进行正则化。
contributions: 理论上证明单独约束权重或激活不足以保持安全对齐。
提出CWAC方法，同时约束权重和激活，有效防止安全漂移。
在多个LLM和下游任务上验证CWAC在保持低有害分数的同时，对微调精度影响最小。
analysis.experiments: 在四种广泛使用的LLM和多种下游任务上进行实验，CWAC在有害数据比例高的情况下持续取得最低有害分数，且对微调精度影响最小，显著优于强基线。
limitations: 可能依赖预计算的安全子空间和稀疏自编码器，计算开销需进一步评估。
未讨论对极端有害数据比例或对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出耦合权重与激活约束（CWAC）方法，同时约束权重更新和关键安全特征，防止LLM微调中的安全漂移。

papers.title: HQA-VLAttack: Towards High Quality Adversarial Attack on Vision-Language Pre-Trained Models
papers.abstract: Black-box adversarial attack on vision-language pre-trained models is a practical and challenging task, as text and image perturbations need to be considered simultaneously, and only the predicted results are accessible. Research on this problem is in its infancy, and only a handful of methods are available. Nevertheless, existing methods either rely on a complex iterative cross-search strategy, which inevitably consumes numerous queries, or only consider reducing the similarity of positive image-text pairs but ignore that of negative ones, which will also be implicitly diminished, thus inevitably affecting the attack performance. To alleviate the above issues, we propose a simple yet effective framework to generate high-quality adversarial examples on vision-language pre-trained models, named HQA-VLAttack, which consists of text and image attack stages. For text perturbation generation, it leverages the counter-fitting word vector to generate the substitute word set, thus guaranteeing the semantic consistency between the substitute word and the original word. For image perturbation generation, it first initializes the image adversarial example via the layer-importance guided strategy, and then utilizes contrastive learning to optimize the image adversarial perturbation, which ensures that the similarity of positive image-text pairs is decreased while that of negative image-text pairs is increased. In this way, the optimized adversarial images and texts are more likely to retrieve negative examples, thereby enhancing the attack success rate. Experimental results on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that HQA-VLAttack significantly outperforms strong baselines in terms of attack success rate.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种简单有效的黑盒对抗攻击框架HQA-VLAttack，通过文本和图像两阶段攻击生成高质量对抗样本，显著提升对视觉-语言预训练模型的攻击成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 黑盒对抗攻击视觉-语言预训练模型是实用且具有挑战性的任务，现有方法要么依赖复杂迭代交叉搜索消耗大量查询，要么忽略负样本相似度影响攻击性能。
analysis.problem: 如何高效生成高质量对抗样本，同时降低正样本相似度并提升负样本相似度，以提高黑盒攻击成功率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法仅考虑降低正样本相似度，导致负样本相似度也被隐式降低，影响攻击性能。
analysis.method: 两阶段攻击框架：文本阶段使用反拟合词向量生成替代词集保证语义一致性；图像阶段先通过层重要性引导策略初始化对抗样本，再利用对比学习优化扰动，同时降低正样本相似度并提升负样本相似度。
contributions: 提出HQA-VLAttack框架，结合文本和图像两阶段攻击生成高质量对抗样本。
引入反拟合词向量和层重要性引导策略，以及对比学习优化，有效提升攻击成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准数据集上实验，HQA-VLAttack在攻击成功率上显著优于强基线。
limitations: 可能仅适用于黑盒场景，白盒攻击效果未知。
未讨论对抗样本的迁移性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种简单有效的黑盒对抗攻击框架HQA-VLAttack，通过文本和图像两阶段攻击生成高质量对抗样本，显著提升对视觉-语言预训练模型的攻击成功率。

papers.title: Modality-Agnostic Prompt Learning for Multi-Modal Camouflaged Object Detection
papers.abstract: Camouflaged Object Detection (COD) aims to segment objects that blend seamlessly into complex backgrounds, with growing interest in exploiting additional visual modalities to enhance robustness through complementary information. However, most existing approaches generally rely on modality-specific architectures or customized fusion strategies, which limit scalability and cross-modal generalization. To address this, we propose a novel framework that generates modality-agnostic multi-modal prompts for the Segment Anything Model (SAM), enabling parameter-efficient adaptation to arbitrary auxiliary modalities and significantly improving overall performance on COD tasks. Specifically, we model multi-modal learning through interactions between a data-driven content domain and a knowledge-driven prompt domain, distilling task-relevant cues into unified prompts for SAM decoding. We further introduce a lightweight Mask Refine Module to calibrate coarse predictions by incorporating fine-grained prompt cues, leading to more accurate camouflaged object boundaries. Extensive experiments on RGB-Depth, RGB-Thermal, and RGB-Polarization benchmarks validate the effectiveness and generalization of our modality-agnostic framework.

analysis.tldr: 提出模态无关提示学习框架，利用SAM实现多模态伪装目标检测的通用高效适配。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有COD方法依赖特定模态架构或定制融合策略，限制了跨模态泛化与可扩展性，亟需统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个无需针对每种模态定制架构的多模态COD方法，实现参数高效且跨模态泛化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出模态无关提示学习框架，通过数据驱动内容域与知识驱动提示域交互，将任务相关线索蒸馏为统一提示输入SAM，并引入轻量级掩码精炼模块校准粗预测。
contributions: 提出模态无关的提示学习框架，可适配任意辅助模态并提升COD性能。
设计内容-提示双域交互机制，将多模态信息蒸馏为统一提示。
引入轻量级掩码精炼模块，利用细粒度提示线索改善边界精度。
analysis.experiments: 在RGB-D、RGB-T、RGB-P三个基准上验证了有效性与泛化性，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖SAM的预训练能力，在极端场景下泛化性有限。
仅验证了三种模态，更多模态（如RGB-NIR）未测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出模态无关提示学习框架，利用SAM实现多模态伪装目标检测的通用高效适配。

papers.title: Beyond Output Correctness: Benchmarking and Evaluating Large Language Model Reasoning in Coding Tasks
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly rely on explicit reasoning to solve coding tasks, yet evaluating the quality of this reasoning remains challenging. Existing reasoning evaluators are not designed for coding, and current benchmarks focus primarily on code generation, leaving other coding tasks largely unexplored. We introduce CodeRQ-Bench, the first benchmark for evaluating LLM reasoning quality across three coding task categories: generation, summarization, and classification. Using this benchmark, we analyze 1,069 mismatch cases from existing evaluators, identify five recurring limitations, and derive four design insights for reasoning evaluation in coding tasks. Guided by these insights, we propose VERA, a two-stage evaluator that combines evidence-grounded verification with ambiguity-aware score correction. Experiments on CodeRQ-Bench show that VERA consistently outperforms strong baselines across four datasets, improving AUCROC by up to 0.26 and AUPRC by up to 0.21. We release CodeRQ-Bench at https://github.com/MrLYG/CodeRQ-Bench, supporting future investigations.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个面向代码任务的推理质量基准CodeRQ-Bench和两阶段评估器VERA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有推理评估器不适用于代码任务，且基准主要关注代码生成，忽视了其他编码任务。
analysis.problem: 缺乏专门评估LLM在代码任务中推理质量的基准和方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分析现有评估器在代码任务中的1069个不匹配案例，总结出五种常见局限，并推导出四个设计洞见。
analysis.method: 提出CodeRQ-Bench基准，覆盖生成、总结和分类三类编码任务；提出VERA两阶段评估器，结合证据验证和模糊性感知分数校正。
contributions: 首个面向代码任务推理质量评估的基准CodeRQ-Bench。
提出VERA评估器，在多个数据集上显著优于基线。
analysis.experiments: 在CodeRQ-Bench上对比多个基线，VERA在AUC-ROC上提升高达0.26，AUPRC提升高达0.21。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖三类编码任务，可能不全面。
VERA的泛化性需在更多模型和任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个面向代码任务的推理质量基准CodeRQ-Bench和两阶段评估器VERA。

papers.title: SCRIPT: A Subcharacter Compositional Representation Injection Module for Korean Pre-Trained Language Models
papers.abstract: Korean is a morphologically rich language with a featural writing system in which each character is systematically composed of subcharacter units known as Jamo. These subcharacters not only determine the visual structure of Korean but also encode frequent and linguistically meaningful morphophonological processes. However, most current Korean language models (LMs) are based on subword tokenization schemes, which are not explicitly designed to capture the internal compositional structure of characters. To address this limitation, we propose SCRIPT, a model-agnostic module that injects subcharacter compositional knowledge into Korean PLMs. SCRIPT allows to enhance subword embeddings with structural granularity, without requiring architectural changes or additional pre-training. As a result, SCRIPT enhances all baselines across various Korean natural language understanding (NLU) and generation (NLG) tasks. Moreover, beyond performance gains, detailed linguistic analyses show that SCRIPT reshapes the embedding space in a way that better captures grammatical regularities and semantically cohesive variations. Our code is available at https://github.com/SungHo3268/SCRIPT.

analysis.tldr: SCRIPT模块通过注入韩语子字符（Jamo）的组成结构知识，在不改变架构或额外预训练的情况下提升韩语PLM性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 韩语是形态丰富的语言，其文字系统由子字符单元（Jamo）构成，但当前基于子词的分词方法无法捕捉字符内部的组成结构，限制了模型对韩语形态音位过程的理解。
analysis.problem: 如何在不改变模型架构或进行额外预训练的前提下，将子字符级别的组成知识注入韩语预训练语言模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SCRIPT模块，一种模型无关的注入方法，通过增强子词嵌入的结构粒度来注入子字符组成知识。
contributions: 提出SCRIPT模块，无需架构修改或额外预训练即可提升韩语PLM性能。
在多种韩语NLU和NLG任务上验证了有效性，并展示了嵌入空间的重塑以更好捕捉语法规律和语义变化。
analysis.experiments: 在多种韩语自然语言理解和生成任务上进行实验，SCRIPT提升了所有基线模型性能，并进行了语言学分析。
limitations: 可能仅适用于韩语等具有类似子字符结构的语言。
未讨论在更大规模模型或更复杂任务上的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SCRIPT模块通过注入韩语子字符（Jamo）的组成结构知识，在不改变架构或额外预训练的情况下提升韩语PLM性能。

papers.title: Cooperative Memory Paging with Keyword Bookmarks for Long-Horizon LLM Conversations
papers.abstract: When LLM conversations grow beyond the context window, old content must be evicted -- but how does the model recover it when needed? We propose cooperative paging: evicted segments are replaced with minimal keyword bookmarks ([pN:keywords], ~8-24 tokens each), and the model is given a recall() tool to retrieve full content on demand. On the LoCoMo benchmark (10 real multi-session conversations, 300+ turns), cooperative paging achieves the highest answer quality among six methods -- outperforming truncation, BM25, word-overlap retrieval, a search-tool baseline, and full context -- on four models (GPT-4o-mini, DeepSeek-v3.2, Claude Haiku, GLM-5), confirmed by four independent LLM judges ($p=0.017$, paired bootstrap). We then study the paging design space with a 5x4 ablation over boundary strategies and eviction policies (3,176 synthetic probes, 1,600 LoCoMo probes). Key findings: (1) coarse fixed-size pages (fixed_20) reach 96.7% while content-aware topic_shift collapses to 56.7%; (2) eviction policy choice is data-dependent (FIFO best on synthetic, LFU on LoCoMo); (3) two bookmark generation strategies improve over the heuristic baseline (+4.4 and +8.7 E2E points); (4) the remaining bottleneck is bookmark discrimination -- the model triggers recall() 96% of the time but selects the correct page only 57% when bookmarks are insufficiently distinctive. Keyword specificity alone accounts for a 25 percentage point accuracy difference.

analysis.tldr: 提出合作内存分页机制，用关键词书签替代被驱逐的对话片段，使LLM能按需召回长对话历史，在LoCoMo基准上超越六种基线方法。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM对话超出上下文窗口时，旧内容必须被驱逐，但现有方法无法高效恢复被驱逐的内容，导致长对话中答案质量下降。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种机制，使LLM在长对话中既能有效管理上下文窗口，又能按需准确恢复被驱逐的历史信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过消融实验揭示了关键瓶颈：书签区分性不足——模型96%的时间触发召回，但仅57%能选对正确页面；关键词特异性单独造成25个百分点的准确率差异。
analysis.method: 合作内存分页：将驱逐的对话段替换为少量关键词书签（约8-24个token），并赋予模型recall()工具按需检索完整内容。
contributions: 提出合作内存分页机制，在LoCoMo基准上四个模型上均取得最高答案质量，显著优于截断、BM25、检索等基线。
通过大规模消融实验（5x4设计，3176个合成探针和1600个LoCoMo探针）揭示了分页策略的关键设计空间：粗粒度固定页面优于内容感知分页，驱逐策略依赖数据分布，书签生成策略可提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在LoCoMo基准（10个真实多会话对话，300+轮次）上评估，使用四个模型（GPT-4o-mini、DeepSeek-v3.2、Claude Haiku、GLM-5），由四个独立LLM裁判评判，p=0.017（配对bootstrap）。消融实验包括5x4边界策略和驱逐策略组合。
limitations: 书签区分性仍是主要瓶颈，模型选对页面的准确率仅57%。
实验仅在LoCoMo基准上进行，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出合作内存分页机制，用关键词书签替代被驱逐的对话片段，使LLM能按需召回长对话历史，在LoCoMo基准上超越六种基线方法。

papers.title: Nemotron 3 Super: Open, Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Hybrid Mamba-Transformer Model for Agentic Reasoning
papers.abstract: We describe the pre-training, post-training, and quantization of Nemotron 3 Super, a 120 billion (active 12 billion) parameter hybrid Mamba-Attention Mixture-of-Experts model. Nemotron 3 Super is the first model in the Nemotron 3 family to 1) be pre-trained in NVFP4, 2) leverage LatentMoE, a new Mixture-of-Experts architecture that optimizes for both accuracy per FLOP and accuracy per parameter, and 3) include MTP layers for inference acceleration through native speculative decoding. We pre-trained Nemotron 3 Super on 25 trillion tokens followed by post-training using supervised fine tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL). The final model supports up to 1M context length and achieves comparable accuracy on common benchmarks, while also achieving up to 2.2x and 7.5x higher inference throughput compared to GPT-OSS-120B and Qwen3.5-122B, respectively. Nemotron 3 Super datasets, along with the base, post-trained, and quantized checkpoints, are open-sourced on HuggingFace.

analysis.tldr: Nemotron 3 Super 是一个 120B 参数（12B 激活）的混合 Mamba-Attention MoE 模型，通过 NVFP4 预训练、LatentMoE 架构和 MTP 层实现高效推理，支持 1M 上下文，吞吐量显著优于同类模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有大型语言模型在推理效率和长上下文处理方面存在瓶颈，尤其是 MoE 模型在准确率与计算/参数效率之间的权衡尚未充分优化。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个既保持高准确率又具备高推理吞吐量、支持长上下文的开放 MoE 模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Nemotron 3 Super，采用混合 Mamba-Attention 架构、LatentMoE（优化每 FLOP 和每参数准确率）、NVFP4 预训练、MTP 层（原生推测解码加速推理），经 25T token 预训练及 SFT+RL 后训练。
contributions: 首个在 Nemotron 3 系列中使用 NVFP4 预训练、LatentMoE 架构和 MTP 层的模型。
在 1M 上下文长度下，推理吞吐量相比 GPT-OSS-120B 提升 2.2 倍，相比 Qwen3.5-122B 提升 7.5 倍，同时保持可比准确率。
开源基础、后训练和量化检查点及数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在常见基准上评估准确率，并与 GPT-OSS-120B 和 Qwen3.5-122B 比较推理吞吐量，结果显示准确率相当且吞吐量显著提升。
limitations: 摘要未提及在特定任务（如数学推理）上的详细性能对比。
仅报告了吞吐量优势，未讨论内存占用或部署成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Nemotron 3 Super 是一个 120B 参数（12B 激活）的混合 Mamba-Attention MoE 模型，通过 NVFP4 预训练、LatentMoE 架构和 MTP 层实现高效推理，支持 1M 上下文，吞吐量显著优于同类模型。

papers.title: Reading Between the Pixels: Linking Text-Image Embedding Alignment to Typographic Attack Success on Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: We study typographic prompt injection attacks on vision-language models (VLMs), where adversarial text is rendered as images to bypass safety mechanisms, posing a growing threat as VLMs serve as the perceptual backbone of autonomous agents, from browser automation and computer-use systems to camera-equipped embodied agents. In practice, the attack surface is heterogeneous: adversarial text appears at varying font sizes and under diverse visual conditions, while the growing ecosystem of VLMs exhibits substantial variation in vulnerability, complicating defensive approaches. Evaluating 1,000 prompts from SALAD-Bench across four VLMs, namely, GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet 4.5, Mistral-Large-3, and Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct under varying font sizes (6--28px) and visual transformations (rotation, blur, noise, contrast changes), we find: (1) font size significantly affects attack success rate (ASR), with very small fonts (6px) yielding near-zero ASR while mid-range fonts achieve peak effectiveness; (2) text attacks are more effective than image attacks for GPT-4o (36% vs 8%) and Claude (47% vs 22%), while Qwen3-VL and Mistral show comparable ASR across modalities; (3) text-image embedding distance from two multimodal embedding models (JinaCLIP and Qwen3-VL-Embedding) shows strong negative correlation with ASR across all four models (r = -0.71 to -0.93, p < 0.01); (4) heavy degradations increase embedding distance by 10--12% and reduce ASR by 34--96%, while rotation asymmetrically affects models (Mistral drops 50%, GPT-4o unchanged). These findings highlight that model-specific robustness patterns preclude one-size-fits-all defenses and offer empirical guidance for practitioners selecting VLM backbones for agentic systems operating in adversarial environments.

analysis.tldr: 研究发现文本-图像嵌入对齐距离与VLM对排版攻击的脆弱性呈强负相关，字体大小和视觉变换显著影响攻击成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）作为自主代理的感知骨干，面临排版提示注入攻击的威胁，但攻击表面异质性强，模型脆弱性差异大，缺乏系统性理解。
analysis.problem: 量化字体大小和视觉变换对VLM排版攻击成功率的影响，并探究文本-图像嵌入对齐与攻击成功率的关联。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 小字体（6px）攻击成功率接近零，中字体效果最佳；文本攻击比图像攻击更有效（GPT-4o和Claude）；嵌入距离与攻击成功率强负相关（r=-0.71至-0.93）；重度退化增加嵌入距离并降低攻击成功率，旋转影响因模型而异。
analysis.method: 在SALAD-Bench的1000个提示上，对GPT-4o、Claude Sonnet 4.5、Mistral-Large-3和Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct四种VLM，改变字体大小（6-28px）和视觉变换（旋转、模糊、噪声、对比度），测量攻击成功率，并使用JinaCLIP和Qwen3-VL-Embedding计算文本-图像嵌入距离。
contributions: 系统评估了字体大小和视觉变换对四种VLM排版攻击成功率的影响。
发现文本-图像嵌入距离与攻击成功率呈强负相关，可作为预测脆弱性的指标。
揭示了模型特定的鲁棒性模式，表明不存在通用防御策略。
analysis.experiments: 在SALAD-Bench的1000个提示上，对四种VLM进行不同字体大小和视觉变换的攻击测试，并计算嵌入距离相关性。
limitations: 仅评估了四种VLM，可能不覆盖所有模型。
未探索更复杂的攻击或防御机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究发现文本-图像嵌入对齐距离与VLM对排版攻击的脆弱性呈强负相关，字体大小和视觉变换显著影响攻击成功率。

papers.title: Why and When Visual Token Pruning Fails? A Study on Relevant Visual Information Shift in MLLMs Decoding
papers.abstract: Recently, visual token pruning has been studied to handle the vast number of visual tokens in Multimodal Large Language Models. However, we observe that while existing pruning methods perform reliably on simple visual understanding, they struggle to effectively generalize to complex visual reasoning tasks, a critical gap underexplored in previous studies. Through a systematic analysis, we identify Relevant Visual Information Shift (RVIS) during decoding as the primary failure driver. To address this, we propose Decoding-stage Shift-aware Token Pruning (DSTP), a training-free add-on framework that enables existing pruning methods to align visual tokens with shifting reasoning requirements during the decoding stage. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DSTP significantly mitigates performance degradation of pruning methods in complex reasoning tasks, while consistently yielding performance gains even across visual understanding benchmarks. Furthermore, DSTP demonstrates effectiveness across diverse state-of-the-art architectures, highlighting its generalizability and efficiency with minimal computational overhead.

analysis.tldr: 发现多模态大模型解码时视觉标记剪枝失败源于相关视觉信息偏移，提出无需训练的DSTP框架来对齐解码阶段的推理需求。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型处理大量视觉标记时计算开销大，现有剪枝方法在简单视觉理解上可靠，但在复杂视觉推理任务中泛化能力差，这一关键差距未被充分研究。
analysis.problem: 现有视觉标记剪枝方法在复杂视觉推理任务中性能下降的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过系统分析，识别出解码阶段的相关视觉信息偏移（RVIS）是导致剪枝失败的主要原因。
analysis.method: 提出解码阶段偏移感知标记剪枝（DSTP），一个无需训练的即插即用框架，使现有剪枝方法在解码阶段能够根据推理需求的变化对齐视觉标记。
contributions: 首次系统分析并指出相关视觉信息偏移（RVIS）是视觉标记剪枝在复杂推理任务中失败的主要原因。
提出DSTP框架，无需训练即可显著缓解剪枝方法在复杂推理任务中的性能下降，并在视觉理解基准上持续带来性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在多种最先进架构上进行广泛实验，DSTP显著缓解了剪枝方法在复杂推理任务中的性能下降，并在视觉理解基准上持续带来性能提升，且计算开销极小。
limitations: 摘要未提及DSTP在极端剪枝率下的表现。
可能依赖现有剪枝方法的初始选择。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现多模态大模型解码时视觉标记剪枝失败源于相关视觉信息偏移，提出无需训练的DSTP框架来对齐解码阶段的推理需求。

papers.title: ReflectCAP: Detailed Image Captioning with Reflective Memory
papers.abstract: Detailed image captioning demands both factual grounding and fine-grained coverage, yet existing methods have struggled to achieve them simultaneously. We address this tension with Reflective Note-Guided Captioning (ReflectCAP), where a multi-agent pipeline analyzes what the target large vision-language model (LVLM) consistently hallucinates and what it systematically overlooks, distilling these patterns into reusable guidelines called Structured Reflection Notes. At inference time, these notes steer the captioning model along both axes -- what to avoid and what to attend to -- yielding detailed captions that jointly improve factuality and coverage. Applying this method to 8 LVLMs spanning the GPT-4.1 family, Qwen series, and InternVL variants, ReflectCAP reaches the Pareto frontier of the trade-off between factuality and coverage, and delivers substantial gains on CapArena-Auto, where generated captions are judged head-to-head against strong reference models. Moreover, ReflectCAP offers a more favorable trade-off between caption quality and compute cost than model scaling or existing multi-agent pipelines, which incur 21--36\% greater overhead. This makes high-quality detailed captioning viable under real-world cost and latency constraints.

analysis.tldr: ReflectCAP通过多智能体分析LVLM的幻觉和遗漏模式，生成结构化反思笔记来引导详细图像描述，在事实性和覆盖度上达到帕累托最优。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有详细图像描述方法难以同时保证事实性和细粒度覆盖，存在幻觉和遗漏问题，且模型扩展或多智能体管线计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著增加计算开销的前提下，同时提升详细图像描述的事实性和覆盖度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出目标LVLM存在一致的幻觉和系统性忽略模式，这些模式可被提取为结构化反思笔记。
analysis.method: 多智能体管线分析目标LVLM的幻觉和遗漏模式，提炼为结构化反思笔记，在推理时引导描述模型避免幻觉并关注被忽略的细节。
contributions: 提出ReflectCAP方法，通过反思笔记同时提升事实性和覆盖度。
在8个LVLM上验证，达到事实性与覆盖度的帕累托前沿。
相比模型扩展和现有管线，计算开销降低21-36%。
analysis.experiments: 在CapArena-Auto上评估，生成描述与强参考模型进行头对头比较，并分析了计算成本。
limitations: 依赖多智能体分析阶段，可能引入额外预处理成本。
反思笔记的通用性可能受限于特定LVLM家族。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ReflectCAP通过多智能体分析LVLM的幻觉和遗漏模式，生成结构化反思笔记来引导详细图像描述，在事实性和覆盖度上达到帕累托最优。

papers.title: OmniFood8K: Single-Image Nutrition Estimation via Hierarchical Frequency-Aligned Fusion
papers.abstract: Accurate estimation of food nutrition plays a vital role in promoting healthy dietary habits and personalized diet management. Most existing food datasets primarily focus on Western cuisines and lack sufficient coverage of Chinese dishes, which restricts accurate nutritional estimation for Chinese meals. Moreover, many state-of-the-art nutrition prediction methods rely on depth sensors, restricting their applicability in daily scenarios. To address these limitations, we introduce OmniFood8K, a comprehensive multimodal dataset comprising 8,036 food samples, each with detailed nutritional annotations and multi-view images. In addition, to enhance models' capability in nutritional prediction, we construct NutritionSynth-115K, a large-scale synthetic dataset that introduces compositional variations while preserving precise nutritional labels. Moreover, we propose an end-to-end framework for nutritional prediction from a single RGB image. First, we predict a depth map from a single RGB image and design the Scale-Shift Residual Adapter (SSRA) to refine it for global scale consistency and local structural preservation. Second, we propose the Frequency-Aligned Fusion Module (FAFM) to hierarchically align and fuse RGB and depth features in the frequency domain. Finally, we design a Mask-based Prediction Head (MPH) to emphasize key ingredient regions via dynamic channel selection for more accurate prediction. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method over existing approaches. Project homepage: https://yudongjian.github.io/OmniFood8K-food/

analysis.tldr: 提出OmniFood8K数据集和频率对齐融合方法，实现单张RGB图像的营养成分预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有食品数据集缺乏中餐覆盖，且多数营养预测方法依赖深度传感器，限制了日常场景应用。
analysis.problem: 从单张RGB图像准确估计食物营养成分。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建OmniFood8K数据集和NutritionSynth-115K合成数据集；提出端到端框架：先预测深度图并用SSRA适配器修正，再通过FAFM模块在频域对齐融合RGB和深度特征，最后用MPH头动态选择通道强调关键成分区域。
contributions: 构建了包含8036个中餐样本的多模态数据集OmniFood8K和大型合成数据集NutritionSynth-115K。
提出了单张RGB图像营养预测的端到端框架，包含SSRA、FAFM和MPH三个创新模块。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验，方法优于现有方法。
limitations: 数据集规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有中餐种类。
合成数据与真实数据之间存在域差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OmniFood8K数据集和频率对齐融合方法，实现单张RGB图像的营养成分预测。

papers.title: Combating Pattern and Content Bias: Adversarial Feature Learning for Generalized AI-Generated Image Detection
papers.abstract: In recent years, the rapid development of generative artificial intelligence technology has significantly lowered the barrier to creating high-quality fake images, posing a serious challenge to information authenticity and credibility. Existing generated image detection methods typically enhance generalization through model architecture or network design. However, their generalization performance remains susceptible to data bias, as the training data may drive models to fit specific generative patterns and content rather than the common features shared by images from different generative models (asymmetric bias learning). To address this issue, we propose a Multi-dimensional Adversarial Feature Learning (MAFL) framework. The framework adopts a pretrained multimodal image encoder as the feature extraction backbone, constructs a real-fake feature learning network, and designs an adversarial bias-learning branch equipped with a multi-dimensional adversarial loss, forming an adversarial training mechanism between authenticity-discriminative feature learning and bias feature learning. By suppressing generation-pattern and content biases, MAFL guides the model to focus on the generative features shared across different generative models, thereby effectively capturing the fundamental differences between real and generated images, enhancing cross-model generalization, and substantially reducing the reliance on large-scale training data. Through extensive experimental validation, our method outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches by 10.89% in accuracy and 8.57% in Average Precision (AP). Notably, even when trained with only 320 images, it can still achieve over 80% detection accuracy on public datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出多维度对抗特征学习框架，通过抑制模式和内容偏差提升AI生成图像检测的跨模型泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成图像检测方法因训练数据偏差导致模型拟合特定生成模式和内容，而非不同生成模型的共有特征，限制了泛化性能。
analysis.problem: 如何抑制训练数据中的模式和内容偏差，使模型学习生成模型间的共享特征，提升跨模型泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 训练数据中的不对称偏差学习导致模型倾向于拟合特定生成模式和内容，而非不同生成模型的共有特征。
analysis.method: 提出多维度对抗特征学习（MAFL）框架，采用预训练多模态图像编码器作为骨干，构建真假特征学习网络，并设计对抗偏差学习分支，通过多维度对抗损失形成对抗训练机制，抑制生成模式和内容偏差。
contributions: 提出MAFL框架，通过对抗特征学习抑制模式和内容偏差，提升跨模型泛化能力。
实验表明方法在准确率和平均精度上分别超越SOTA 10.89%和8.57%，且仅用320张训练图像即可达到80%以上检测准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在多个公共数据集上验证，与现有SOTA方法对比，准确率提升10.89%，AP提升8.57%；小样本实验显示仅用320张图像训练仍能达到80%以上准确率。
limitations: 可能对未见过的生成模型类型泛化能力有限。
对抗训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
