analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多维度对抗特征学习框架，通过抑制模式和内容偏差提升AI生成图像检测的跨模型泛化能力。

papers.title: MultiDocFusion: Hierarchical and Multimodal Chunking Pipeline for Enhanced RAG on Long Industrial Documents
papers.abstract: RAG-based QA has emerged as a powerful method for processing long industrial documents. However, conventional text chunking approaches often neglect complex and long industrial document structures, causing information loss and reduced answer quality. To address this, we introduce MultiDocFusion, a multimodal chunking pipeline that integrates: (i) detection of document regions using vision-based document parsing, (ii) text extraction from these regions via OCR, (iii) reconstruction of document structure into a hierarchical tree using large language model (LLM)-based document section hierarchical parsing (DSHP-LLM), and (iv) construction of hierarchical chunks through DFS-based grouping. Extensive experiments across industrial benchmarks demonstrate that MultiDocFusion improves retrieval precision by 8-15% and ANLS QA scores by 2-3% compared to baselines, emphasizing the critical role of explicitly leveraging document hierarchy for multimodal document-based QA. These significant performance gains underscore the necessity of structure-aware chunking in enhancing the fidelity of RAG-based QA systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种层次化多模态文档分块管道MultiDocFusion，通过视觉解析、OCR、LLM层次解析和DFS分组提升长工业文档RAG问答的检索精度和答案质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统文本分块方法忽略复杂的长工业文档结构，导致信息丢失和答案质量下降，亟需结构感知的分块方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用文档的层次结构和多模态信息（视觉、文本）进行高效分块，以提升RAG系统在长工业文档上的检索和问答性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出传统分块方法因忽略文档结构导致信息丢失和答案质量下降。
analysis.method: MultiDocFusion管道包含四步：基于视觉的文档区域检测、OCR文本提取、LLM文档章节层次解析（DSHP-LLM）构建层次树、DFS分组构建层次化分块。
contributions: 提出一种结合视觉解析、OCR和LLM的层次化多模态分块管道。
在工业基准上验证了显式利用文档层次结构对多模态文档QA的重要性，检索精度提升8-15%，ANLS QA分数提升2-3%。
analysis.experiments: 在工业基准上进行了广泛实验，与基线相比，检索精度提升8-15%，ANLS QA分数提升2-3%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的OCR和LLM解析，对文档图像质量敏感。
层次树构建的复杂度可能较高，影响处理速度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种层次化多模态文档分块管道MultiDocFusion，通过视觉解析、OCR、LLM层次解析和DFS分组提升长工业文档RAG问答的检索精度和答案质量。

papers.title: Fundus Image-based Glaucoma Screening via Retinal Knowledge-Oriented Dynamic Multi-Level Feature Integration
papers.abstract: Automated diagnosis based on color fundus photography is essential for large-scale glaucoma screening. However, existing deep learning models are typically data-driven and lack explicit integration of retinal anatomical knowledge, which limits their robustness across heterogeneous clinical datasets. Moreover, pathological cues in fundus images may appear beyond predefined anatomical regions, making fixed-region feature extraction insufficient for reliable diagnosis. To address these challenges, we propose a retinal knowledge-oriented glaucoma screening framework that integrates dynamic multi-scale feature learning with domain-specific retinal priors. The framework adopts a tri-branch structure to capture complementary retinal representations, including global retinal context, structural features of the optic disc/cup, and dynamically localized pathological regions. A Dynamic Window Mechanism is devised to adaptively identify diagnostically informative regions, while a Knowledge-Enhanced Convolutional Attention Module incorporates retinal priors extracted from a pre-trained foundation model to guide attention learning. Extensive experiments on the large-scale AIROGS dataset demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms diverse baselines, achieving an AUC of 98.5% and an accuracy of 94.6%. Additional evaluations on multiple datasets from the SMDG-19 benchmark further confirm its strong cross-domain generalization capability, indicating that knowledge-guided attention combined with adaptive lesion localization can significantly improve the robustness of automated glaucoma screening systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出视网膜知识导向的动态多级特征融合框架，用于眼底图像青光眼筛查，在AIROGS数据集上AUC达98.5%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习模型缺乏视网膜解剖知识整合，且固定区域特征提取无法捕捉超出预定区域的病理线索，导致跨数据集鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何将视网膜领域知识显式融入深度学习模型，并动态定位诊断相关区域，以提高青光眼筛查的准确性和泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 三分支结构捕获互补视网膜表征（全局上下文、视盘/杯结构、动态病理区域），动态窗口机制自适应定位信息区域，知识增强卷积注意力模块利用预训练基础模型提取的视网膜先验引导注意力学习。
contributions: 提出视网膜知识导向的青光眼筛查框架，融合动态多尺度特征学习与领域先验。
设计动态窗口机制和知识增强卷积注意力模块，提升病理区域定位和特征提取能力。
在AIROGS和SMDG-19基准上验证了方法的优越性和跨域泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在AIROGS数据集上AUC 98.5%、准确率94.6%，并在SMDG-19多个数据集上验证了跨域泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练基础模型的质量和可用性。
动态窗口机制的计算开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出视网膜知识导向的动态多级特征融合框架，用于眼底图像青光眼筛查，在AIROGS数据集上AUC达98.5%。

papers.title: Scaffold-Conditioned Preference Triplets for Controllable Molecular Optimization with Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Molecular property optimization is central to drug discovery, yet many deep learning methods rely on black-box scoring and offer limited control over scaffold preservation, often producing unstable or biologically implausible edits. While large language models (LLMs) are promising molecular generators, optimization remains constrained by the lack of chemistry-grounded preference supervision and principled data curation. We introduce \textbf{Scaffold-Conditioned Preference Triplets (SCPT)}, a pipeline that constructs similarity-constrained triplets $\langle\text{scaffold}, \text{better}, \text{worse}\rangle$ via scaffold alignment and chemistry-driven filters for validity, synthesizability, and meaningful property gains. Using these preferences, we align a pretrained molecular LLM as a conditional editor, enabling property-improving edits that retain the scaffold. Across single- and multi-objective benchmarks, SCPT improves optimization success and property gains while maintaining higher scaffold similarity than competitive baselines. Compared with representative non-LLM molecular optimization methods, SCPT-trained LLMs are better suited to scaffold-constrained and multi-objective optimization. In addition, models trained on single-property and two-property supervision generalize effectively to three-property tasks, indicating promising extrapolative generalization under limited higher-order supervision. SCPT also provides controllable data-construction knobs that yield a predictable similarity-gain frontier, enabling systematic adaptation to diverse optimization regimes.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于支架条件的偏好三元组（SCPT）方法，利用化学约束偏好数据对齐分子LLM，实现可控分子优化并保持支架结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有分子优化方法依赖黑盒评分，难以控制支架保留，且缺乏化学先验的偏好监督，导致编辑不稳定或生物不可行。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持分子支架结构的前提下，利用LLM进行有效的分子属性优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建支架对齐和化学驱动的相似性约束三元组（scaffold, better, worse），通过偏好对齐训练预训练分子LLM作为条件编辑器。
contributions: 提出SCPT数据构建流程，生成化学有意义的偏好三元组。
将分子LLM对齐为条件编辑器，实现支架保留的属性优化。
在单目标和多目标基准上取得更好优化成功率和属性增益，且泛化到高阶任务。
analysis.experiments: 在单目标和多目标分子优化基准上评估，与代表性非LLM方法对比，SCPT训练的LLM在支架相似性和优化成功率上更优，且单/双属性监督可泛化到三属性任务。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练LLM的质量和覆盖范围。
三元组构建的化学过滤器可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于支架条件的偏好三元组（SCPT）方法，利用化学约束偏好数据对齐分子LLM，实现可控分子优化并保持支架结构。

papers.title: Unlocking the Potential of Grounding DINO in Videos: Parameter-Efficient Adaptation for Limited-Data Spatial-Temporal Localization
papers.abstract: Spatio-temporal video grounding (STVG) aims to localize queried objects within dynamic video segments. Prevailing fully-trained approaches are notoriously data-hungry. However, gathering large-scale STVG data is exceptionally challenging: dense frame-level bounding boxes and complex temporal language alignments are prohibitively expensive to annotate, especially for specialized video domains. Consequently, conventional models suffer from severe overfitting on these inherently limited datasets, while zero-shot foundational models lack the task-specific temporal awareness needed for precise localization. To resolve this small-data challenge, we introduce ST-GD, a data-efficient framework that adapts pre-trained 2D visual-language models (e.g., Grounding DINO) to video tasks. To avoid destroying pre-trained priors on small datasets, ST-GD keeps the base model frozen and strategically injects lightweight adapters (~10M trainable parameters) to instill spatio-temporal awareness, alongside a novel temporal decoder for boundary prediction. This design naturally counters data scarcity. Consequently, ST-GD excels in data-scarce scenarios, achieving highly competitive performance on the limited-scale HC-STVG v1/v2 benchmarks, while maintaining robust generalization on the VidSTG dataset. This validates ST-GD as a powerful paradigm for complex video understanding under strict small-data constraints.

analysis.tldr: 提出ST-GD框架，通过冻结预训练2D视觉-语言模型并注入轻量适配器，实现小样本时空视频定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 时空视频定位（STVG）需要大量标注数据，但密集的帧级边界框和复杂的时间语言对齐标注成本极高，尤其在专业视频领域，导致现有模型在小数据集上严重过拟合，而零样本基础模型缺乏任务特定的时间感知能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限标注数据下实现有效的时空视频定位，避免过拟合并保持预训练先验知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，全训练方法数据需求大，在小数据集上过拟合；零样本基础模型缺乏时间感知能力。
analysis.method: ST-GD框架：冻结预训练的2D视觉-语言模型（如Grounding DINO），注入轻量适配器（约10M可训练参数）以赋予时空感知能力，并设计新颖的时间解码器用于边界预测。
contributions: 提出ST-GD，一种数据高效的STVG框架，通过冻结预训练模型和轻量适配器解决小数据挑战。
在HC-STVG v1/v2和VidSTG基准上验证了方法的有效性，尤其在数据稀缺场景下表现优异。
analysis.experiments: 在HC-STVG v1/v2（有限规模）和VidSTG数据集上评估，ST-GD在数据稀缺场景下取得高竞争力性能，并在VidSTG上保持鲁棒泛化。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定预训练模型（Grounding DINO），泛化到其他2D视觉-语言模型需验证。
适配器设计可能针对特定任务，迁移到其他视频理解任务需调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ST-GD框架，通过冻结预训练2D视觉-语言模型并注入轻量适配器，实现小样本时空视频定位。

papers.title: FRTSearch: Unified Detection and Parameter Inference of Fast Radio Transients using Instance Segmentation
papers.abstract: The exponential growth of data from modern radio telescopes presents a significant challenge to traditional single-pulse search algorithms, which are computationally intensive and prone to high false-positive rates due to Radio Frequency Interference (RFI). In this work, we introduce FRTSearch, an end-to-end framework unifying the detection and physical characterization of Fast Radio Transients (FRTs). Leveraging the morphological universality of dispersive trajectories in time-frequency dynamic spectra, we reframe FRT detection as a pattern recognition problem governed by the cold plasma dispersion relation. To facilitate this, we constructed CRAFTS-FRT, a pixel-level annotated dataset derived from the Commensal Radio Astronomy FAST Survey (CRAFTS), comprising 2{,}392 instances across diverse source classes. This dataset enables the training of a Mask R-CNN model for precise trajectory segmentation. Coupled with our physics-driven IMPIC algorithm, the framework maps the geometric coordinates of segmented trajectories to directly infer the Dispersion Measure (DM) and Time of Arrival (ToA). Benchmarking on the FAST-FREX dataset shows that FRTSearch achieves a 98.0\% recall, competitive with exhaustive search methods, while reducing false positives by over 99.9\% compared to PRESTO and delivering a processing speedup of up to $13.9\times$. Furthermore, the framework demonstrates robust cross-facility generalization, detecting all 19 tested FRBs from the ASKAP survey without retraining. By shifting the paradigm from ``search-then-identify'' to ``detect-and-infer,'' FRTSearch provides a scalable, high-precision solution for real-time discovery in the era of petabyte-scale radio astronomy.

analysis.tldr: 将快速射电暴检测转化为实例分割任务，统一检测与参数推断，大幅降低假阳性并加速处理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代射电望远镜数据指数增长，传统单脉冲搜索算法计算量大且易受射频干扰导致高假阳性率，亟需高效、低假阳性的实时检测方法。
analysis.problem: 快速射电暂现源（FRT）的检测与物理参数（色散量、到达时间）推断，需同时解决高假阳性、计算效率低和跨设备泛化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建像素级标注数据集CRAFTS-FRT，训练Mask R-CNN进行色散轨迹实例分割，再通过物理驱动的IMPIC算法从分割轨迹几何坐标推断色散量和到达时间。
contributions: 提出FRTSearch框架，将FRT检测统一为实例分割任务，实现端到端检测与参数推断。
构建CRAFTS-FRT数据集，包含2392个像素级标注实例，覆盖多种源类别。
在FAST-FREX数据集上实现98.0%召回率，假阳性降低99.9%以上，处理速度提升13.9倍，且无需重训练即可泛化到ASKAP数据。
analysis.experiments: 在FAST-FREX数据集上评估，召回率98.0%，假阳性比PRESTO降低99.9%以上，处理加速比达13.9倍；在ASKAP数据上检测全部19个FRB，无需重训练。
limitations: 依赖高质量像素级标注数据集，构建成本高。
可能对低信噪比或复杂RFI环境下的弱信号检测能力有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将快速射电暴检测转化为实例分割任务，统一检测与参数推断，大幅降低假阳性并加速处理。

papers.title: Detecting Precise Hand Touch Moments in Egocentric Video
papers.abstract: We address the challenging task of detecting the precise moment when hands make contact with objects in egocentric videos. This frame-level detection is crucial for augmented reality, human-computer interaction, assistive technologies, and robot learning applications, where contact onset signals action initiation or completion. Temporally precise detection is particularly challenging due to subtle hand motion variations near contact, frequent occlusions, fine-grained manipulation patterns, and the inherent motion dynamics of first-person perspectives. To tackle these challenges, we propose a Hand-informed Context Enhanced module (HiCE; pronounced `high-see') that leverages spatiotemporal features from hand regions and their surrounding context through cross-attention mechanisms, learning to identify potential contact patterns. Our approach is further refined with a grasp-aware loss and soft label that emphasizes hand pose patterns and movement dynamics characteristic of touch events, enabling the model to distinguish between near-contact and actual contact frames. We also introduce TouchMoment, an egocentric dataset containing 4,021 videos and 8,456 annotated contact moments spanning over one million frames. Experiments on TouchMoment show that, under a strict evaluation criterion that counts a prediction as correct only if it falls within a two-frame tolerance of the ground-truth moment, our method achieves substantial gains and outperforms state-of-the-art event-spotting baselines by 16.91% average precision.

analysis.tldr: 提出HiCE模块和TouchMoment数据集，在自我中心视频中精确检测手与物体接触的瞬间，比SOTA提升16.91%平均精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 精确检测手与物体接触的瞬间对增强现实、人机交互、辅助技术和机器人学习至关重要，但现有方法因手部运动细微、遮挡频繁、操作模式精细及第一人称视角动态而难以实现帧级精确检测。
analysis.problem: 在自我中心视频中，精确检测手与物体接触的帧级时刻，区分近接触与真实接触。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出手部信息上下文增强模块（HiCE），通过交叉注意力机制利用手部区域及其周围上下文的时空特征；结合抓取感知损失和软标签，强调手部姿态模式和运动动态。
contributions: 提出HiCE模块，利用交叉注意力融合手部区域与上下文特征以检测接触时刻。
引入抓取感知损失和软标签，提升近接触与真实接触的区分能力。
构建TouchMoment数据集，包含4021个视频和8456个标注接触时刻，覆盖超过一百万帧。
analysis.experiments: 在TouchMoment数据集上，采用严格评估标准（预测落在真实时刻两帧容差内算正确），方法平均精度比SOTA事件定位基线提升16.91%。
limitations: 数据集仅包含自我中心视频，泛化到其他视角可能受限。
两帧容差标准严格，实际应用中可能需调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HiCE模块和TouchMoment数据集，在自我中心视频中精确检测手与物体接触的瞬间，比SOTA提升16.91%平均精度。

papers.title: CoLA: A Choice Leakage Attack Framework to Expose Privacy Risks in Subset Training
papers.abstract: Training models on a carefully chosen portion of data rather than the full dataset is now a standard preprocess for modern ML. From vision coreset selection to large-scale filtering in language models, it enables scalability with minimal utility loss. A common intuition is that training on fewer samples should also reduce privacy risks. In this paper, we challenge this assumption. We show that subset training is not privacy free: the very choices of which data are included or excluded can introduce new privacy surface and leak more sensitive information. Such information can be captured by adversaries either through side-channel metadata from the subset selection process or via the outputs of the target model. To systematically study this phenomenon, we propose CoLA (Choice Leakage Attack), a unified framework for analyzing privacy leakage in subset selection. In CoLA, depending on the adversary's knowledge of the side-channel information, we define two practical attack scenarios: Subset-aware Side-channel Attacks and Black-box Attacks. Under both scenarios, we investigate two privacy surfaces unique to subset training: (1) Training-membership MIA (TM-MIA), which concerns only the privacy of training data membership, and (2) Selection-participation MIA (SP-MIA), which concerns the privacy of all samples that participated in the subset selection process. Notably, SP-MIA enlarges the notion of membership from model training to the entire data-model supply chain. Experiments on vision and language models show that existing threat models underestimate subset-training privacy risks: the expanded privacy surface leaks both training and selection membership, extending risks from individual models to the broader ML ecosystem.

analysis.tldr: 子集训练并非隐私安全，选择过程会引入新的隐私泄露面，CoLA框架系统分析了这种选择泄露攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 子集训练（如核心集选择、数据过滤）在机器学习中广泛应用，但人们普遍认为训练更少样本会降低隐私风险，这一假设缺乏验证。
analysis.problem: 子集训练中数据选择过程可能泄露敏感信息，现有隐私攻击框架未考虑这种新的隐私面。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 子集训练的选择过程（哪些数据被包含或排除）会引入新的隐私泄露面，攻击者可通过侧信道元数据或模型输出捕获信息。
analysis.method: 提出CoLA框架，定义两种攻击场景（子集感知侧信道攻击和黑盒攻击），并研究两种隐私面：训练成员推断（TM-MIA）和选择参与推断（SP-MIA）。
contributions: 首次系统研究子集训练中的隐私泄露问题，挑战了子集训练更安全的直觉。
提出CoLA统一框架，定义两种攻击场景和两种隐私面，扩展了成员推断的概念。
analysis.experiments: 在视觉和语言模型上进行实验，表明现有威胁模型低估了子集训练的隐私风险。
limitations: 摘要未提及攻击的具体成功率或效率。
可能仅适用于特定子集选择算法或模型架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 子集训练并非隐私安全，选择过程会引入新的隐私泄露面，CoLA框架系统分析了这种选择泄露攻击。

papers.title: Bridging the Micro--Macro Gap: Frequency-Aware Semantic Alignment for Image Manipulation Localization
papers.abstract: As generative image editing advances, image manipulation localization (IML) must handle both traditional manipulations with conspicuous forensic artifacts and diffusion-generated edits that appear locally realistic. Existing methods typically rely on either low-level forensic cues or high-level semantics alone, leading to a fundamental micro--macro gap. To bridge this gap, we propose FASA, a unified framework for localizing both traditional and diffusion-generated manipulations. Specifically, we extract manipulation-sensitive frequency cues through an adaptive dual-band DCT module and learn manipulation-aware semantic priors via patch-level contrastive alignment on frozen CLIP representations. We then inject these priors into a hierarchical frequency pathway through a semantic-frequency side adapter for multi-scale feature interaction, and employ a prototype-guided, frequency-gated mask decoder to integrate semantic consistency with boundary-aware localization for tampered region prediction. Extensive experiments on OpenSDI and multiple traditional manipulation benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art localization performance, strong cross-generator and cross-dataset generalization, and robust performance under common image degradations.

analysis.tldr: 提出频率感知语义对齐框架FASA，弥合传统与扩散生成图像篡改定位中的微观-宏观鸿沟。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像篡改定位方法要么依赖低级取证线索，要么依赖高级语义，难以同时处理传统篡改和扩散生成编辑，存在微观-宏观鸿沟。
analysis.problem: 如何统一检测传统篡改（有明显伪影）和扩散生成编辑（局部真实）的篡改区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统篡改留下低级伪影，扩散编辑局部真实但全局不一致，单一线索方法失效。
analysis.method: FASA框架：自适应双频DCT模块提取频率线索，冻结CLIP的patch级对比对齐学习篡改感知语义先验，通过语义-频率侧适配器注入层次化频率路径，原型引导频率门控掩码解码器融合语义一致性与边界感知定位。
contributions: 提出统一框架FASA，同时处理传统和扩散生成篡改定位。
设计频率感知语义对齐机制，利用CLIP先验和频率线索。
在多个基准上达到SOTA，并展示强泛化性和鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在OpenSDI和多个传统篡改基准上评估，达到SOTA定位性能，跨生成器、跨数据集泛化强，对常见图像退化鲁棒。
limitations: 依赖CLIP模型，可能受限于CLIP的领域覆盖。
未提及对高分辨率图像的效率分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出频率感知语义对齐框架FASA，弥合传统与扩散生成图像篡改定位中的微观-宏观鸿沟。

papers.title: GeM-EA: A Generative and Meta-learning Enhanced Evolutionary Algorithm for Streaming Data-Driven Optimization
papers.abstract: Streaming Data-Driven Optimization (SDDO) problems arise in many applications where data arrive continuously and the optimization environment evolves over time. Concept drift produces non-stationary landscapes, making optimization methods challenging due to outdated models. Existing approaches often rely on simple surrogate combinations or directly injecting solutions, which may cause negative transfer under sudden environmental changes. We propose GeM-EA, a Generative and Meta-learning Enhanced Evolutionary Algorithm for SDDO that unifies meta-learned surrogate adaptation with generative replay for effective evolutionary search. Upon detecting concept drift, a bi-level meta-learning strategy rapidly initializes the surrogate using environment-relevant priors, while a linear residual component captures global trends. A multi-island evolutionary strategy further leverages historical knowledge via generative replay to accelerate optimization. Experimental results on benchmark SDDO problems demonstrate that GeM-EA achieves faster adaptation and improved robustness compared with state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出结合元学习与生成回放的进化算法，用于流式数据驱动优化中的概念漂移适应。
analysis.research_motivation: 流式数据驱动优化中，数据连续到达且环境随时间演变，概念漂移导致优化景观非平稳，传统方法因模型过时而失效，现有方法依赖简单替代模型或直接注入解，在环境突变时易产生负迁移。
analysis.problem: 解决流式数据驱动优化中概念漂移导致的模型过时和负迁移问题，实现快速适应和鲁棒优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GeM-EA，包含双层元学习策略快速初始化替代模型（利用环境相关先验）和线性残差组件捕获全局趋势，结合多岛进化策略通过生成回放利用历史知识加速优化。
contributions: 提出统一元学习替代模型适应与生成回放的进化算法GeM-EA。
设计双层元学习策略和线性残差组件以应对概念漂移。
引入多岛进化策略结合生成回放加速搜索。
analysis.experiments: 在基准SDDO问题上，GeM-EA相比最先进方法实现了更快的适应和更强的鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的历史数据生成回放。
元学习策略的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结合元学习与生成回放的进化算法，用于流式数据驱动优化中的概念漂移适应。

papers.title: All in One: A Unified Synthetic Data Pipeline for Multimodal Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Training multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for video understanding requires large-scale annotated data spanning diverse tasks such as object counting, question answering, and segmentation. However, collecting and annotating multimodal video data in real-world is costly, slow, and inherently limited in diversity and coverage. To address this challenge, we propose a unified synthetic data generation pipeline capable of automatically producing unlimited multimodal video data with rich and diverse supervision. Our framework supports multiple task formats within a single pipeline, enabling scalable and consistent data creation across tasks. To further enhance reasoning ability, we introduce a VQA-based fine-tuning strategy that trains models to answer structured questions about visual content rather than relying solely on captions or simple instructions. This formulation encourages deeper visual grounding and reasoning. We evaluate our approach in three challenging tasks: video object counting, video-based visual question answering, and video object segmentation. Experimental results demonstrate that models trained predominantly on synthetic data generalize effectively to real-world datasets, often outperforming traditionally trained counterparts. Our findings highlight the potential of unified synthetic data pipelines as a scalable alternative to expensive real-world annotation for multimodal video understanding.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一合成数据流水线，自动生成多模态视频数据，在计数、问答、分割任务上超越传统真实数据训练模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实多模态视频数据标注成本高、速度慢、多样性有限，制约了视频理解MLLM的训练。
analysis.problem: 如何低成本、可扩展地生成高质量、多样化的多模态视频标注数据以替代真实数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出统一合成数据生成流水线，支持多种任务格式（计数、VQA、分割），并引入VQA微调策略增强推理能力。
contributions: 提出统一的合成数据流水线，可自动生成无限多模态视频数据并覆盖多种任务。
引入VQA微调策略，提升模型对视觉内容的深度推理和接地能力。
在视频计数、VQA、分割三个任务上验证合成数据训练模型可泛化至真实场景并超越传统方法。
analysis.experiments: 在视频目标计数、视频问答、视频目标分割三个任务上评估，合成数据训练模型在真实数据集上表现优于传统训练模型。
limitations: 合成数据与真实数据之间可能存在域差异，未讨论如何缓解。
仅验证了三个任务，更广泛的任务适用性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一合成数据流水线，自动生成多模态视频数据，在计数、问答、分割任务上超越传统真实数据训练模型。

papers.title: HyperLiDAR: Adaptive Post-Deployment LiDAR Segmentation via Hyperdimensional Computing
papers.abstract: LiDAR semantic segmentation plays a pivotal role in 3D scene understanding for edge applications such as autonomous driving. However, significant challenges remain for real-world deployments, particularly for on-device post-deployment adaptation. Real-world environments can shift as the system navigates through different locations, leading to substantial performance degradation without effective and timely model adaptation. Furthermore, edge systems operate under strict computational and energy constraints, making it infeasible to adapt conventional segmentation models (based on large neural networks) directly on-device. To address the above challenges, we introduce HyperLiDAR, the first lightweight, post-deployment LiDAR segmentation framework based on Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC). The design of HyperLiDAR fully leverages the fast learning and high efficiency of HDC, inspired by how the human brain processes information. To further improve the adaptation efficiency, we identify the high data volume per scan as a key bottleneck and introduce a buffer selection strategy that focuses learning on the most informative points. We conduct extensive evaluations on two state-of-the-art LiDAR segmentation benchmarks and two representative devices. Our results show that HyperLiDAR outperforms or achieves comparable adaptation performance to state-of-the-art segmentation methods, while achieving up to a 13.8x speedup in retraining.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个基于超维计算的轻量级LiDAR分割框架，实现高效后部署自适应。
analysis.research_motivation: LiDAR语义分割在边缘设备（如自动驾驶）部署时面临环境变化导致的性能下降和计算资源受限的挑战，传统大模型无法在设备上直接适应。
analysis.problem: 解决LiDAR分割模型在部署后因环境变化导致的性能退化，并满足边缘设备的计算和能耗约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出每帧点云数据量大是自适应效率的瓶颈，通过选择信息量最大的点可提升学习效率。
analysis.method: 基于超维计算（HDC）的轻量级框架，利用HDC的快速学习和高效率特性，并引入缓冲区选择策略聚焦于信息量最大的点进行学习。
contributions: 首个基于HDC的轻量级后部署LiDAR分割框架HyperLiDAR
提出缓冲区选择策略，通过聚焦信息量最大的点提升自适应效率
analysis.experiments: 在两个主流LiDAR分割基准和两种代表性设备上进行评估，HyperLiDAR在自适应性能上达到或超越SOTA，重训练速度提升高达13.8倍。
limitations: 可能仅在特定LiDAR数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试
HDC方法的表示能力可能受限于高维向量维度
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个基于超维计算的轻量级LiDAR分割框架，实现高效后部署自适应。

papers.title: Black-Box Optimization From Small Offline Datasets via Meta Learning with Synthetic Tasks
papers.abstract: We consider the problem of offline black-box optimization, where the goal is to discover optimal designs (e.g., molecules or materials) from past experimental data. A key challenge in this setting is data scarcity: in many scientific applications, only small or poor-quality datasets are available, which severely limits the effectiveness of existing algorithms. Prior work has theoretically and empirically shown that performance of offline optimization algorithms depends on how well the surrogate model captures the optimization bias (i.e., ability to rank input designs correctly), which is challenging to accomplish with limited experimental data. This paper proposes Surrogate Learning with Optimization Bias via Synthetic Task Generation (OptBias), a meta-learning framework that directly tackles data scarcity. OptBias learns a reusable optimization bias by training on synthetic tasks generated from a Gaussian process, and then fine-tunes the surrogate model on the small data for the target task. Across diverse continuous and discrete offline optimization benchmarks, OptBias consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in small data regimes. These results highlight OptBias as a robust and practical solution for offline optimization in realistic small data settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出元学习框架OptBias，通过合成任务学习优化偏差，解决小样本离线黑箱优化问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 离线黑箱优化在科学应用中常面临数据稀缺问题，现有算法因无法从少量数据中准确捕捉优化偏差而性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何从少量离线数据中学习有效的优化偏差，以提升黑箱优化性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出离线优化算法的性能依赖于代理模型对优化偏差（即正确排序输入设计的能力）的捕捉，而小数据集下这一目标难以实现。
analysis.method: 提出OptBias元学习框架：先在高斯过程生成的合成任务上训练，学习可复用的优化偏差，再在小目标数据集上微调代理模型。
contributions: 提出一种基于合成任务生成的元学习方法，直接针对优化偏差进行学习，缓解数据稀缺问题。
在连续和离散的离线优化基准上，小数据场景下一致超越现有基线。
analysis.experiments: 在多种连续和离散离线优化基准上评估，小数据场景下OptBias一致优于最先进基线。
limitations: 依赖高斯过程生成合成任务，可能无法完全覆盖真实任务分布。
元学习阶段的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出元学习框架OptBias，通过合成任务学习优化偏差，解决小样本离线黑箱优化问题。

papers.title: Self-Adversarial One Step Generation via Condition Shifting
papers.abstract: The push for efficient text to image synthesis has moved the field toward one step sampling, yet existing methods still face a three way tradeoff among fidelity, inference speed, and training efficiency. Approaches that rely on external discriminators can sharpen one step performance, but they often introduce training instability, high GPU memory overhead, and slow convergence, which complicates scaling and parameter efficient tuning. In contrast, regression based distillation and consistency objectives are easier to optimize, but they typically lose fine details when constrained to a single step. We present APEX, built on a key theoretical insight: adversarial correction signals can be extracted endogenously from a flow model through condition shifting. Using a transformation creates a shifted condition branch whose velocity field serves as an independent estimator of the model's current generation distribution, yielding a gradient that is provably GAN aligned, replacing the sample dependent discriminator terms that cause gradient vanishing. This discriminator free design is architecture preserving, making APEX a plug and play framework compatible with both full parameter and LoRA based tuning. Empirically, our 0.6B model surpasses FLUX-Schnell 12B (20$\times$ more parameters) in one step quality. With LoRA tuning on Qwen-Image 20B, APEX reaches a GenEval score of 0.89 at NFE=1 in 6 hours, surpassing the original 50-step teacher (0.87) and providing a 15.33$\times$ inference speedup. Code is available https://github.com/LINs-lab/APEX.

analysis.tldr: APEX通过条件移位从流模型中提取对抗校正信号，实现无需判别器的一步文本到图像生成，0.6B模型质量超越FLUX-Schnell 12B。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有一步文本到图像生成方法在保真度、推理速度和训练效率之间存在三难权衡，依赖外部判别器的方法存在训练不稳定、高GPU内存开销和收敛慢的问题，而回归蒸馏和一致性目标在单步约束下容易丢失细节。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入外部判别器的情况下，实现高效、稳定的一步文本到图像生成，同时保持高保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出APEX框架，通过条件移位从流模型中提取内生对抗校正信号，利用变换创建移位条件分支，其速度场作为模型当前生成分布的独立估计器，提供与GAN对齐的梯度，无需判别器。
contributions: 提出条件移位理论，从流模型中内生提取对抗校正信号，消除对样本依赖判别器的需求。
设计无判别器、架构保持的APEX框架，兼容全参数和LoRA调优，实现即插即用。
实验表明0.6B模型在一步生成质量上超越20倍参数量的FLUX-Schnell 12B，LoRA调优Qwen-Image 20B在6小时内达到GenEval 0.89，超越50步教师模型。
analysis.experiments: 在文本到图像生成任务上评估，0.6B模型一步生成质量超越FLUX-Schnell 12B（20倍参数量）；LoRA调优Qwen-Image 20B在NFE=1时GenEval得分为0.89，超越原始50步教师模型（0.87），推理速度提升15.33倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于流的生成模型，对其他类型生成模型的泛化性未知。
条件移位变换的具体设计可能依赖特定模型架构，可迁移性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: APEX通过条件移位从流模型中提取对抗校正信号，实现无需判别器的一步文本到图像生成，0.6B模型质量超越FLUX-Schnell 12B。

papers.title: EgoEsportsQA: An Egocentric Video Benchmark for Perception and Reasoning in Esports
papers.abstract: While video large language models (Video-LLMs) excel in understanding slow-paced, real-world egocentric videos, their capabilities in high-velocity, information-dense virtual environments remain under-explored. Existing benchmarks focus on daily activities, yet lack a rigorous testbed for evaluating fast, rule-bound reasoning in virtual scenarios. To fill this gap, we introduce EgoEsportsQA, a pioneering video question-answering (QA) benchmark for grounding perception and reasoning in expert esports knowledge. We curate 1,745 high-quality QA pairs from professional matches across 3 first-person shooter games via a scalable six-stage pipeline. These questions are structured into a two-dimensional decoupled taxonomy: 11 sub-tasks in the cognitive capability dimension (covering perception and reasoning levels) and 6 sub-tasks in the esports knowledge dimension. Comprehensive evaluations of state-of-the-art Video-LLMs reveal that current models still fail to achieve satisfactory performance, with the best model only 71.58%. The results expose notable gaps across both axes: models exhibit stronger capabilities in basic visual perception than in deep tactical reasoning, and they grasp overall macro-progression better than fine-grained micro-operations. Extensive ablation experiments demonstrate the intrinsic weaknesses of current Video-LLM architectures. Further analysis suggests that our dataset not only reveals the connections between real-world and virtual egocentric domains, but also offers guidance for optimizing downstream esports applications, thereby fostering the future advancement of Video-LLMs in various egocentric environments.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向电竞第一人称视角视频的感知与推理问答基准，揭示当前Video-LLMs在高速虚拟环境中的不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频大语言模型在慢速真实世界第一人称视频中表现优异，但在高速、信息密集的虚拟环境（如电竞）中的能力尚未被充分探索，缺乏严格的测试基准。
analysis.problem: 构建一个用于评估视频大语言模型在电竞第一人称视角视频中感知与推理能力的问答基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前最佳模型仅达到71.58%准确率；模型在基础视觉感知上强于深层战术推理，在宏观进程理解上强于微观操作细节。
analysis.method: 通过可扩展的六阶段流程从3款第一人称射击游戏的职业比赛中收集1,745个高质量问答对，并构建二维解耦分类体系（认知能力维度11个子任务、电竞知识维度6个子任务）。
contributions: 提出了EgoEsportsQA，首个面向电竞第一人称视角视频的感知与推理问答基准。
设计了二维解耦分类体系，系统评估模型在认知能力和电竞知识两个维度上的表现。
全面评估了当前Video-LLMs，揭示了其在高速虚拟环境中的显著不足和内在弱点。
analysis.experiments: 对多个最新Video-LLMs进行了全面评估，最佳模型准确率仅71.58%，并进行了消融实验分析架构弱点。
limitations: 仅覆盖3款第一人称射击游戏，可能无法泛化到其他电竞类型。
问答对数量有限（1,745个），可能不足以全面评估模型能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向电竞第一人称视角视频的感知与推理问答基准，揭示当前Video-LLMs在高速虚拟环境中的不足。

papers.title: RSGMamba: Reliability-Aware Self-Gated State Space Model for Multimodal Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Multimodal semantic segmentation has emerged as a powerful paradigm for enhancing scene understanding by leveraging complementary information from multiple sensing modalities (e.g., RGB, depth, and thermal). However, existing cross-modal fusion methods often implicitly assume that all modalities are equally reliable, which can lead to feature degradation when auxiliary modalities are noisy, misaligned, or incomplete. In this paper, we revisit cross-modal fusion from the perspective of modality reliability and propose a novel framework termed the Reliability-aware Self-Gated State Space Model (RSGMamba). At the core of our method is the Reliability-aware Self-Gated Mamba Block (RSGMB), which explicitly models modality reliability and dynamically regulates cross-modal interactions through a self-gating mechanism. Unlike conventional fusion strategies that indiscriminately exchange information across modalities, RSGMB enables reliability-aware feature selection and enhancing informative feature aggregation. In addition, a lightweight Local Cross-Gated Modulation (LCGM) is incorporated to refine fine-grained spatial details, complementing the global modeling capability of RSGMB. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RSGMamba achieves state-of-the-art performance on both RGB-D and RGB-T semantic segmentation benchmarks, resulting 58.8% / 54.0% mIoU on NYUDepth V2 and SUN-RGBD (+0.4% / +0.7% over prior best), and 61.1% / 88.9% mIoU on MFNet and PST900 (up to +1.6%), with only 48.6M parameters, thereby validating the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出RSGMamba，通过自门控状态空间模型显式建模模态可靠性，实现多模态语义分割的鲁棒融合。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有跨模态融合方法默认所有模态同样可靠，当辅助模态存在噪声、未对齐或不完整时会导致特征退化，亟需一种能感知模态可靠性的融合机制。
analysis.problem: 多模态语义分割中，如何显式建模各模态的可靠性并动态调节跨模态交互，以抑制不可靠信息、增强有效特征聚合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RSGMamba框架，核心是RSGMB模块，通过自门控机制显式建模模态可靠性并动态调节跨模态交互；另引入轻量级LCGM模块细化空间细节。
contributions: 提出可靠性感知的自门控状态空间模型RSGMamba，首次将模态可靠性显式建模引入多模态语义分割。
设计RSGMB模块和LCGM模块，分别实现全局可靠性感知融合和局部细节细化。
在RGB-D和RGB-T四个基准上取得SOTA，参数仅48.6M。
analysis.experiments: 在NYUDepth V2、SUN-RGBD、MFNet、PST900四个基准上评估，mIoU分别达58.8%/54.0%、61.1%/88.9%，超越先前最佳0.4%~1.6%。
limitations: 可能对极端噪声或完全缺失模态的场景鲁棒性有限。
自门控机制可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RSGMamba，通过自门控状态空间模型显式建模模态可靠性，实现多模态语义分割的鲁棒融合。

papers.title: Cell Instance Segmentation via Multi-Task Image-to-Image Schrödinger Bridge
papers.abstract: Existing cell instance segmentation pipelines typically combine deterministic predictions with post-processing, which imposes limited explicit constraints on the global structure of instance masks. In this work, we propose a multi-task image-to-image Schrödinger Bridge framework that formulates instance segmentation as a distribution-based image-to-image generation problem. Boundary-aware supervision is integrated through a reverse distance map, and deterministic inference is employed to produce stable predictions. Experimental results on the PanNuke dataset demonstrate that the proposed method achieves competitive or superior performance without relying on SAM pre-training or additional post-processing. Additional results on the MoNuSeg dataset show robustness under limited training data. These findings indicate that Schrödinger Bridge-based image-to-image generation provides an effective framework for cell instance segmentation.

analysis.tldr: 将细胞实例分割建模为基于分布的图像到图像生成问题，使用多任务薛定谔桥框架，无需SAM预训练或后处理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有细胞实例分割方法通常结合确定性预测与后处理，对实例掩码的全局结构约束有限，导致分割质量受限于后处理步骤。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖SAM预训练和额外后处理的情况下，通过生成式框架提升细胞实例分割的全局结构一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出多任务图像到图像薛定谔桥框架，将实例分割视为分布生成问题，集成边界感知监督（反向距离图），并采用确定性推理生成稳定预测。
contributions: 首次将薛定谔桥引入细胞实例分割，构建分布生成框架。
通过多任务学习整合边界距离图，提升分割质量。
在PanNuke和MoNuSeg数据集上验证了无需SAM预训练和后处理的竞争力。
analysis.experiments: 在PanNuke数据集上达到竞争或更优性能，在MoNuSeg数据集上展示了对有限训练数据的鲁棒性。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对复杂细胞形态或重叠场景的泛化性未充分验证。
计算开销可能高于传统方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将细胞实例分割建模为基于分布的图像到图像生成问题，使用多任务薛定谔桥框架，无需SAM预训练或后处理。

papers.title: GTPBD-MM: A Global Terraced Parcel and Boundary Dataset with Multi-Modality
papers.abstract: Agricultural parcel extraction plays an important role in remote sensing-based agricultural monitoring, supporting parcel surveying, precision management, and ecological assessment. However, existing public benchmarks mainly focus on regular and relatively flat farmland scenes. In contrast, terraced parcels in mountainous regions exhibit stepped terrain, pronounced elevation variation, irregular boundaries, and strong cross-regional heterogeneity, making parcel extraction a more challenging problem that jointly requires visual recognition, semantic discrimination, and terrain-aware geometric understanding. Although recent studies have advanced visual parcel benchmarks and image-text farmland understanding, a unified benchmark for complex terraced parcel extraction under aligned image-text-DEM settings remains absent. To fill this gap, we present GTPBD-MM, the first multimodal benchmark for global terraced parcel extraction. Built upon GTPBD, GTPBD-MM integrates high-resolution optical imagery, structured text descriptions, and DEM data, and supports systematic evaluation under Image-only, Image+Text, and Image+Text+DEM settings. We further propose Elevation and Text guided Terraced parcel network (ETTerra), a multimodal baseline for terraced parcel delineation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that textual semantics and terrain geometry provide complementary cues beyond visual appearance alone, yielding more accurate, coherent, and structurally consistent delineation results in complex terraced scenes.

analysis.tldr: 首个全球梯田地块与边界多模态数据集，融合光学影像、文本和DEM，并提出了多模态基线方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有农业地块数据集主要针对规则平坦农田，而山区梯田具有阶梯地形、高程变化大、边界不规则和跨区域异质性强等特点，使得地块提取需要视觉识别、语义判别和地形感知几何理解，但缺乏统一的多模态基准。
analysis.problem: 构建首个全球梯田地块多模态基准数据集，并设计能融合视觉、文本和DEM信息的多模态地块提取方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 文本语义和地形几何信息能为视觉外观提供互补线索，在复杂梯田场景下产生更准确、连贯和结构一致的分割结果。
analysis.method: 提出GTPBD-MM多模态数据集，包含高分辨率光学影像、结构化文本描述和DEM数据；并设计ETTerra多模态基线网络，融合图像、文本和DEM进行梯田地块分割。
contributions: 构建了首个全球梯田地块多模态基准数据集GTPBD-MM，支持图像、文本和DEM三种模态的评估。
提出了ETTerra多模态基线方法，验证了文本语义和地形几何对梯田地块提取的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在GTPBD-MM数据集上进行了图像、图像+文本、图像+文本+DEM三种设置下的系统评估，结果表明多模态融合能提升分割准确性和结构一致性。
limitations: 数据集规模可能有限，未提及具体样本数量和地域覆盖范围。
ETTerra方法可能依赖高质量文本描述和DEM数据，实际应用中获取成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个全球梯田地块与边界多模态数据集，融合光学影像、文本和DEM，并提出了多模态基线方法。

papers.title: Is Vibe Coding the Future? An Empirical Assessment of LLM Generated Codes for Construction Safety
papers.abstract: The emergence of vibe coding, a paradigm where non-technical users instruct Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate executable codes via natural language, presents both significant opportunities and severe risks for the construction industry. While empowering construction personnel such as the safety managers, foremen, and workers to develop tools and software, the probabilistic nature of LLMs introduces the threat of silent failures, wherein generated code compiles perfectly but executes flawed mathematical safety logic. This study empirically evaluates the reliability, software architecture, and domain-specific safety fidelity of 450 vibe-coded Python scripts generated by three frontier models, Claude 3.5 Haiku, GPT-4o-Mini, and Gemini 2.5 Flash. Utilizing a persona-driven prompt dataset (n=150) and a bifurcated evaluation pipeline comprising isolated dynamic sandboxing and an LLM-as-a-Judge, the research quantifies the severe limits of zero-shot vibe codes for construction safety. The findings reveal a highly significant relationship between user persona and data hallucination, demonstrating that less formal prompts drastically increase the AI's propensity to invent missing safety variables. Furthermore, while the models demonstrated high foundational execution viability (~85%), this syntactic reliability actively masked logic deficits and a severe lack of defensive programming. Among successfully executed scripts, the study identified an alarming ~45% overall Silent Failure Rate, with GPT-4o-Mini generating mathematically inaccurate outputs in ~56% of its functional code. The results demonstrate that current LLMs lack the deterministic rigor required for standalone safety engineering, necessitating the adoption of deterministic AI wrappers and strict governance for cyber-physical deployments.

analysis.tldr: LLM生成的建筑安全代码虽语法可靠但逻辑缺陷严重，静默失败率高达45%，不适用于独立安全工程。
analysis.research_motivation: 建筑行业非技术人员使用LLM生成代码（vibe coding）虽便捷，但LLM的概率性可能导致代码编译成功却执行错误的安全逻辑，带来严重风险。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM生成的建筑安全代码在可靠性、软件架构和领域安全保真度方面的表现，特别是静默失败问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户提示的正式程度与数据幻觉显著相关；代码执行可行性高（~85%）但掩盖了逻辑缺陷和缺乏防御性编程；静默失败率约45%，GPT-4o-Mini的数学不准确率高达56%。
analysis.method: 使用450个由Claude 3.5 Haiku、GPT-4o-Mini和Gemini 2.5 Flash生成的Python脚本，基于角色驱动提示数据集（n=150），通过隔离动态沙箱和LLM-as-a-Judge进行双分支评估。
contributions: 首次实证评估vibe coding在建筑安全领域的可靠性，揭示高静默失败率。
发现用户提示正式程度与数据幻觉之间的显著关系。
提出需要确定性AI包装和严格治理的建议。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅评估了三个模型，可能不具广泛代表性。
仅针对建筑安全领域，结论泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM生成的建筑安全代码虽语法可靠但逻辑缺陷严重，静默失败率高达45%，不适用于独立安全工程。

papers.title: Towards Realistic and Consistent Orbital Video Generation via 3D Foundation Priors
papers.abstract: We present a novel method for generating geometrically realistic and consistent orbital videos from a single image of an object. Existing video generation works mostly rely on pixel-wise attention to enforce view consistency across frames. However, such mechanism does not impose sufficient constraints for long-range extrapolation, e.g. rear-view synthesis, in which pixel correspondences to the input image are limited. Consequently, these works often fail to produce results with a plausible and coherent structure. To tackle this issue, we propose to leverage rich shape priors from a 3D foundational generative model as an auxiliary constraint, motivated by its capability of modeling realistic object shape distributions learned from large 3D asset corpora. Specifically, we prompt the video generation with two scales of latent features encoded by the 3D foundation model: (i) a denoised global latent vector as an overall structural guidance, and (ii) a set of latent images projected from volumetric features to provide view-dependent and fine-grained geometry details. In contrast to commonly used 2.5D representations such as depth or normal maps, these compact features can model complete object shapes, and help to improve inference efficiency by avoiding explicit mesh extraction. To achieve effective shape conditioning, we introduce a multi-scale 3D adapter to inject feature tokens to the base video model via cross-attention, which retains its capabilities from general video pretraining and enables a simple and model-agonistic fine-tuning process. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks show that our method achieves superior visual quality, shape realism and multi-view consistency compared to state-of-the-art methods, and robustly generalizes to complex camera trajectories and in-the-wild images.

analysis.tldr: 利用3D基础模型先验生成几何一致且真实的物体轨道视频。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成方法依赖像素级注意力约束，难以处理长程外推（如后视图合成）中像素对应有限的问题，导致生成结果结构不合理。
analysis.problem: 从单张物体图像生成几何真实且多视图一致的轨道视频。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出像素级注意力机制在长程外推时约束不足，无法保证结构连贯性。
analysis.method: 利用3D基础生成模型的形状先验，通过多尺度3D适配器注入两种潜在特征（全局潜在向量和体积投影潜在图像）到基础视频模型中，实现结构引导和细粒度几何细节。
contributions: 提出利用3D基础模型先验增强视频生成几何一致性的方法。
设计多尺度3D适配器，实现高效形状条件注入，保持基础模型预训练能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上实验，相比SOTA方法在视觉质量、形状真实性和多视图一致性上更优，且能泛化到复杂相机轨迹和野外图像。
limitations: 依赖3D基础模型的质量和泛化能力。
可能对非刚性物体或极端视角效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用3D基础模型先验生成几何一致且真实的物体轨道视频。

papers.title: Boosting Robust AIGI Detection with LoRA-based Pairwise Training
papers.abstract: The proliferation of highly realistic AI-Generated Image (AIGI) has necessitated the development of practical detection methods. While current AIGI detectors perform admirably on clean datasets, their detection performance frequently decreases when deployed "in the wild", where images are subjected to unpredictable, complex distortions. To resolve the critical vulnerability, we propose a novel LoRA-based Pairwise Training (LPT) strategy designed specifically to achieve robust detection for AIGI under severe distortions. The core of our strategy involves the targeted finetuning of a visual foundation model, the deliberate simulation of data distribution during the training phase, and a unique pairwise training process. Specifically, we introduce distortion and size simulations to better fit the distribution from the validation and test sets. Based on the strong visual representation capability of the visual foundation model, we finetune the model to achieve AIGI detection. The pairwise training is utilized to improve the detection via decoupling the generalization and robustness optimization. Experiments show that our approach secured the 3th placement in the NTIRE Robust AI-Generated Image Detection in the Wild challenge

analysis.tldr: 提出基于LoRA的成对训练策略，提升AI生成图像在复杂失真下的鲁棒检测能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AIGI检测器在干净数据集上表现良好，但在实际部署中面对不可预测的复杂失真时性能显著下降，亟需提升鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何使AIGI检测器在严重失真条件下仍保持高检测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LoRA-based Pairwise Training (LPT)策略，包括：1) 对视觉基础模型进行LoRA微调；2) 在训练阶段模拟失真和尺寸分布；3) 采用成对训练解耦泛化与鲁棒性优化。
contributions: 提出LPT策略，通过LoRA微调视觉基础模型实现鲁棒AIGI检测。
引入失真和尺寸模拟以匹配验证/测试集分布。
利用成对训练分离泛化与鲁棒性优化，提升检测性能。
analysis.experiments: 在NTIRE Robust AI-Generated Image Detection in the Wild挑战中获得第三名。
limitations: 可能依赖特定视觉基础模型，泛化性需进一步验证。
成对训练的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于LoRA的成对训练策略，提升AI生成图像在复杂失真下的鲁棒检测能力。

papers.title: GCA Framework: A GCC Countries-Grounded Dataset and Agentic Pipeline for Climate Decision Support
papers.abstract: Climate decision-making in the GCC states increasingly demands systems that can translate heterogeneous scientific and policy evidence into actionable guidance, yet general-purpose large language models (LLMs) remain weak both in region-specific climate knowledge and grounded interaction with geospatial and forecasting tools. We present the GCA framework, which unifies (i) GCA-DS, a curated multimodal dataset grounded in the GCC states, and (ii) Gulf Climate Agent (GCA), a tool-augmented agent for climate analysis. GCA-DS comprises 200k question--answer pairs spanning governmental policies and adaptation plans, NGO and international frameworks, academic literature, and event-driven reporting on heatwaves, dust storms, and floods, complemented with remote-sensing inputs that couple imagery with textual evidence. Building on this foundation, the GCA agent orchestrates a modular tool pipeline grounded in real-time and historical signals and geospatial processing that produces derived indices and interpretable visualizations. Finally, we benchmark open and proprietary LLMs on climate tasks in the GCC states and show that domain fine-tuning and tool integration substantially improve reliability over general-purpose baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出面向海湾合作委员会国家的气候决策支持数据集与智能体框架，通过领域微调和工具集成提升大模型在区域气候任务上的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 海湾合作委员会国家的气候决策需要系统将异构科学和政策证据转化为可操作指导，但通用大模型在区域特定气候知识和地理空间/预测工具交互方面表现薄弱。
analysis.problem: 通用大模型缺乏区域特定气候知识，且无法有效与地理空间和预测工具进行交互，导致在GCC国家气候决策支持中可靠性不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用大模型在GCC区域气候任务上表现不佳，领域微调和工具集成能显著提升可靠性。
analysis.method: 构建GCA-DS多模态数据集（含20万问答对，覆盖政策、学术、事件报告及遥感数据）和GCA智能体（模块化工具流水线，集成实时/历史信号与地理空间处理）。
contributions: 提出GCA-DS数据集，首个面向GCC国家的多模态气候数据集
设计GCA智能体，通过工具增强实现可解释的气候分析
基准测试显示领域微调和工具集成显著优于通用基线
analysis.experiments: 在GCC区域气候任务上对开源和专有LLM进行基准测试，结果表明领域微调和工具集成提高了可靠性。
limitations: 数据集仅覆盖GCC国家，泛化性有限
智能体依赖外部工具，可能引入延迟或错误
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出面向海湾合作委员会国家的气候决策支持数据集与智能体框架，通过领域微调和工具集成提升大模型在区域气候任务上的可靠性。

papers.title: CBAM-Enhanced DenseNet121 for Multi-Class Chest X-Ray Classification with Grad-CAM Explainability
papers.abstract: Pneumonia remains a leading cause of childhood mortality worldwide, with a heavy burden in low-resource settings such as Bangladesh where radiologist availability is limited. Most existing deep learning approaches treat pneumonia detection as a binary problem, overlooking the clinically critical distinction between bacterial and viral aetiology. This paper proposes CBAM-DenseNet121, a transfer-learning framework that integrates the Convolutional Block Attention Module (CBAM) into DenseNet121 for three-class chest X-ray classification: Normal, Bacterial Pneumonia, and Viral Pneumonia. We also conduct a systematic binary-task baseline study revealing that EfficientNetB3 (73.88%) underperforms even the custom CNN baseline (78.53%) -- a practically important negative finding for medical imaging model selection. To ensure statistical reliability, all experiments were repeated three times with independent random seeds (42, 7, 123), and results are reported as mean +/- standard deviation. CBAM-DenseNet121 achieves 84.29% +/- 1.14% test accuracy with per-class AUC scores of 0.9565 +/- 0.0010, 0.9610 +/- 0.0014, and 0.9187 +/- 0.0037 for bacterial pneumonia, normal, and viral pneumonia respectively. Grad-CAM visualizations confirm that the model attends to anatomically plausible pulmonary regions for each class, supporting interpretable deployment in resource-constrained clinical environments.

analysis.tldr: 将CBAM注意力模块集成到DenseNet121中，实现三类胸部X光分类（正常、细菌性肺炎、病毒性肺炎），并用Grad-CAM提供可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 肺炎是儿童死亡主因，尤其在放射科医生稀缺的低资源地区；现有方法多将肺炎检测视为二分类问题，忽略了细菌性与病毒性肺炎的临床关键区分。
analysis.problem: 实现胸部X光片的三分类（正常、细菌性肺炎、病毒性肺炎），并确保模型可解释性以支持临床部署。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CBAM-DenseNet121，将卷积块注意力模块（CBAM）集成到DenseNet121中，采用迁移学习框架进行三类分类；同时进行系统性二分类基线研究。
contributions: 提出CBAM-DenseNet121用于三类胸部X光分类，区分细菌性与病毒性肺炎。
揭示EfficientNetB3在二分类任务中表现不如简单CNN基线的负发现，对医学影像模型选择有实际意义。
使用Grad-CAM可视化验证模型关注解剖学合理的肺部区域，增强可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在胸部X光数据集上进行三类分类实验，所有实验重复三次（随机种子42, 7, 123），报告均值±标准差。CBAM-DenseNet121测试准确率84.29%±1.14%，各类AUC分别为0.9565±0.0010、0.9610±0.0014、0.9187±0.0037。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
未与最新多类肺炎分类方法对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将CBAM注意力模块集成到DenseNet121中，实现三类胸部X光分类（正常、细菌性肺炎、病毒性肺炎），并用Grad-CAM提供可解释性。

papers.title: Knowledge Graph RAG: Agentic Crawling and Graph Construction in Enterprise Documents
papers.abstract: This research paper addresses the limitations of semantic search in complex enterprise document ecosystems. Traditional RAG pipelines often fail to capture hierarchical and interconnected information, leading to retrieval inaccuracies. We propose Agentic Knowledge Graphs featuring Recursive Crawling as a robust solution for navigating superseding logic and multi-hop references. Our benchmark evaluation using the Code of Federal Regulations (CFR) demonstrates that this Knowledge Graph-enhanced approach achieves a 70% accuracy improvement over standard vector-based RAG systems, providing exhaustive and precise answers for complex regulatory queries.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于智能体递归爬取的知识图谱RAG方法，在法规文档检索中准确率提升70%。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统RAG在复杂企业文档中难以捕捉层次化和互联信息，导致检索不准确。
analysis.problem: 解决语义搜索在复杂文档生态中无法处理层级逻辑和多跳引用的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准向量RAG在法规查询中准确率不足，无法提供全面精确的答案。
analysis.method: 提出Agentic Knowledge Graphs，结合递归爬取构建知识图谱，增强检索。
contributions: 提出基于智能体递归爬取的知识图谱构建方法
在CFR基准上实现70%准确率提升
analysis.experiments: 在Code of Federal Regulations (CFR)数据集上评估，知识图谱增强方法相比标准向量RAG准确率提升70%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定领域文档结构
递归爬取的计算开销未提及
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于智能体递归爬取的知识图谱RAG方法，在法规文档检索中准确率提升70%。

papers.title: Local-Splitter: A Measurement Study of Seven Tactics for Reducing Cloud LLM Token Usage on Coding-Agent Workloads
papers.abstract: We present a systematic measurement study of seven tactics for reducing cloud LLM token usage when a small local model can act as a triage layer in front of a frontier cloud model. The tactics are: (1) local routing, (2) prompt compression, (3) semantic caching, (4) local drafting with cloud review, (5) minimal-diff edits, (6) structured intent extraction, and (7) batching with vendor prompt caching. We implement all seven in an open-source shim that speaks both MCP and the OpenAI-compatible HTTP surface, supporting any local model via Ollama and any cloud model via an OpenAI-compatible endpoint. We evaluate each tactic individually, in pairs, and in a greedy-additive subset across four coding-agent workload classes (edit-heavy, explanation-heavy, general chat, RAG-heavy). We measure tokens saved, dollar cost, latency, and routing accuracy. Our headline finding is that T1 (local routing) combined with T2 (prompt compression) achieves 45-79% cloud token savings on edit-heavy and explanation-heavy workloads, while on RAG-heavy workloads the full tactic set including T4 (draft-review) achieves 51% savings. We observe that the optimal tactic subset is workload-dependent, which we believe is the most actionable finding for practitioners deploying coding agents today.

analysis.tldr: 针对编码Agent工作负载，系统测量了七种减少云端LLM Token用量的策略，发现最优策略组合取决于工作负载类型。
analysis.research_motivation: 云端LLM API调用成本高昂，尤其在编码Agent场景下频繁交互导致Token消耗巨大，现有方法缺乏系统性的测量和对比。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地评估和组合多种减少云端LLM Token用量的策略，以在编码Agent工作负载中实现成本、延迟和准确性的最佳平衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同工作负载类型（如编辑密集型、解释密集型、RAG密集型）对策略组合的敏感度不同，最优策略子集是工作负载依赖的。
analysis.method: 实现一个开源中间件（shim），集成七种策略：本地路由、提示压缩、语义缓存、本地草稿+云端审查、最小差异编辑、结构化意图提取、批处理+供应商提示缓存，并在四种编码Agent工作负载上单独、成对及贪心添加组合评估。
contributions: 系统测量了七种减少云端LLM Token用量的策略在编码Agent工作负载上的效果。
发现最优策略组合依赖于工作负载类型，为实践者提供了可操作的指导。
analysis.experiments: 在四种编码Agent工作负载（编辑密集型、解释密集型、通用聊天、RAG密集型）上评估了Token节省、成本、延迟和路由准确性。
limitations: 仅针对编码Agent工作负载，其他领域可能不适用。
策略组合的贪心添加可能不是全局最优。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对编码Agent工作负载，系统测量了七种减少云端LLM Token用量的策略，发现最优策略组合取决于工作负载类型。

papers.title: CoSyncDiT: Cognitive Synchronous Diffusion Transformer for Movie Dubbing
papers.abstract: Movie dubbing aims to synthesize speech that preserves the vocal identity of a reference audio while synchronizing with the lip movements in a target video. Existing methods fail to achieve precise lip-sync and lack naturalness due to explicit alignment at the duration level. While implicit alignment solutions have emerged, they remain susceptible to interference from the reference audio, triggering timbre and pronunciation degradation in in-the-wild scenarios. In this paper, we propose a novel flow matching-based movie dubbing framework driven by the Cognitive Synchronous Diffusion Transformer (CoSync-DiT), inspired by the cognitive process of professional actors. This architecture progressively guides the noise-to-speech generative trajectory by executing acoustic style adapting, fine-grained visual calibrating, and time-aware context aligning. Furthermore, we design the Joint Semantic and Alignment Regularization (JSAR) mechanism to simultaneously constrain frame-level temporal consistency on the contextual outputs and semantic consistency on the flow hidden states, ensuring robust alignment. Extensive experiments on both standard benchmarks and challenging in-the-wild dubbing benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance across multiple metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出认知同步扩散Transformer（CoSync-DiT）用于电影配音，通过渐进式生成轨迹和联合语义对齐正则化实现精准唇同步与自然语音。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有电影配音方法在唇同步精度和自然度上存在不足，显式对齐方法缺乏自然性，隐式对齐方法易受参考音频干扰导致音色和发音退化。
analysis.problem: 如何实现高精度唇同步且保持语音自然度的电影配音。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 隐式对齐方法在野外场景下受参考音频干扰，导致音色和发音退化。
analysis.method: 提出CoSync-DiT框架，基于流匹配，通过声学风格适应、细粒度视觉校准和时间感知上下文对齐渐进引导生成轨迹；并设计JSAR机制同时约束帧级时间一致性和语义一致性。
contributions: 提出CoSync-DiT框架，模拟专业演员认知过程实现渐进式生成。
设计JSAR机制联合约束时间与语义一致性，提升鲁棒对齐。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准和具有挑战性的野外配音基准上，方法在多个指标上达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量参考音频和视频输入。
计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出认知同步扩散Transformer（CoSync-DiT）用于电影配音，通过渐进式生成轨迹和联合语义对齐正则化实现精准唇同步与自然语音。

papers.title: Frontier-Eng: Benchmarking Self-Evolving Agents on Real-World Engineering Tasks with Generative Optimization
papers.abstract: Current LLM agent benchmarks, which predominantly focus on binary pass/fail tasks such as code generation or search-based question answering, often neglect the value of real-world engineering that is often captured through the iterative optimization of feasible designs. To this end, we introduce Frontier-Eng, a human-verified benchmark for generative optimization -- an iterative propose-execute-evaluate loop in which an agent generates candidate artifacts, receives executable verifier feedback, and revises them under a fixed interaction budget -- spanning $47$ tasks across five broad engineering categories. Unlike previous suites, Frontier-Eng tasks are grounded in industrial-grade simulators and verifiers that provide continuous reward signals and enforce hard feasibility constraints under constrained budgets. We evaluate eight frontier language models using representative search frameworks, finding that while GPT 5.4 achieves the most robust performance, the benchmark remains challenging for all models. Our analysis suggests a dual power-law decay in improvement frequency ($\sim$ 1/iteration) and magnitude ($\sim$ 1/improvement count). We further show that although width improves parallelism and diversity, depth remains crucial for hard-won improvements under a fixed budget. Frontier-Eng establishes a new standard for assessing the capacity of AI agents to integrate domain knowledge with executable feedback to solve complex, open-ended engineering problems.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Frontier-Eng 基准，用于评估 LLM Agent 在真实工程任务上的迭代优化能力，发现性能随迭代呈双幂律衰减。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 LLM Agent 基准多关注二元通过/失败任务（如代码生成），忽略了真实工程中通过迭代优化可行设计的过程，缺乏对生成优化能力的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能评估 LLM Agent 在真实工程任务中进行迭代优化（生成-执行-评估循环）能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现改进频率和幅度均呈双幂律衰减（~1/迭代次数和~1/改进次数），且宽度（并行性）提升多样性，但深度（迭代次数）对固定预算下的关键改进至关重要。
analysis.method: 构建 Frontier-Eng 基准，包含 47 个任务，覆盖 5 个工程类别，使用工业级模拟器和验证器提供连续奖励信号和硬可行性约束，评估 8 个前沿语言模型在代表性搜索框架下的表现。
contributions: 提出 Frontier-Eng 基准，专注于生成优化任务，填补了现有基准的空白。
发现双幂律衰减规律，揭示了迭代优化中宽度与深度的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 评估了 8 个前沿语言模型，GPT 5.4 表现最稳健，但所有模型仍面临挑战。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准任务可能未覆盖所有工程领域。
未深入分析不同搜索框架的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Frontier-Eng 基准，用于评估 LLM Agent 在真实工程任务上的迭代优化能力，发现性能随迭代呈双幂律衰减。

papers.title: LiveMoments: Reselected Key Photo Restoration in Live Photos via Reference-guided Diffusion
papers.abstract: Live Photo captures both a high-quality key photo and a short video clip to preserve the precious dynamics around the captured moment. While users may choose alternative frames as the key photo to capture better expressions or timing, these frames often exhibit noticeable quality degradation, as the photo capture ISP pipeline delivers significantly higher image quality than the video pipeline. This quality gap highlights the need for dedicated restoration techniques to enhance the reselected key photo. To this end, we propose LiveMoments, a reference-guided image restoration framework tailored for the reselected key photo in Live Photos. Our method employs a two-branch neural network: a reference branch that extracts structural and textural information from the original high-quality key photo, and a main branch that restores the reselected frame using the guidance provided by the reference branch. Furthermore, we introduce a unified Motion Alignment module that incorporates motion guidance for spatial alignment at both the latent and image levels. Experiments on real and synthetic Live Photos demonstrate that LiveMoments significantly improves perceptual quality and fidelity over existing solutions, especially in scenes with fast motion or complex structures. Our code is available at https://github.com/OpenVeraTeam/LiveMoments.

analysis.tldr: 提出参考引导的扩散框架，用于恢复 Live Photos 中重选关键帧的画质。
analysis.research_motivation: Live Photos 中用户重选的关键帧因来自视频流水线而画质显著低于原始关键帧，现有方法缺乏针对性的恢复技术。
analysis.problem: 如何利用原始高质量关键帧作为参考，恢复重选关键帧的感知质量和保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 重选关键帧存在明显的质量退化，尤其在快速运动或复杂结构场景下退化更严重。
analysis.method: 双分支参考引导扩散框架：参考分支提取原始关键帧的结构和纹理信息，主分支利用参考分支的引导恢复重选帧；引入统一运动对齐模块，在潜空间和图像空间进行空间对齐。
contributions: 提出首个针对 Live Photos 重选关键帧的参考引导图像恢复框架
设计双分支网络和运动对齐模块，有效利用原始关键帧信息提升恢复质量
analysis.experiments: 在真实和合成 Live Photos 上实验，相比现有方案在感知质量和保真度上有显著提升，尤其快速运动和复杂结构场景。
limitations: 依赖原始关键帧作为参考，若原始关键帧本身质量不佳可能影响效果
运动对齐模块可能对极端运动或遮挡场景处理有限
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出参考引导的扩散框架，用于恢复 Live Photos 中重选关键帧的画质。

papers.title: GAM: Hierarchical Graph-based Agentic Memory for LLM Agents
papers.abstract: To sustain coherent long-term interactions, Large Language Model (LLM) agents must navigate the tension between acquiring new information and retaining prior knowledge. Current unified stream-based memory systems facilitate context updates but remain vulnerable to interference from transient noise. Conversely, discrete structured memory architectures provide robust knowledge retention but often struggle to adapt to evolving narratives. To address this, we propose GAM, a hierarchical Graph-based Agentic Memory framework that explicitly decouples memory encoding from consolidation to effectively resolve the conflict between rapid context perception and stable knowledge retention. By isolating ongoing dialogue in an event progression graph and integrating it into a topic associative network only upon semantic shifts, our approach minimizes interference while preserving long-term consistency. Additionally, we introduce a graph-guided, multi-factor retrieval strategy to enhance context precision. Experiments on LoCoMo and LongDialQA indicate that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both reasoning accuracy and efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层图记忆框架GAM，解耦编码与整合，提升LLM智能体长程交互的推理准确性与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM智能体在长程交互中面临新信息获取与旧知识保留的冲突：统一流式记忆易受瞬态噪声干扰，离散结构化记忆难以适应动态叙事。
analysis.problem: 如何设计记忆系统同时实现快速上下文感知与稳定知识保留，避免干扰并保持长期一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 统一流式记忆易受瞬态噪声干扰，离散结构化记忆难以适应动态叙事。
analysis.method: 分层图记忆框架GAM：将对话编码为事件进展图，仅在语义转变时整合到主题关联网络，并采用图引导的多因子检索策略。
contributions: 提出GAM框架，显式解耦记忆编码与整合，解决快速感知与稳定保留的冲突。
引入图引导的多因子检索策略，提升上下文精度。
analysis.experiments: 在LoCoMo和LongDialQA数据集上，方法在推理准确性和效率上持续优于最先进基线。
limitations: 摘要未提及跨领域泛化能力。
可能依赖高质量图构建，对噪声对话敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层图记忆框架GAM，解耦编码与整合，提升LLM智能体长程交互的推理准确性与效率。

papers.title: MAST: Mask-Guided Attention Mass Allocation for Training-Free Multi-Style Transfer
papers.abstract: Style transfer aims to render a content image with the visual characteristics of a reference style while preserving its underlying semantic layout and structural geometry. While recent diffusion-based models demonstrate strong stylization capabilities by leveraging powerful generative priors and controllable internal representations, they typically assume a single global style. Extending them to multi-style scenarios often leads to boundary artifacts, unstable stylization, and structural inconsistency due to interference between multiple style representations. To overcome these limitations, we propose MAST (Mask-Guided Attention Mass Allocation for Training-Free Multi-Style Transfer), a novel training-free framework that explicitly controls content-style interactions within the diffusion attention mechanism. To achieve artifact-free and structure-preserving stylization, MAST integrates four connected modules. First, Layout-preserving Query Anchoring prevents global layout collapse by firmly anchoring the semantic structure using content queries. Second, Logit-level Attention Mass Allocation deterministically distributes attention probability mass across spatial regions, seamlessly fusing multiple styles without boundary artifacts. Third, Sharpness-aware Temperature Scaling restores the attention sharpness degraded by multi-style expansion. Finally, Discrepancy-aware Detail Injection adaptively compensates for localized high-frequency detail losses by measuring structural discrepancies. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MAST effectively mitigates boundary artifacts and maintains structural consistency, preserving texture fidelity and spatial coherence even as the number of applied styles increases.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的多风格迁移框架MAST，通过注意力机制控制内容-风格交互，消除边界伪影并保持结构一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型通常假设单一全局风格，扩展到多风格场景时会出现边界伪影、风格不稳定和结构不一致等问题，亟需一种无需训练的多风格迁移方法。
analysis.problem: 多风格迁移中多个风格表示相互干扰导致的边界伪影、结构不一致和风格不稳定问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多风格扩展时注意力锐度下降，导致边界伪影和结构不一致；局部高频细节丢失。
analysis.method: 提出MAST框架，包含四个模块：布局保持查询锚定、对数级注意力质量分配、锐度感知温度缩放和差异感知细节注入，在扩散注意力机制中显式控制内容-风格交互。
contributions: 提出首个无需训练的多风格迁移框架MAST，有效消除边界伪影并保持结构一致性。
设计四个创新模块：布局保持查询锚定、对数级注意力质量分配、锐度感知温度缩放和差异感知细节注入。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的分割掩码。
多风格数量增加时计算开销可能增大。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的多风格迁移框架MAST，通过注意力机制控制内容-风格交互，消除边界伪影并保持结构一致性。

papers.title: Forge-UGC: FX optimization and register-graph engine for universal graph compiler
papers.abstract: We present Forge-UGC (FX Optimization and Register-Graph Engine for Universal Graph Compilation), a four-phase compiler for transformer deployment on heterogeneous accelerator hardware, validated on Intel AI Boost NPU. Existing frameworks such as OpenVINO and ONNX Runtime often use opaque compilation pipelines, limited pass-level visibility, and weak buffer management, which can lead to higher compilation cost and runtime overhead. Forge-UGC addresses this with a hardware-agnostic design that separates graph capture, optimization, intermediate representation lowering, and backend scheduling. Phase 1 captures graphs with torch.export at the ATen operator level, supporting modern transformer components such as rotary position embeddings, grouped-query attention, and SwiGLU without manual decomposition. Phase 2 applies six optimization passes: dead code elimination, common subexpression elimination, constant folding, attention fusion, operator fusion, and layout optimization, reducing graph node count by 14.2 to 21.9%. Phase 3 lowers the optimized graph into a typed intermediate representation with explicit virtual register assignments. Phase 4 performs liveness analysis, linear-scan buffer allocation, reducing peak buffer count by 30 to 48%, and device-affinity scheduling, reducing NPU-CPU transitions by 42 to 65%. Across six model families ranging from 125M to 8B parameters, evaluated on WikiText-103 and GLUE, Forge-UGC delivers 6.9 to 9.2x faster compilation than OpenVINO and ONNX Runtime, 18.2 to 35.7% lower inference latency, and 30.2 to 40.9% lower energy per inference. Fidelity is preserved, with max absolute logit differences below 2.1e-5 and KL divergence below 8.4e-9. We also introduce Fusion Gain Ratio, Compilation Efficiency Index, and per-pass execution profiling for systematic evaluation of NPU compilation pipelines.

analysis.tldr: Forge-UGC 是一个四阶段通用图编译器，通过硬件无关设计和优化引擎在 Intel NPU 上实现 6.9-9.2 倍编译加速和 18.2-35.7% 推理延迟降低。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有框架如 OpenVINO 和 ONNX Runtime 存在编译管线不透明、pass 级可见性有限、缓冲区管理薄弱等问题，导致编译成本和运行时开销较高，亟需一种硬件无关且高效的编译器。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个硬件无关的通用图编译器，以降低 transformer 模型在异构加速器上的编译成本和运行时开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Forge-UGC 采用四阶段设计：阶段1通过 torch.export 在 ATen 算子级别捕获图，支持现代 transformer 组件；阶段2应用六种优化 pass（死代码消除、公共子表达式消除、常量折叠、注意力融合、算子融合、布局优化），减少图节点数 14.2-21.9%；阶段3将优化图降级为带显式虚拟寄存器赋值的类型化中间表示；阶段4进行活跃性分析、线性扫描缓冲区分配（减少峰值缓冲区数 30-48%）和设备亲和性调度（减少 NPU-CPU 转换 42-65%）。
contributions: 提出四阶段硬件无关编译器 Forge-UGC，分离图捕获、优化、中间表示降级和后端调度。
引入六种优化 pass 和寄存器图引擎，显著降低编译时间和运行时开销。
在 Intel NPU 上验证，实现 6.9-9.2 倍编译加速、18.2-35.7% 推理延迟降低和 30.2-40.9% 能耗降低。
analysis.experiments: 在 125M 到 8B 参数的六个模型家族上，使用 WikiText-103 和 GLUE 数据集评估，与 OpenVINO 和 ONNX Runtime 对比，报告了编译时间、推理延迟、能耗、缓冲区减少、NPU-CPU 转换减少以及保真度指标（最大绝对 logit 差异 <2.1e-5，KL 散度 <8.4e-9）。
limitations: 仅在 Intel AI Boost NPU 上验证，泛化到其他加速器（如 GPU、TPU）的效果未知。
优化 pass 可能对特定模型结构敏感，需要进一步分析其通用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Forge-UGC 是一个四阶段通用图编译器，通过硬件无关设计和优化引擎在 Intel NPU 上实现 6.9-9.2 倍编译加速和 18.2-35.7% 推理延迟降低。

papers.title: SubFlow: Sub-mode Conditioned Flow Matching for Diverse One-Step Generation
papers.abstract: Flow matching has emerged as a powerful generative framework, with recent few-step methods achieving remarkable inference acceleration. However, we identify a critical yet overlooked limitation: these models suffer from severe diversity degradation, concentrating samples on dominant modes while neglecting rare but valid variations of the target distribution. We trace this degradation to averaging distortion: when trained with MSE objectives, class-conditional flows learn a frequency-weighted mean over intra-class sub-modes, causing the model to over-represent high-density modes while systematically neglecting low-density ones. To address this, we propose SubFlow, Sub-mode Conditioned Flow Matching, which eliminates averaging distortion by decomposing each class into fine-grained sub-modes via semantic clustering and conditioning the flow on sub-mode indices. Each conditioned sub-distribution is approximately unimodal, so the learned flow accurately targets individual modes with no averaging distortion, restoring full mode coverage in a single inference step. Crucially, SubFlow is entirely plug-and-play: it integrates seamlessly into existing one-step models such as MeanFlow and Shortcut Models without any architectural modifications. Extensive experiments on ImageNet-256 demonstrate that SubFlow yields substantial gains in generation diversity (Recall) while maintaining competitive image quality (FID), confirming its broad applicability across different one-step generation frameworks. Project page: https://yexionglin.github.io/subflow.

analysis.tldr: SubFlow通过子模式条件流匹配消除平均失真，在单步生成中恢复多样性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有流匹配模型在加速推理时严重退化生成多样性，倾向于集中采样主导模式而忽略稀有但有效的变体。
analysis.problem: 解决流匹配模型在少步/单步生成中因MSE训练导致的平均失真问题，恢复对目标分布全模式覆盖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到类条件流在MSE目标下学习到频率加权均值，导致高密度模式过表示、低密度模式被系统忽略。
analysis.method: 通过语义聚类将每个类别分解为细粒度子模式，并基于子模式索引进行条件流匹配，使每个条件子分布近似单峰，消除平均失真。
contributions: 识别并分析了流匹配模型在少步生成中的多样性退化问题及其根源——平均失真。
提出SubFlow，一种即插即用的子模式条件流匹配方法，无需架构修改即可恢复单步生成中的模式覆盖。
在ImageNet-256上验证了SubFlow在保持图像质量的同时显著提升生成多样性。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet-256上评估，使用Recall衡量多样性、FID衡量质量，与MeanFlow和Shortcut Models等单步模型集成，显示多样性提升且质量竞争。
limitations: 依赖语义聚类的质量，可能对聚类超参数敏感。
仅针对类条件生成，未验证无条件或文本条件场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SubFlow通过子模式条件流匹配消除平均失真，在单步生成中恢复多样性。

papers.title: DreamStereo: Towards Real-Time Stereo Inpainting for HD Videos
papers.abstract: Stereo video inpainting, which aims to fill the occluded regions of warped videos with visually coherent content while maintaining temporal consistency, remains a challenging open problem. The regions to be filled are scattered along object boundaries and occupy only a small fraction of each frame, leading to two key challenges. First, existing approaches perform poorly on such tasks due to the scarcity of high-quality stereo inpainting datasets, which limits their ability to learn effective inpainting priors. Second, these methods apply equal processing to all regions of the frame, even though most pixels require no modification, resulting in substantial redundant computation. To address these issues, we introduce three interconnected components. We first propose Gradient-Aware Parallax Warping (GAPW), which leverages backward warping and the gradient of the coordinate mapping function to obtain continuous edges and smooth occlusion regions. Then, a Parallax-Based Dual Projection (PBDP) strategy is introduced, which incorporates GAPW to produce geometrically consistent stereo inpainting pairs and accurate occlusion masks without requiring stereo videos. Finally, we present Sparsity-Aware Stereo Inpainting (SASI), which reduces over 70% of redundant tokens, achieving a 10.7x speedup during diffusion inference and delivering results comparable to its full-computation counterpart, enabling real-time processing of HD (768 x 1280) videos at 25 FPS on a single A100 GPU.

analysis.tldr: 提出实时高清立体视频修复方法，通过稀疏感知扩散推理实现10.7倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 立体视频修复中，待填充区域仅占帧的小部分，现有方法对所有区域均等处理导致大量冗余计算，且缺乏高质量数据集限制了修复先验的学习。
analysis.problem: 实现高清立体视频的实时修复，同时保证视觉连贯性和时间一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 待修复区域稀疏且沿物体边界分布，现有方法处理效率低；缺乏立体修复数据集导致模型性能受限。
analysis.method: 提出三个组件：梯度感知视差扭曲（GAPW）获取连续边缘和平滑遮挡区域；基于视差的双投影（PBDP）生成几何一致的立体修复对和精确遮挡掩码；稀疏感知立体修复（SASI）减少70%以上冗余token，实现10.7倍扩散推理加速。
contributions: 提出GAPW方法利用反向扭曲和坐标映射梯度获得连续边缘和平滑遮挡区域。
提出PBDP策略无需立体视频即可生成几何一致的立体修复对和精确遮挡掩码。
提出SASI方法通过稀疏感知减少冗余token，实现10.7倍加速，支持HD视频实时处理。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及在单个A100 GPU上实现HD (768x1280)视频25 FPS的实时处理。
limitations: 可能依赖特定扩散模型架构，泛化性需验证。
加速效果可能受视频内容稀疏程度影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出实时高清立体视频修复方法，通过稀疏感知扩散推理实现10.7倍加速。

papers.title: CascadeDebate: Multi-Agent Deliberation for Cost-Aware LLM Cascades
papers.abstract: Cascaded LLM systems coordinate models of varying sizes with human experts to balance accuracy, cost, and abstention under uncertainty. However, single-model tiers at each stage often struggle with ambiguous queries, triggering premature escalations to costlier models or experts due to under-confidence and inefficient compute scaling. CascadeDebate addresses this gap by inserting multi-agent deliberation directly at each tier's escalation boundary. Confidence-based routers activate lightweight agent ensembles only for uncertain cases, enabling consensus-driven resolution of ambiguities internally without invoking higher-cost upgrades. Our unified architecture alternates single-model inference with selective multi-agent deliberation across model scales, culminating in human experts as the final fallback. This design scales test-time compute dynamically according to query difficulty. Across five benchmarks spanning science, medicine, and general knowledge, CascadeDebate outperforms strong single-model cascades and standalone multi-agent systems by up to 26.75 percent. An online threshold optimizer proves essential, boosting accuracy by 20.98 to 52.33 percent relative improvement over fixed policies and enabling elastic adaptation to real-world distributions.

analysis.tldr: 通过在多级级联LLM中插入选择性多智能体讨论，在不确定查询上以更低成本提升准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 级联LLM系统通过协调不同规模模型和人类专家来平衡准确率、成本和弃权，但单模型层级在面对模糊查询时往往因置信度不足而过早升级到更昂贵的模型或专家，导致计算效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著增加成本的前提下，让级联LLM系统在模糊查询上做出更准确的决策，减少不必要的升级。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单模型层级在模糊查询上置信度不足，导致过早升级；固定策略无法适应真实分布变化。
analysis.method: CascadeDebate在每级级联的升级边界插入多智能体讨论，由基于置信度的路由器仅在不确定案例上激活轻量级智能体集成，通过共识驱动内部解决歧义，避免升级到更昂贵的模型或专家。整体架构交替进行单模型推理和选择性多智能体讨论，最终以人类专家作为最终回退。
contributions: 提出CascadeDebate架构，在级联LLM中引入选择性多智能体讨论，动态分配测试时计算资源。
设计在线阈值优化器，实现弹性适应真实分布，显著提升准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在科学、医学和通用知识五个基准上，CascadeDebate比强单模型级联和独立多智能体系统提升高达26.75%；在线阈值优化器相比固定策略带来20.98%到52.33%的相对准确率提升。
limitations: 多智能体讨论可能引入额外延迟，摘要未提及延迟分析。
在线阈值优化器的收敛性和稳定性未详细讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过在多级级联LLM中插入选择性多智能体讨论，在不确定查询上以更低成本提升准确率。

papers.title: Coding-Free and Privacy-Preserving Agentic Framework for Data-Driven Clinical Research
papers.abstract: Clinical data-driven research requires clinical expertise, programming skills, access to patient data, and extensive documentation, creating barriers and slowing the pace for clinicians and external researchers. To address this, we developed the Clinical Agentic Research Intelligence System (CARIS) that automates the workflow: research planning, literature search, cohort construction, Institutional Review Board (IRB) documentation, Vibe Machine Learning (ML), and report generation, with human-in-the-loop refinement. CARIS integrates Large Language Models (LLMs) with modular tools through the Model Context Protocol (MCP), enabling natural language-driven research without coding while allowing users to access only outputs. We evaluated CARIS on three heterogeneous datasets with distinct clinical tasks, where it completed planning and IRB documentation within four iterations, supported Vibe ML, and generated reports, achieving 96% completeness in LLM-based evaluation and 82% in human evaluation. CARIS demonstrates potential to reduce documentation burden and technical barriers, accelerating data-driven clinical research across public and private data environments.

analysis.tldr: CARIS 是一个无需编码、保护隐私的临床研究智能体框架，通过 LLM 和 MCP 协议自动化研究全流程。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床数据驱动研究需要临床专业知识、编程技能、患者数据访问和大量文档，对临床医生和外部研究者构成障碍，减缓研究进度。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个无需编码、保护隐私的自动化框架，以降低临床研究的技术和文档门槛。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 CARIS 框架，集成 LLM 与模块化工具（通过 MCP 协议），支持自然语言驱动的研究规划、文献搜索、队列构建、IRB 文档、Vibe ML 和报告生成，并包含人在回路优化。
contributions: 提出无需编码、保护隐私的临床研究智能体框架 CARIS
在三个异构数据集上验证了框架的有效性，LLM 评估完整性达 96%，人工评估达 82%
analysis.experiments: 在三个异构数据集上评估，完成规划和 IRB 文档在四次迭代内，支持 Vibe ML 并生成报告，LLM 评估完整性 96%，人工评估 82%。
limitations: 可能依赖 LLM 的生成质量，存在幻觉风险
人工评估样本量未明确，可能有限
