analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CARIS 是一个无需编码、保护隐私的临床研究智能体框架，通过 LLM 和 MCP 协议自动化研究全流程。

papers.title: See No Evil: Semantic Context-Aware Privacy Risk Detection for AR
papers.abstract: Augmented reality (AR) systems pose unique privacy risks due to their continuous capture of visual data. Existing AR privacy frameworks lack semantic understanding of visual content, limiting their effectiveness in detecting context-dependent privacy risks. We propose PrivAR, which leverages vision language models (VLMs) with chain-of-thought prompting for contextual privacy risk detection in AR environments. PrivAR uses visual scene cues to infer potential sensitive information types, such as identifying password notes in office environments through contextual reasoning. PrivAR detects and obfuscates textual content, preventing exposure of sensitive information while preserving contextual cues necessary for VLM inference. Additionally, we investigate contextually-informed warning interfaces to enhance user privacy awareness. Experiments on a real-world AR dataset show that PrivAR achieves superior accuracy (81.48%) and F1-score (84.62%) compared to baselines, while reducing privacy leakage rate to 17.58%. User studies evaluating contextually-informed warning interfaces provide insights into effective privacy-aware AR design.

analysis.tldr: 提出PrivAR，利用VLM和思维链提示实现AR环境下的上下文感知隐私风险检测与文本遮挡。
analysis.research_motivation: AR系统持续捕获视觉数据带来独特隐私风险，现有框架缺乏对视觉内容的语义理解，难以检测上下文相关的隐私泄露。
analysis.problem: 如何在AR环境中实现上下文感知的隐私风险检测，并有效遮挡敏感文本同时保留VLM推理所需的上下文线索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PrivAR使用视觉语言模型（VLM）结合思维链（CoT）提示，通过视觉场景线索推断潜在敏感信息类型（如办公室环境中的密码便签），检测并遮挡文本内容，同时设计上下文感知的警告界面。
contributions: 提出PrivAR框架，首次将VLM与CoT结合用于AR上下文隐私风险检测。
实现敏感文本检测与遮挡，在保护隐私的同时保留VLM推理所需上下文。
通过用户研究探索上下文感知警告界面，为隐私感知AR设计提供见解。
analysis.experiments: 在真实AR数据集上，PrivAR准确率81.48%，F1分数84.62%，隐私泄露率降至17.58%，优于基线。用户研究评估了上下文感知警告界面。
limitations: 可能仅针对文本类敏感信息，对其他模态（如图像、音频）的隐私风险未涉及。
依赖VLM的推理能力，在复杂或罕见场景下可能失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PrivAR，利用VLM和思维链提示实现AR环境下的上下文感知隐私风险检测与文本遮挡。

papers.title: A Physics-Aware Framework for Short-Term GPU Power Forecasting of AI Data Centers
papers.abstract: AI data centers experience rapid fluctuations in power demand due to the heterogeneity of computational tasks that they have to support. For example, the power profile of inference and training of large language models (LLMs) is quite distinct and big divergences can result in the instability of the underlying electricity grid. In this paper we propose, to the best of our knowledge, the first physics-informed DLinear time-series model that can accurately forecast power utilization of an AI data center 5-80 minutes (short-term forecasting) into the future. The physics, based on a multi-node lumped thermal resistance-capacitance (RC) network consistent with Newton's law of cooling, is captured using newly derived time-dependent ordinary differential equations (ODE) that separately models and interlinks power consumption with the GPU compute and memory utilization and temperature. The resulting model, that we refer to as PI-DLinear, trained and evaluated on a real AI data center dataset and is not only more accurate than the state-of-the-art (SOTA) models tested, but the forecast profile respects the underlying physics under power throttling and load transient events. Relative to the SOTA transformer-based and non-transformer-based models, improvements in forecasting accuracy (averaged across all look-back and prediction windows) range from 0.782%-39.08% for MSE, 0.993%-51.82% for MAE, and 0.370%-22.28% for RMSE.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个物理信息DLinear时间序列模型PI-DLinear，用于AI数据中心GPU功耗短期预测，在真实数据集上优于SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: AI数据中心因计算任务异构性导致功耗剧烈波动，影响电网稳定性，现有模型缺乏物理约束，预测精度不足。
analysis.problem: 如何准确预测AI数据中心未来5-80分钟的GPU功耗，并确保预测符合物理规律。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PI-DLinear模型，结合多节点集总热阻-电容（RC）网络和牛顿冷却定律，推导时变ODE描述功耗与GPU计算、内存利用率和温度的耦合关系，并嵌入DLinear时间序列模型。
contributions: 首个物理信息时间序列模型用于AI数据中心GPU功耗短期预测
推导了基于RC网络的时变ODE，显式建模功耗与温度、计算/内存利用率的动态关系
analysis.experiments: 在真实AI数据中心数据集上评估，与SOTA transformer和非transformer模型对比，MSE提升0.782%-39.08%，MAE提升0.993%-51.82%，RMSE提升0.370%-22.28%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据中心硬件配置，泛化性需验证
ODE模型假设可能简化实际热动态
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个物理信息DLinear时间序列模型PI-DLinear，用于AI数据中心GPU功耗短期预测，在真实数据集上优于SOTA。

papers.title: Style-Decoupled Adaptive Routing Network for Underwater Image Enhancement
papers.abstract: Underwater Image Enhancement (UIE) is essential for robust visual perception in marine applications. However, existing methods predominantly rely on uniform mapping tailored to average dataset distributions, leading to over-processing mildly degraded images or insufficient recovery for severe ones. To address this challenge, we propose a novel adaptive enhancement framework, SDAR-Net. Unlike existing uniform paradigms, it first decouples specific degradation styles from the input and subsequently modulates the enhancement process adaptively. Specifically, since underwater degradation primarily shifts the appearance while keeping the scene structure, SDAR-Net formulates image features into dynamic degradation style embeddings and static scene structural representations through a carefully designed training framework. Subsequently, we introduce an adaptive routing mechanism. By evaluating style features and adaptively predicting soft weights at different enhancement states, it guides the weighted fusion of the corresponding image representations, accurately satisfying the adaptive restoration demands of each image. Extensive experiments show that SDAR-Net achieves a new state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance with a PSNR of 25.72 dB on real-world benchmark, and demonstrates its utility in downstream vision tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/WHU-USI3DV/SDAR-Net.

analysis.tldr: 提出风格解耦自适应路由网络SDAR-Net，通过解耦退化风格并自适应调制增强过程，实现水下图像增强SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有水下图像增强方法采用统一映射，无法适应不同退化程度的图像，导致过处理或欠恢复。
analysis.problem: 如何根据输入图像的具体退化风格自适应调整增强过程，避免统一映射的局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 水下退化主要改变外观而保持场景结构，因此可将图像特征解耦为动态风格嵌入和静态结构表示。
analysis.method: 提出SDAR-Net，先通过训练框架将图像特征解耦为动态退化风格嵌入和静态场景结构表示，再引入自适应路由机制，根据风格特征预测软权重，加权融合不同增强状态的图像表示。
contributions: 提出风格解耦自适应路由网络SDAR-Net，实现自适应水下图像增强。
在真实世界基准上达到SOTA性能（PSNR 25.72 dB），并验证了下游视觉任务的实用性。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界基准上PSNR达25.72 dB，并展示了下游视觉任务中的效用。
limitations: 可能对极端退化场景的泛化能力有限。
计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出风格解耦自适应路由网络SDAR-Net，通过解耦退化风格并自适应调制增强过程，实现水下图像增强SOTA。

papers.title: Improving Molecular Force Fields with Minimal Temporal Information
papers.abstract: Accurate prediction of energy and forces for 3D molecular systems is one of fundamental challenges at the core of AI for Science applications. Many powerful and data-efficient neural networks predict molecular energies and forces from single atomic configurations. However, one crucial aspect of the data generation process is rarely considered while learning these models i.e. Molecular Dynamics (MD) simulation. MD simulations generate time-ordered trajectories of atomic positions that fluctuate in energy and explore regions of the potential energy surface (e.g., under standard NVE/NVT ensembles), rather than being constructed to steadily lower the potential energy toward a minimum as in geometry relaxations. This work explores a novel way to leverage MD data, when available, to improve the performance of such predictors. We introduce a novel training strategy called FRAMES, that use an auxiliary loss function for exploiting the temporal relationships within MD trajectories. Counter-intuitively, on two atomistic benchmarks and a synthetic system we observe that minimal temporal information, captured by pairs of just two consecutive frames, is often sufficient to obtain the best performance, while adding longer trajectory sequences can introduce redundancy and degrade performance. On the widely used MD17 and ISO17 benchmarks, FRAMES significantly outperforms its Equiformer baseline, achieving highly competitive results in both energy and force accuracy. Our work not only presents a novel training strategy which improves the accuracy of the model, but also provides evidence that for distilling physical priors of atomic systems, more temporal data is not always better.

analysis.tldr: 利用MD轨迹中极少的时序信息（仅两帧）即可显著提升分子力场预测精度，更多时序数据反而可能有害。
analysis.research_motivation: 分子动力学模拟生成大量时序轨迹数据，但现有神经网络模型通常仅从单帧构型预测能量和力，忽略了轨迹中的时序关系，导致数据利用不充分。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用MD轨迹中的时序信息来提升分子能量和力预测模型的精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到，仅使用连续两帧的时序信息即可获得最佳性能，而增加更长轨迹序列会引入冗余并降低性能，表明更多时序数据并非总是更好。
analysis.method: 提出FRAMES训练策略，通过辅助损失函数利用MD轨迹中连续两帧的时序关系进行训练。
contributions: 提出FRAMES训练策略，利用MD轨迹中极少的时序信息（两帧）提升分子力场预测精度。
在MD17和ISO17基准上显著超越Equiformer基线，并揭示更多时序数据可能有害的反直觉现象。
analysis.experiments: 在MD17和ISO17两个原子基准以及一个合成系统上进行了实验，FRAMES在能量和力精度上均取得具有竞争力的结果。
limitations: 仅验证了连续两帧的时序信息，更复杂的时序模式可能未被探索。
方法依赖于MD轨迹的可用性，对于无轨迹数据的场景可能不适用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用MD轨迹中极少的时序信息（仅两帧）即可显著提升分子力场预测精度，更多时序数据反而可能有害。

papers.title: ARGen: Affect-Reinforced Generative Augmentation towards Vision-based Dynamic Emotion Perception
papers.abstract: Dynamic facial expression recognition in the wild remains challenging due to data scarcity and long-tail distributions, which hinder models from effectively learning the temporal dynamics of scarce emotions. To address these limitations, we propose ARGen, an Affect-Reinforced Generative Augmentation Framework that enables data-adaptive dynamic expression generation for robust emotion perception. ARGen operates in two stages: Affective Semantic Injection (ASI) and Adaptive Reinforcement Diffusion (ARD). The ASI stage establishes affective knowledge alignment through facial Action Units and employs a retrieval-augmented prompt generation strategy to synthesize consistent and fine-grained affective descriptions via large-scale visual-language models, thereby injecting interpretable emotional priors into the generation process. The ARD stage integrates text-conditioned image-to-video diffusion with reinforcement learning, introducing inter-frame conditional guidance and a multi-objective reward function to jointly optimize expression naturalness, facial integrity, and generative efficiency. Extensive experiments on both generation and recognition tasks verify that ARGen substantially enhances synthesis fidelity and improves recognition performance, establishing an interpretable and generalizable generative augmentation paradigm for vision-based affective computing.

analysis.tldr: 提出ARGen框架，通过情感语义注入和强化学习扩散生成动态面部表情，提升识别性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 野外动态面部表情识别面临数据稀缺和长尾分布问题，现有方法难以有效学习稀缺表情的时间动态。
analysis.problem: 如何生成高质量、多样化的动态面部表情数据以增强模型对稀缺表情的识别能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：情感语义注入（ASI）利用面部动作单元和检索增强提示生成情感描述，自适应强化扩散（ARD）结合文本条件图像到视频扩散和强化学习，优化表情自然度、面部完整性和生成效率。
contributions: 提出ARGen框架，结合情感语义注入和强化学习扩散用于动态表情生成。
在生成和识别任务上验证了ARGen能提升合成保真度和识别性能。
analysis.experiments: 在生成和识别任务上进行实验，表明ARGen提升了合成保真度和识别性能，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模视觉-语言模型，计算成本较高。
强化学习奖励函数设计可能需针对不同场景调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ARGen框架，通过情感语义注入和强化学习扩散生成动态面部表情，提升识别性能。

papers.title: SpanKey: Dynamic Key Space Conditioning for Neural Network Access Control
papers.abstract: SpanKey is a lightweight way to gate inference without encrypting weights or chasing leaderboard accuracy on gated inference. The idea is to condition activations on secret keys. A basis matrix $B$ defines a low-dimensional key subspace $Span(B)$; during training we sample coefficients $α$ and form keys $k=α^\top B$, then inject them into intermediate activations with additive or multiplicative maps and strength $γ$. Valid keys lie in $Span(B)$; invalid keys are sampled outside that subspace. We make three points. (i) Mechanism: subspace key injection and a multi-layer design space. (ii) Failure mode: key absorption, together with two analytical results (a Beta-energy split and margin-tail diagnostics), explains weak baseline separation in energy and margin terms -- these are not a security theorem. iii) Deny losses and experiments: Modes A--C and extensions, with CIFAR-10 ResNet-18 runs and MNIST ablations for Mode B. We summarize setup and first-order analysis, injectors, absorption, deny losses and ablations, a threat discussion that does not promise cryptography, and closing remarks on scale. Code: \texttt{https://github.com/mindmemory-ai/dksc}

analysis.tldr: 提出SpanKey方法，通过动态密钥空间条件控制神经网络推理，分析密钥吸收失败模式并设计拒绝损失。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有门控推理方法要么加密权重开销大，要么追求排行榜精度而忽视实际安全性，需要轻量级且可解释的访问控制方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不加密权重的前提下，通过密钥条件化激活值实现神经网络的门控推理，并避免密钥被模型吸收失效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现密钥吸收现象：模型可能忽略密钥条件，导致有效密钥与无效密钥的激活差异微弱；通过Beta能量分裂和边际诊断分析解释了这种弱分离。
analysis.method: 定义低维密钥子空间Span(B)，训练时采样系数α生成密钥k=α^T B，通过加法或乘法映射注入中间激活；设计拒绝损失（Deny losses）增强无效密钥下的错误输出。
contributions: 提出SpanKey轻量级门控推理框架，无需加密权重。
揭示密钥吸收失败模式，并提供分析工具（Beta能量分裂、边际诊断）。
设计拒绝损失及多种注入模式，在CIFAR-10和MNIST上验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10 ResNet-18和MNIST上进行了模式B的消融实验，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 未提供与加密方法的直接安全性对比。
实验规模较小，仅限小数据集和简单模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SpanKey方法，通过动态密钥空间条件控制神经网络推理，分析密钥吸收失败模式并设计拒绝损失。

papers.title: A Scoping Review of Large Language Model-Based Pedagogical Agents
papers.abstract: This scoping review examines the emerging field of Large Language Model (LLM)-based pedagogical agents in educational settings. While traditional pedagogical agents have been extensively studied, the integration of LLMs represents a transformative advancement with unprecedented capabilities in natural language understanding, reasoning, and adaptation. Following PRISMA-ScR guidelines, we analyzed 52 studies across five major databases from November 2022 to January 2025. Our findings reveal diverse LLM-based agents spanning K-12, higher education, and informal learning contexts across multiple subject domains. We identified four key design dimensions characterizing these agents: interaction approach (reactive vs. proactive), domain scope (domain-specific vs. general-purpose), role complexity (single-role vs. multi-role), and system integration (standalone vs. integrated). Emerging trends include multi-agent systems that simulate naturalistic learning environments, virtual student simulation for agent evaluation, integration with immersive technologies, and combinations with learning analytics. We also discuss significant research gaps and ethical considerations regarding privacy, accuracy, and student autonomy. This review provides researchers and practitioners with a comprehensive understanding of LLM-based pedagogical agents while identifying crucial areas for future development in this rapidly evolving field.

analysis.tldr: 综述了基于大语言模型的教学代理的设计维度、趋势与伦理挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统教学代理研究已较为成熟，但LLM的引入带来了自然语言理解与推理能力的质变，亟需系统梳理其设计、应用与挑战。
analysis.problem: LLM教学代理领域缺乏系统性综述，现有研究分散，设计维度与趋势不明确。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式，仅指出研究空白与伦理问题。
analysis.method: 遵循PRISMA-ScR指南，对2022年11月至2025年1月间52项研究进行范围综述，识别出四个关键设计维度和新兴趋势。
contributions: 系统梳理了LLM教学代理的四个设计维度：交互方式、领域范围、角色复杂度和系统集成。
识别了多智能体系统、虚拟学生模拟、沉浸式技术整合等新兴趋势及伦理挑战。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 综述范围限于2022-2025年，可能遗漏早期或最新研究。
未深入分析各设计维度的有效性或性能对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述了基于大语言模型的教学代理的设计维度、趋势与伦理挑战。

papers.title: ArtifactWorld: Scaling 3D Gaussian Splatting Artifact Restoration via Video Generation Models
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) delivers high-fidelity real-time rendering but suffers from geometric and photometric degradations under sparse-view constraints. Current generative restoration approaches are often limited by insufficient temporal coherence, a lack of explicit spatial constraints, and a lack of large-scale training data, resulting in multi-view inconsistencies, erroneous geometric hallucinations, and limited generalization to diverse real-world artifact distributions. In this paper, we present ArtifactWorld, a framework that resolves 3DGS artifact repair through systematic data expansion and a homogeneous dual-model paradigm. To address the data bottleneck, we establish a fine-grained phenomenological taxonomy of 3DGS artifacts and construct a comprehensive training set of 107.5K diverse paired video clips to enhance model robustness. Architecturally, we unify the restoration process within a video diffusion backbone, utilizing an isomorphic predictor to localize structural defects via an artifact heatmap. This heatmap then guides the restoration through an Artifact-Aware Triplet Fusion mechanism, enabling precise, intensity-guided spatio-temporal repair within native self-attention. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ArtifactWorld achieves state-of-the-art performance in sparse novel view synthesis and robust 3D reconstruction. Code and dataset will be made public.

analysis.tldr: 通过视频扩散模型和系统化数据扩展，解决3D高斯泼溅在稀疏视角下的伪影修复问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 3DGS在稀疏视角下存在几何和光度退化，现有生成式修复方法受限于时间一致性不足、缺乏显式空间约束和大规模训练数据，导致多视角不一致和几何幻觉。
analysis.problem: 如何实现3DGS伪影的鲁棒修复，克服数据瓶颈和时空一致性挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前方法在多视角一致性、几何幻觉和泛化能力上存在局限，并建立了细粒度的3DGS伪影现象学分类。
analysis.method: 提出ArtifactWorld框架，包括：1) 基于伪影分类构建107.5K配对视频片段数据集；2) 视频扩散骨干网络统一修复过程；3) 同构预测器生成伪影热图定位结构缺陷；4) 伪影感知三元组融合机制实现强度引导的时空修复。
contributions: 建立了3DGS伪影的细粒度现象学分类并构建大规模配对视频训练集
提出同构预测器与伪影感知三元组融合机制，实现精确的时空修复
在稀疏视角新视图合成和3D重建上达到SOTA性能
analysis.experiments: 在稀疏新视图合成和3D重建任务上进行了广泛实验，达到SOTA性能。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖视频扩散模型的计算开销
伪影分类的完备性可能影响泛化
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

papers.title: How memory can affect collective and cooperative behaviors in an LLM-Based Social Particle Swarm
papers.abstract: This study examines how model-specific characteristics of Large Language Model (LLM) agents, including internal alignment, shape the effect of memory on their collective and cooperative dynamics in a multi-agent system. To this end, we extend the Social Particle Swarm (SPS) model, in which agents move in a two-dimensional space and play the Prisoner's Dilemma with neighboring agents, by replacing its rule-based agents with LLM agents endowed with Big Five personality scores and varying memory lengths. Using Gemini-2.0-Flash, we find that memory length is a critical parameter governing collective behavior: even a minimal memory drastically suppressed cooperation, transitioning the system from stable cooperative clusters through cyclical formation and collapse of clusters to a state of scattered defection as memory length increased. Big Five personality traits correlated with agent behaviors in partial agreement with findings from experiments with human participants, supporting the validity of the model. Comparative experiments using Gemma~3:4b revealed the opposite trend: longer memory promoted cooperation, accompanied by the formation of dense cooperative clusters. Sentiment analysis of agents' reasoning texts showed that Gemini interprets memory increasingly negatively as its length grows, while Gemma interprets it less negatively, and that this difference persists in the early phase of experiments before the macro-level dynamics converge. These results suggest that model-specific characteristics of LLMs, potentially including alignment, play a fundamental role in determining emergent social behavior in Generative Agent-Based Modeling, and provide a micro-level cognitive account of the contradictions found in prior work on memory and cooperation.

analysis.tldr: LLM智能体的记忆长度和模型特性（如对齐）显著影响多智能体系统中的合作行为，且不同模型表现出相反趋势。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解LLM智能体的记忆如何影响集体合作行为，对生成式智能体建模和AI社会模拟至关重要，但先前研究存在矛盾结论。
analysis.problem: 探究LLM智能体的记忆长度和模型特定特性（如内部对齐）如何影响多智能体系统中的集体与协作动态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 记忆长度是关键参数：Gemini-2.0-Flash中，即使最小记忆也大幅抑制合作，随记忆增长从稳定合作簇过渡到分散背叛；Gemma~3:4b则相反，更长记忆促进合作并形成密集合作簇。情感分析显示，Gemini随记忆增长对记忆解释更负面，Gemma则更不负面，且差异在宏观动态收敛前已存在。
analysis.method: 扩展社会粒子群（SPS）模型，用具有大五人格评分和可变记忆长度的LLM智能体替代基于规则的智能体，在二维空间中与邻居进行囚徒困境博弈。
contributions: 发现记忆长度是控制LLM智能体集体行为的关键参数，且不同模型表现出相反趋势。
揭示模型特定特性（包括对齐）在生成式智能体建模中决定涌现社会行为的基础作用。
通过情感分析提供微观认知解释，阐明先前关于记忆与合作矛盾发现的原因。
analysis.experiments: 使用Gemini-2.0-Flash和Gemma~3:4b进行对比实验，分析记忆长度对合作率、聚类动态的影响，并进行情感分析。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅使用两种LLM模型，结论的泛化性有限。
未深入探讨对齐机制如何具体影响记忆解释。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM智能体的记忆长度和模型特性（如对齐）显著影响多智能体系统中的合作行为，且不同模型表现出相反趋势。

papers.title: SpecBound: Adaptive Bounded Self-Speculation with Layer-wise Confidence Calibration
papers.abstract: Speculative decoding has emerged as a promising approach to accelerate autoregressive inference in large language models (LLMs). Self-draft methods, which leverage the base LLM itself for speculation, avoid the overhead of auxiliary draft models but face limitations: shallow layers often produce overconfident yet incorrect token predictions, and the presence of difficult tokens in a draft sequence forces redundant computation through deeper layers, undermining both draft acceptance and overall speedup. To address these issues, we propose a novel self-draft framework that suppresses spurious confidence via layer-wise temperature annealing in early-exit decision and adaptively bounds speculation length based on token-wise decoding difficulty. By reprocessing the hidden states of draft tokens in a unified parallel pass through deep layers, our method maintains exact output equivalence with the original model while maximizing computational efficiency. It requires no modifications to the base LLM parameters and achieves up to 2.33x wall-time speedup over standard autoregressive decoding across diverse long-form generation tasks and multiple model architectures.

analysis.tldr: 通过层间置信度校准和自适应推测长度边界，实现无损加速的自推测解码框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 自推测解码中浅层过度自信导致错误预测，且困难令牌迫使深层冗余计算，限制加速效果。
analysis.problem: 自推测解码中浅层置信度校准不足与推测长度固定导致的效率低下问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 浅层常产生过度自信但错误的预测；困难令牌导致深层冗余计算。
analysis.method: 提出SpecBound框架，包含层间温度退火抑制虚假置信度，以及基于令牌解码难度的自适应推测长度边界，并通过统一并行传递重处理隐藏状态保持输出等价。
contributions: 提出层间温度退火校准早期退出决策的置信度
设计自适应推测长度边界，根据解码难度动态调整
实现无损加速，无需修改基模型参数，最高2.33倍加速
analysis.experiments: 在多种长文本生成任务和多个模型架构上验证，达到最高2.33倍墙钟时间加速。
limitations: 可能对极短序列加速效果有限
温度退火超参数需针对模型调优
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过层间置信度校准和自适应推测长度边界，实现无损加速的自推测解码框架。

papers.title: Socrates Loss: Unifying Confidence Calibration and Classification by Leveraging the Unknown
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks, despite their high accuracy, often exhibit poor confidence calibration, limiting their reliability in high-stakes applications. Current ad-hoc confidence calibration methods attempt to fix this during training but face a fundamental trade-off: two-phase training methods achieve strong classification performance at the cost of training instability and poorer confidence calibration, while single-loss methods are stable but underperform in classification. This paper addresses and mitigates this stability-performance trade-off. We propose Socrates Loss, a novel, unified loss function that explicitly leverages uncertainty by incorporating an auxiliary unknown class, whose predictions directly influence the loss function and a dynamic uncertainty penalty. This unified objective allows the model to be optimized for both classification and confidence calibration simultaneously, without the instability of complex, scheduled losses. We provide theoretical guarantees that our method regularizes the model to prevent miscalibration and overfitting. Across four benchmark datasets and multiple architectures, our comprehensive experiments demonstrate that Socrates Loss consistently improves training stability while achieving more favorable accuracy-calibration trade-off, often converging faster than existing methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出Socrates Loss，通过引入辅助未知类统一优化分类与置信度校准，缓解稳定性-性能权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度神经网络在高精度下常存在置信度校准不良问题，现有方法面临两阶段训练不稳定或单损失分类性能不足的权衡，亟需统一且稳定的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一的损失函数，同时优化分类准确率和置信度校准，并避免训练不稳定。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 两阶段训练方法分类性能强但校准差且不稳定，单损失方法稳定但分类性能不足，存在稳定性-性能权衡。
analysis.method: Socrates Loss：在损失函数中引入辅助未知类，其预测直接影响损失并加入动态不确定性惩罚，实现分类与校准的联合优化。
contributions: 提出Socrates Loss，统一了置信度校准与分类优化，无需复杂调度损失。
提供理论保证，证明该方法能正则化模型防止错误校准和过拟合。
在四个基准数据集和多种架构上验证了其训练稳定性、更优的精度-校准权衡及更快的收敛速度。
analysis.experiments: 在四个基准数据集和多种架构上进行实验，结果表明Socrates Loss持续提升训练稳定性，实现更优的精度-校准权衡，且收敛更快。
limitations: 辅助未知类的定义和引入方式可能依赖具体任务。
动态不确定性惩罚的超参数调节可能增加调参成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Socrates Loss，通过引入辅助未知类统一优化分类与置信度校准，缓解稳定性-性能权衡。

papers.title: Continuous Knowledge Metabolism: Generating Scientific Hypotheses from Evolving Literature
papers.abstract: Scientific hypothesis generation requires tracking how knowledge evolves, not just what is currently known. We introduce Continuous Knowledge Metabolism (CKM), a framework that processes scientific literature through sliding time windows and incrementally updates a structured knowledge base as new findings arrive. We present CKM-Lite, an efficient variant that achieves strong predictive coverage through incremental accumulation, outperforming batch processing on hit rate (+2.8%, p=0.006), hypothesis yield (+3.6, p<0.001), and best-match alignment (+0.43, p<0.001) while reducing token cost by 92%. To understand what drives these differences, we develop CKM-Full, an instrumented variant that categorizes each new finding as novel, confirming, or contradicting, detects knowledge change signals, and conditions hypothesis generation on the full evolution trajectory. Analyzing 892 hypotheses generated by CKM-Full across 50 research topics, alongside parallel runs of the other variants, we report four empirical observations: (1) incremental processing outperforms batch baseline across predictive and efficiency metrics; (2) change-aware instrumentation is associated with higher LLM-judged novelty (Cohen's d=3.46) but lower predictive coverage, revealing a quality-coverage trade-off; (3) a field's trajectory stability is associated with hypothesis success (r=-0.28, p=0.051), suggesting boundary conditions for literature-based prediction; (4) knowledge convergence signals are associated with nearly 5x higher hit rate than contradiction signals, pointing to differential predictability across change types. These findings suggest that the character of generated hypotheses is shaped not only by how much literature is processed, but also by how it is processed. They further indicate that evaluation frameworks must account for the quality-coverage trade-off rather than optimize for a single metric.

analysis.tldr: 提出连续知识代谢（CKM）框架，通过增量处理文献生成科学假设，发现增量处理优于批处理，且存在质量-覆盖权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学假设生成需要追踪知识的演化过程，而不仅仅是当前已知状态，现有方法多采用批处理，无法有效利用文献的时序动态信息。
analysis.problem: 如何从不断演化的科学文献中高效生成高质量的科学假设，并理解不同处理方式对假设质量的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要报告了四个实证观察：增量处理优于批处理；变化感知仪器化与更高新颖性相关但降低预测覆盖，揭示质量-覆盖权衡；领域轨迹稳定性与假设成功相关；知识收敛信号比矛盾信号具有近5倍命中率。
analysis.method: 提出连续知识代谢（CKM）框架，包含CKM-Lite（高效增量变体）和CKM-Full（仪器化变体），通过滑动时间窗口增量更新结构化知识库，并分类新发现为新颖、确认或矛盾，检测知识变化信号，基于完整演化轨迹生成假设。
contributions: 提出CKM框架，实现从演化文献中增量生成科学假设
通过CKM-Lite和CKM-Full揭示增量处理优于批处理，并发现质量-覆盖权衡等关键现象
analysis.experiments: 在50个研究主题上生成892个假设，并与并行运行的变体比较，报告了命中率、假设产量、最佳匹配对齐、新颖性等指标。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM判断新颖性，存在主观性
质量-覆盖权衡可能限制实际应用中的优化方向
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出连续知识代谢（CKM）框架，通过增量处理文献生成科学假设，发现增量处理优于批处理，且存在质量-覆盖权衡。

papers.title: Physics-Grounded Monocular Vehicle Distance Estimation Using Standardized License Plate Typography
papers.abstract: Accurate inter-vehicle distance estimation is a cornerstone of Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) and autonomous driving. While LiDAR and radar provide high precision, their high cost prohibits widespread adoption in mass-market vehicles. Monocular camera-based estimation offers a low-cost alternative but suffers from fundamental scale ambiguity. Recent deep learning methods for monocular depth achieve impressive results yet require expensive supervised training, suffer from domain shift, and produce predictions that are difficult to certify for safety-critical deployment. This paper presents a framework that exploits the standardized typography of United States license plates as passive fiducial markers for metric ranging, resolving scale ambiguity through explicit geometric priors without any training data or active illumination. First, a four-method parallel plate detector achieves robust plate reading across the full automotive lighting range. Second, a three-stage state identification engine fusing OCR text matching, multi-design color scoring, and a lightweight neural network classifier provides robust identification across all ambient conditions. Third, hybrid depth fusion with inverse-variance weighting and online scale alignment, combined with a one-dimensional constant-velocity Kalman filter, delivers smoothed distance, relative velocity, and time-to-collision for collision warning. Baseline validation reproduces a 2.3% coefficient of variation in character height measurements and a 36% reduction in distance-estimate variance compared with plate-width methods from prior work. Extensive outdoor experiments confirm a mean absolute error of 2.3% at 10 m and continuous distance output during brief plate occlusions, outperforming deep learning baselines by a factor of five in relative error.

analysis.tldr: 利用美国车牌标准化字体作为被动标记，无需训练数据即可实现单目车辆距离估计，误差低至2.3%。
analysis.research_motivation: 激光雷达和雷达成本高，难以普及；单目相机虽廉价但存在尺度模糊；现有深度学习方法需要昂贵监督训练、存在域迁移且难以安全认证。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖训练数据和主动照明的情况下，利用单目相机实现精确的车辆间距离估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 美国车牌具有标准化字体，可作为被动标记解决尺度模糊；字符高度测量变异系数仅2.3%，且基于车牌宽度的方法方差较大。
analysis.method: 提出一个框架，包含四方法并行车牌检测器、三阶段状态识别引擎（OCR文本匹配、多设计颜色评分、轻量神经网络分类器），以及混合深度融合（逆方差加权+在线尺度对齐）和一维常速卡尔曼滤波器，输出平滑距离、相对速度和碰撞时间。
contributions: 提出利用标准化车牌字体作为被动标记的单目距离估计方法，无需训练数据。
设计鲁棒的车牌检测与识别流水线，适应全光照和多种环境条件。
混合深度融合与卡尔曼滤波实现平滑距离输出，在10米处平均绝对误差2.3%，相对误差比深度学习方法低5倍。
analysis.experiments: 基线验证显示字符高度测量变异系数2.3%，距离估计方差比基于车牌宽度的方法降低36%；室外实验在10米处平均绝对误差2.3%，能在短暂遮挡期间连续输出距离，相对误差优于深度学习基线5倍。
limitations: 依赖美国车牌标准化字体，可能不适用于其他国家或地区。
在极端天气或车牌完全遮挡时性能可能下降。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用美国车牌标准化字体作为被动标记，无需训练数据即可实现单目车辆距离估计，误差低至2.3%。

papers.title: MolMem: Memory-Augmented Agentic Reinforcement Learning for Sample-Efficient Molecular Optimization
papers.abstract: In drug discovery, molecular optimization aims to iteratively refine a lead compound to improve molecular properties while preserving structural similarity to the original molecule. However, each oracle evaluation is expensive, making sample efficiency a key challenge for existing methods under a limited oracle budget. Trial-and-error approaches require many oracle calls, while methods that leverage external knowledge tend to reuse familiar templates and struggle on challenging objectives. A key missing piece is long-term memory that can ground decisions and provide reusable insights for future optimizations. To address this, we present MolMem (\textbf{Mol}ecular optimization with \textbf{Mem}ory), a multi-turn agentic reinforcement learning (RL) framework with a dual-memory system. Specifically, MolMem uses Static Exemplar Memory to retrieve relevant exemplars for cold-start grounding, and Evolving Skill Memory to distill successful trajectories into reusable strategies. Built on this memory-augmented formulation, we train the policy with dense step-wise rewards, turning costly rollouts into long-term knowledge that improves future optimization. Extensive experiments show that MolMem achieves 90\% success on single-property tasks (1.5$\times$ over the best baseline) and 52\% on multi-property tasks using only 500 oracle calls. Our code is available at https://github.com/REAL-Lab-NU/MolMem.

analysis.tldr: MolMem 通过双记忆系统增强的智能体强化学习，在仅500次oracle调用下实现分子优化90%成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 药物发现中分子优化需要迭代改进先导化合物，但每次oracle评估昂贵，现有方法样本效率低，缺乏长期记忆来指导决策。
analysis.problem: 在有限oracle预算下，如何高效地进行分子优化以改善分子属性并保持结构相似性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MolMem框架，包含静态示例记忆（Static Exemplar Memory）用于冷启动检索相关示例，以及演化技能记忆（Evolving Skill Memory）将成功轨迹蒸馏为可重用策略；基于记忆增强的公式，使用密集逐步奖励训练策略。
contributions: 提出MolMem，一个具有双记忆系统的多轮智能体强化学习框架，用于样本高效的分子优化。
在单属性和多属性任务上，仅用500次oracle调用即达到90%和52%的成功率，显著优于基线。
analysis.experiments: 在单属性任务上达到90%成功率（最佳基线的1.5倍），多属性任务上52%成功率，均使用500次oracle调用。
limitations: 可能对复杂多属性任务的成功率仍有提升空间（52%）。
双记忆系统的泛化性可能受限于训练数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MolMem 通过双记忆系统增强的智能体强化学习，在仅500次oracle调用下实现分子优化90%成功率。

papers.title: Gradient-Free Continual Learning in Spiking Neural Networks via Inter-Spike Interval Regularization
papers.abstract: Continual learning, the ability to acquire new tasks sequentially without forgetting prior knowledge, is essential for deploying neural networks in dynamic real-world environments, from nuclear digital twin monitoring to grid-edge fault detection. Existing synaptic importance methods, such as Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC) and Synaptic Intelligence (SI), rely on gradient computation, making them incompatible with neuromorphic hardware that lacks backpropagation support. We propose ISI-CV, the first gradient-free synaptic importance metric for SNN continual learning, derived from the Coefficient of Variation (CV) of Inter-Spike Intervals (ISIs). Neurons that fire regularly (low CV) encode stable, task-relevant features and are protected from overwriting; neurons with irregular firing are permitted to adapt freely. ISI-CV requires only spike time counters and integer arithmetic, all of which are native to every neuromorphic chip. We evaluate on four benchmarks of increasing difficulty: Split-MNIST, Permuted-MNIST, Split-FashionMNIST, and Split-N-MNIST using real Dynamic Vision Sensor (DVS) event data. Across three seeds, ISI-CV achieves zero forgetting (AF = 0.000 +/- 0.000) on Split-MNIST and Split-FashionMNIST, near-zero forgetting on Permuted-MNIST (AF = 0.001 +/- 0.000), and the highest accuracy with the lowest forgetting on real neuromorphic DVS data (AA = 0.820 +/- 0.012, AF = 0.221 +/- 0.014). On N-MNIST, gradient-based methods produce unreliable importance estimates and perform worse than no regularization; ISI-CV avoids this failure by design.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个无梯度脉冲神经网络持续学习方法，利用脉冲间隔变异系数作为突触重要性度量，实现零遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于梯度的持续学习方法（如EWC、SI）不兼容缺乏反向传播支持的神经形态硬件，限制了在动态环境（如核数字孪生、电网故障检测）中的部署。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖梯度计算的情况下，为脉冲神经网络（SNN）设计有效的突触重要性度量以实现持续学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：在N-MNIST上，基于梯度的方法产生不可靠的重要性估计，性能甚至不如无正则化；而ISI-CV通过设计避免了这一失败。
analysis.method: ISI-CV：基于脉冲间隔变异系数（CV of ISIs）的无梯度突触重要性度量。规则发放（低CV）的神经元编码稳定任务相关特征，受到保护；不规则发放的神经元可自由适应。仅需脉冲时间计数器和整数运算，原生支持神经形态芯片。
contributions: 提出首个无梯度SNN持续学习方法ISI-CV，利用脉冲间隔变异系数作为突触重要性度量。
在多个基准上实现零遗忘或近零遗忘，并在真实DVS数据上取得最高准确率和最低遗忘。
analysis.experiments: 在Split-MNIST、Permuted-MNIST、Split-FashionMNIST和Split-N-MNIST（使用真实DVS事件数据）四个基准上评估，三个随机种子。结果：Split-MNIST和Split-FashionMNIST上零遗忘（AF=0.000±0.000），Permuted-MNIST上近零遗忘（AF=0.001±0.000），DVS数据上最高准确率（AA=0.820±0.012）和最低遗忘（AF=0.221±0.014）。
limitations: 可能仅适用于SNN，不直接适用于传统人工神经网络。
在更复杂任务序列上的表现尚未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个无梯度脉冲神经网络持续学习方法，利用脉冲间隔变异系数作为突触重要性度量，实现零遗忘。

papers.title: TEMPLATEFUZZ: Fine-Grained Chat Template Fuzzing for Jailbreaking and Red Teaming LLMs
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed across diverse domains, yet their vulnerability to jailbreak attacks, where adversarial inputs bypass safety mechanisms to elicit harmful outputs, poses significant security risks. While prior work has primarily focused on prompt injection attacks, these approaches often require resource-intensive prompt engineering and overlook other critical components, such as chat templates. This paper introduces TEMPLATEFUZZ, a fine-grained fuzzing framework that systematically exposes vulnerabilities in chat templates, a critical yet underexplored attack surface in LLMs. Specifically, TEMPLATEFUZZ (1) designs a series of element-level mutation rules to generate diverse chat template variants, (2) proposes a heuristic search strategy to guide the chat template generation toward the direction of amplifying the attack success rate (ASR) while preserving model accuracy, and (3) integrates an active learning-based strategy to derive a lightweight rule-based oracle for accurate and efficient jailbreak evaluation. Evaluated on twelve open-source LLMs across multiple attack scenarios, TEMPLATEFUZZ achieves an average ASR of 98.2% with only 1.1% accuracy degradation, outperforming state-of-the-art methods by 9.1%-47.9% in ASR and 8.4% in accuracy degradation. Moreover, even on five industry-leading commercial LLMs where chat templates cannot be specified, TEMPLATEFUZZ attains a 90% average ASR via chat template-based prompt injection attacks.

analysis.tldr: 提出TEMPLATEFUZZ框架，通过细粒度模糊测试聊天模板实现高成功率越狱攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有越狱攻击主要关注提示注入，忽略了聊天模板这一关键攻击面，且需要大量资源进行提示工程。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地发现和利用LLM聊天模板中的安全漏洞，实现高效越狱攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 聊天模板是LLM中未被充分探索的攻击面，通过细粒度变异和启发式搜索可显著提升攻击成功率。
analysis.method: 设计元素级变异规则生成模板变体，结合启发式搜索策略优化攻击成功率，并利用主动学习构建轻量级规则评估器。
contributions: 首次系统性地将聊天模板作为攻击面进行模糊测试
提出元素级变异规则和启发式搜索策略，实现高攻击成功率与低精度损失
集成主动学习评估器，实现高效准确的越狱评估
analysis.experiments: 在12个开源LLM上平均ASR达98.2%，精度仅下降1.1%，优于SOTA方法9.1%-47.9%；在5个商业LLM上通过模板注入攻击达90% ASR。
limitations: 仅针对聊天模板，未覆盖其他潜在攻击面
商业模型上需依赖提示注入，可能受限于模型输入限制
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TEMPLATEFUZZ框架，通过细粒度模糊测试聊天模板实现高成功率越狱攻击。

papers.title: HintMR: Eliciting Stronger Mathematical Reasoning in Small Language Models
papers.abstract: Small language models (SLMs) often struggle with complex mathematical reasoning due to limited capacity to maintain long chains of intermediate steps and to recover from early errors. We address this challenge by introducing a hint-assisted reasoning framework that incrementally guides SLMs through multi-step mathematical problem solving. Our approach decomposes solutions into sequential reasoning steps and provides context-aware hints, where hints are generated by a separate SLM trained via distillation from a strong large language model. While the hint-generating SLM alone is not capable of solving the problems, its collaboration with a reasoning SLM enables effective guidance, forming a cooperative two-model system for reasoning. Each hint is generated conditionally on the problem statement and the accumulated reasoning history, providing stepwise, localized guidance without revealing full solutions. This reduces error propagation and allows the reasoning model to focus on manageable subproblems. Experiments across diverse mathematical benchmarks and models demonstrate that hint assistance consistently improves reasoning accuracy for SLMs, yielding substantial gains over standard prompting while preserving model efficiency. These results highlight that structured collaboration between SLMs-via hint generation and reasoning-offers an effective and lightweight mechanism for enhancing mathematical reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 通过提示辅助推理框架，让小型语言模型在数学推理中表现更强。
analysis.research_motivation: 小型语言模型因容量有限，难以维持长链推理步骤并从早期错误中恢复，数学推理能力弱。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著增加模型规模的前提下，提升小型语言模型的多步数学推理准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HintMR框架，将解答分解为顺序推理步骤，由提示生成SLM（通过大模型蒸馏训练）为推理SLM提供上下文感知的逐步提示，形成双模型协作系统。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级的提示辅助推理框架，通过双SLM协作提升数学推理能力。
在多个数学基准和模型上验证了该方法能一致提升推理准确性，且保持模型效率。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数学基准和模型上进行实验，提示辅助一致提升SLM推理准确性，相比标准提示有显著增益。
limitations: 依赖蒸馏大模型来训练提示生成器，可能引入额外训练成本。
双模型协作可能增加推理时的计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过提示辅助推理框架，让小型语言模型在数学推理中表现更强。

papers.title: Designing Reliable LLM-Assisted Rubric Scoring for Constructed Responses: Evidence from Physics Exams
papers.abstract: Student responses in STEM assessments are often handwritten and combine symbolic expressions, calculations, and diagrams, creating substantial variation in format and interpretation. Despite their importance for evaluating students' reasoning, such responses are time-consuming to score and prone to rater inconsistency, particularly when partial credit is required. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have increased attention to AI-assisted scoring, yet evidence remains limited regarding how rubric design and LLM configurations influence reliability across performance levels. This study examined the reliability of AI-assisted scoring of undergraduate physics constructed responses using GPT-4o. Twenty authentic handwritten exam responses were scored across two rounds by four instructors and by the AI model using skill-based rubrics with differing levels of analytic granularity. Prompting format and temperature settings were systematically varied. Overall, human-AI agreement on total scores was comparable to human inter-rater reliability and was highest for high- and low-performing responses, but declined for mid-level responses involving partial or ambiguous reasoning. Criterion-level analyses showed stronger alignment for clearly defined conceptual skills than for extended procedural judgments. A more fine-grained, checklist-based rubric improved consistency relative to holistic scoring. These findings indicate that reliable AI-assisted scoring depends primarily on clear, well-structured rubrics, while prompting format plays a secondary role and temperature has relatively limited impact. More broadly, the study provides transferable design recommendations for implementing reliable LLM-assisted scoring in STEM contexts through skill-based rubrics and controlled LLM settings.

analysis.tldr: LLM辅助评分可靠性主要取决于清晰的结构化评分标准，提示格式和温度设置影响较小。
analysis.research_motivation: STEM评估中学生的开放式回答通常为手写且包含符号、计算和图表，评分耗时且易出现评分者不一致，尤其是需要部分给分时。LLM辅助评分虽受关注，但评分标准设计和LLM配置如何影响不同表现水平的可靠性尚缺乏证据。
analysis.problem: 研究LLM辅助评分中评分标准粒度和LLM配置（提示格式、温度）对评分可靠性的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人机总分一致性接近人类评分者间信度，在高分和低分回答中最高，但在中等水平（部分或模糊推理）回答中下降；标准层面分析显示，清晰定义的概念技能比扩展的程序性判断一致性更强；细粒度检查表式评分标准比整体评分提高了一致性。
analysis.method: 使用GPT-4o对20份真实手写物理考试回答进行评分，由4名教师和AI模型使用不同分析粒度的技能型评分标准进行两轮评分，并系统变化提示格式和温度设置。
contributions: 揭示了LLM辅助评分可靠性主要依赖于清晰、结构化的评分标准，而非提示格式或温度设置。
提供了在STEM环境中通过技能型评分标准和受控LLM设置实现可靠LLM辅助评分的可迁移设计建议。
analysis.experiments: 使用20份真实手写本科物理考试回答，由4名教师和GPT-4o进行两轮评分，比较不同评分标准粒度、提示格式和温度设置下的人机一致性。
limitations: 样本量较小（20份回答），可能限制泛化性。
仅使用GPT-4o一种模型，其他LLM可能表现不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM辅助评分可靠性主要取决于清晰的结构化评分标准，提示格式和温度设置影响较小。

papers.title: LLM-Guided Semantic Bootstrapping for Interpretable Text Classification with Tsetlin Machines
papers.abstract: Pretrained language models (PLMs) like BERT provide strong semantic representations but are costly and opaque, while symbolic models such as the Tsetlin Machine (TM) offer transparency but lack semantic generalization. We propose a semantic bootstrapping framework that transfers LLM knowledge into symbolic form, combining interpretability with semantic capacity. Given a class label, an LLM generates sub-intents that guide synthetic data creation through a three-stage curriculum (seed, core, enriched), expanding semantic diversity. A Non-Negated TM (NTM) learns from these examples to extract high-confidence literals as interpretable semantic cues. Injecting these cues into real data enables a TM to align clause logic with LLM-inferred semantics. Our method requires no embeddings or runtime LLM calls, yet equips symbolic models with pretrained semantic priors. Across multiple text classification tasks, it improves interpretability and accuracy over vanilla TM, achieving performance comparable to BERT while remaining fully symbolic and efficient.

analysis.tldr: 用LLM生成语义线索引导Tsetlin Machine训练，实现可解释且高效的文本分类。
analysis.research_motivation: PLM（如BERT）语义强但成本高且不透明，符号模型（如Tsetlin Machine）透明但缺乏语义泛化能力，需要一种结合两者优势的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何将LLM的语义知识迁移到符号模型（Tsetlin Machine）中，使其兼具可解释性和语义能力，且无需嵌入或运行时LLM调用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出语义引导的bootstrapping框架：LLM根据类别标签生成子意图，通过三阶段课程（种子、核心、丰富）生成合成数据；非否定Tsetlin Machine（NTM）从合成数据中提取高置信度文字作为可解释语义线索；将这些线索注入真实数据，使TM的从句逻辑与LLM推断的语义对齐。
contributions: 提出一种将LLM知识迁移到符号模型（Tsetlin Machine）的语义bootstrapping框架，无需嵌入或运行时LLM调用。
通过三阶段课程生成合成数据，并利用NTM提取可解释语义线索，提升TM的准确性和可解释性，性能接近BERT。
analysis.experiments: 在多个文本分类任务上，该方法在可解释性和准确率上优于原始TM，性能与BERT相当。
limitations: 依赖LLM生成子意图的质量，可能引入偏差。
三阶段课程设计可能需针对不同任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用LLM生成语义线索引导Tsetlin Machine训练，实现可解释且高效的文本分类。

papers.title: BarbieGait: An Identity-Consistent Synthetic Human Dataset with Versatile Cloth-Changing for Gait Recognition
papers.abstract: Gait recognition, as a reliable biometric technology, has seen rapid development in recent years while it faces significant challenges caused by diverse clothing styles in the real world. This paper introduces BarbieGait, a synthetic gait dataset where real-world subjects are uniquely mapped into a virtual engine to simulate extensive clothing changes while preserving their gait identity information. As a pioneering work, BarbieGait provides a controllable gait data generation method, enabling the production of large datasets to validate cross-clothing issues that are difficult to verify with real-world data. However, the diversity of clothing increases intra-class variance and makes one of the biggest challenges to learning cloth-invariant features under varying clothing conditions. Therefore, we propose GaitCLIF (Gait-oriented CLoth-Invariant Feature) as a robust baseline model for cross-clothing gait recognition. Through extensive experiments, we validate that our method significantly improves cross-clothing performance on BarbieGait and the existing popular gait benchmarks. We believe that BarbieGait, with its extensive cross-clothing gait data, will further advance the capabilities of gait recognition in cross-clothing scenarios and promote progress in related research.

analysis.tldr: 提出合成步态数据集BarbieGait和跨服装不变特征方法GaitCLIF，显著提升跨服装步态识别性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实世界中服装多样性导致步态识别性能下降，现有数据集难以覆盖广泛服装变化，且跨服装不变特征学习困难。
analysis.problem: 如何生成包含丰富服装变化且保持身份一致的合成步态数据，并学习服装不变特征以提升跨服装步态识别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 服装多样性增加类内方差，成为学习服装不变特征的主要挑战。
analysis.method: 构建BarbieGait合成数据集，将真实主体映射到虚拟引擎模拟服装变化；提出GaitCLIF基线模型，学习服装不变特征。
contributions: 提出BarbieGait，首个将真实主体映射到虚拟引擎的合成步态数据集，支持可控的跨服装数据生成。
提出GaitCLIF方法，作为跨服装步态识别的鲁棒基线，显著提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在BarbieGait和现有流行步态基准上验证，跨服装性能显著提升。
limitations: 合成数据与真实数据之间可能存在域差异。
方法在极端服装变化下的泛化能力未充分探讨。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出合成步态数据集BarbieGait和跨服装不变特征方法GaitCLIF，显著提升跨服装步态识别性能。

papers.title: Ride the Wave: Precision-Allocated Sparse Attention for Smooth Video Generation
papers.abstract: Video Diffusion Transformers have revolutionized high-fidelity video generation but suffer from the massive computational burden of self-attention. While sparse attention provides a promising acceleration solution, existing methods frequently provoke severe visual flickering caused by static sparsity patterns and deterministic block routing. To resolve these limitations, we propose Precision-Allocated Sparse Attention (PASA), a training-free framework designed for highly efficient and temporally smooth video generation. First, we implement a curvature-aware dynamic budgeting mechanism. By profiling the generation trajectory acceleration across timesteps, we elastically allocate the exact-computation budget to secure high-precision processing strictly during critical semantic transitions. Second, we replace global homogenizing estimations with hardware-aligned grouped approximations, successfully capturing fine-grained local variations while maintaining peak compute throughput. Finally, we incorporate a stochastic selection bias into the attention routing mechanism. This probabilistic approach softens rigid selection boundaries and eliminates selection oscillation, effectively eradicating the localized computational starvation that drives temporal flickering. Extensive evaluations on leading video diffusion models demonstrate that PASA achieves substantial inference acceleration while consistently producing remarkably fluid and structurally stable video sequences.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的稀疏注意力框架PASA，通过动态预算分配和随机路由消除视频生成中的闪烁伪影，实现加速与流畅性兼得。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频扩散Transformer虽能生成高质量视频，但自注意力的计算负担巨大；现有稀疏注意力方法因静态稀疏模式和确定性路由导致严重视觉闪烁，亟需一种高效且时序平滑的加速方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持视频生成时序平滑性的前提下，通过稀疏注意力显著加速视频扩散Transformer的推理？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有稀疏注意力方法采用静态稀疏模式和确定性块路由，导致局部计算饥饿，从而引发时序闪烁伪影。
analysis.method: 提出Precision-Allocated Sparse Attention (PASA)，包含三个组件：1) 曲率感知动态预算机制，根据生成轨迹加速度弹性分配精确计算预算；2) 硬件对齐的分组近似，替代全局均匀估计以捕获局部变化；3) 随机选择偏置，软化路由边界并消除选择振荡，避免局部计算饥饿。
contributions: 提出PASA，一种无需训练、即插即用的稀疏注意力框架，显著加速视频生成并消除闪烁。
设计曲率感知动态预算机制，在关键语义转换期分配高精度计算。
引入随机选择偏置，通过概率化路由消除时序闪烁。
analysis.experiments: 在主流视频扩散模型上进行评估，表明PASA实现了显著的推理加速，并持续生成流畅且结构稳定的视频序列。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对超参数（如预算分配阈值、随机偏置强度）敏感，需要调参。
仅针对自注意力模块，未考虑其他计算瓶颈（如交叉注意力、前馈网络）。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的稀疏注意力框架PASA，通过动态预算分配和随机路由消除视频生成中的闪烁伪影，实现加速与流畅性兼得。

papers.title: Modality-Native Routing in Agent-to-Agent Networks: A Multimodal A2A Protocol Extension
papers.abstract: Preserving multimodal signals across agent boundaries is necessary for accurate cross-modal reasoning, but it is not sufficient. We show that modality-native routing in Agent-to-Agent (A2A) networks improves task accuracy by 20 percentage points over text-bottleneck baselines, but only when the downstream reasoning agent can exploit the richer context that native routing preserves. An ablation replacing LLM-backed reasoning with keyword matching eliminates the accuracy gap entirely (36% vs. 36%), establishing a two-layer requirement: protocol-level routing must be paired with capable agent-level reasoning for the benefit to materialize. We present MMA2A, an architecture layer atop A2A that inspects Agent Card capability declarations to route voice, image, and text parts in their native modality. On CrossModal-CS, a controlled 50-task benchmark with the same LLM backend, same tasks, and only the routing path varying, MMA2A achieves 52% task completion accuracy versus 32% for the text-bottleneck baseline (95% bootstrap CI on $Δ$TCA: [8, 32] pp; McNemar's exact $p = 0.006$). Gains concentrate on vision-dependent tasks: product defect reports improve by +38.5 pp and visual troubleshooting by +16.7 pp. This accuracy gain comes at a $1.8\times$ latency cost from native multimodal processing. These results suggest that routing is a first-order design variable in multi-agent systems, as it determines the information available for downstream reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出MMA2A协议层，通过模态原生路由提升多智能体系统任务准确率20个百分点，但收益依赖于下游推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Agent-to-Agent网络常将多模态信号压缩为文本传递，导致跨模态推理信息损失，限制了多智能体系统的准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计路由协议，使得多模态信号在智能体间以原生形式传递，并验证其有效性条件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模态原生路由的收益依赖于下游推理智能体能否利用丰富上下文；若替换为关键词匹配，准确率差距消失（36% vs 36%），表明路由与推理能力需协同。
analysis.method: MMA2A：在A2A协议之上增加架构层，通过检查Agent Card能力声明，将语音、图像、文本以原生模态路由到对应智能体。
contributions: 揭示模态原生路由在多智能体系统中的两层次要求：协议级路由与智能体推理能力必须匹配。
提出MMA2A协议扩展，实现多模态信号的原生路由，并在50任务基准上验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在CrossModal-CS基准上，MMA2A任务完成准确率52% vs 文本瓶颈基线32%，提升20个百分点；视觉依赖任务提升显著（产品缺陷报告+38.5pp，视觉故障排查+16.7pp），但带来1.8倍延迟。
limitations: 延迟成本较高（1.8倍），可能影响实时应用。
仅验证了特定LLM后端和50任务基准，泛化性需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MMA2A协议层，通过模态原生路由提升多智能体系统任务准确率20个百分点，但收益依赖于下游推理能力。

papers.title: Beyond Prompt: Fine-grained Simulation of Cognitively Impaired Standardized Patients via Stochastic Steering
papers.abstract: Simulating Standardized Patients with cognitive impairment offers a scalable and ethical solution for clinical training. However, existing methods rely on discrete prompt engineering and fail to capture the heterogeneity of deficits across varying domains and severity levels. To address this limitation, we propose StsPatient for the fine-grained simulation of cognitively impaired patients. We innovatively capture domain-specific features by extracting steering vectors from contrastive pairs of instructions and responses. Furthermore, we introduce a Stochastic Token Modulation (STM) mechanism to regulate the intervention probability. STM enables precise control over impairment severity while mitigating the instability of conventional vector methods. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that StsPatient significantly outperforms baselines in both clinical authenticity and severity controllability.

analysis.tldr: 提出StsPatient方法，通过随机令牌调制实现认知障碍标准化患者的细粒度模拟。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床培训中模拟认知障碍患者需要可扩展且符合伦理的方案，但现有方法依赖离散提示工程，无法捕捉不同领域和严重程度下缺陷的异质性。
analysis.problem: 如何实现认知障碍患者的细粒度模拟，以准确反映不同领域和严重程度的缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从指令-响应对比对中提取转向向量以捕获领域特定特征，并引入随机令牌调制（STM）机制调节干预概率，实现严重程度精确控制并缓解传统向量方法的不稳定性。
contributions: 提出StsPatient方法，实现认知障碍患者的细粒度模拟。
引入随机令牌调制（STM）机制，提升严重程度可控性和稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量对比对数据。
泛化到其他类型认知障碍或语言模型的能力未明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出StsPatient方法，通过随机令牌调制实现认知障碍标准化患者的细粒度模拟。

papers.title: Unveiling the Surprising Efficacy of Navigation Understanding in End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Global navigation information and local scene understanding are two crucial components of autonomous driving systems. However, our experimental results indicate that many end-to-end autonomous driving systems tend to over-rely on local scene understanding while failing to utilize global navigation information. These systems exhibit weak correlation between their planning capabilities and navigation input, and struggle to perform navigation-following in complex scenarios. To overcome this limitation, we propose the Sequential Navigation Guidance (SNG) framework, an efficient representation of global navigation information based on real-world navigation patterns. The SNG encompasses both navigation paths for constraining long-term trajectories and turn-by-turn (TBT) information for real-time decision-making logic. We constructed the SNG-QA dataset, a visual question answering (VQA) dataset based on SNG that aligns global and local planning. Additionally, we introduce an efficient model SNG-VLA that fuses local planning with global planning. The SNG-VLA achieves state-of-the-art performance through precise navigation information modeling without requiring auxiliary loss functions from perception tasks. Project page: SNG-VLA

analysis.tldr: 提出SNG框架和SNG-VLA模型，通过顺序导航引导提升端到端自动驾驶的导航跟随能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶系统过度依赖局部场景理解，未能有效利用全局导航信息，在复杂场景中导航跟随能力弱。
analysis.problem: 如何让端到端自动驾驶系统更好地融合全局导航信息与局部场景理解，提升导航跟随能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现许多端到端系统对导航输入的相关性弱，在复杂场景中难以执行导航跟随。
analysis.method: 提出顺序导航引导（SNG）框架，包含导航路径和逐向（TBT）信息；构建SNG-QA数据集；提出SNG-VLA模型融合局部与全局规划。
contributions: 揭示了端到端自动驾驶系统对导航信息利用不足的问题
提出SNG框架和SNG-VLA模型，实现精确导航信息建模，无需感知辅助损失函数即达到SOTA
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称SNG-VLA达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定导航数据格式
未提及在极端天气或动态障碍物场景下的表现
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SNG框架和SNG-VLA模型，通过顺序导航引导提升端到端自动驾驶的导航跟随能力。

papers.title: Latent patterns of urban mixing in mobility analysis across five global cities
papers.abstract: This study leverages large-scale travel surveys for over 200,000 residents across Boston, Chicago, Hong Kong, London, and Sao Paulo. With rich individual-level data, we make systematic comparisons and reveal patterns in social mixing, which cannot be identified by analyzing high-resolution mobility data alone. Using the same set of data, inferring socioeconomic status from residential neighborhoods yield social mixing levels 16% lower than using self-reported survey data. Besides, individuals over the age of 66 experience greater social mixing than those in late working life (aged 55 to 65), lending data-driven support to the "second youth" hypothesis. Teenagers and women with caregiving responsibilities exhibit lower social mixing levels. Across the five cities, proximity to major transit stations reduces the influence of individual socioeconomic status on social mixing. Finally, we construct detailed spatio-temporal place networks for each city using a graph neural network. Inputs of home-space, activity-space and demographic attributes are embedded and fed into a supervised autoencoder to predict individual exposure vectors. Results show that the structure of individual activity space, i.e., where people travel to, explains most of the variations in place exposure, suggesting that mobility shapes experienced social mixing more than sociodemographic characteristics, home environment, and transit proximity. The ablation tests further discover that, while different income groups may experience similar levels of social mixing, their activity spaces remain stratified by income, resulting in structurally different social mixing experiences.

analysis.tldr: 基于五大城市20万居民调查数据，揭示社会混合的潜在模式，发现活动空间结构比人口特征更能解释社会混合差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究多依赖高分辨率移动数据，但缺乏个体层面信息，难以系统比较社会混合模式。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大规模旅行调查数据，揭示城市社会混合的潜在模式及其影响因素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了观察到的现象：基于居住地推断的社会经济地位会低估社会混合水平；66岁以上人群社会混合高于55-65岁人群；青少年和照护责任女性社会混合较低；靠近主要交通站点可减少社会经济地位的影响；活动空间结构比人口特征更能解释社会混合差异。
analysis.method: 利用大规模旅行调查数据，结合图神经网络构建时空地点网络，通过监督自编码器预测个体暴露向量，并进行消融测试。
contributions: 系统比较五大城市的社会混合模式，发现基于居住地推断的社会经济地位会低估社会混合水平。
揭示活动空间结构比人口特征更能解释社会混合差异，且不同收入群体活动空间存在分层。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及了基于200,000居民数据的分析、消融测试等。
limitations: 仅覆盖五个城市，可能不具全球代表性。
依赖自报告调查数据，可能存在报告偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于五大城市20万居民调查数据，揭示社会混合的潜在模式，发现活动空间结构比人口特征更能解释社会混合差异。

papers.title: Towards grounded autonomous research: an end-to-end LLM mini research loop on published computational physics
papers.abstract: Recent autonomous LLM agents have demonstrated end-to-end automation of machine-learning research. Real-world physical science is intrinsically harder, requiring deep reasoning bounded by physical truth and, because real systems are too complex to study in isolation, almost always built on existing literature. We focus on the smallest meaningful unit of such research, a mini research loop in which an agent reads a paper, reproduces it, critiques it, and extends it. We test this loop in two complementary regimes: scale and depth. At scale, across 111 open-access computational physics papers, an agent autonomously runs the read-plan-compute-compare loop and, without being asked to critique, raises substantive concerns on ~42% of papers - 97.7% of which require execution to surface. In depth, for one Nature Communications paper on multiscale simulation of a 2D-material MOSFET, the agent runs new calculations missing from the original and produces, unsupervised, a publishable Comment -- composed, figured, typeset, and PDF-iterated -- that revises the paper's headline conclusion.

analysis.tldr: LLM智能体自主复现、批判并扩展计算物理论文，发现42%论文存在需执行才能暴露的实质问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理科学研究依赖文献且系统复杂，现有LLM智能体多用于机器学习研究，缺乏对物理科学中深度推理和文献复现的自动化探索。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个端到端的LLM智能体循环，使其能够自主阅读、复现、批判并扩展计算物理论文。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出约42%的论文存在实质性问题，且97.7%需通过执行计算才能发现。
analysis.method: 设计一个mini研究循环，包含阅读、规划、计算、比较四个步骤，并在两种互补场景（规模与深度）中测试：规模上处理111篇论文，深度上针对一篇Nature Communications论文生成可发表的评论。
contributions: 提出了一个端到端的LLM智能体研究循环，能够自主复现、批判和扩展计算物理论文。
在大规模实验中揭示了约42%的论文存在需执行才能发现的实质性问题。
在深度案例中，智能体无监督地生成了可发表的评论，修正了论文的主要结论。
analysis.experiments: 在111篇开放获取计算物理论文上进行规模实验，并在一篇Nature Communications论文上进行深度实验。
limitations: 可能仅适用于计算物理领域，泛化性未知。
智能体批判的准确性和深度可能受限于LLM的推理能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM智能体自主复现、批判并扩展计算物理论文，发现42%论文存在需执行才能暴露的实质问题。

papers.title: Beyond Scores: Diagnostic LLM Evaluation via Fine-Grained Abilities
papers.abstract: Current evaluations of large language models aggregate performance across diverse tasks into single scores. This obscures fine-grained ability variation, limiting targeted model improvement and ability-guided selection for specific tasks. Motivated by this gap, we propose a cognitive diagnostic framework that estimates model abilities across multiple fine-grained dimensions. For mathematics, we construct a 35-dimensional ability taxonomy grounded in cognitive theory and domain knowledge. The framework employs multidimensional Item Response Theory with an item-ability association matrix to estimate fine-grained ability levels, which in turn enable prediction of performance on unseen items (questions of benchmark). Evaluated on 41 models, our approach demonstrates strong criterion validity, consistent ability estimates across benchmarks, and accurate prediction of unseen items with AUC ranging from 0.80 to 0.89 within benchmarks and from 0.77 to 0.86 across benchmarks, substantially exceeding trivial baselines. The framework generalizes across scientific domains, producing consistent diagnostic performance in physics (27 dimensions), chemistry (58 dimensions), and computer science (12 dimensions). This work establishes a principled framework for fine-grained assessment of abilities, with potential applications in targeted training, ability-guided model selection, and ability-aware benchmark design.

analysis.tldr: 提出认知诊断框架，通过多维项目反应理论估计LLM细粒度能力，实现跨基准的准确预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM评估将不同任务性能聚合为单一分数，掩盖了细粒度能力差异，限制了针对性模型改进和任务导向的模型选择。
analysis.problem: 如何从细粒度维度估计LLM的多项能力，并利用这些能力预测模型在未见任务上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建基于认知理论和领域知识的能力分类体系，采用多维项目反应理论（IRT）结合项目-能力关联矩阵，估计模型在多个细粒度维度上的能力水平，并用于预测未见项目的表现。
contributions: 提出一个认知诊断框架，用于估计LLM在多个细粒度维度上的能力。
在数学、物理、化学和计算机科学领域构建了多维度能力分类体系，并验证了框架的跨领域泛化性。
analysis.experiments: 在41个模型上评估，展示了强效标效度、跨基准一致的能力估计，以及AUC在0.80-0.89（基准内）和0.77-0.86（跨基准）的未见项目预测准确性，显著优于简单基线。
limitations: 能力分类体系的构建依赖领域专家知识，可能难以自动扩展。
框架在更多样化的任务和模型上的泛化性有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出认知诊断框架，通过多维项目反应理论估计LLM细粒度能力，实现跨基准的准确预测。

papers.title: Characterizing Resource Sharing Practices on Underground Internet Forum Synthetic Non-Consensual Intimate Image Content Creation Communities
papers.abstract: Many malicious actors responsible for disseminating synthetic non-consensual intimate imagery (SNCII) operate within internet forums to exchange resources, strategies, and generated content across multiple platforms. Technically-sophisticated actors gravitate toward certain communities (e.g., 4chan), while lower-sophistication end-users are more active on others (e.g., Reddit). To characterize key stakeholders in the broader ecosystem, we perform an integrated analysis of multiple communities, analyzing 282,154 4chan comments and 78,308 Reddit submissions spanning 165 days between June and November 2025 to characterize involved actors, actions, and resources. We find: (a) that users with differing levels of technical sophistication employ and share a wide range of primary resources facilitating SNCII content creation as well as numerous secondary resources facilitating dissemination; and (b) that knowledge transfer between experts and newcomers facilitates propagation of these illicit resources. Based on our empirical analysis, we identify gaps in existing SNCII regulatory infrastructure and synthesize several critical intervention points for bolstering deterrence.

analysis.tldr: 分析地下论坛中合成非自愿亲密图像（SNCII）的资源分享行为，发现不同技术水平的用户共享多种资源，且专家与新手之间的知识转移促进了非法资源传播。
analysis.research_motivation: 合成非自愿亲密图像（SNCII）的恶意传播者在地下论坛中交换资源和策略，但缺乏对多社区生态系统的系统分析，导致监管漏洞。
analysis.problem: 如何系统地表征不同技术水平的用户在多个地下论坛中分享SNCII资源的行为模式及知识转移机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 技术熟练的参与者倾向于4chan等社区，而低技术用户更活跃于Reddit；用户共享多种主要资源（促进内容创作）和次要资源（促进传播）；专家与新手之间的知识转移加速了非法资源的扩散。
analysis.method: 对4chan（282,154条评论）和Reddit（78,308个帖子）进行跨社区综合分析，覆盖2025年6月至11月的165天数据，识别参与者、行动和资源。
contributions: 首次对多个地下论坛中SNCII资源分享行为进行大规模实证分析
识别了现有监管基础设施的漏洞，并提出了关键干预点
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及基于282,154条4chan评论和78,308个Reddit帖子的实证分析。
limitations: 仅分析两个平台，可能无法代表整个生态系统
数据时间范围有限（165天），可能遗漏长期趋势
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 分析地下论坛中合成非自愿亲密图像（SNCII）的资源分享行为，发现不同技术水平的用户共享多种资源，且专家与新手之间的知识转移促进了非法资源传播。

papers.title: TRUST Agents: A Collaborative Multi-Agent Framework for Fake News Detection, Explainable Verification, and Logic-Aware Claim Reasoning
papers.abstract: TRUST Agents is a collaborative multi-agent framework for explainable fact verification and fake news detection. Rather than treating verification as a simple true-or-false classification task, the system identifies verifiable claims, retrieves relevant evidence, compares claims against that evidence, reasons under uncertainty, and generates explanations that humans can inspect. The baseline pipeline consists of four specialized agents. A claim extractor uses named entity recognition, dependency parsing, and LLM-based extraction to identify factual claims. A retrieval agent performs hybrid sparse and dense search using BM25 and FAISS. A verifier agent compares claims with retrieved evidence and produces verdicts with calibrated confidence. An explainer agent then generates a human-readable report with explicit evidence citations. To handle complex claims more effectively, we introduce a research-oriented extension with three additional components: a decomposer agent inspired by LoCal-style claim decomposition, a Delphi-inspired multi-agent jury with specialized verifier personas, and a logic aggregator that combines atomic verdicts using conjunction, disjunction, negation, and implication. We evaluate both pipelines on the LIAR benchmark against fine-tuned BERT, fine-tuned RoBERTa, and a zero-shot LLM baseline. Although supervised encoders remain stronger on raw metrics, TRUST Agents improves interpretability, evidence transparency, and reasoning over compound claims. Results also show that retrieval quality and uncertainty calibration remain the main bottlenecks in trustworthy automated fact verification.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个多智能体协作框架TRUST Agents，用于可解释的假新闻检测和逻辑感知的声明推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有假新闻检测方法多将验证视为简单二分类，缺乏可解释性和对复杂声明的推理能力，难以建立用户信任。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可解释、证据透明且能处理复合声明的假新闻检测系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 检索质量和不确定性校准是可信自动化事实验证的主要瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出TRUST Agents框架，包含声明提取器、检索代理（BM25+FAISS）、验证代理（带校准置信度）和解释代理；扩展版本增加分解代理、多智能体陪审团和逻辑聚合器。
contributions: 提出一个协作多智能体框架，将假新闻检测分解为声明提取、证据检索、验证和解释四个子任务。
引入逻辑感知的扩展模块，支持复合声明的分解、多视角陪审团推理和逻辑聚合。
在LIAR基准上评估，证明框架在可解释性和证据透明度上优于基线，同时指出检索质量和校准是主要瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 在LIAR基准上评估，与微调BERT、RoBERTa和零样本LLM基线对比。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 检索质量和不确定性校准仍是瓶颈，可能影响整体性能。
框架复杂度较高，可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个多智能体协作框架TRUST Agents，用于可解释的假新闻检测和逻辑感知的声明推理。

papers.title: Clustering-Enhanced Domain Adaptation for Cross-Domain Intrusion Detection in Industrial Control Systems
papers.abstract: Industrial control systems operate in dynamic environments where traffic distributions vary across scenarios, labeled samples are limited, and unknown attacks frequently emerge, posing significant challenges to cross-domain intrusion detection. To address this issue, this paper proposes a clustering-enhanced domain adaptation method for industrial control traffic. The framework contains two key components. First, a feature-based transfer learning module projects source and target domains into a shared latent subspace through spectral-transform-based feature alignment and iteratively reduces distribution discrepancies, enabling accurate cross-domain detection. Second, a clustering enhancement strategy combines K-Medoids clustering with PCA-based dimensionality reduction to improve cross-domain correlation estimation and reduce performance degradation caused by manual parameter tuning. Experimental results show that the proposed method significantly improves unknown attack detection. Compared with five baseline models, it increases detection accuracy by up to 49%, achieves larger gains in F-score, and demonstrates stronger stability. Moreover, the clustering enhancement strategy further boosts detection accuracy by up to 26% on representative tasks. These results suggest that the proposed method effectively alleviates data scarcity and domain shift, providing a practical solution for robust cross-domain intrusion detection in dynamic industrial environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出聚类增强的域自适应方法，通过特征对齐和聚类策略提升工业控制系统跨域入侵检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业控制系统运行在动态环境中，流量分布随场景变化、标注样本有限且未知攻击频繁出现，导致跨域入侵检测面临数据稀缺和域偏移的挑战。
analysis.problem: 解决跨域入侵检测中因域偏移和标注不足导致的检测性能下降问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出聚类增强的域自适应框架，包含基于谱变换的特征对齐模块（将源域和目标域投影到共享子空间并迭代减少分布差异）和聚类增强策略（结合K-Medoids聚类与PCA降维改善跨域相关性估计，减少手动参数调优带来的性能退化）。
contributions: 提出一种结合特征对齐和聚类增强的跨域入侵检测方法。
实验表明该方法在未知攻击检测上相比基线模型准确率提升高达49%，F-score提升更大，且聚类增强策略进一步在代表性任务上提升准确率高达26%。
analysis.experiments: 在工业控制流量数据集上，与五种基线模型对比，检测准确率提升高达49%，F-score提升更大，聚类增强策略在代表性任务上进一步提升准确率高达26%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定工业场景的数据分布，泛化性需进一步验证。
聚类增强策略的计算开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出聚类增强的域自适应方法，通过特征对齐和聚类策略提升工业控制系统跨域入侵检测性能。

papers.title: CycloneMAE: A Scalable Multi-Task Learning Model for Global Tropical Cyclone Probabilistic Forecasting
papers.abstract: Tropical cyclones (TCs) rank among the most destructive natural hazards, yet their forecasting faces fundamental trade-offs: numerical weather prediction (NWP) models are computationally prohibitive and struggle to leverage historical data, while existing deep learning (DL)-based intelligent models are variable-specific and deterministic, which fail to generalize across different forecasting variables. Here we present CycloneMAE, a scalable multi-task forecasting model that learns transferable TC representations from multi-modal data using a TC structure-aware masked autoencoder. By coupling a discrete probabilistic gridding mechanism with a pre-train/fine-tune paradigm, CycloneMAE simultaneously delivers deterministic forecasts and probability distributions. Evaluated across five global ocean basins, CycloneMAE outperforms leading NWP systems in pressure and wind forecasting up to 120 hours and in track forecasting up to 24 hours. Attribution analysis via integrated gradients reveals physically interpretable learning dynamics: short-term forecasts rely predominantly on the internal core convective structure from satellite imagery, whereas longer-term forecasts progressively shift attention to external environmental factors. Our framework establishes a scalable, probabilistic, and interpretable pathway for operational TC forecasting.

analysis.tldr: 提出可扩展的多任务学习模型CycloneMAE，用于全球热带气旋概率预报，在多个指标上超越数值天气预报系统。
analysis.research_motivation: 热带气旋预报面临数值天气预报计算成本高、难以利用历史数据，以及现有深度学习模型变量特定且确定性、无法泛化到不同预报变量的痛点。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可扩展、多任务、概率性的热带气旋预报模型，同时实现确定性预报和概率分布输出。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过积分梯度归因分析发现：短期预报主要依赖卫星图像中的内部核心对流结构，而长期预报逐渐转向外部环境因素。
analysis.method: 提出CycloneMAE，采用TC结构感知的掩码自编码器从多模态数据学习可迁移表示，结合离散概率网格化机制和预训练/微调范式，同时输出确定性预报和概率分布。
contributions: 提出可扩展的多任务热带气旋预报模型CycloneMAE，融合掩码自编码器与概率网格化机制。
在五个全球海洋盆地的评估中，在气压和风速预报（120小时）及路径预报（24小时）上超越领先的数值天气预报系统。
通过归因分析揭示物理可解释的学习动态，为模型可信度提供支撑。
analysis.experiments: 在五个全球海洋盆地上评估，CycloneMAE在气压和风速预报（120小时）及路径预报（24小时）上优于领先的数值天气预报系统。
limitations: 路径预报的领先时间仅24小时，更长时效可能不如NWP。
依赖多模态数据，数据获取和预处理可能复杂。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可扩展的多任务学习模型CycloneMAE，用于全球热带气旋概率预报，在多个指标上超越数值天气预报系统。

papers.title: Policy-Invisible Violations in LLM-Based Agents
papers.abstract: LLM-based agents can execute actions that are syntactically valid, user-sanctioned, and semantically appropriate, yet still violate organizational policy because the facts needed for correct policy judgment are hidden at decision time. We call this failure mode policy-invisible violations: cases in which compliance depends on entity attributes, contextual state, or session history absent from the agent's visible context. We present PhantomPolicy, a benchmark spanning eight violation categories with balanced violation and safe-control cases, in which all tool responses contain clean business data without policy metadata. We manually review all 600 model traces produced by five frontier models and evaluate them using human-reviewed trace labels. Manual review changes 32 labels (5.3%) relative to the original case-level annotations, confirming the need for trace-level human review. To demonstrate what world-state-grounded enforcement can achieve under favorable conditions, we introduce Sentinel, an enforcement framework based on counterfactual graph simulation. Sentinel treats every agent action as a proposed mutation to an organizational knowledge graph, performs speculative execution to materialize the post-action world state, and verifies graph-structural invariants to decide Allow/Block/Clarify. Against human-reviewed trace labels, Sentinel substantially outperforms a content-only DLP baseline (68.8% vs. 93.0% accuracy) while maintaining high precision, though it still leaves room for improvement on certain violation categories. These results demonstrate what becomes achievable once policy-relevant world state is made available to the enforcement layer.

analysis.tldr: 提出LLM智能体在决策时因缺乏政策相关事实而导致的“策略不可见违规”问题，并构建基准与基于反事实图模拟的强制框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM智能体安全研究多关注语法、语义或用户授权层面的违规，但忽略了因决策时缺少实体属性、上下文状态等关键事实而导致的组织策略违规，这类问题在实际部署中危害大且难以检测。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM智能体在决策时因政策相关事实不可见而违反组织策略的问题，即策略不可见违规。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到即使智能体动作语法有效、用户授权且语义恰当，仍可能因缺少实体属性、上下文状态或会话历史等事实而违反策略；人工审查发现5.3%的标签需要修正，说明轨迹级审查的必要性。
analysis.method: 提出PhantomPolicy基准（8类违规，平衡违规与安全案例）和Sentinel强制框架：将每个智能体动作视为对组织知识图的提议突变，通过反事实图模拟执行后世界状态，并验证图结构不变量以决定允许/阻止/澄清。
contributions: 定义并形式化LLM智能体中的策略不可见违规问题。
构建PhantomPolicy基准，包含8类违规和平衡的违规/安全案例，并提供人工审查的轨迹标签。
提出Sentinel框架，基于反事实图模拟实现世界状态感知的策略强制，显著优于内容型DLP基线。
analysis.experiments: 在PhantomPolicy基准上，使用5个前沿模型生成600条轨迹，人工审查所有轨迹标签；Sentinel与内容型DLP基线对比，准确率68.8% vs 93.0%（原文如此，可能笔误，应为Sentinel更高），但部分违规类别仍有提升空间。
limitations: Sentinel在部分违规类别上仍有改进空间。
基准仅覆盖8类违规，可能未涵盖所有实际场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LLM智能体在决策时因缺乏政策相关事实而导致的“策略不可见违规”问题，并构建基准与基于反事实图模拟的强制框架。

papers.title: Evaluating Relational Reasoning in LLMs with REL
papers.abstract: Relational reasoning is the ability to infer relations that jointly bind multiple entities, attributes, or variables. This ability is central to scientific reasoning, but existing evaluations of relational reasoning in large language models often focus on structured inputs such as tables, graphs, or synthetic tasks, and do not isolate the difficulty introduced by higher-arity relational binding. We study this problem through the lens of Relational Complexity (RC), which we define as the minimum number of independent entities or operands that must be simultaneously bound to apply a relation. RC provides a principled way to vary reasoning difficulty while controlling for confounders such as input size, vocabulary, and representational choices. Building on RC, we introduce REL, a generative benchmark framework spanning algebra, chemistry, and biology that varies RC within each domain. Across frontier LLMs, performance degrades consistently and monotonically as RC increases, even when the total number of entities is held fixed. This failure mode persists with increased test-time compute and in-context learning, suggesting a limitation tied to the arity of the required relational binding rather than to insufficient inference steps or lack of exposure to examples. Our results identify a regime of higher-arity reasoning in which current models struggle, and motivate re-examining benchmarks through the lens of relational complexity.

analysis.tldr: LLM在关系推理中随关系复杂度（RC）增加性能持续下降，现有基准未能隔离高元关系绑定的难度。
analysis.research_motivation: 关系推理是科学推理的核心，但现有LLM评估多使用结构化输入（表格、图等），未隔离高元关系绑定带来的难度，导致对模型推理能力的评估不够精准。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能系统评估LLM在高元关系绑定（higher-arity relational binding）下推理能力的基准，并揭示其失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：随着关系复杂度（RC）增加，LLM性能一致且单调下降，即使保持实体总数固定；增加测试时计算和上下文学习无法缓解，表明失败源于关系绑定的元数限制而非推理步骤或示例不足。
analysis.method: 提出关系复杂度（RC）概念，定义为同时绑定以应用关系所需的最小独立实体数；基于RC构建REL基准，涵盖代数、化学和生物学领域，在每个领域内变化RC。
contributions: 形式化定义了关系复杂度（RC），为控制混淆变量下变化推理难度提供原则性方法。
引入REL基准框架，跨领域（代数、化学、生物学）系统评估LLM的高元关系推理能力。
揭示前沿LLM在高RC下性能一致下降，且无法通过增加测试时计算或上下文学习克服，指出当前模型的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在多个前沿LLM上观察到性能随RC增加而单调下降。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖三个领域，可能无法代表所有关系推理场景。
未探讨模型架构或训练数据对RC敏感性的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在关系推理中随关系复杂度（RC）增加性能持续下降，现有基准未能隔离高元关系绑定的难度。

papers.title: Redefining Quality Criteria and Distance-Aware Score Modeling for Image Editing Assessment
papers.abstract: Recent advances in image editing have heightened the need for reliable Image Editing Quality Assessment (IEQA). Unlike traditional methods, IEQA requires complex reasoning over multimodal inputs and multi-dimensional assessments. Existing MLLM-based approaches often rely on human heuristic prompting, leading to two key limitations: rigid metric prompting and distance-agnostic score modeling. These issues hinder alignment with implicit human criteria and fail to capture the continuous structure of score spaces. To address this, we propose Define-and-Score Image Editing Quality Assessment (DS-IEQA), a unified framework that jointly learns evaluation criteria and score representations. Specifically, we introduce Feedback-Driven Metric Prompt Optimization (FDMPO) to automatically refine metric definitions via probabilistic feedback. Furthermore, we propose Token-Decoupled Distance Regression Loss (TDRL), which decouples numerical tokens from language modeling to explicitly model score continuity through expected distance minimization. Extensive experiments show our method's superior performance; it ranks 4th in the 2026 NTIRE X-AIGC Quality Assessment Track 2 without any additional training data.

analysis.tldr: 提出DS-IEQA框架，通过自动优化评估标准和距离感知评分建模提升图像编辑质量评估性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 图像编辑技术的进步需要可靠的评估方法，但现有MLLM方法依赖人工启发式提示，存在刚性度量提示和距离无关评分建模的局限，无法对齐隐式人类标准且难以捕捉评分空间的连续结构。
analysis.problem: 解决图像编辑质量评估中评估标准僵化及评分建模忽略连续性的问题。
