analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有MLLM方法存在两个关键局限：刚性度量提示（rigid metric prompting）和距离无关评分建模（distance-agnostic score modeling），导致与隐式人类标准对齐不足且无法捕捉评分空间的连续结构。
analysis.method: 提出DS-IEQA框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 反馈驱动度量提示优化（FDMPO），通过概率反馈自动优化度量定义；2) 令牌解耦距离回归损失（TDRL），将数值令牌与语言建模解耦，通过期望距离最小化显式建模评分连续性。
contributions: 提出DS-IEQA统一框架，联合学习评估标准和评分表示。
设计FDMPO自动优化度量定义，减少人工启发式依赖。
提出TDRL损失函数，显式建模评分空间的连续性。
analysis.experiments: 在2026 NTIRE X-AIGC质量评估Track 2上排名第4，且未使用额外训练数据。
limitations: 可能依赖特定MLLM架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
未在更多样化的编辑类型或真实用户场景中测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DS-IEQA框架，通过自动优化评估标准和距离感知评分建模提升图像编辑质量评估性能。

papers.title: Fully Homomorphic Encryption on Llama 3 model for privacy preserving LLM inference
papers.abstract: The applications of Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) and their intersections with data-driven fields, such as healthcare, finance, transportation, and information security, have led to significant improvements in service efficiency and low latency. However, this synergy raises serious concerns regarding the security of large language models (LLMs) and their potential impact on the privacy of companies and users' data. Many technology companies that incorporate LLMs in their services with a certain level of command and control bear a risk of data exposure and secret divulgence caused by insecure LLM pipelines, making them vulnerable to multiple attacks such as data poisoning, prompt injection, and model theft. Although several security techniques (input/output sanitization, decentralized learning, access control management, and encryption) were implemented to reduce this risk, there is still an imminent risk of quantum computing attacks, which are expected to break existing encryption algorithms, hence, retrieving secret keys, encrypted sensitive data, and decrypting encrypted models. In this extensive work, we integrate the Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) based Lattice-based Homomorphic Encryption (HE) main functions in the LLM's inference pipeline to secure some of its layers against data privacy attacks. We modify the inference pipeline of the transformer architecture for the LLAMA-3 model while injecting the main homomorphic encryption operations provided by the concrete-ml library. We demonstrate high text generation accuracies (up to 98%) with reasonable latencies (237 ms) on an i9 CPU, reaching up to 80 tokens per second, which proves the feasibility and validity of our work while running a FHE-secured LLAMA-3 inference model. Further experiments and analysis are discussed to justify models' text generation latencies and behaviours.

analysis.tldr: 将全同态加密集成到Llama 3推理管线中，在i9 CPU上实现高达98%的文本生成准确率和80 tokens/s的吞吐量。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在医疗、金融等数据驱动领域的应用面临隐私泄露风险，现有安全技术（如输入/输出清洗、去中心化学习）无法抵御量子计算攻击，亟需后量子密码学方案保护模型推理过程中的数据隐私。
analysis.problem: 如何在LLM推理管线中集成全同态加密（FHE）以保护模型层免受数据隐私攻击，同时保持可接受的推理速度和准确率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于后量子密码学的格基同态加密，将concrete-ml库提供的同态加密操作注入LLAMA-3模型的Transformer推理管线中，对部分层进行加密保护。
contributions: 首次将全同态加密集成到LLAMA-3推理管线中，实现隐私保护推理。
在i9 CPU上验证了FHE-secured LLAMA-3的可行性，达到98%准确率和80 tokens/s的吞吐量。
analysis.experiments: 在i9 CPU上测试文本生成准确率（高达98%）和延迟（237 ms），吞吐量达80 tokens/s，并讨论了延迟和模型行为。
limitations: 实验仅在CPU上进行，未评估GPU或专用硬件上的性能。
仅对部分层进行加密，未分析全模型加密的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将全同态加密集成到Llama 3推理管线中，在i9 CPU上实现高达98%的文本生成准确率和80 tokens/s的吞吐量。

papers.title: EMBER: Autonomous Cognitive Behaviour from Learned Spiking Neural Network Dynamics in a Hybrid LLM Architecture
papers.abstract: We present (Experience-Modulated Biologically-inspired Emergent Reasoning), a hybrid cognitive architecture that reorganises the relationship between large language models (LLMs) and memory: rather than augmenting an LLM with retrieval tools, we place the LLM as a replaceable reasoning engine within a persistent, biologically-grounded associative substrate. The architecture centres on a 220,000-neuron spiking neural network (SNN) with spike-timing-dependent plasticity (STDP), four-layer hierarchical organisation (sensory/concept/category/meta-pattern), inhibitory E/I balance, and reward-modulated learning. Text embeddings are encoded into the SNN via a novel z-score standardised top-k population code that is dimension-independent by construction, achieving 82.2\% discrimination retention across embedding dimensionalities. We show that STDP lateral propagation during idle operation can trigger and shape LLM actions without external prompting or scripted triggers: the SNN determines when to act and what associations to surface, while the LLM selects the action type and generates content. In one instance, the system autonomously initiated contact with a user after learned person-topic associations fired laterally during an 8-hour idle period. From a clean start with zero learned weights, the first SNN-triggered action occurred after only 7 conversational exchanges (14 messages).

analysis.tldr: 提出一种混合认知架构，将LLM作为可替换推理引擎嵌入持久生物启发式SNN记忆基质，实现无需外部提示的自主认知行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM增强检索的方法将记忆视为外部工具，缺乏生物启发的持久关联记忆和自主触发能力，难以实现类人认知行为。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种混合架构，使LLM能够嵌入持久、生物启发的关联记忆基质，并实现无需外部提示的自主行为触发。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：STDP侧向传播在空闲操作期间可触发并塑造LLM动作，无需外部提示或脚本触发；系统在8小时空闲后自主发起与用户的联系；从零权重开始，仅7次对话交换（14条消息）后即出现首次SNN触发动作。
analysis.method: 提出EMBER架构：以220,000神经元SNN为核心，具有STDP、四层层次组织（感觉/概念/类别/元模式）、抑制性E/I平衡和奖励调制学习；文本嵌入通过z-score标准化的top-k群体编码（维度无关）映射到SNN；LLM作为可替换推理引擎，由SNN决定何时行动及关联内容，LLM选择动作类型并生成内容。
contributions: 提出一种混合认知架构，将LLM重新定位为持久生物启发式SNN基质中的可替换推理引擎。
设计维度无关的z-score标准化top-k群体编码，实现82.2%的判别保留率。
展示SNN侧向传播可自主触发LLM动作，无需外部提示，并在8小时空闲后实现自主用户联系。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及82.2%判别保留率和7次对话交换后首次SNN触发动作。
limitations: 仅报告单一实例的自主行为，缺乏系统化评估和泛化性验证。
未与其他混合架构或基线方法进行定量比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种混合认知架构，将LLM作为可替换推理引擎嵌入持久生物启发式SNN记忆基质，实现无需外部提示的自主认知行为。

papers.title: Nucleus-Image: Sparse MoE for Image Generation
papers.abstract: We present Nucleus-Image, a text-to-image generation model that establishes a new Pareto frontier in quality-versus-efficiency by matching or exceeding leading models on GenEval, DPG-Bench, and OneIG-Bench while activating only approximately 2B parameters per forward pass. Nucleus-Image employs a sparse mixture-of-experts (MoE) diffusion transformer architecture with Expert-Choice Routing that scales total model capacity to 17B parameters across 64 routed experts per layer. We adopt a streamlined architecture optimized for inference efficiency by excluding text tokens from the transformer backbone entirely and using joint attention that enables text KV sharing across timesteps. To improve routing stability when using timestep modulation, we introduce a decoupled routing design that separates timestep-aware expert assignment from timestep-conditioned expert computation. We construct a large-scale training corpus of 1.5B high-quality training pairs spanning 700M unique images through multi-stage filtering, deduplication, aesthetic tiering, and caption curation. Training follows a progressive resolution curriculum (256 to 512 to 1024) with multi-aspect-ratio bucketing at every stage, coupled with progressive sparsification of the expert capacity factor. We adopt the Muon optimizer and share our parameter grouping recipe tailored for diffusion models with timestep modulation. Nucleus-Image demonstrates that sparse MoE scaling is a highly effective path to high-quality image generation, reaching the performance of models with significantly larger active parameter budgets at a fraction of the inference cost. These results are achieved without post-training optimization of any kind: no reinforcement learning, no direct preference optimization, and no human preference tuning. We release the training recipe, making Nucleus-Image the first fully open-source MoE diffusion model at this quality.

analysis.tldr: Nucleus-Image 通过稀疏 MoE 扩散 Transformer 架构，以约 2B 激活参数实现与更大模型相当或更优的文本到图像生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型在质量与效率之间难以兼顾，大模型推理成本高，而小模型质量不足。稀疏 MoE 有望在保持高质量的同时降低推理成本，但此前在扩散模型中的应用尚不充分。
analysis.problem: 如何设计稀疏 MoE 扩散 Transformer 架构，在激活少量参数的情况下实现与大规模模型相当或更优的图像生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用 Expert-Choice Routing 的稀疏 MoE 扩散 Transformer，总参数 17B，每层 64 个专家，前向仅激活约 2B 参数；去除文本 token 以简化架构，使用联合注意力实现文本 KV 跨时间步共享；提出解耦路由设计分离时间步感知的专家分配与条件计算；构建 1.5B 高质量图文对训练集，采用渐进分辨率课程和多宽高比分桶训练，并逐步稀疏化专家容量因子；使用 Muon 优化器及针对扩散模型的参数分组策略。
contributions: 提出 Nucleus-Image，首个全开源的高质量稀疏 MoE 扩散模型，在 GenEval、DPG-Bench、OneIG-Bench 上匹配或超越领先模型，激活参数仅约 2B。
引入解耦路由设计，提升时间步调制下的路由稳定性。
公开训练配方，包括数据构建、课程学习、优化器配置等，促进可复现研究。
analysis.experiments: 在 GenEval、DPG-Bench、OneIG-Bench 上评估，与多个领先模型对比，Nucleus-Image 在质量-效率帕累托前沿上表现优异。
limitations: 仅验证了文本到图像生成任务，未涉及其他模态或视频生成。
模型规模较大（17B 总参数），训练资源需求可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Nucleus-Image 通过稀疏 MoE 扩散 Transformer 架构，以约 2B 激活参数实现与更大模型相当或更优的文本到图像生成质量。

papers.title: Development, Evaluation, and Deployment of a Multi-Agent System for Thoracic Tumor Board
papers.abstract: Tumor boards are multidisciplinary conferences dedicated to producing actionable patient care recommendations with live review of primary radiology and pathology data. Succinct patient case summaries are needed to drive efficient and accurate case discussions. We developed a manual AI-based workflow to generate patient summaries to display live at the Stanford Thoracic Tumor board. To improve on this manually intensive process, we developed several automated AI chart summarization methods and evaluated them against physician gold standard summaries and fact-based scoring rubrics. We report these comparative evaluations as well as our deployment of the final state automated AI chart summarization tool along with post-deployment monitoring. We also validate the use of an LLM as a judge evaluation strategy for fact-based scoring. This work is an example of integrating AI-based workflows into routine clinical practice.

analysis.tldr: 开发并部署了一个多智能体系统用于生成胸部肿瘤委员会的患者摘要，并进行了评估与部署后监测。
analysis.research_motivation: 肿瘤委员会需要高效准确的病例摘要来驱动讨论，但手动生成摘要耗时且费力，因此需要自动化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化生成准确、事实性的患者摘要以支持肿瘤委员会实时讨论。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发了多种自动化AI图表摘要方法，包括多智能体系统，并与医生金标准摘要和基于事实的评分标准进行比较，最终部署并监测。
contributions: 开发并比较了多种自动化AI图表摘要方法
部署了最终状态的自动化AI图表摘要工具并进行监测
验证了使用LLM作为评判者进行基于事实的评分策略
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对胸部肿瘤委员会场景，泛化性未知
LLM作为评判者的可靠性可能有限
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 开发并部署了一个多智能体系统用于生成胸部肿瘤委员会的患者摘要，并进行了评估与部署后监测。

papers.title: VidTAG: Temporally Aligned Video to GPS Geolocalization with Denoising Sequence Prediction at a Global Scale
papers.abstract: The task of video geolocalization aims to determine the precise GPS coordinates of a video's origin and map its trajectory; with applications in forensics, social media, and exploration. Existing classification-based approaches operate at a coarse city-level granularity and fail to capture fine-grained details, while image retrieval methods are impractical on a global scale due to the need for extensive image galleries which are infeasible to compile. Comparatively, constructing a gallery of GPS coordinates is straightforward and inexpensive. We propose VidTAG, a dual-encoder framework that performs frame-to-GPS retrieval using both self-supervised and language-aligned features. To address temporal inconsistencies in video predictions, we introduce the TempGeo module, which aligns frame embeddings, and the GeoRefiner module, an encoder-decoder architecture that refines GPS features using the aligned frame embeddings. Evaluations on Mapillary (MSLS) and GAMa datasets demonstrate our model's ability to generate temporally consistent trajectories and outperform baselines, achieving a 20% improvement at the 1 km threshold over GeoCLIP. We also beat current State-of-the-Art by 25% on global coarse grained video geolocalization (CityGuessr68k). Our approach enables fine-grained video geolocalization and lays a strong foundation for future research. More details on the project webpage: https://parthpk.github.io/vidtag_webpage/

analysis.tldr: 提出VidTAG双编码器框架，通过自监督和语言对齐特征实现视频到GPS的细粒度地理定位，并引入时序对齐与特征精炼模块提升轨迹一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频地理定位方法要么粗粒度（城市级），要么依赖不可行的全球图像库，而GPS坐标库易于构建，因此需要一种高效且细粒度的视频地理定位方法。
analysis.problem: 如何实现全球尺度下视频的细粒度GPS地理定位并生成时序一致的轨迹。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视频预测存在时序不一致问题，导致轨迹不连贯。
analysis.method: VidTAG双编码器框架，包含自监督和语言对齐特征进行帧到GPS检索；TempGeo模块对齐帧嵌入，GeoRefiner模块（编码器-解码器）利用对齐帧嵌入精炼GPS特征。
contributions: 提出VidTAG框架，实现全球尺度下视频到GPS的细粒度地理定位。
引入TempGeo和GeoRefiner模块，解决时序不一致问题并提升轨迹质量。
analysis.experiments: 在Mapillary (MSLS)和GAMa数据集上评估，VidTAG在1公里阈值下比GeoCLIP提升20%，在CityGuessr68k上比当前SOTA提升25%。
limitations: 可能依赖GPS坐标库的覆盖范围和质量。
对长视频或复杂场景的时序对齐能力未充分验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VidTAG双编码器框架，通过自监督和语言对齐特征实现视频到GPS的细粒度地理定位，并引入时序对齐与特征精炼模块提升轨迹一致性。

papers.title: Depth-Resolved Coral Reef Thermal Fields from Satellite SST and Sparse In-Situ Loggers Using Physics-Informed Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Satellite sea surface temperature (SST) products underpin global coral bleaching monitoring, yet they measure only the ocean skin. Corals inhabit depths from the shallows to beyond 20 metres, where temperatures can be 1-3°C cooler than the surface; applying satellite SST uniformly to all depths therefore overestimates subsurface thermal stress. We present a physics-informed neural network (PINN) that fuses NOAA Coral Reef Watch SST with sparse in-situ temperature loggers within the one-dimensional vertical heat equation, enforcing SST as a hard surface boundary condition and jointly learning effective thermal diffusivity (\k{appa}) and light attenuation (Kd). Validated across four Great Barrier Reef sites (30 holdout experiments), the PINN achieves 0.25-1.38°C RMSE at unseen depths. Under extreme sparsity (three training depths), the PINN maintains 0.27°C RMSE at the 5 metre holdout and 0.32°C at the 9.1 metre holdout, where statistical baselines collapse to >1.8°C; it outperforms a physics-only finite-difference baseline in 90% of experiments. Depth-resolved Degree Heating Day (DHD) profiles show that thermal stress attenuates with depth: at Davies Reef, DHD drops from 0.29 at the surface to zero by 10.7 metres, consistent with logger observations, while satellite DHD remains constant at 0.31 across all depths. However, the PINN underestimates absolute DHD at shallow depths because its smooth predictions attenuate the short-duration peaks that drive threshold exceedances; PINN DHD values should be interpreted as conservative lower bounds on depth-resolved stress. These results demonstrate that physics-constrained fusion of satellite SST with sparse loggers can extend bleaching assessment to the depth dimension using existing observational infrastructure.

analysis.tldr: 用物理信息神经网络融合卫星海表温度与稀疏原位记录器，实现珊瑚礁深度分辨热场重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 卫星海表温度仅测量海洋表层，而珊瑚栖息深度可达20米以上，其温度比表层低1-3°C，统一应用卫星SST会高估深层热应力，导致珊瑚白化监测不准确。
analysis.problem: 如何利用稀疏的原位温度记录器和卫星SST，重建深度分辨的珊瑚礁热场，以准确评估不同深度的热应力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 热应力随深度衰减：表层DHD为0.29，到10.7米处降为零，而卫星DHD在所有深度恒为0.31；PINN在浅层低估绝对DHD，因其平滑预测衰减了短时峰值。
analysis.method: 提出物理信息神经网络（PINN），融合NOAA珊瑚礁观察SST与稀疏原位温度记录器，嵌入一维垂直热方程，将SST作为硬表面边界条件，联合学习有效热扩散率（κ）和光衰减（Kd）。
contributions: 首次将PINN用于珊瑚礁深度分辨热场重建，融合卫星SST与稀疏原位数据。
在四个大堡礁站点验证，PINN在未观测深度RMSE为0.25-1.38°C，极端稀疏下仍优于统计基线和纯物理有限差分基线。
analysis.experiments: 在四个大堡礁站点进行30次留出实验，评估PINN在未观测深度的RMSE；极端稀疏实验（三个训练深度）中，PINN在5米留出点RMSE为0.27°C，9.1米为0.32°C，而统计基线超过1.8°C；PINN在90%实验中优于纯物理有限差分基线。
limitations: PINN在浅层低估绝对DHD，因其平滑预测衰减了短时峰值，DHD值应视为保守下界。
方法依赖稀疏原位记录器，可能不适用于无记录器的区域。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用物理信息神经网络融合卫星海表温度与稀疏原位记录器，实现珊瑚礁深度分辨热场重建。

papers.title: Domain-Specific Latent Representations Improve the Fidelity of Diffusion-Based Medical Image Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Latent diffusion models for medical image super-resolution universally inherit variational autoencoders designed for natural photographs. We show that this default choice, not the diffusion architecture, is the dominant constraint on reconstruction quality. In a controlled experiment holding all other pipeline components fixed, replacing the generic Stable Diffusion VAE with MedVAE, a domain-specific autoencoder pretrained on more than 1.6 million medical images, yields +2.91 to +3.29 dB PSNR improvement across knee MRI, brain MRI, and chest X-ray (n = 1,820; Cohen's d = 1.37 to 1.86, all p < 10^{-20}, Wilcoxon signed-rank). Wavelet decomposition localises the advantage to the finest spatial frequency bands encoding anatomically relevant fine structure. Ablations across inference schedules, prediction targets, and generative architectures confirm the gap is stable within plus or minus 0.15 dB, while hallucination rates remain comparable between methods (Cohen's h < 0.02 across all datasets), establishing that reconstruction fidelity and generative hallucination are governed by independent pipeline components. These results provide a practical screening criterion: autoencoder reconstruction quality, measurable without diffusion training, predicts downstream SR performance (R^2 = 0.67), suggesting that domain-specific VAE selection should precede diffusion architecture search. Code and trained model weights are publicly available at https://github.com/sebasmos/latent-sr.

analysis.tldr: 替换通用VAE为医学领域专用VAE即可显著提升扩散模型医学图像超分辨率的重建保真度，且幻觉率不变。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学图像超分辨率扩散模型直接沿用为自然图像设计的变分自编码器（VAE），可能成为重建质量的瓶颈，但此前未被系统验证。
analysis.problem: 验证并解决扩散模型医学图像超分辨率中，通用VAE对重建保真度的限制问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用VAE是重建质量的主要约束，而非扩散架构；领域专用VAE在精细空间频带（编码解剖细节）上优势明显；重建保真度与生成幻觉由独立组件控制。
analysis.method: 在固定扩散架构下，对比通用VAE（Stable Diffusion VAE）与领域专用VAE（MedVAE，基于160万医学图像预训练）对超分辨率性能的影响。
contributions: 发现并验证了通用VAE是扩散模型医学图像超分辨率重建质量的主要瓶颈。
提出领域专用VAE可显著提升PSNR（+2.91~+3.29 dB），且不增加幻觉率。
建立实用筛选准则：VAE重建质量（无需扩散训练即可测量）可预测下游超分辨率性能（R²=0.67）。
analysis.experiments: 在膝盖MRI、脑MRI和胸部X光三个数据集（n=1,820）上进行控制实验，使用PSNR、Cohen's d、Wilcoxon符号秩检验等指标，并进行了消融实验（推理调度、预测目标、生成架构）。
limitations: 仅验证了医学图像领域，通用性需进一步探索。
MedVAE的具体架构细节未在摘要中详述。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 替换通用VAE为医学领域专用VAE即可显著提升扩散模型医学图像超分辨率的重建保真度，且幻觉率不变。

papers.title: Some Theoretical Limitations of t-SNE
papers.abstract: t-SNE has gained popularity as a dimension reduction technique, especially for visualizing data. It is well-known that all dimension reduction techniques may lose important features of the data. We provide a mathematical framework for understanding this loss for t-SNE by establishing a number of results in different scenarios showing how important features of data are lost by using t-SNE.

analysis.tldr: 论文通过数学框架证明t-SNE在降维时可能丢失重要数据特征，并分析了不同场景下的局限性。
analysis.research_motivation: t-SNE作为流行的降维可视化工具，其数据特征丢失问题缺乏严格的数学分析。
analysis.problem: t-SNE在降维过程中如何以及为何会丢失数据的重要特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: t-SNE倾向于保留局部结构而忽略全局结构，导致高维数据中的关键模式（如聚类、拓扑）被扭曲或丢失。
analysis.main_method: 建立数学框架，通过理论证明和场景分析（如高斯混合、流形数据）揭示t-SNE的局限性。
analysis.key_experiments: 在合成和真实数据集上验证理论结果，展示t-SNE丢失聚类分离度、拓扑结构等特征的具体案例。
analysis.contributions: 首次为t-SNE的特征丢失提供严格数学证明，并分类不同场景下的失效模式。
analysis.limitations: 理论分析主要针对特定数据分布，未涵盖所有实际应用场景；未提出改进方法。

papers.title: Selecting Feature Interactions for Generalized Additive Models by Distilling Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Identifying meaningful feature interactions is a central challenge in building accurate and interpretable models for tabular data. Generalized additive models (GAMs) have shown great success at modeling tabular data, but often rely on heuristic procedures to select interactions, potentially missing higher-order or context-dependent effects. To meet this challenge, we propose TabDistill, a method that leverages tabular foundation models and post-hoc distillation methods. Our key intuition is that tabular foundation models implicitly learn rich, adaptive feature dependencies through large-scale representation learning. Given a dataset, TabDistill first fits a tabular foundation model to the dataset, and then applies a post-hoc interaction attribution method to extract salient feature interactions from it. We evaluate these interactions by then using them as terms in a GAM. Across tasks, we find that interactions identified by TabDistill lead to consistent improvements in downstream GAMs' predictive performance. Our results suggest that tabular foundation models can serve as effective, data-driven guides for interaction discovery, bridging high-capacity models and interpretable additive frameworks.

analysis.tldr: 提出 TabDistill 方法，利用表格基础模型蒸馏出特征交互，提升广义加性模型的预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 广义加性模型依赖启发式方法选择特征交互，可能遗漏高阶或上下文相关效应，需要更有效的数据驱动方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从表格基础模型中自动识别有意义的特征交互，以改进广义加性模型的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 表格基础模型通过大规模表示学习隐式学习到丰富的自适应特征依赖，可被蒸馏为显式交互。
analysis.main_method: 先拟合表格基础模型，再用事后交互归因方法提取显著特征交互，并将其作为项加入广义加性模型。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个任务上评估，TabDistill 识别的交互一致提升了下游广义加性模型的预测性能。
analysis.contributions: 提出利用表格基础模型作为交互发现的数据驱动指南，桥接高容量模型与可解释加性框架。
analysis.limitations: 依赖基础模型的质量和归因方法的准确性，可能受限于预训练数据的分布。

papers.title: Multi-Task LLM with LoRA Fine-Tuning for Automated Cancer Staging and Biomarker Extraction
papers.abstract: Pathology reports serve as the definitive record for breast cancer staging, yet their unstructured format impedes large-scale data curation. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer semantic reasoning, their deployment is often limited by high computational costs and hallucination risks. This study introduces a parameter-efficient, multi-task framework for automating the extraction of Tumor-Node-Metastasis (TNM) staging, histologic grade, and biomarkers. We fine-tune a Llama-3-8B-Instruct encoder using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) on a curated, expert-verified dataset of 10,677 reports. Unlike generative approaches, our architecture utilizes parallel classification heads to enforce consistent schema adherence. Experimental results demonstrate that the model achieves a Macro F1 score of 0.976, successfully resolving complex contextual ambiguities and heterogeneous reporting formats that challenge traditional extraction methods including rule-based natural language processing (NLP) pipelines, zero-shot LLMs, and single-task LLM baselines. The proposed adapter-efficient, multi-task architecture enables reliable, scalable pathology-derived cancer staging and biomarker profiling, with the potential to enhance clinical decision support and accelerate data-driven oncology research.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于LoRA微调的多任务LLM框架，从病理报告中自动提取癌症分期和生物标志物，Macro F1达0.976。
analysis.research_motivation: 病理报告非结构化格式阻碍大规模数据整理，现有方法计算成本高或存在幻觉风险。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、准确地从非结构化病理报告中自动提取TNM分期、组织学分级和生物标志物。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统规则NLP和零样本LLM难以处理复杂上下文歧义和异构报告格式，而单任务LLM基线性能不足。
analysis.main_method: 使用LoRA微调Llama-3-8B-Instruct编码器，并采用并行分类头架构实现多任务输出，确保模式一致性。
analysis.key_experiments: 在10,677份专家验证的病理报告数据集上评估，与规则NLP、零样本LLM和单任务LLM基线对比。
analysis.contributions: 提出参数高效的多任务框架，显著提升提取准确性和可扩展性，支持临床决策和肿瘤研究。
analysis.limitations: 依赖特定数据集和Llama模型，泛化性需进一步验证；未讨论罕见病例或低资源场景。

papers.title: AgentSPEX: An Agent SPecification and EXecution Language
papers.abstract: Language-model agent systems commonly rely on reactive prompting, in which a single instruction guides the model through an open-ended sequence of reasoning and tool-use steps, leaving control flow and intermediate state implicit and making agent behavior potentially difficult to control. Orchestration frameworks such as LangGraph, DSPy, and CrewAI impose greater structure through explicit workflow definitions, but tightly couple workflow logic with Python, making agents difficult to maintain and modify. In this paper, we introduce AgentSPEX, an Agent SPecification and EXecution Language for specifying LLM-agent workflows with explicit control flow and modular structure, along with a customizable agent harness. AgentSPEX supports typed steps, branching and loops, parallel execution, reusable submodules, and explicit state management, and these workflows execute within an agent harness that provides tool access, a sandboxed virtual environment, and support for checkpointing, verification, and logging. Furthermore, we provide a visual editor with synchronized graph and workflow views for authoring and inspection. We include ready-to-use agents for deep research and scientific research, and we evaluate AgentSPEX on 7 benchmarks. Finally, we show through a user study that AgentSPEX provides a more interpretable and accessible workflow-authoring paradigm than a popular existing agent framework.

analysis.tldr: 提出AgentSPEX语言，用于显式定义LLM代理工作流，支持控制流、模块化结构和可视化编辑，提升可解释性和可维护性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有代理系统依赖反应式提示或紧耦合Python框架，导致行为难以控制和维护。
analysis.problem: 代理工作流缺乏显式控制流和模块化结构，难以解释、修改和复用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 反应式提示隐式处理控制流和状态，而现有编排框架将逻辑与Python代码紧耦合，增加了维护成本。
analysis.main_method: 设计AgentSPEX语言，支持类型化步骤、分支循环、并行执行、可重用子模块和显式状态管理，并配套可定制代理框架和可视化编辑器。
analysis.key_experiments: 在7个基准上评估，并通过用户研究证明比现有框架更可解释和易用。
analysis.contributions: 提出一种新的代理工作流规范语言，结合显式控制流、模块化设计和可视化工具，显著提升可解释性和开发效率。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论语言表达能力上限或复杂任务下的性能开销，用户研究规模可能有限。

papers.title: When Less Latent Leads to Better Relay: Information-Preserving Compression for Latent Multi-Agent LLM Collaboration
papers.abstract: Communication in Large Language Model (LLM)-based multi-agent systems is moving beyond discrete tokens to preserve richer context. Recent work such as LatentMAS enables agents to exchange latent messages through full key-value (KV) caches. However, full KV relay incurs high memory and communication cost. We adapt eviction-style KV compression to this setting and introduce Orthogonal Backfill (OBF) to mitigate information loss from hard eviction. OBF injects a low-rank orthogonal residual from discarded KV states into the retained KV states. We evaluate proposed method against full KV relay on nine standard benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, coding, and knowledge-intensive QA. It achieves performance comparable to full KV relay while reducing communication cost by 79.8%--89.4%. OBF further improves the performance and achieves the best results on 7 of the 9 benchmarks. This suggests that more information does not necessarily lead to better communication; preserving the most useful information matters more. Our codebase is publicly available on https://github.com/markli404/When-Less-Latent-Leads-to-Better-Relay.

analysis.tldr: 提出正交回填（OBF）方法压缩多智能体LLM通信中的KV缓存，在降低79.8%-89.4%通信成本的同时保持甚至提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体LLM协作中，全KV缓存中继通信成本过高，需探索高效压缩方法。
analysis.problem: 全KV缓存中继在LLM多智能体系统中导致高内存和通信开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 保留更多信息不一定带来更好通信效果，保留最有用的信息更为关键。
analysis.main_method: 采用驱逐式KV压缩，并引入正交回填（OBF），将丢弃KV状态的低秩正交残差注入保留的KV状态。
analysis.key_experiments: 在数学推理、编程和知识密集型QA等9个标准基准上评估，与全KV中继对比。
analysis.contributions: 首次将驱逐式KV压缩适配到多智能体潜在通信场景，并提出OBF方法减少信息损失。
analysis.limitations: 未在更大规模模型或更复杂多智能体任务上验证，正交残差注入的泛化性待进一步探索。

papers.title: Concrete Jungle: Towards Concreteness Paved Contrastive Negative Mining for Compositional Understanding
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models demonstrate remarkable capabilities but often struggle with compositional reasoning, exhibiting vulnerabilities regarding word order and attribute binding. This limitation arises from a scarcity of informative samples needed to differentiate subtle semantic variations during contrastive pretraining. Although hard negative mining offers a promising remedy, existing methods lack explicit mechanisms to dictate which linguistic elements undergo modification. Instead of engineering generative architectures, this study establishes lexical concreteness as a fundamental determinant of negative sample efficacy. Modifying highly concrete terms generates more pronounced structural and visual discrepancies, providing a substantially stronger learning signal. Leveraging this principle, ConcretePlant is proposed to systematically isolate and manipulate perceptually grounded concepts. Analyses of the InfoNCE further reveals a severe gradient imbalance, where easily distinguishable pairs disproportionately overwhelm the optimization process and restrict the bandwidth available for nuanced learning. To resolve this degradation, the Cement loss is formulated utilizing a margin-based approach. By correlating psycholinguistic scores with sample difficulty, this objective dynamically calibrates the penalization applied to individual training pairs. Comprehensive evaluations substantiate these theoretical claims. The integrated framework, designated as Slipform, achieves state-of-the-art accuracy across diverse compositional evaluation benchmarks, general cross-modal retrieval, single and multi label linear probing.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于词汇具体性的对比负样本挖掘方法，结合动态边际损失，提升视觉语言模型的组合推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在组合推理上表现脆弱，缺乏有效机制生成信息丰富的负样本。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地生成高质量负样本以增强模型对词序和属性绑定的区分能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 修改高具体性词汇会产生更显著的结构和视觉差异，提供更强的学习信号；InfoNCE损失存在梯度不平衡问题。
analysis.main_method: 提出ConcretePlant方法，基于词汇具体性隔离和操作感知概念；设计Cement损失，利用心理语言学分数动态调整样本惩罚。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个组合推理基准、跨模态检索和线性探测任务上评估，Slipform框架达到最先进水平。
analysis.contributions: 首次将词汇具体性作为负样本质量的决定因素；提出动态边际损失解决梯度不平衡。
analysis.limitations: 依赖心理语言学分数库，可能限制泛化性；未探索其他语言属性对负样本的影响。

papers.title: Structure- and Stability-Preserving Learning of Port-Hamiltonian Systems
authors: Nam T. Nguyen and Truong X. Nghiem
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the problem of data-driven modeling of port-Hamiltonian systems while preserving their intrinsic Hamiltonian structure and stability properties. We propose a novel neural-network-based port-Hamiltonian modeling technique that relaxes the convexity constraint commonly imposed by neural network-based Hamiltonian approximations, thereby improving the expressiveness and generalization capability of the model. By removing this restriction, the proposed approach enables the use of more general non-convex Hamiltonian representations to enhance modeling flexibility and accuracy. Furthermore, the proposed method incorporates information about stable equilibria into the learning process, allowing the learned model to preserve the stability of multiple isolated equilibria rather than being restricted to a single equilibrium as in conventional methods. Two numerical experiments are conducted to validate the effectiveness of the proposed approach and demonstrate its ability to achieve more accurate structure- and stability-preserving learning of port-Hamiltonian systems compared with a baseline method.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种神经网络方法，在保持端口-哈密顿系统结构与稳定性的同时，放宽凸性约束以提升建模精度和泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于神经网络的哈密顿系统建模常强制凸性约束，限制了模型表达力；且难以同时保持多个孤立平衡点的稳定性。
analysis.problem: 如何在数据驱动建模中同时保持端口-哈密顿系统的哈密顿结构和多平衡点稳定性，并提升模型精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 强制凸性约束的哈密顿近似会降低模型灵活性和泛化能力，而传统方法仅能保持单一平衡点的稳定性。
analysis.main_method: 提出一种非凸哈密顿表示的神经网络架构，并引入稳定平衡点信息作为学习约束，实现结构与稳定性保持。
analysis.key_experiments: 通过两个数值实验验证方法有效性，与基线方法对比，展示了更准确的结构与稳定性保持能力。
analysis.contributions: 首次在端口-哈密顿系统学习中放松凸性约束，支持多平衡点稳定性保持，提升了建模精度和泛化性。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论高维系统或实际物理系统的适用性，且数值实验规模较小。

papers.title: Physics-informed reservoir characterization from bulk and extreme pressure events with a differentiable simulator
papers.abstract: Accurate characterization of subsurface heterogeneity is challenging but essential for applications such as reservoir pressure management, geothermal energy extraction and CO$_2$, H$_2$, and wastewater injection operations. This challenge becomes especially acute in extreme pressure events, which are rarely observed but can strongly affect operational risk. Traditional history matching and inversion techniques rely on expensive full-physics simulations, making it infeasible to handle uncertainty and extreme events at scale. Purely data-driven models often struggle to maintain physics consistency when dealing with sparse observations, complex geology, and extreme events. To overcome these limitations, we introduce a physics-informed machine learning method that embeds a differentiable subsurface flow simulator directly into neural network training. The network infers heterogeneous permeability fields from limited pressure observations, while training minimizes both permeability and pressure losses through the simulator, enforcing physical consistency. Because the simulator is used only during training, inference remains fast once the model is learned. In an initial test, the proposed method reduces the pressure inference error by half compared with a purely data-driven approach. We then extend the test over eight distinct data scenarios, and in every case, our method produces significantly lower pressure inference errors than the purely data-driven model. We also evaluate our method on extreme events, which represent high-consequence data in the tail of the sample distribution. Similar to the bulk distribution, the physics-informed model maintains higher pressure inference accuracy in the extreme event regimes. Overall, the proposed method enables rapid, physics-consistent subsurface inversion for real-time reservoir characterization and risk-aware decision-making.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种可微模拟器嵌入神经网络的物理信息方法，从稀疏压力观测反演渗透率场，在极端事件中压力推断误差减半。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统历史拟合依赖昂贵全物理模拟，难以处理不确定性和极端事件；纯数据驱动模型在稀疏观测和复杂地质下物理一致性差。
analysis.problem: 如何从有限压力观测高效、物理一致地反演地下非均质渗透率场，并应对罕见极端压力事件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 极端压力事件虽罕见但显著影响操作风险，传统方法在尾部数据分布上精度不足，而物理信息方法能保持高精度。
analysis.main_method: 将可微地下流动模拟器嵌入神经网络训练，网络推断渗透率场，通过模拟器同时最小化渗透率和压力损失以强制物理一致性。
analysis.key_experiments: 在初始测试中压力推断误差减半，并在8种数据场景下均优于纯数据驱动模型；在极端事件区域也保持更高精度。
analysis.contributions: 提出可微模拟器与神经网络结合的物理信息反演框架，实现快速、物理一致的实时储层表征和风险决策。
analysis.limitations: 依赖可微模拟器的准确性，可能对复杂地质或极端非线性场景的泛化性有限。

papers.title: Anomaly Detection in IEC-61850 GOOSE Networks: Evaluating Unsupervised and Temporal Learning for Real-Time Intrusion Detection
papers.abstract: The IEC-61850 GOOSE protocol underpins time-critical communication in modern digital substations but lacks native security mechanisms, leaving it vulnerable to replay, masquerade, and data injection attacks. Intrusion detection in this setting is challenging due to strict latency constraints (sub-4ms) and limited availability of labeled attack data. This paper evaluates whether unsupervised temporal modeling can provide effective and deployable anomaly detection for GOOSE networks. Five models are compared on the ERENO IEC-61850 dataset: a supervised Random Forest baseline, a feedforward Autoencoder, and three recurrent sequence autoencoders (RNN, LSTM, and GRU). The supervised Random Forest achieves the highest detection performance (F1=0.9516) but fails to meet real-time constraints at 21.8ms per prediction. All four unsupervised models satisfy the 4ms requirement, with the GRU achieving the best accuracy to latency tradeoff among them (F1=0.8737 at 1.118ms). A cross-environment evaluation on an independent dataset shows that all models degrade under distribution shift. However, recurrent models retain substantially higher relative performance than the supervised baseline, suggesting that temporal sequence modeling generalizes better than fitting labeled attack distributions. Anomaly thresholds for the unsupervised models are selected on a held out validation partition to avoid test set leakage. These results support unsupervised temporal models as a practical choice for real-time GOOSE intrusion detection, particularly in environments where labeled training data may be unavailable or where large-scale deployment across diverse substations is required.

analysis.tldr: 评估无监督时序模型在IEC-61850 GOOSE网络实时入侵检测中的有效性，GRU在满足4ms延迟约束下达到最佳性能。
analysis.research_motivation: GOOSE协议缺乏原生安全机制，易受攻击，且实时检测面临严格延迟约束和标记数据稀缺的挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何在满足亚4ms实时性要求下，利用无监督时序模型实现GOOSE网络的有效异常检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 监督模型性能高但延迟超标，无监督模型均满足实时要求；跨环境评估中时序模型泛化性优于监督模型。
analysis.main_method: 比较监督随机森林、前馈自编码器及三种循环序列自编码器（RNN、LSTM、GRU），在ERENO数据集上评估检测性能与延迟。
analysis.key_experiments: 在ERENO数据集上测试5种模型，GRU达到F1=0.8737且延迟1.118ms；跨环境评估验证分布偏移下的泛化能力。
analysis.contributions: 证明无监督时序模型（尤其GRU）在实时GOOSE入侵检测中的实用性和泛化优势。
analysis.limitations: 无监督模型性能仍低于监督基线；跨环境性能下降，需进一步研究域适应方法。

papers.title: MOONSHOT : A Framework for Multi-Objective Pruning of Vision and Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Weight pruning is a common technique for compressing large neural networks. We focus on the challenging post-training one-shot setting, where a pre-trained model is compressed without any retraining. Existing one-shot pruning methods typically optimize a single objective, such as a layer-wise reconstruction loss or a second-order Taylor approximation of the training loss. We highlight that neither objective alone is consistently the most effective across architectures and sparsity levels. Motivated by this insight, we propose MOONSHOT, a general and flexible framework that extends any single-objective pruning method into a multi-objective formulation by jointly optimizing both the layer-wise reconstruction error and second-order Taylor approximation of the training loss. MOONSHOT acts as a wrapper around existing pruning algorithms. To enable this integration while maintaining scalability to billion-parameter models, we propose modeling decisions and introduce an efficient procedure for computing the inverse Hessian, preserving the efficiency of state-of-the-art one-shot pruners. When combined with state-of-the-art pruning methods on Llama-3.2 and Llama-2 models, MOONSHOT reduces C4 perplexity by up to 32.6% at 2:4 sparsity and improves zero-shot mean accuracy across seven classification benchmarks by up to 4.9 points. On Vision Transformers, it improves accuracy on ImageNet-1k by over 5 points at 70% sparsity, and on ResNet-50, it yields a 4-point gain at 90% sparsity.

analysis.tldr: 提出MOONSHOT框架，通过多目标优化（层重构误差+二阶泰勒近似）提升一次性剪枝性能，在LLM和视觉模型上显著降低困惑度并提高准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有一次性剪枝方法仅优化单一目标，在不同架构和稀疏度下效果不稳定，需要更通用的多目标优化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个通用框架，将单目标剪枝方法扩展为多目标优化，同时保持对十亿参数模型的可扩展性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 层重构损失和二阶泰勒近似在剪枝中各有优劣，单一目标无法在所有场景下最优，联合优化可互补优势。
analysis.main_method: 提出MOONSHOT框架，作为现有剪枝算法的包装器，联合优化层重构误差和二阶泰勒近似，并引入高效逆Hessian计算过程。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Llama-3.2/2上C4困惑度降低32.6%（2:4稀疏度），零样本准确率提升4.9点；ViT在70%稀疏度下ImageNet准确率提升5点；ResNet-50在90%稀疏度下提升4点。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个通用多目标一次性剪枝框架，兼容现有方法；设计高效逆Hessian计算，支持十亿参数模型；在多种模型和任务上取得显著提升。
analysis.limitations: 多目标优化可能增加计算开销；逆Hessian近似精度对极端稀疏度的影响未充分探讨；框架依赖基础剪枝方法的质量。

papers.title: Better and Worse with Scale: How Contextual Entrainment Diverges with Model Size
papers.abstract: Larger language models become simultaneously better and worse at handling contextual information -- better at ignoring false claims, worse at ignoring irrelevant tokens. We formalize this apparent paradox through the first scaling laws for contextual entrainment, the tendency of models to favor tokens that appeared in context regardless of relevance. Analyzing the Cerebras-GPT (111M-13B) and Pythia (410M-12B) model families, we find entrainment follows predictable power-law scaling, but with opposite trends depending on context type: semantic contexts show decreasing entrainment with scale, while non-semantic contexts show increasing entrainment. Concretely, the largest models are four times more resistant to counterfactual misinformation than the smallest, yet simultaneously twice as prone to copying arbitrary tokens. These diverging trends, which replicate across model families, suggest that semantic filtering and mechanical copying are functionally distinct behaviors that scale in opposition -- scaling alone does not resolve context sensitivity, it reshapes it.

analysis.tldr: 大语言模型在语义上下文中更少受错误信息影响，但在非语义上下文中更易复制无关标记，且这种趋势随规模扩大而分化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究未系统分析模型规模对上下文处理能力的影响，尤其是语义与非语义上下文的差异。
analysis.problem: 大模型在忽略错误信息方面表现更好，但在忽略无关标记方面表现更差，形成矛盾。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 上下文夹带（contextual entrainment）在语义和非语义上下文中随模型规模呈现相反趋势：语义夹带减少，非语义夹带增加。
analysis.main_method: 通过Cerebras-GPT和Pythia模型家族，定义并测量上下文夹带，建立其与模型规模的幂律缩放关系。
analysis.key_experiments: 在反事实错误信息和任意标记复制任务上测试模型，发现最大模型对错误信息抵抗性提升4倍，但复制倾向增加2倍。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出上下文夹带的缩放定律，揭示语义过滤与机械复制是功能上不同的行为，且随规模反向缩放。
analysis.limitations: 仅分析两个模型家族，未涵盖其他架构或训练数据；未深入解释机械复制增加的原因。

papers.title: Binomial Gradient-Based Meta-Learning for Enhanced Meta-Gradient Estimation
papers.abstract: Meta-learning offers a principled framework leveraging \emph{task-invariant} priors from related tasks, with which \emph{task-specific} models can be fine-tuned on downstream tasks, even with limited data records. Gradient-based meta-learning (GBML) relies on gradient descent (GD) to adapt the prior to a new task. Albeit effective, these methods incur high computational overhead that scales linearly with the number of GD steps. To enhance efficiency and scalability, existing methods approximate the gradient of prior parameters (meta-gradient) via truncated backpropagation, yet suffer large approximation errors. Targeting accurate approximation, this work puts forth binomial GBML (BinomGBML), which relies on a truncated binomial expansion for meta-gradient estimation. This novel expansion endows more information in the meta-gradient estimation via efficient parallel computation. As a running paradigm applied to model-agnostic meta-learning (MAML), the resultant BinomMAML provably enjoys error bounds that not only improve upon existing approaches, but also decay super-exponentially under mild conditions. Numerical tests corroborate the theoretical analysis and showcase boosted performance with slightly increased computational overhead.

analysis.tldr: 提出二项式梯度元学习（BinomGBML），通过截断二项式展开精确估计元梯度，在MAML中实现超指数误差衰减。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有梯度元学习方法因截断反向传播导致元梯度估计误差大，需更精确的估计方法。
analysis.problem: 梯度元学习中元梯度估计的高计算开销与近似误差之间的权衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 截断反向传播虽降低计算量但引入较大近似误差，而二项式展开能通过并行计算提供更丰富的梯度信息。
analysis.main_method: 利用截断二项式展开进行元梯度估计，并应用于MAML框架形成BinomMAML。
analysis.key_experiments: 数值实验验证了理论分析，表明在轻微增加计算开销下性能显著提升。
analysis.contributions: 提出二项式展开的元梯度估计方法，理论证明误差超指数衰减，实验验证有效性。
analysis.limitations: 计算开销略有增加，且二项式展开的截断阶数选择可能影响实际性能。

papers.title: Enhancing Confidence Estimation in Telco LLMs via Twin-Pass CoT-Ensembling
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to complex telecommunications tasks, including 3GPP specification analysis and O-RAN network troubleshooting. However, a critical limitation remains: LLM-generated confidence scores are often biased and unreliable, frequently exhibiting systematic overconfidence. This lack of trustworthy self-assessment makes it difficult to verify model outputs and safely rely on them in practice. In this paper, we study confidence calibration in telecom-domain LLMs using the representative Gemma-3 model family (4B, 12B, and 27B parameters), evaluated on TeleQnA, ORANBench, and srsRANBench. We show that standard single-pass, verbalized confidence estimates fail to reflect true correctness, often assigning high confidence to incorrect predictions. To address this, we propose a novel Twin-Pass Chain of Thought (CoT)-Ensembling methodology for improving confidence estimation by leveraging multiple independent reasoning evaluations and aggregating their assessments into a calibrated confidence score. Our approach reduces Expected Calibration Error (ECE) by up to 88% across benchmarks, significantly improving the reliability of model self-assessment. These results highlight the limitations of current confidence estimation practices and demonstrate a practical path toward more trustworthy evaluation of LLM outputs in telecommunications.

analysis.tldr: 提出Twin-Pass CoT-Ensembling方法，将电信领域LLM的置信度校准误差降低88%，显著提升模型自我评估可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在电信任务中生成的置信度分数存在系统性过度自信偏差，导致输出难以验证和可靠使用。
analysis.problem: 标准单次口头化置信度估计无法反映真实正确性，高置信度常对应错误预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM的置信度估计存在系统性偏差，尤其在电信领域复杂任务中，单次推理的置信度与正确性严重脱节。
analysis.main_method: 提出Twin-Pass CoT-Ensembling方法，通过多次独立推理评估并聚合其置信度分数，生成校准后的置信度。
analysis.key_experiments: 在TeleQnA、ORANBench和srsRANBench基准上，使用Gemma-3模型家族（4B/12B/27B）评估，ECE降低最高达88%。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了当前置信度估计的局限性，并提供了实用的校准方法，显著提升电信领域LLM输出的可信度。
analysis.limitations: 方法依赖多次推理，可能增加计算开销；未在更多样化的电信任务或更大模型上验证。

papers.title: Counterfactual Peptide Editing for Causal TCR--pMHC Binding Inference
papers.abstract: Neural models for TCR-pMHC binding prediction are susceptible to shortcut learning: they exploit spurious correlations in training data -- such as peptide length bias or V-gene co-occurrence -- rather than the physical binding interface. This renders predictions brittle under family-held-out and distance-aware evaluation, where such shortcuts do not transfer. We introduce \emph{Counterfactual Invariant Prediction} (CIP), a training framework that generates biologically constrained counterfactual peptide edits and enforces invariance to edits at non-anchor positions while amplifying sensitivity at MHC anchor residues. CIP augments the base classifier with two auxiliary objectives: (1) an invariance loss penalizing prediction changes under conservative non-anchor substitutions, and (2) a contrastive loss encouraging large prediction changes under anchor-position disruptions. Evaluated on a curated VDJdb-IEDB benchmark under family-held-out, distance-aware, and random splits, CIP achieves AUROC 0.831 and counterfactual consistency (CFC) 0.724 under the challenging family-held-out protocol -- a 39.7\% reduction in shortcut index relative to the unconstrained baseline. Ablations confirm that anchor-aware edit generation is the dominant driver of OOD gains, providing a practical recipe for causally-grounded TCR specificity modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出反事实不变预测框架，通过生物约束的肽编辑消除捷径学习，提升TCR-pMHC结合预测的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有TCR-pMHC结合预测模型易受捷径学习影响，在分布外评估中表现脆弱，需要因果驱动的建模方法。
analysis.problem: 模型利用训练数据中的虚假相关性（如肽长度偏差）而非物理结合界面进行预测，导致泛化能力差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在家族留出和距离感知评估中性能显著下降，表明其依赖的统计模式在分布外场景中不成立。
analysis.main_method: 提出CIP框架，生成生物约束的反事实肽编辑，对非锚点位置编辑保持预测不变性，对锚点位置编辑放大敏感性。
analysis.key_experiments: 在VDJdb-IEDB基准上，家族留出协议下AUROC达0.831，反事实一致性0.724，捷径指数降低39.7%。
analysis.contributions: 首次将反事实推理引入TCR-pMHC结合预测，提出锚点感知编辑生成策略，显著提升分布外泛化。
analysis.limitations: 依赖预定义的锚点位置知识，可能不适用于所有MHC等位基因；反事实编辑的生物有效性需进一步验证。

papers.title: Bias-Corrected Adaptive Conformal Inference for Multi-Horizon Time Series Forecasting
papers.abstract: Adaptive Conformal Inference (ACI) provides distribution-free prediction intervals with asymptotic coverage guarantees for time series under distribution shift. However, ACI only adapts the quantile threshold -- it cannot shift the interval center. When a base forecaster develops persistent bias after a regime change, ACI compensates by widening intervals symmetrically, producing unnecessarily conservative bands. We propose Bias-Corrected ACI (BC-ACI), which augments standard ACI with an online exponentially weighted moving average (EWM) estimate of forecast bias. BC-ACI corrects nonconformity scores before quantile computation and re-centers prediction intervals, addressing the root cause of miscalibration rather than its symptom. An adaptive dead-zone threshold suppresses corrections when estimated bias is indistinguishable from noise, ensuring no degradation on well-calibrated data. In controlled experiments across 688 runs spanning two base models, four synthetic regimes, and three real datasets, BC-ACI reduces Winkler interval scores by 13--17% under mean and compound distribution shifts (Wilcoxon p < 0.001) while maintaining equivalent performance on stationary data (ratio 1.002x). We provide finite-sample analysis showing that coverage guarantees degrade gracefully with bias estimation error.

analysis.tldr: 提出偏差校正自适应共形推断（BC-ACI），通过在线估计预测偏差并校正区间中心，提升多步时间序列预测的区间效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准ACI仅调整分位数阈值，无法校正区间中心，导致在持续偏差下产生过宽的保守区间。
analysis.problem: 时间序列预测中，基模型在分布变化后产生持续偏差，ACI只能对称扩宽区间，造成不必要的保守性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: ACI仅通过调整分位数阈值补偿偏差，但无法移动区间中心，导致区间宽度过度增加。
analysis.main_method: 引入在线指数加权移动平均（EWM）估计预测偏差，在计算分位数前校正非一致性分数，并重新居中预测区间；同时使用自适应死区阈值抑制噪声下的无效校正。
analysis.key_experiments: 在688次实验中，覆盖两个基模型、四种合成场景和三个真实数据集，BC-ACI在均值和复合分布偏移下将Winkler区间分数降低13-17%，在平稳数据上性能相当。
analysis.contributions: 提出BC-ACI方法，结合偏差校正与自适应死区阈值，显著提升区间效率；提供有限样本分析，证明覆盖保证随偏差估计误差优雅退化。
analysis.limitations: 依赖偏差估计的准确性，死区阈值需手动设定，可能影响极端分布变化下的表现。

papers.title: Analog Optical Inference on Million-Record Mortgage Data
papers.abstract: Analog optical computers promise large efficiency gains for machine learning inference, yet no demonstration has moved beyond small-scale image benchmarks. We benchmark the analog optical computer (AOC) digital twin on mortgage approval classification from 5.84 million U.S. HMDA records and separate three sources of accuracy loss. On the original 19 features, the AOC reaches 94.6% balanced accuracy with 5,126 parameters (1,024 optical), compared with 97.9% for XGBoost; the 3.3 percentage-point gap narrows by only 0.5pp when the optical core is widened from 16 to 48 channels, suggesting an architectural rather than hardware limitation. Restricting all models to a shared 127-bit binary encoding drops every model to 89.4--89.6%, with an encoding cost of 8pp for digital models and 5pp for the AOC. Seven calibrated hardware non-idealities impose no measurable penalty. The three resulting layers of limitation (encoding, architecture, hardware fidelity) locate where accuracy is lost and what to improve next.

analysis.tldr: 在百万级抵押贷款数据上，模拟光学推理达到94.6%的平衡准确率，与XGBoost差距仅3.3个百分点，并分离出编码、架构和硬件三个精度损失来源。
analysis.research_motivation: 模拟光学计算机在机器学习推理中具有巨大效率潜力，但此前仅在小规模图像基准上验证，缺乏真实大规模结构化数据的演示。
analysis.problem: 模拟光学计算机在真实大规模结构化数据上的推理性能如何，以及精度损失的主要来源是什么。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 光学核心从16通道扩展到48通道仅缩小0.5个百分点的精度差距，表明限制主要来自架构而非硬件；二进制编码使所有模型精度降至89.4-89.6%，编码成本对数字模型更大。
analysis.main_method: 使用模拟光学计算机的数字孪生模型，在584万条HMDA抵押贷款数据上进行审批分类，并系统分离编码、架构和硬件非理想性三种精度损失来源。
analysis.key_experiments: 在原始19特征上，AOC以5126参数（1024光学）达到94.6%平衡准确率，XGBoost为97.9%；限制为127位二进制编码后，所有模型精度降至89.4-89.6%。
analysis.contributions: 首次在百万级真实结构化数据上演示模拟光学推理，并量化了编码、架构和硬件三个层次的精度损失，为未来改进提供方向。
analysis.limitations: 光学核心通道数扩展对精度提升有限，表明架构设计存在根本性限制；实验仅针对单一分类任务，通用性待验证。

papers.title: Does Dimensionality Reduction via Random Projections Preserve Landscape Features?
papers.abstract: Exploratory Landscape Analysis (ELA) provides numerical features for characterizing black-box optimization problems. In high-dimensional settings, however, ELA suffers from sparsity effects, high estimator variance, and the prohibitive cost of computing several feature classes. Dimensionality reduction has therefore been proposed as a way to make ELA applicable in such settings, but it remains unclear whether features computed in reduced spaces still reflect intrinsic properties of the original landscape. In this work, we investigate the robustness of ELA features under dimensionality reduction via Random Gaussian Embeddings (RGEs). Starting from the same sampled points and objective values, we compute ELA features in projected spaces and compare them to those obtained in the original search space across multiple sample budgets and embedding dimensions. Our results show that linear random projections often alter the geometric and topological structure relevant to ELA, yielding feature values that are no longer representative of the original problem. While a small subset of features remains comparatively stable, most are highly sensitive to the embedding. Moreover, robustness under projection does not necessarily imply informativeness, as apparently robust features may still reflect projection-induced artifacts rather than intrinsic landscape characteristics.

analysis.tldr: 研究发现随机高斯嵌入降维会显著改变ELA特征，使其无法反映原始优化问题的景观特性。
analysis.research_motivation: 高维黑箱优化中ELA计算成本高且存在稀疏性问题，降维被提出作为解决方案，但其对景观特征的影响未知。
analysis.problem: 降维后的ELA特征是否仍能保留原始高维景观的内在属性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 线性随机投影改变了与ELA相关的几何和拓扑结构，导致大部分特征值不再代表原始问题，仅少数特征相对稳定。
analysis.main_method: 通过随机高斯嵌入对采样点和目标值进行降维，比较原始空间与投影空间中ELA特征的差异。
analysis.key_experiments: 在不同样本预算和嵌入维度下，计算并对比原始空间与投影空间的ELA特征值。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了随机投影降维对ELA特征的破坏性影响，并指出稳健特征可能反映投影伪影而非原始景观。
analysis.limitations: 仅研究了线性随机投影，未考虑非线性降维方法；未提出替代方案。

papers.title: Rare Event Analysis via Stochastic Optimal Control
papers.abstract: Rare events such as conformational changes in biomolecules, phase transitions, and chemical reactions are central to the behavior of many physical systems, yet they are extremely difficult to study computationally because unbiased simulations seldom produce them. Transition Path Theory (TPT) provides a rigorous statistical framework for analyzing such events: it characterizes the ensemble of reactive trajectories between two designated metastable states (reactant and product), and its central object--the committor function, which gives the probability that the system will next reach the product rather than the reactant--encodes all essential kinetic and thermodynamic information. We introduce a framework that casts committor estimation as a stochastic optimal control (SOC) problem. In this formulation the committor defines a feedback control--proportional to the gradient of its logarithm--that actively steers trajectories toward the reactive region, thereby enabling efficient sampling of reactive paths. To solve the resulting hitting-time control problem we develop two complementary objectives: a direct backpropagation loss and a principled off-policy Value Matching loss, for which we establish first-order optimality guarantees. We further address metastability, which can trap controlled trajectories in intermediate basins, by introducing an alternative sampling process that preserves the reactive current while lowering effective energy barriers. On benchmark systems, the framework yields markedly more accurate committor estimates, reaction rates, and equilibrium constants than existing methods.

analysis.tldr: 将稀有事件分析中的committor函数估计转化为随机最优控制问题，通过反馈控制高效采样反应路径。
analysis.research_motivation: 稀有事件在物理系统中至关重要，但传统无偏模拟难以高效采样，需要更精确的计算方法。
analysis.problem: 现有方法在估计committor函数和采样反应路径时精度不足，且难以处理亚稳态导致的轨迹捕获问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 稀有事件（如构象变化）在模拟中极少发生，但committor函数编码了所有关键动力学和热力学信息。
analysis.main_method: 将committor估计建模为随机最优控制问题，提出直接反向传播损失和离策略值匹配损失两种目标函数，并引入替代采样过程降低有效能垒。
analysis.key_experiments: 在基准系统上测试，与现有方法相比，committor估计、反应速率和平衡常数的精度显著提升。
analysis.contributions: 建立了committor估计与随机最优控制的理论联系，提出了两种可求解的损失函数并保证一阶最优性，解决了亚稳态问题。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论高维系统的可扩展性，且对复杂能量景观的适用性需进一步验证。

papers.title: Evaluating the Evaluator: Problems with SemEval-2020 Task 1 for Lexical Semantic Change Detection
papers.abstract: This discussion paper re-examines SemEval-2020 Task 1, the most influential shared benchmark for lexical semantic change detection, through a three-part evaluative framework: operationalisation, data quality, and benchmark design. First, at the level of operationalisation, we argue that the benchmark models semantic change mainly as gain, loss, or redistribution of discrete senses. While practical for annotation and evaluation, this framing is too narrow to capture gradual, constructional, collocational, and discourse-level change. Also, the gold labels are outcomes of annotation decisions, clustering procedures, and threshold settings, which could potentially limit the validity of the task. Second, at the level of data quality, we show that the benchmark is affected by substantial corpus and preprocessing problems, including OCR noise, malformed characters, truncated sentences, inconsistent lemmatisation, POS-tagging errors, and missed targets. These issues can distort model behaviour, complicate linguistic analysis, and reduce reproducibility. Third, at the level of bench-mark design, we argue the small curated target sets and limited language coverage reduce realism and increase statistical uncertainty. Taken together, these limitations suggest that the benchmark should be treated as a useful but partial test bed rather than a definitive measure of progress. We therefore call for future datasets and shared tasks to adopt broader theories of semantic change, document pre-processing transparently, expand cross-linguistic coverage, and use more realistic evaluation settings. Such steps are necessary for more valid, interpretable, and generalisable progress in lexical semantic change detection

analysis.tldr: 该论文批判性评估了SemEval-2020 Task 1词汇语义变化检测基准，指出其在操作化、数据质量和基准设计三方面的严重缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: SemEval-2020 Task 1是词汇语义变化检测领域最具影响力的共享基准，但其有效性尚未得到系统审视。
analysis.problem: 现有基准将语义变化窄化为离散义项的增减，且存在数据污染和评估设计不合理的问题，导致其无法作为可靠的进展衡量标准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基准标注依赖离散义项聚类和阈值设定，忽略了渐变、构式、搭配和话语层面的语义变化；OCR噪声、词形还原错误等数据问题严重扭曲模型行为。
analysis.main_method: 提出三部分评估框架：操作化层面分析语义变化建模的局限性，数据质量层面检测语料和预处理错误，基准设计层面评估目标集和语言覆盖的不足。
analysis.key_experiments: 未进行新实验，而是通过系统分析现有基准的标注流程、数据错误和设计缺陷来论证问题。
analysis.contributions: 首次系统揭露了SemEval-2020 Task 1在操作化、数据质量和基准设计三方面的根本性缺陷，并提出了未来数据集和共享任务的建设性改进方向。
analysis.limitations: 未提供替代基准或实验验证所提改进方案的有效性；分析主要基于定性论证，缺乏定量评估缺陷影响程度的实验。

papers.title: Unleashing Implicit Rewards: Prefix-Value Learning for Distribution-Level Optimization
papers.abstract: Process reward models (PRMs) provide fine-grained reward signals along the reasoning process, but training reliable PRMs often requires step annotations or heavy verification pipelines, making them expensive to scale and refresh during online RL. Implicit PRMs mitigate this cost by learning decomposable token- or step-level rewards from trajectory-level outcome labels. However, they suffer from a train-inference mismatch: training only constrains a sequence-level aggregate, whereas inference requires token-level scores to reflect local step quality. As a result, token-level credits are weakly identified and may fail to faithfully reflect which reasoning steps are actually correct. This unreliability undermines a key promise of implicit PRMs: scoring many candidate tokens. In practice, noisy per-token advantages may systematically reinforce incorrect continuations. We address this problem with a novel Implicit Prefix-Value Reward Model (IPVRM), which directly learns a prefix-conditioned value function estimating the probability of eventual correctness, and derives step signals via temporal-difference (TD) differences. IPVRM substantially improves step-verification F1 on ProcessBench. Building on these calibrated prefix values, we further propose Distribution-Level RL (DistRL), which computes TD advantages for both sampled tokens and high-probability candidate tokens, enabling dense counterfactual updates without additional rollouts. While DistRL offers limited gains when powered by miscalibrated implicit rewards, it consistently improves downstream reasoning once paired with IPVRM.

analysis.tldr: 提出隐式前缀值奖励模型（IPVRM），通过前缀条件值函数和时序差分差异，解决隐式过程奖励模型在训练与推理间的信用分配不匹配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有隐式过程奖励模型（PRMs）虽能避免逐步骤标注，但存在训练-推理不匹配，导致令牌级信用分配不可靠，影响推理步骤的准确评估。
analysis.problem: 隐式PRMs在训练时仅约束序列级聚合，推理时却需令牌级分数反映局部步骤质量，导致令牌级信用弱识别，可能错误强化不正确推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 训练-推理不匹配使得令牌级优势信号噪声大，系统性地强化错误延续，削弱了隐式PRMs在候选令牌评分中的可靠性。
analysis.main_method: 提出IPVRM，直接学习前缀条件值函数估计最终正确概率，并通过时序差分差异推导步骤信号；进一步提出分布级强化学习（DistRL），利用校准后的前缀值计算密集反事实更新。
analysis.key_experiments: 在ProcessBench上，IPVRM显著提升步骤验证F1分数；DistRL与IPVRM结合后持续改善下游推理性能，而单独使用未校准隐式奖励时增益有限。
analysis.contributions: 提出IPVRM解决隐式奖励的信用分配问题，并引入DistRL实现无需额外采样的密集反事实更新，提升推理优化效果。
analysis.limitations: DistRL在未校准隐式奖励下增益有限，且方法可能依赖特定任务设置，泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: CLAD: Efficient Log Anomaly Detection Directly on Compressed Representations
papers.abstract: The explosive growth of system logs makes streaming compression essential, yet existing log anomaly detection (LAD) methods incur severe pre-processing overhead by requiring full decompression and parsing. We introduce CLAD, the first deep learning framework to perform LAD directly on compressed byte streams. CLAD bypasses these bottlenecks by exploiting a key insight: normal logs compress into regular byte patterns, while anomalies systematically disrupt them. To extract these multi-scale deviations from opaque bytes, we propose a purpose-built architecture integrating a dilated convolutional byte encoder, a hybrid Transformer--mLSTM, and four-way aggregation pooling. This is coupled with a two-stage training strategy of masked pre-training and focal-contrastive fine-tuning to effectively handle severe class imbalance. Evaluated across five datasets, CLAD achieves a state-of-the-art average F1-score of 0.9909 and outperforms the best baseline by 2.72 percentage points. It delivers superior accuracy while completely eliminating decompression and parsing overheads, offering a robust solution that generalizes to structured streaming compressors.

analysis.tldr: CLAD 直接在压缩字节流上进行日志异常检测，无需解压和解析，实现高效且高精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有日志异常检测方法需要完全解压和解析日志，导致严重的预处理开销，无法满足流式压缩场景的需求。
analysis.problem: 如何在不解压和解析的情况下，直接从压缩的字节流中检测日志异常。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 正常日志压缩后形成规则的字节模式，而异常日志会系统性地破坏这些模式，从而在压缩表示中留下可检测的痕迹。
analysis.main_method: 提出包含膨胀卷积字节编码器、混合Transformer-mLSTM和四路聚合池化的架构，结合掩码预训练和焦点对比微调的两阶段训练策略。
analysis.key_experiments: 在五个数据集上评估，平均F1分数达0.9909，比最佳基线高2.72个百分点，且完全消除了解压和解析开销。
analysis.contributions: 首个直接在压缩字节流上进行日志异常检测的深度学习框架，显著降低预处理开销并保持高精度。
analysis.limitations: 可能对特定压缩算法敏感，且未讨论在极端噪声或实时性要求极高场景下的表现。

papers.title: Fast Voxelization and Level of Detail for Microgeometry Rendering
authors: Javier Fabre and Carlos Castillo and Carlos Rodriguez-Pardo and Jorge Lopez-Moreno
papers.abstract: Many materials show anisotropic light scattering patterns due to the shape and local alignment of their underlying micro structures: surfaces with small elements such as fibers, or the ridges of a brushed metal, are very sparse and require a high spatial resolution to be properly represented as a volume. The acquisition of voxel data from such objects is a time and memory-intensive task, and most rendering approaches require an additional Level-of-Detail (LoD) data structure to aggregate the visual appearance, as observed from multiple distances, in order to reduce the number of samples computed per pixel (E.g.: MIP mapping). In this work we introduce first, an efficient parallel voxelization method designed to facilitate fast data aggregation at multiple resolution levels, and second, a novel representation based on hierarchical SGGX clustering that provides better accuracy than baseline methods. We validate our approach with a CUDA-based implementation of the voxelizer, tested both on triangle meshes and volumetric fabrics modeled with explicit fibers. Finally, we show the results generated with a path tracer based on the proposed LoD rendering model.

analysis.tldr: 提出高效并行体素化方法和基于层次化SGGX聚类的细节层次表示，用于微几何渲染。
analysis.research_motivation: 微几何材料（如纤维、拉丝金属）的体素数据获取耗时且占用内存大，现有渲染方法需要额外的LoD结构来聚合多距离外观。
analysis.problem: 微几何表面稀疏且需要高空间分辨率，体素化效率低，且缺乏高效的LoD表示来减少每像素采样数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 微结构（如纤维）的局部排列导致各向异性光散射，传统体素化难以平衡精度和计算开销。
analysis.main_method: 提出并行体素化方法加速多分辨率数据聚合，并引入基于层次化SGGX聚类的LoD表示以提高精度。
analysis.key_experiments: 基于CUDA实现体素化器，在三角网格和显式纤维建模的织物上测试，并用路径追踪器验证LoD渲染模型。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出高效并行体素化方法，以及基于层次化SGGX聚类的LoD表示，优于基线方法。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论对动态场景或非刚性变形的适用性，且CUDA实现可能受限于GPU内存。

papers.title: HUANet: Hard-Constrained Unrolled ADMM for Constrained Convex Optimization
authors: Binh Nguyen and Truong X. Nghiem
papers.abstract: This paper presents HUANet, a constrained deep neural network architecture that unrolls the iterations of the Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM) into a trainable neural network for solving constrained convex optimization problems. Existing end-to-end learning methods operate as black-box mappings from parameters to solutions, often lacking explicit optimality principles and failing to enforce constraints. To address this limitation, we unroll ADMM and embed a hard-constrained neural network at each iteration to accelerate the algorithm, where equality constraints are enforced via a differentiable correction stage at the network output. Furthermore, we incorporate first-order optimality conditions as soft constraints during training to promote the convergence of the proposed unrolled algorithm. Extensive numerical experiments are conducted to validate the effectiveness of the proposed architecture for constrained optimization problems.

analysis.tldr: 提出HUANet，将ADMM迭代展开为硬约束神经网络，用于求解带约束凸优化问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有端到端学习方法缺乏显式最优性原理且难以保证约束满足，需要一种可解释且约束可保证的深度学习架构。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个既能利用深度学习加速求解，又能严格满足等式约束的凸优化求解网络。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统ADMM迭代可被展开为可训练网络，但直接展开无法保证约束满足；通过硬约束校正层可强制满足等式约束。
analysis.main_method: 将ADMM迭代展开为神经网络，每步嵌入硬约束校正层强制满足等式约束，并在训练中引入一阶最优性条件作为软约束。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个约束凸优化问题上进行数值实验，验证了HUANet在收敛速度和约束满足方面的有效性。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出硬约束ADMM展开网络，结合可微校正层保证等式约束，并利用最优性条件提升收敛性。
analysis.limitations: 仅适用于凸优化问题，对非凸问题可能不适用；硬约束校正层的计算开销可能较大。

papers.title: Classical and Quantum Speedups for Non-Convex Optimization via Energy Conserving Descent
papers.abstract: The Energy Conserving Descent (ECD) algorithm was recently proposed (De Luca & Silverstein, 2022) as a global non-convex optimization method. Unlike gradient descent, appropriately configured ECD dynamics escape strict local minima and converge to a global minimum, making it appealing for machine learning optimization. We present the first analytical study of ECD, focusing on the one-dimensional setting for this first installment. We formalize a stochastic ECD dynamics (sECD) with energy-preserving noise, as well as a quantum analog of the ECD Hamiltonian (qECD), providing the foundation for a quantum algorithm through Hamiltonian simulation. For positive double-well objectives, we compute the expected hitting time from a local to the global minimum. We prove that both sECD and qECD yield exponential speedup over respective gradient descent baselines--stochastic gradient descent and its quantization. For objectives with tall barriers, qECD achieves a further speedup over sECD.

analysis.tldr: 首次理论分析能量守恒下降（ECD）算法，证明其在非凸优化中相对梯度下降具有指数加速，并提出了量子版本。
analysis.research_motivation: 非凸优化中梯度下降易陷入局部极小，而ECD算法能逃离局部极小并收敛到全局最小，但其理论分析尚缺。
analysis.problem: 解决非凸优化中全局收敛的理论分析缺失问题，以及经典和量子加速的量化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: ECD通过能量守恒动力学避免陷入局部极小，在双阱势能中从局部到全局的期望首达时间呈指数级缩短。
analysis.main_method: 形式化随机ECD（sECD）和量子ECD（qECD）动力学，利用哈密顿模拟实现量子算法，并分析一维双阱势能下的首达时间。
analysis.key_experiments: 理论计算正双阱目标函数下sECD和qECD的期望首达时间，并与随机梯度下降及其量子化基线对比。
analysis.contributions: 首次对ECD进行严格理论分析，证明sECD和qECD相对梯度下降有指数加速，且qECD在高势垒下进一步加速。
analysis.limitations: 仅分析一维情形，高维扩展和实际应用中的噪声影响未涉及。

papers.title: PolicyLLM: Towards Excellent Comprehension of Public Policy for Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into real-world decision-making, including in the domain of public policy. Yet, their ability to comprehend and reason about policy-related content remains underexplored. To fill this gap, we present \textbf{\textit{PolicyBench}}, the first large-scale cross-system benchmark (US-China) evaluating policy comprehension, comprising 21K cases across a broad spectrum of policy areas, capturing the diversity and complexity of real-world governance. Following Bloom's taxonomy, the benchmark assesses three core capabilities: (1) \textbf{Memorization}: factual recall of policy knowledge, (2) \textbf{Understanding}: conceptual and contextual reasoning, and (3) \textbf{Application}: problem-solving in real-life policy scenarios. Building on this benchmark, we further propose \textbf{\textit{PolicyMoE}}, a domain-specialized Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model with expert modules aligned to each cognitive level. The proposed models demonstrate stronger performance on application-oriented policy tasks than on memorization or conceptual understanding, and yields the highest accuracy on structured reasoning tasks. Our results reveal key limitations of current LLMs in policy understanding and suggest paths toward more reliable, policy-focused models.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个跨系统（中美）公共政策理解基准PolicyBench和领域专用MoE模型PolicyMoE，评估LLM在政策记忆、理解和应用上的能力。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在公共政策领域的理解和推理能力尚未被充分探索，需要系统评估和提升。
analysis.problem: 现有LLM对政策内容的记忆、理解和应用能力不足，缺乏针对性的基准和模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在应用导向的政策任务上表现优于记忆和概念理解，但在结构化推理任务上准确率最高。
analysis.main_method: 构建PolicyBench基准（21K案例，覆盖中美政策），并基于Bloom分类法设计PolicyMoE模型，将专家模块对齐到三个认知层次。
analysis.key_experiments: 在PolicyBench上评估多种LLM，PolicyMoE在应用任务和结构化推理上表现更优。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出跨系统政策理解基准PolicyBench，并开发领域专用MoE模型PolicyMoE，揭示LLM在政策理解中的关键局限。
analysis.limitations: 仅覆盖中美政策，可能不适用于其他政策体系；MoE模型训练和推理成本较高。

papers.title: Toward Autonomous Long-Horizon Engineering for ML Research
papers.abstract: Autonomous AI research has advanced rapidly, but long-horizon ML research engineering remains difficult: agents must sustain coherent progress across task comprehension, environment setup, implementation, experimentation, and debugging over hours or days. We introduce AiScientist, a system for autonomous long-horizon engineering for ML research built on a simple principle: strong long-horizon performance requires both structured orchestration and durable state continuity. To this end, AiScientist combines hierarchical orchestration with a permission-scoped File-as-Bus workspace: a top-level Orchestrator maintains stage-level control through concise summaries and a workspace map, while specialized agents repeatedly re-ground on durable artifacts such as analyses, plans, code, and experimental evidence rather than relying primarily on conversational handoffs, yielding thin control over thick state. Across two complementary benchmarks, AiScientist improves PaperBench score by 10.54 points on average over the best matched baseline and achieves 81.82 Any Medal% on MLE-Bench Lite. Ablation studies further show that File-as-Bus protocol is a key driver of performance, reducing PaperBench by 6.41 points and MLE-Bench Lite by 31.82 points when removed. These results suggest that long-horizon ML research engineering is a systems problem of coordinating specialized work over durable project state, rather than a purely local reasoning problem.

analysis.tldr: 提出AiScientist系统，通过分层编排和持久状态连续性实现ML研究的自主长周期工程，在基准测试中显著提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主AI研究进展迅速，但长周期ML研究工程仍困难，代理需在数小时或数天内维持任务理解、环境设置、实现、实验和调试的连贯进展。
analysis.problem: 现有系统在长周期ML研究工程中缺乏结构化编排和持久状态连续性，导致代理难以维持连贯进展。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 长周期ML研究工程本质上是协调专业工作与持久项目状态的系统问题，而非纯局部推理问题。
analysis.main_method: 结合分层编排与权限范围的File-as-Bus工作空间：顶层编排器通过简洁摘要和工作空间图维护阶段控制，专业代理反复基于持久工件（如分析、计划、代码和实验证据）重新定位。
analysis.key_experiments: 在PaperBench上平均提升10.54分，在MLE-Bench Lite上达到81.82%的Any Medal率；消融实验显示移除File-as-Bus协议后性能分别下降6.41和31.82分。
analysis.contributions: 提出AiScientist系统，证明长周期ML研究工程是系统问题，并验证File-as-Bus协议的关键作用。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论系统在更复杂或开放场景下的泛化能力，以及计算资源开销。

papers.title: Causal Diffusion Models for Counterfactual Outcome Distributions in Longitudinal Data
papers.abstract: Predicting counterfactual outcomes in longitudinal data, where sequential treatment decisions heavily depend on evolving patient states, is critical yet notoriously challenging due to complex time-dependent confounding and inadequate uncertainty quantification in existing methods. We introduce the Causal Diffusion Model (CDM), the first denoising diffusion probabilistic approach explicitly designed to generate full probabilistic distributions of counterfactual outcomes under sequential interventions. CDM employs a novel residual denoising architecture with relational self-attention, capturing intricate temporal dependencies and multimodal outcome trajectories without requiring explicit adjustments (e.g., inverse-probability weighting or adversarial balancing) for confounding. In rigorous evaluation on a pharmacokinetic-pharmacodynamic tumor-growth simulator widely adopted in prior work, CDM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art longitudinal causal inference methods, achieving a 15-30% relative improvement in distributional accuracy (1-Wasserstein distance) while maintaining competitive or superior point-estimate accuracy (RMSE) under high-confounding regimes. By unifying uncertainty quantification and robust counterfactual prediction in complex, sequentially confounded settings, without tailored deconfounding, CDM offers a flexible, high-impact tool for decision support in medicine, policy evaluation, and other longitudinal domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出因果扩散模型（CDM），首个为纵向数据生成反事实结果完整概率分布的扩散方法，无需显式去混杂。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有纵向因果推断方法难以处理复杂时变混杂且缺乏不确定性量化，需更鲁棒的预测工具。
analysis.problem: 纵向数据中顺序治疗决策依赖演化患者状态，存在复杂时变混杂，现有方法无法准确生成反事实结果分布。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 时变混杂导致传统方法（如逆概率加权）失效，且多模态结果轨迹需要概率建模而非点估计。
analysis.main_method: 采用残差去噪架构与关系自注意力机制，通过扩散过程直接生成反事实结果分布，无需显式去混杂调整。
analysis.key_experiments: 在药代动力学-药效学肿瘤生长模拟器上评估，CDM在分布精度（1-Wasserstein距离）上相对提升15-30%，点估计精度（RMSE）保持竞争力。
analysis.contributions: 首个将扩散模型用于纵向反事实分布生成，统一不确定性量化与鲁棒预测，无需定制去混杂。
analysis.limitations: 依赖模拟数据验证，真实临床数据泛化性待考；计算成本可能高于传统方法。

papers.title: Accelerating Speculative Decoding with Block Diffusion Draft Trees
papers.abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates autoregressive language models by using a lightweight drafter to propose multiple future tokens, which the target model then verifies in parallel. DFlash shows that a block diffusion drafter can generate an entire draft block in a single forward pass and achieve state-of-the-art speculative decoding performance, outperforming strong autoregressive drafters such as EAGLE-3. Vanilla DFlash, however, still verifies only a single drafted trajectory per round, potentially limiting its acceptance length. We introduce DDTree (Diffusion Draft Tree), a method that constructs a draft tree directly from the per-position distributions of a block diffusion drafter. Under a fixed node budget, DDTree uses a simple best-first heap algorithm to select the continuations that are most likely to match the target model according to a surrogate defined by the draft model's output. The resulting tree is verified efficiently in a single target model forward pass using an ancestor-only attention mask. Because DDTree builds on DFlash, a leading draft model for speculative decoding, these gains place DDTree among the leading approaches to speculative decoding.

analysis.tldr: 提出DDTree方法，利用块扩散草稿模型构建草稿树，通过单次前向传递验证多个候选序列，提升推测解码效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有推测解码方法（如DFlash）每轮仅验证单个草稿轨迹，限制了接受长度，需探索多轨迹验证以加速。
analysis.problem: 如何利用块扩散草稿模型生成多个候选草稿序列，并在单次目标模型前向传递中高效验证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 块扩散草稿模型能一次生成整个草稿块，但传统验证方式仅利用单条轨迹，未充分挖掘其多候选潜力。
analysis.main_method: 基于块扩散草稿模型每位置分布，使用最佳优先堆算法在固定节点预算下构建草稿树，并通过祖先注意力掩码在单次前向传递中验证。
analysis.key_experiments: 在推测解码任务中，DDTree与DFlash及EAGLE-3等强基线对比，验证了其领先的加速性能。
analysis.contributions: 首次将块扩散草稿模型与草稿树结合，提出高效构建与验证方法，显著提升推测解码的接受长度和速度。
analysis.limitations: 依赖块扩散草稿模型的输出分布质量，且树结构构建可能受节点预算限制影响最优性。

papers.title: An Optimal Sauer Lemma Over $k$-ary Alphabets
papers.abstract: The Sauer-Shelah-Perles Lemma is a cornerstone of combinatorics and learning theory, bounding the size of a binary hypothesis class in terms of its Vapnik-Chervonenkis (VC) dimension. For classes of functions over a $k$-ary alphabet, namely the multiclass setting, the Natarajan dimension has long served as an analogue of VC dimension, yet the corresponding Sauer-type bounds are suboptimal for alphabet sizes $k>2$. In this work, we establish a sharp Sauer inequality for multiclass and list prediction. Our bound is expressed in terms of the Daniely--Shalev-Shwartz (DS) dimension, and more generally with its extension, the list-DS dimension -- the combinatorial parameters that characterize multiclass and list PAC learnability. Our bound is tight for every alphabet size $k$, list size $\ell$, and dimension value, replacing the exponential dependence on $\ell$ in the Natarajan-based bound by the optimal polynomial dependence, and improving the dependence on $k$ as well. Our proof uses the polynomial method. In contrast to the classical VC case, where several direct combinatorial proofs are known, we are not aware of any purely combinatorial proof in the DS setting. This motivates several directions for future research, which are discussed in the paper. As consequences, we obtain improved sample complexity upper bounds for list PAC learning and for uniform convergence of list predictors, sharpening the recent results of Charikar et al.~(STOC~2023), Hanneke et al.~(COLT~2024), and Brukhim et al.~(NeurIPS~2024).

analysis.tldr: 该论文针对k元字母表上的多类与列表预测，建立了最优的Sauer不等式，改进了Natarajan维度的次优界。
analysis.research_motivation: 经典Sauer-Shelah-Perles引理在二元假设类中是最优的，但在多类（k>2）场景下，基于Natarajan维度的Sauer型界存在次优性，需要更紧的界。
analysis.problem: 解决多类与列表预测中Sauer不等式不紧的问题，即现有界对字母表大小k和列表大小ℓ的依赖不是最优的。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Natarajan维度的Sauer界对ℓ有指数依赖，而实际最优依赖应为多项式；DS维度作为更精确的组合参数，能导出更紧的界。
analysis.main_method: 采用多项式方法（polynomial method）证明，而非经典VC维度的组合证明。
analysis.key_experiments: 未涉及实验，但理论推导了样本复杂度上界，改进了Charikar等（STOC 2023）、Hanneke等（COLT 2024）和Brukhim等（NeurIPS 2024）的结果。
analysis.contributions: 建立了对任意k、ℓ和维度值均紧的Sauer不等式，将指数依赖降为多项式依赖，并提升了k的依赖；给出了改进的样本复杂度上界。
analysis.limitations: 证明依赖多项式方法，缺乏纯组合证明；未讨论实际应用中的计算效率或算法实现。

papers.title: Adaptive Learning via Off-Model Training and Importance Sampling for Fully Non-Markovian Optimal Stochastic Control. Complete version
authors: Simone Scotti and Adolfo M.D da Silva
papers.abstract: This paper studies continuous-time stochastic control problems whose controlled states are fully non-Markovian and depend on unknown model parameters. Such problems arise naturally in path-dependent stochastic differential equations, rough-volatility hedging, and systems driven by fractional Brownian motion. Building on the discrete skeleton approach developed in earlier work, we propose a Monte Carlo learning methodology for the associated embedded backward dynamic programming equation. Our main contribution is twofold. First, we construct explicit dominating training laws and Radon--Nikodym weights for several representative classes of non-Markovian controlled systems. This yields an off-model training architecture in which a fixed synthetic dataset is generated under a reference law, while the dynamic programming operators associated with a target model are recovered by importance sampling. Second, we use this structure to design an adaptive update mechanism under parametric model uncertainty, so that repeated recalibration can be performed by reweighting the same training sample rather than regenerating new trajectories. For fixed parameters, we establish non-asymptotic error bounds for the approximation of the embedded dynamic programming equation via deep neural networks. For adaptive learning, we derive quantitative estimates that separate Monte Carlo approximation error from model-risk error. Numerical experiments illustrate both the off-model training mechanism and the adaptive importance-sampling update in structured linear-quadratic examples.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于离模型训练和重要性采样的自适应学习方法，用于解决完全非马尔可夫最优随机控制问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 实际控制问题常涉及非马尔可夫状态和未知模型参数，现有方法难以高效处理。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新生成轨迹的情况下，对非马尔可夫随机控制问题进行自适应学习和参数更新。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 非马尔可夫系统（如粗糙波动率、分数布朗运动）的路径依赖特性导致传统动态规划失效。
analysis.main_method: 构建显式支配训练律和Radon-Nikodym权重，通过重要性采样在固定合成数据集上恢复目标模型的动态规划算子，并设计自适应更新机制。
analysis.key_experiments: 在结构化线性二次型示例中验证离模型训练和自适应重要性采样更新的有效性。
analysis.contributions: 提出离模型训练架构和自适应参数更新方法，并给出非渐近误差界和模型风险分离的定量估计。
analysis.limitations: 实验仅针对线性二次型示例，未在更复杂非线性系统中验证。

papers.title: The Verification Tax: Fundamental Limits of AI Auditing in the Rare-Error Regime
papers.abstract: The most cited calibration result in deep learning -- post-temperature-scaling ECE of 0.012 on CIFAR-100 (Guo et al., 2017) -- is below the statistical noise floor.
