We prove this is not a failure of the experiment but a law: the minimax rate for estimating calibration error with model error rate epsilon is Theta((Lepsilon/m)^{1/3}), and no estimator can beat it. This "verification tax" implies that as AI models improve, verifying their calibration becomes fundamentally harder -- with the same exponent in opposite directions. We establish four results that contradict standard evaluation practice: (1) self-evaluation without labels provides exactly zero information about calibration, bounded by a constant independent of compute; (2) a sharp phase transition at mepsilon approx 1 below which miscalibration is undetectable; (3) active querying eliminates the Lipschitz constant, collapsing estimation to detection; (4) verification cost grows exponentially with pipeline depth at rate L^K. We validate across five benchmarks (MMLU, TruthfulQA, ARC-Challenge, HellaSwag, WinoGrande; ~27,000 items) with 6 LLMs from 5 families (8B-405B parameters, 27 benchmark-model pairs with logprob-based confidence), 95% bootstrap CIs, and permutation tests. Self-evaluation non-significance holds in 80% of pairs. Across frontier models, 23% of pairwise comparisons are indistinguishable from noise, implying that credible calibration claims must report verification floors and prioritize active querying once gains approach benchmark resolution.

analysis.tldr: 证明AI校准验证存在基本极限：随模型误差降低，校准估计的统计难度以立方根速率增加，验证成本呈指数增长。
analysis.research_motivation: 揭示深度学习中最常引用的校准结果（CIFAR-100上0.012的ECE）低于统计噪声下限这一矛盾现象背后的根本原因。
analysis.problem: AI模型校准验证在低错误率场景下存在不可克服的统计极限，标准评估实践可能产生误导性结论。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 校准误差估计的极小极大速率与模型错误率ε满足Θ((Lε/m)^{1/3})关系，意味着模型越准确，验证其校准性越困难，两者呈相反指数方向变化。
analysis.main_method: 通过信息论下界证明建立校准验证的统计极限定理，推导出四个反直觉结论，并在5个基准测试、6个LLM家族（8B-405B参数）上验证。
analysis.key_experiments: 在MMLU等5个基准（约27,000项）上测试6个LLM（27个模型-基准对），使用95%自助法置信区间和置换检验，发现80%的自我评估不显著，23%的成对比较与噪声无异。
analysis.contributions: 首次严格证明AI校准验证存在基本统计极限，揭示验证成本随流水线深度呈指数增长，提出主动查询可消除Lipschitz常数依赖。
analysis.limitations: 理论分析主要针对校准验证，未覆盖其他AI审计维度；实验验证限于特定模型家族和基准。

papers.title: Parcae: Scaling Laws For Stable Looped Language Models
papers.abstract: Traditional fixed-depth architectures scale quality by increasing training FLOPs, typically through increased parameterization, at the expense of a higher memory footprint, or data. A potential alternative is looped architectures, which instead increase FLOPs by sending activations through a block of layers in a loop. While promising, existing recipes for training looped architectures can be unstable, suffering from residual explosion and loss spikes. We address these challenges by recasting looping as a nonlinear time-variant dynamical system over the residual stream. Via a linear approximation to this system, we find that instability occurs in existing looped architectures as a result of large spectral norms in their injection parameters. To address these instability issues, we propose Parcae, a novel stable, looped architecture that constrains the spectral norm of the injection parameters via discretization of a negative diagonal parameterization. As a result, Parcae achieves up to 6.3% lower validation perplexity over prior large-scale looped models. Using our stable looped architecture, we investigate the scaling properties of looping as a medium to improve quality by increasing FLOPs in training and test-time. For training, we derive predictable power laws to scale FLOPs while keeping parameter count fixed. Our initial scaling laws suggest that looping and data should be increased in tandem, given a fixed FLOP budget. At test-time, we find that Parcae can use looping to scale compute, following a predictable, saturating exponential decay. When scaled up to 1.3B parameters, we find that Parcae improves CORE and Core-Extended quality by 2.99 and 1.18 points when compared to strong Transformer baselines under a fixed parameter and data budget, achieving a relative quality of up to 87.5% a Transformer twice the size.

analysis.tldr: 提出稳定循环架构Parcae，通过约束谱范数解决训练不稳定问题，并推导循环语言模型的缩放定律。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统固定深度架构通过增加参数量提升质量，但内存开销大；循环架构通过增加计算量替代参数量，但现有训练方法不稳定。
analysis.problem: 循环语言模型训练中存在残差爆炸和损失尖峰等不稳定问题，且缺乏系统的缩放规律。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 循环架构的不稳定性源于注入参数的谱范数过大，导致残差流在迭代中发散。
analysis.main_method: 将循环建模为非线性时变动力系统，通过负对角参数化的离散化约束注入参数的谱范数，提出稳定循环架构Parcae。
analysis.key_experiments: 在1.3B参数规模下，Parcae相比同等参数Transformer在CORE和Core-Extended上提升2.99和1.18分，达到两倍参数Transformer 87.5%的相对质量。
analysis.contributions: 提出稳定循环架构Parcae，推导训练和测试时的缩放定律，证明循环与数据应同步增加。
analysis.limitations: 缩放定律基于特定架构和实验设置，泛化性需进一步验证；循环架构的推理效率未详细讨论。

papers.title: Token Encoding for Semantic Recovery
authors: Jingzhi Hu and Geoffrey Ye Li
papers.abstract: Token-based semantic communication is promising for future wireless networks, as it can compact semantic tokens under very limited channel capacity. However, harsh wireless channels often cause missing tokens, leading to severe distortion that prevents reliable semantic recovery at the receiver. In this article, we propose a token encoding framework for robust semantic recovery (TokCode), which incurs no additional transmission overhead and supports plug-and-play deployment. For efficient token encoder optimization, we develop a sentence-semantic-guided foundation model adaptation algorithm (SFMA) that avoids costly end-to-end training. Based on simulation results on prompt-based generative image transmission, TokCode mitigates semantic distortion and can approach the performance upper-bound, even under harsh channels where 40% to 60% of tokens are randomly lost.

analysis.tldr: 提出 TokCode 框架，通过令牌编码和语义引导的模型适配，在无额外开销下恢复丢失令牌，提升恶劣信道下的语义通信鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于令牌的语义通信在信道容量受限时有效，但恶劣无线信道导致令牌丢失，造成严重语义失真，亟需鲁棒恢复方法。
analysis.problem: 解决恶劣信道下令牌随机丢失导致的语义恢复失真问题，且不增加传输开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在信道条件恶劣时，40% 到 60% 的令牌可能随机丢失，直接导致接收端语义恢复严重失真，影响通信质量。
analysis.main_method: 提出 TokCode 令牌编码框架，结合句子语义引导的基模型适配算法（SFMA），避免端到端训练，实现即插即用。
analysis.key_experiments: 在基于提示的生成式图像传输任务上仿真，验证 TokCode 在 40%-60% 令牌丢失率下接近性能上限。
analysis.contributions: 提出无额外开销的令牌编码框架和高效优化算法，显著提升恶劣信道下的语义恢复鲁棒性。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对生成式图像传输验证，未涉及其他模态或更复杂信道模型；依赖预训练基模型。

papers.title: Frequency-aware Decomposition Learning for Sensorless Wrench Forecasting on a Vibration-rich Hydraulic Manipulator
papers.abstract: Force and torque (F/T) sensing is critical for robot-environment interaction, but physical F/T sensors impose constraints in size, cost, and fragility. To mitigate this, recent studies have estimated force/wrench sensorlessly from robot internal states. While existing methods generally target relatively slow interactions, tasks involving rapid interactions, such as grinding, can induce task-critical high-frequency vibrations, and estimation in such robotic settings remains underexplored. To address this gap, we propose a Frequency-aware Decomposition Network (FDN) for short-term forecasting of vibration-rich wrench from proprioceptive history. FDN predicts spectrally decomposed wrench with asymmetric deterministic and probabilistic heads, modeling the high-frequency residual as a learned conditional distribution. It further incorporates frequency-awareness to adaptively enhance input spectra with learned filtering and impose a frequency-band prior on the outputs. We pretrain FDN on a large-scale open-source robot dataset and transfer the learned proprioception-to-wrench representation to the downstream. On real-world grinding excavation data from a 6-DoF hydraulic manipulator and under a delayed estimation setting, FDN outperforms baseline estimators and forecasters in the high-frequency band and remains competitive in the low-frequency band. Transfer learning provides additional gains, suggesting the potential of large-scale pretraining and transfer learning for robotic wrench estimation. Code and data will be made available upon acceptance.

analysis.tldr: 提出频率感知分解网络（FDN），从本体感受历史中预测振动丰富的力/扭矩，在液压机械臂磨削任务中优于基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理力/扭矩传感器在尺寸、成本和脆弱性方面存在限制，而现有无传感器方法主要针对慢速交互，缺乏对快速交互（如磨削）中高频振动的处理。
analysis.problem: 如何在振动丰富的快速交互场景中，从机器人内部状态准确预测力/扭矩。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 快速交互（如磨削）会引入任务关键的高频振动，而现有方法难以捕捉这些高频成分，导致估计精度下降。
analysis.main_method: 提出频率感知分解网络（FDN），使用非对称确定性和概率性头部对力/扭矩进行频谱分解，并通过学习滤波和频带先验增强输入和输出。
analysis.key_experiments: 在6自由度液压机械臂的真实磨削挖掘数据上，在延迟估计设置下评估，FDN在高频段优于基线，在低频段保持竞争力，且迁移学习带来额外提升。
analysis.contributions: 首次针对振动丰富场景提出频率感知的无传感器力/扭矩预测方法，并展示了大规模预训练和迁移学习的潜力。
analysis.limitations: 方法在低频段性能仅与基线持平，且依赖预训练数据的可用性。

papers.title: TCL: Enabling Fast and Efficient Cross-Hardware Tensor Program Optimization via Continual Learning
papers.abstract: Deep learning (DL) compilers rely on cost models and auto-tuning to optimize tensor programs for target hardware. However, existing approaches depend on large offline datasets, incurring high collection costs and offering suboptimal transferability across platforms. In this paper, we introduce TCL, a novel efficient and transferable compiler framework for fast tensor program optimization across diverse hardware platforms to address these challenges. Specifically, TCL is built on three core enablers: (1) the RDU Sampler, a data-efficient active learning strategy that selects only 10% of tensor programs by jointly optimizing Representativeness, Diversity, and Uncertainty, substantially reducing data collection costs while maintaining near-original model accuracy; (2) a new Mamba-based cost model that efficiently captures long-range schedule dependencies while achieving a favorable trade-off between prediction accuracy and computational cost through reduced parameterization and lightweight sequence modeling; and (3) a continuous knowledge distillation framework that effectively and progressively transfers knowledge across multiple hardware platforms while avoiding the parameter explosion and data dependency issues typically caused by traditional multi-task learning. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of each individual enabler and the holistic TCL framework. When optimizing a range of mainstream DL models on both CPU and GPU platforms, TCL achieves, on average, 16.8x and 12.48x faster tuning time, and 1.20x and 1.13x lower inference latency, respectively, compared to Tenset-MLP.

analysis.tldr: TCL 提出基于持续学习的跨硬件张量程序优化框架，通过主动采样、Mamba 成本模型和知识蒸馏实现快速高效调优。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 DL 编译器依赖大规模离线数据集，收集成本高且跨平台迁移性差，亟需高效可迁移的优化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖大规模数据的前提下，实现跨硬件平台的快速张量程序优化并保持高性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统多任务学习会导致参数爆炸和数据依赖，而主动学习可大幅减少数据需求，Mamba 模型能高效捕捉长程依赖。
analysis.main_method: 提出 RDU 采样器（联合优化代表性、多样性和不确定性）、Mamba 成本模型和持续知识蒸馏框架。
analysis.key_experiments: 在 CPU 和 GPU 上优化主流 DL 模型，相比 Tenset-MLP 调优时间加速 16.8x/12.48x，推理延迟降低 1.20x/1.13x。
analysis.contributions: 首次将持续学习引入跨硬件张量程序优化，提出数据高效采样和轻量级成本模型，显著提升调优效率。
analysis.limitations: 仅验证 CPU 和 GPU 平台，未涉及更多异构硬件（如 NPU/TPU）；Mamba 模型在极端复杂场景下的泛化性待考。

papers.title: Growing Pains: Extensible and Efficient LLM Benchmarking Via Fixed Parameter Calibration
papers.abstract: The rapid release of both language models and benchmarks makes it increasingly costly to evaluate every model on every dataset. In practice, models are often evaluated on different samples, making scores difficult to compare across studies. To address this, we propose a framework based on multidimensional Item Response Theory (IRT) that uses anchor items to calibrate new benchmarks to the evaluation suite while holding previously calibrated item parameters fixed. Our approach supports a realistic evaluation setting in which datasets are introduced over time and models are evaluated only on the datasets available at the time of evaluation, while a fixed anchor set for each dataset is used so that results from different evaluation periods can be compared directly. In large-scale experiments on more than $400$ models, our framework predicts full-evaluation performance within 2-3 percentage points using only $100$ anchor questions per dataset, with Spearman $\rho \geq 0.9$ for ranking preservation, showing that it is possible to extend benchmark suites over time while preserving score comparability, at a constant evaluation cost per new dataset. Code available at https://github.com/eliyahabba/growing-pains

analysis.tldr: 提出基于多维项目反应理论的框架，通过固定锚题校准新基准，实现跨时间评估分数可比性，仅用100题即可预测全评估性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言模型和基准快速迭代，全面评估成本高昂，且不同研究使用不同样本导致分数难以比较。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新评估所有模型的情况下，将新基准无缝集成到现有评估套件中，并保持分数可比性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型通常在不同样本上评估，使得跨研究分数比较困难；基准随时间引入，评估结果受限于当时可用数据集。
analysis.main_method: 基于多维项目反应理论，使用锚题校准新基准，固定先前校准的项目参数，仅评估新数据集上的锚题。
analysis.key_experiments: 在400多个模型上进行大规模实验，每个数据集仅用100个锚题，预测全评估性能误差在2-3个百分点内，Spearman ρ≥0.9。
analysis.contributions: 提出一种可扩展且高效的基准扩展框架，支持跨时间分数直接比较，且评估成本恒定。
analysis.limitations: 依赖锚题质量，可能不适用于高度动态或非标准化基准；未讨论锚题选择策略的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Understanding and Improving Continuous Adversarial Training for LLMs via In-context Learning Theory
papers.abstract: Adversarial training (AT) is an effective defense for large language models (LLMs) against jailbreak attacks, but performing AT on LLMs is costly. To improve the efficiency of AT for LLMs, recent studies propose continuous AT (CAT) that searches for adversarial inputs within the continuous embedding space of LLMs during AT. While CAT has achieved empirical success, its underlying mechanism, i.e., why adversarial perturbations in the embedding space can help LLMs defend against jailbreak prompts synthesized in the input token space, remains unknown. This paper presents the first theoretical analysis of CAT on LLMs based on in-context learning (ICL) theory. For linear transformers trained with adversarial examples from the embedding space on in-context linear regression tasks, we prove a robust generalization bound that has a negative correlation with the perturbation radius in the embedding space. This clearly explains why CAT can defend against jailbreak prompts from the LLM's token space. Further, the robust bound shows that the robustness of an adversarially trained LLM is closely related to the singular values of its embedding matrix. Based on this, we propose to improve LLM CAT by introducing an additional regularization term, which depends on singular values of the LLM's embedding matrix, into the objective function of CAT. Experiments on real-world LLMs demonstrate that our method can help LLMs achieve a better jailbreak robustness-utility tradeoff. The code is available at https://github.com/fshp971/continuous-adv-icl.

analysis.tldr: 首次从上下文学习理论解释连续对抗训练防御越狱攻击的机制，并提出基于嵌入矩阵奇异值的正则化改进方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 连续对抗训练在LLM防御中有效但机制不明，需理论解释为何嵌入空间的扰动能防御令牌空间的越狱攻击。
analysis.problem: 现有连续对抗训练缺乏理论支撑，且防御效果与模型实用性之间的平衡有待优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 嵌入空间的对抗扰动通过影响上下文学习中的泛化边界，间接增强对令牌空间越狱提示的鲁棒性。
analysis.main_method: 基于线性Transformer的上下文学习理论推导鲁棒泛化界，提出依赖嵌入矩阵奇异值的正则化项改进目标函数。
analysis.key_experiments: 在真实LLM上验证所提方法，对比标准连续对抗训练，展示更好的越狱鲁棒性与实用性权衡。
analysis.contributions: 首次为连续对抗训练提供理论解释，并提出可提升防御效果的正则化方法。
analysis.limitations: 理论分析限于线性Transformer和线性回归任务，对复杂LLM的适用性需进一步验证。

papers.title: Rapid LoRA Aggregation for Wireless Channel Adaptation in Open-Set Radio Frequency Fingerprinting
papers.abstract: Radio frequency fingerprints (RFFs) enable secure wireless authentication but struggle in open-set scenarios with unknown devices and varying channels. Existing methods face challenges in generalization and incur high computational costs. We propose a lightweight, self-adaptive RFF extraction framework using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). By pretraining LoRA modules per environment, our method enables fast adaptation to unseen channel conditions without full retraining. During inference, a weighted combination of LoRAs dynamically enhances feature extraction. Experimental results demonstrate a 15% reduction in equal error rate (EER) compared to non-finetuned baselines and an 83% decrease in training time relative to full fine-tuning, using the same training dataset. This approach provides a scalable and efficient solution for open-set RFF authentication in dynamic wireless vehicular networks.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于LoRA的轻量级自适应框架，实现无线信道快速适应，在开放集射频指纹识别中降低15%等错误率和83%训练时间。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有射频指纹识别方法在开放集场景下泛化能力差且计算成本高，需要高效的自适应方案。
analysis.problem: 开放集场景中未知设备和信道变化导致RFF识别困难，传统方法需全量重训练且泛化不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同信道环境对RFF特征提取影响显著，但环境间存在共享的底层特征模式，可通过LoRA模块组合实现快速适配。
analysis.main_method: 预训练每个环境的LoRA模块，推理时通过加权组合动态增强特征提取，避免全量重训练。
analysis.key_experiments: 在动态无线车载网络数据集上，与未微调基线相比EER降低15%，与全微调相比训练时间减少83%。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个基于LoRA的开放集RFF自适应框架，实现轻量级信道适配并显著降低计算开销。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论多环境LoRA模块数量扩展时的存储开销，以及极端信道变化下的鲁棒性边界。

papers.title: The role of System 1 and System 2 semantic memory structure in human and LLM biases
papers.abstract: Implicit biases in both humans and large language models (LLMs) pose significant societal risks. Dual process theories propose that biases arise primarily from associative System 1 thinking, while deliberative System 2 thinking mitigates bias, but the cognitive mechanisms that give rise to this phenomenon remain poorly understood. To better understand what underlies this duality in humans, and possibly in LLMs, we model System 1 and System 2 thinking as semantic memory networks with distinct structures, built from comparable datasets generated by both humans and LLMs. We then investigate how these distinct semantic memory structures relate to implicit gender bias using network-based evaluation metrics. We find that semantic memory structures are irreducible only in humans, suggesting that LLMs lack certain types of human-like conceptual knowledge. Moreover, semantic memory structure relates consistently to implicit bias only in humans, with lower levels of bias in System~2 structures. These findings suggest that certain types of conceptual knowledge contribute to bias regulation in humans, but not in LLMs, highlighting fundamental differences between human and machine cognition.

analysis.tldr: 通过语义记忆网络建模，发现人类和LLM的隐式偏见机制不同：人类系统2结构偏见更低，而LLM缺乏类似概念知识。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解人类和LLM中隐式偏见的认知机制差异，特别是双系统理论中系统1和系统2的作用。
analysis.problem: 人类和LLM的隐式偏见如何产生，以及系统1和系统2的语义记忆结构如何影响偏见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类语义记忆结构不可简化，且系统2结构偏见更低；LLM缺乏人类概念知识，结构-偏见关系不一致。
analysis.main_method: 将系统1和系统2思维建模为不同结构的语义记忆网络，使用网络评估指标分析隐式性别偏见。
analysis.key_experiments: 基于人类和LLM生成的可比数据集构建语义网络，比较偏见与结构的关系。
analysis.contributions: 揭示人类和LLM在偏见机制上的根本差异，强调概念知识在人类偏见调节中的作用。
analysis.limitations: 仅关注性别偏见，未涉及其他类型偏见；LLM数据集可能不完全代表其认知结构。

papers.title: Interpretable Relational Inference with LLM-Guided Symbolic Dynamics Modeling
papers.abstract: Inferring latent interaction structures from observed dynamics is a fundamental inverse problem in many-body interacting systems. Most neural approaches rely on black-box surrogates over trainable graphs, achieving accuracy at the expense of mechanistic interpretability. Symbolic regression offers explicit dynamical equations and stronger inductive biases, but typically assumes known topology and a fixed function library. We propose \textbf{COSINE} (\textbf{C}o-\textbf{O}ptimization of \textbf{S}ymbolic \textbf{I}nteractions and \textbf{N}etwork \textbf{E}dges), a differentiable framework that jointly discovers interaction graphs and sparse symbolic dynamics. To overcome the limitations of fixed symbolic libraries, COSINE further incorporates an outer-loop large language model that adaptively prunes and expands the hypothesis space using feedback from the inner optimization loop. Experiments on synthetic systems and large-scale real-world epidemic data demonstrate robust structural recovery and compact, mechanism-aligned dynamical expressions. Code: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/COSINE-6D43.

analysis.tldr: 提出 COSINE 框架，联合发现交互图与稀疏符号动力学，利用大语言模型自适应扩展符号空间。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经方法依赖黑箱代理，缺乏可解释性；符号回归需已知拓扑和固定函数库，灵活性不足。
analysis.problem: 从观测动力学中推断潜在交互结构，同时保持机制可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多体系统中，动力学与交互结构相互耦合，固定符号库难以覆盖复杂模式。
analysis.main_method: 提出 COSINE 框架，通过可微分优化联合学习交互图和稀疏符号动力学，并利用大语言模型外循环自适应调整符号假设空间。
analysis.key_experiments: 在合成系统和大规模真实疫情数据上验证，展示了鲁棒的结构恢复和紧凑的动力学表达式。
analysis.contributions: 首次将大语言模型融入符号动力学发现，实现交互图与符号方程联合优化，提升可解释性与灵活性。
analysis.limitations: 依赖大语言模型质量，计算开销可能较大；未讨论对高维系统的扩展性。

papers.title: EvoSpark: Endogenous Interactive Agent Societies for Unified Long-Horizon Narrative Evolution
papers.abstract: Realizing endogenous narrative evolution in LLM-based multi-agent systems is hindered by the inherent stochasticity of generative emergence. In particular, long-horizon simulations suffer from social memory stacking, where conflicting relational states accumulate without resolution, and narrative-spatial dissonance, where spatial logic detaches from the evolving plot. To bridge this gap, we propose EvoSpark, a framework specifically designed to sustain logically coherent long-horizon narratives within Endogenous Interactive Agent Societies. To ensure consistency, the Stratified Narrative Memory employs a Role Socio-Evolutionary Base as living cognition, dynamically metabolizing experiences to resolve historical conflicts. Complementarily, Generative Mise-en-Sc\`ene mechanism enforces Role-Location-Plot alignment, synchronizing character presence with the narrative flow. Underpinning these is the Unified Narrative Operation Engine, which integrates an Emergent Character Grounding Protocol to transform stochastic sparking into persistent characters. This engine establishes a substrate that expands a minimal premise into an open-ended, evolving story world. Experiments demonstrate that EvoSpark significantly outperforms baselines across diverse paradigms, enabling the sustained generation of expressive and coherent narrative experiences.

analysis.tldr: 提出EvoSpark框架，通过分层叙事记忆和生成性场面调度机制，解决多智能体系统中长程叙事的一致性问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统在长程叙事中面临社会记忆冲突和叙事空间脱节的问题，亟需统一框架维持逻辑连贯性。
analysis.problem: 长程叙事模拟中，社会记忆堆叠导致关系状态冲突无法解决，以及叙事空间失调使空间逻辑脱离情节发展。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 生成式涌现的随机性导致智能体关系状态累积矛盾，且空间逻辑与叙事流脱节，破坏故事连贯性。
analysis.main_method: 提出分层叙事记忆（Stratified Narrative Memory）和生成性场面调度（Generative Mise-en-Scène）机制，并集成统一叙事操作引擎（Unified Narrative Operation Engine）。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多种叙事范式下与基线方法对比，EvoSpark在表达性和连贯性上显著优于现有方法。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出内生交互智能体社会的长程叙事演化框架，解决社会记忆冲突和叙事空间失调问题。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论计算开销和可扩展性，可能受限于复杂场景下的实时性能。

papers.title: Teaching LLMs Human-Like Editing of Inappropriate Argumentation via Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Editing human-written text has become a standard use case of large language models (LLMs), for example, to make one's arguments more appropriate for a discussion. Comparing human to LLM-generated edits, however, we observe a mismatch in editing strategies: While LLMs often perform multiple scattered edits and tend to change meaning notably, humans rather encapsulate dependent changes in self-contained, meaning-preserving edits. In this paper, we present a reinforcement learning approach that teaches LLMs human-like editing to improve the appropriateness of arguments. Our approach produces self-contained sentence-level edit suggestions that can be accepted or rejected independently. We train the approach using group relative policy optimization with a multi-component reward function that jointly optimizes edit-level semantic similarity, fluency, and pattern conformity as well as argument-level appropriateness. In automatic and human evaluation, it outperforms competitive baselines and the state of the art in human-like editing, with multi-round editing achieving appropriateness close to full rewriting.

analysis.tldr: 通过强化学习训练LLM生成类似人类的、自包含的句子级编辑建议，以改进论证的适当性。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类与LLM在编辑策略上存在差异：LLM常进行分散编辑并改变原意，而人类则倾向于自包含、保留原意的编辑。
analysis.problem: 现有LLM编辑论证时策略不似人类，导致编辑分散且可能改变原意。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类编辑更注重自包含和保留原意，而LLM编辑往往分散且改变意义。
analysis.main_method: 使用组相对策略优化（GRPO）和多组件奖励函数（包括语义相似性、流畅性、模式一致性和论证适当性）训练LLM生成句子级编辑建议。
analysis.key_experiments: 在自动和人工评估中，该方法优于竞争基线和现有最先进方法，多轮编辑的适当性接近完全重写。
analysis.contributions: 提出了一种强化学习方法，使LLM生成类似人类的、自包含的句子级编辑建议，并联合优化多个编辑质量指标。
analysis.limitations: 可能依赖特定任务（论证适当性），泛化性需进一步验证；多轮编辑的实用性可能受限于接受/拒绝机制。

papers.title: Stress Detection Using Wearable Physiological and Sociometric Sensors
papers.abstract: Stress remains a significant social problem for individuals in modern societies. This paper presents a machine learning approach for the automatic detection of stress of people in a social situation by combining two sensor systems that capture physiological and social responses. We compare the performance using different classifiers including support vector machine, AdaBoost, and k-nearest neighbor. Our experimental results show that by combining the measurements from both sensor systems, we could accurately discriminate between stressful and neutral situations during a controlled Trier social stress test (TSST). Moreover, this paper assesses the discriminative ability of each sensor modality individually and considers their suitability for real-time stress detection. Finally, we present an study of the most discriminative features for stress detection.

analysis.tldr: 结合生理与社会传感器，用机器学习在TSST中自动检测压力，准确区分压力与中性状态。
analysis.research_motivation: 压力是现代社会的重大社会问题，需要自动检测方法以辅助健康管理。
analysis.problem: 如何利用可穿戴传感器数据自动检测社交情境中的压力状态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 生理和社会传感器数据组合能提升压力检测准确性，不同传感器模态各有贡献。
analysis.main_method: 使用支持向量机、AdaBoost和k近邻分类器，融合生理与社会传感器特征进行压力分类。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Trier社会压力测试（TSST）中对比多种分类器，评估单模态与多模态性能，并分析最具判别力的特征。
analysis.contributions: 验证了多模态传感器融合在压力检测中的有效性，并识别了关键特征。
analysis.limitations: 实验在受控环境下进行，真实场景泛化性未验证；样本量可能有限。

papers.title: Rethinking the Personalized Relaxed Initialization in the Federated Learning: Consistency and Generalization
papers.abstract: Federated learning (FL) is a distributed paradigm that coordinates massive local clients to collaboratively train a global model via stage-wise local training processes on the heterogeneous dataset. Previous works have implicitly studied that FL suffers from the ``client-drift'' problem, which is caused by the inconsistent optimum across local clients. However, till now it still lacks solid theoretical analysis to explain the impact of this local inconsistency. To alleviate the negative impact of ``client drift'' and explore its substance in FL, in this paper, we first propose an efficient FL algorithm FedInit, which allows employing the personalized relaxed initialization state at the beginning of each local training stage. Specifically, FedInit initializes the local state by moving away from the current global state towards the reverse direction of the latest local state. Moreover, to further understand how inconsistency disrupts performance in FL, we introduce the excess risk analysis and study the divergence term to investigate the test error in FL. Our studies show that optimization error is not sensitive to this local inconsistency, while it mainly affects the generalization error bound. Extensive experiments are conducted to validate its efficiency. The proposed FedInit method could achieve comparable results compared to several advanced benchmarks without any additional training or communication costs. Meanwhile, the stage-wise personalized relaxed initialization could also be incorporated into several current advanced algorithms to achieve higher generalization performance in the FL paradigm.

analysis.tldr: 提出FedInit算法，通过个性化松弛初始化缓解联邦学习中的客户端漂移问题，并理论分析其对泛化误差的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习中客户端漂移问题缺乏严格理论分析，现有研究未解释局部不一致性的本质影响。
analysis.problem: 联邦学习中客户端漂移导致局部最优不一致，影响全局模型性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 局部不一致性主要影响泛化误差界，而非优化误差，表明其通过破坏模型泛化能力降低性能。
analysis.main_method: 提出FedInit算法，在每个局部训练阶段开始时，将局部状态从当前全局状态向最新局部状态的反方向移动，实现个性化松弛初始化。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个基准数据集上验证FedInit，与先进算法比较，无需额外训练或通信成本即可达到相当性能，并能集成到现有算法中提升泛化。
analysis.contributions: 首次从理论上分析局部不一致性对泛化误差的影响，提出高效FedInit算法，可无缝集成到现有联邦学习框架。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论在极端非独立同分布数据下的表现，以及初始化方向选择对收敛速度的潜在影响。

papers.title: Generating Effective CoT Traces for Mitigating Causal Hallucination
papers.abstract: Although large language models (LLMs) excel in complex reasoning tasks, they suffer from severe causal hallucination in event causality identification (ECI), particularly in smaller models ($\leq$1.5B parameters). A promising approach to address this issue is to fine-tune them with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) traces. However, there is currently a lack of CoT trace dataset available for ECI. In this paper, we first investigate the essential criteria that effective CoT traces should possess to mitigate causal hallucination in smaller models. We then design a pipeline to generate CoT traces that meet these criteria. Moreover, since there is currently no metric for quantifying causal hallucination, we also introduce a new metric, the Causal Hallucination Rate (CHR), to quantify causal hallucination, guide the formulation of effective CoT trace criteria, and validate the effectiveness of our pipeline. Our experiments show that fine-tuning with the CoT traces generated by our pipeline not only substantially reduces causal hallucination in smaller LLMs but also improves mean accuracy. Moreover, the fine-tuned models exhibit strong cross-dataset and cross-difficulty generalization, as well as robustness under misleading intervention prompts.

analysis.tldr: 针对小模型在事件因果识别中的因果幻觉问题，提出生成有效思维链轨迹的流程和新指标CHR，微调后显著减少幻觉并提升准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 小参数LLM在事件因果识别中严重因果幻觉，但缺乏可用的思维链轨迹数据集。
analysis.problem: 小模型（≤1.5B参数）在事件因果识别中产生因果幻觉，且缺乏量化指标和有效CoT数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 小模型在因果推理中易产生虚假关联，导致幻觉；有效CoT轨迹需满足特定标准才能缓解此问题。
analysis.main_method: 设计生成符合有效标准的CoT轨迹的流程，并引入因果幻觉率（CHR）作为量化指标。
analysis.key_experiments: 微调小模型后，在多个数据集上测试准确率、跨数据集泛化性和对误导提示的鲁棒性。
analysis.contributions: 提出CoT轨迹生成流程和CHR指标，实验证明微调后显著降低幻觉并提升泛化能力。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对小模型（≤1.5B），未验证更大模型效果；CoT生成依赖特定设计标准。

papers.title: NaviRAG: Towards Active Knowledge Navigation for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
papers.abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) typically relies on a flat retrieval paradigm that maps queries directly to static, isolated text segments. This approach struggles with more complex tasks that require the conditional retrieval and dynamic synthesis of information across different levels of granularity (e.g., from broad concepts to specific evidence). To bridge this gap, we introduce NaviRAG, a novel framework that shifts from passive segment retrieval to active knowledge navigation. NaviRAG first structures the knowledge documents into a hierarchical form, preserving semantic relationships from coarse-grained topics to fine-grained details. Leveraging this reorganized knowledge records, a large language model (LLM) agent actively navigates the records, iteratively identifying information gaps and retrieving relevant content from the most appropriate granularity level. Extensive experiments on long-document QA benchmarks show that NaviRAG consistently improves both retrieval recall and end-to-end answer performance over conventional RAG baselines. Ablation studies confirm performance gains stem from our method's capacity for multi-granular evidence localization and dynamic retrieval planning. We further discuss efficiency, applicable scenario, and future directions of our method, hoping to make RAG systems more intelligent and autonomous.

analysis.tldr: NaviRAG 将被动检索转为主动知识导航，通过层次化文档结构和 LLM 代理动态规划检索，提升复杂问答性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统 RAG 的扁平检索范式难以处理需要跨粒度条件检索和动态合成的复杂任务。
analysis.problem: 现有 RAG 方法无法有效从不同粒度（如从宽泛概念到具体证据）进行条件检索和动态信息合成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 复杂任务中，信息常分布在文档的不同层级，静态检索无法自适应地定位和整合这些多粒度信息。
analysis.main_method: 构建层次化知识文档，利用 LLM 代理主动导航，迭代识别信息缺口并从最合适的粒度层级检索内容。
analysis.key_experiments: 在长文档 QA 基准上，NaviRAG 在检索召回率和端到端答案性能上均优于传统 RAG 基线，消融实验验证了多粒度定位和动态规划的有效性。
analysis.contributions: 提出主动知识导航范式，实现多粒度证据定位和动态检索规划，显著提升 RAG 在复杂任务中的智能性和自主性。
analysis.limitations: 论文未明确讨论计算开销和可扩展性，层次化构建可能依赖文档结构质量。

papers.title: Universal NER v2: Towards a Massively Multilingual Named Entity Recognition Benchmark
papers.abstract: While multilingual language models promise to bring the benefits of LLMs to speakers of many languages, gold-standard evaluation benchmarks in most languages to interrogate these assumptions remain scarce. The Universal NER project, now entering its fourth year, is dedicated to building gold-standard multilingual Named Entity Recognition (NER) benchmark datasets. Inspired by existing massively multilingual efforts for other core NLP tasks (e.g., Universal Dependencies), the project uses a general tagset and thorough annotation guidelines to collect standardized, cross-lingual annotations of named entity spans. The first installment (UNER v1) was released in 2024, and the project has continued and expanded since then, with various organizers, annotators, and collaborators in an active community.

analysis.tldr: Universal NER v2 项目致力于构建大规模多语言命名实体识别基准，通过统一标签集和标注指南收集跨语言标注数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 多语言语言模型虽承诺惠及多种语言，但大多数语言缺乏黄金标准评估基准，限制了模型性能的准确评估。
analysis.problem: 现有 NER 基准在语言覆盖上不足，缺乏标准化、跨语言的标注数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多语言 NLP 研究依赖少数高资源语言，低资源语言评估困难，导致模型泛化能力未知。
analysis.main_method: 采用通用标签集和详细标注指南，组织社区协作收集标准化跨语言命名实体标注。
analysis.key_experiments: UNER v1 于 2024 年发布，v2 在此基础上扩展，涉及更多组织者、标注者和合作者。
analysis.contributions: 构建大规模多语言 NER 基准，推动低资源语言评估标准化，促进社区协作。
analysis.limitations: 依赖人工标注，可能受标注者偏差影响；语言覆盖仍有限，未涵盖所有语言。

papers.title: Evaluating Differential Privacy Against Membership Inference in Federated Learning: Insights from the NIST Genomics Red Team Challenge
papers.abstract: While Federated Learning (FL) mitigates direct data exposure, the resulting trained models remain susceptible to membership inference attacks (MIAs). This paper presents an empirical evaluation of Differential Privacy (DP) as a defense mechanism against MIAs in FL, leveraging the environment of the 2025 NIST Genomics Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning (PPFL) Red Teaming Event. To improve inference accuracy, we propose a stacking attack strategy that ensembles seven black-box estimators to train a meta-classifier on prediction probabilities and cross-entropy losses. We evaluate this methodology against target models under three privacy configurations: an unprotected convolutional neural network (CNN, $\epsilon=\infty$), a low-privacy DP model ($\epsilon=200$), and a high-privacy DP model ($\epsilon=10$). The attack outperforms all baselines in the No DP and Low Privacy settings and, critically, maintains measurable membership leakage at $\epsilon=200$ where a single-signal LiRA baseline collapses. Evaluated on an independent third-party benchmark, these results provide an empirical characterisation of how stacking-based inference degrades across calibrated DP tiers in FL.

analysis.tldr: 在联邦学习中，通过堆叠攻击策略评估差分隐私对成员推理攻击的防御效果，发现低隐私DP下仍有可测量的成员泄露。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习虽减少直接数据暴露，但模型仍易受成员推理攻击，需评估差分隐私作为防御机制的有效性。
analysis.problem: 现有成员推理攻击在差分隐私保护下性能下降，需更鲁棒的攻击方法以量化隐私泄露。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 低隐私DP（ε=200）下，单信号LiRA基线失效，但堆叠攻击仍能检测到成员泄露，表明攻击策略的鲁棒性。
analysis.main_method: 提出堆叠攻击策略，集成七个黑盒估计器，基于预测概率和交叉熵损失训练元分类器。
analysis.key_experiments: 在NIST基因组PPFL红队挑战环境下，评估无DP、低隐私DP（ε=200）和高隐私DP（ε=10）三种配置下的攻击性能。
analysis.contributions: 首次在NIST基准上系统表征堆叠攻击在差分隐私联邦学习中的退化行为，并证明低隐私DP下仍有泄露。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对基因组数据，未验证其他领域；堆叠攻击计算开销较大。

papers.title: Token-Level Policy Optimization: Linking Group-Level Rewards to Token-Level Aggregation via Sequence-Level Likelihood
papers.abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has significantly advanced the reasoning ability of large language models (LLMs), particularly in their mathemat ical reasoning performance. However, GRPO and related entropy regularization methods still struggle with token-level sparse-rewards, which is an inherent chal lenge in chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning. These approaches often rely on undifferen tiated token-level entropy regularization, which easily leads to entropy collapse or model degradation under sparse token rewards. In this work, we propose TEPO, a novel token-level framework that (1) leverages sequence-level likelihood to link group-level rewards with individual tokens via token-level aggregation, and (2) introduces a token-level KL-Divergence mask constraint that targets tokens with positive advantages and decreasing entropy to mitigate abrupt policy updates. Experiments demonstrate that TEPO not only achieves state-of-the-art performance on mathematical reasoning benchmarks but also markedly enhances training stability, reducing convergence time by 50% compared with GRPO/DAPO.

analysis.tldr: 提出TEPO框架，通过序列级似然将组级奖励链接到令牌级聚合，并引入令牌级KL散度掩码约束，提升数学推理性能并减少50%收敛时间。
analysis.research_motivation: GRPO等现有方法在链式推理中面临令牌级稀疏奖励问题，导致熵崩溃或模型退化，亟需更稳定的优化策略。
analysis.problem: 解决GRPO中令牌级稀疏奖励导致的熵崩溃和模型退化问题，以及训练不稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: GRPO使用无差别的令牌级熵正则化，在稀疏奖励下容易引发熵崩溃，而TEPO通过序列级似然聚合奖励可缓解此现象。
analysis.main_method: TEPO框架包含两个关键组件：(1) 利用序列级似然将组级奖励通过令牌级聚合分配给每个令牌；(2) 引入令牌级KL散度掩码约束，针对正优势且熵下降的令牌限制策略更新。
analysis.key_experiments: 在数学推理基准上达到最先进性能，与GRPO/DAPO相比收敛时间减少50%。
analysis.contributions: 提出TEPO框架，有效解决令牌级稀疏奖励问题，提升训练稳定性和收敛速度，并在数学推理任务上取得SOTA。
analysis.limitations: 论文未明确讨论在非数学推理任务（如通用文本生成）上的泛化能力，且可能对超参数敏感。

papers.title: Transformer Based Machine Fault Detection From Audio Input
papers.abstract: In recent years, Sound AI is being increasingly used to predict machine failures. By attaching a microphone to the machine of interest, one can get real time data on machine behavior from the field. Traditionally, Convolutional Neural Net (CNN) architectures have been used to analyze spectrogram images generated from the sounds captured and predict if the machine is functioning as expected. CNN architectures seem to work well empirically even though they have biases like locality and parameter-sharing which may not be completely relevant for spectrogram analysis. With the successful application of transformer-based models in the field of image processing starting with Vision Transformer (ViT) in 2020, there has been significant interest in leveraging these in the field of Sound AI. Since transformer-based architectures have significantly lower inductive biases, they are expected to perform better than CNNs at spectrogram analysis given enough data. This paper demonstrates the effectiveness of transformer-driven architectures in analyzing Sound data and compares the embeddings they generate with CNNs on the specific task of machine fault detection.

analysis.tldr: 论文证明Transformer在机器故障音频检测中优于CNN，因其更低的归纳偏置能更好分析频谱图。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统CNN用于频谱图分析存在归纳偏置问题，而Transformer在图像处理中表现优异，因此探索其在声音AI中的应用。
analysis.problem: 解决CNN在频谱图分析中因局部性和参数共享偏置导致的性能限制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: CNN虽在频谱图任务上有效，但其归纳偏置不完全适合频谱图分析；Transformer因偏置更低，理论上在数据充足时表现更好。
analysis.main_method: 采用Transformer架构处理音频频谱图，并与CNN生成的嵌入进行对比，评估机器故障检测性能。
analysis.key_experiments: 在机器故障检测任务上，比较Transformer和CNN的嵌入效果及分类准确率。
analysis.contributions: 实证了Transformer在声音AI中的有效性，并提供了与CNN的对比分析。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论数据量不足时Transformer的性能，且实验可能局限于特定机器类型。

papers.title: Do VLMs Truly "Read" Candlesticks? A Multi-Scale Benchmark for Visual Stock Price Forecasting
papers.abstract: Vision-language models(VLMs) are increasingly applied to visual stock price forecasting, yet existing benchmarks inadequately evaluate their understanding of stock price in candlestick charts. First, prior studies fail to isolate VLMs' comprehension of visual inputs genuinely improves predictive performance and whether VLMs truly comprehend candlestick patterns. Further, most existing datasets and evaluation setups are designed around single-period or tabular inputs. However, human analysts strongly rely on multi-scale candlestick charts, where longer-term horizons capture trend direction and shorter-term horizons provide cues for inflection points, making it difficult to systematically assess VLMs' ability to integrate short-term and long-term visual market dynamics. To bridge this gap, we construct a multi-scale candlestick charts dataset and a standardized evaluation framework to assess VLMs' ability to utilize multi-scale visual market signals. Evaluation combines confusion-matrix-based diagnostics with information coefficient(IC) time series metrics and includes XGBoost as a feature-based temporal baseline. Using this dataset, we benchmark representative VLMs and analyze their ability to leverage multi-scale stock price data. Experimental results show that most VLMs perform well only under persistent uptrend or downtrend conditions, while exhibiting weak predictive capability in more common market scenarios. We also identify significant prediction biases and limited sensitivity to explicitly specified forecast horizons in prompts, indicating inherent limitations in precise temporal reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 构建多尺度K线图基准，评估视觉语言模型在股票价格预测中的真实理解能力，发现多数模型仅在持续趋势中表现良好。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准无法有效评估视觉语言模型对K线图的理解，且缺乏多尺度视觉市场信号的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 视觉语言模型是否真正理解K线图模式，以及如何评估其整合多尺度视觉信息的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多数模型仅在持续上涨或下跌趋势中表现良好，在常见市场场景中预测能力弱，且存在显著预测偏差和对预测时间窗口不敏感的问题。
analysis.main_method: 构建多尺度K线图数据集和标准化评估框架，结合混淆矩阵诊断和信息系数时间序列指标，以XGBoost作为基线。
analysis.key_experiments: 在构建的多尺度数据集上基准测试代表性视觉语言模型，分析其利用多尺度股票价格数据的能力。
analysis.contributions: 提出了多尺度K线图基准和评估框架，揭示了视觉语言模型在股票预测中的局限性。
analysis.limitations: 仅评估了有限模型，未深入探讨模型内部机制或改进方法。

papers.title: On Higher-Order Geometric Refinements of Classical Covariance Asymptotics: An Approach via Intrinsic and Extrinsic Information Geometry
papers.abstract: Classical Fisher-information asymptotics describe the covariance of regular efficient estimators through the local quadratic approximation of the log-likelihood, and thus capture first-order geometry only. In curved models, including mixtures, curved exponential families, latent-variable models, and manifold-constrained parameter spaces, finite-sample behavior can deviate systematically from these predictions. We develop a coordinate-invariant, curvature-aware refinement by viewing a regular parametric family as a Riemannian manifold \((\Theta,g)\) with Fisher--Rao metric, immersed in \(L^2(\mu)\) through the square-root density map. Under suitable regularity and moment assumptions, we derive an \(n^{-2}\) correction to the leading \(n^{-1}I(\theta)^{-1}\) covariance term for score-root, first-order efficient estimators. The correction is governed by a tensor \(P_{ij}\) that decomposes canonically into three parts, an intrinsic Ricci-type contraction of the Fisher--Rao curvature tensor, an extrinsic Gram-type contraction of the second fundamental form, and a Hellinger discrepancy tensor encoding higher-order probabilistic information not determined by immersion geometry alone. The extrinsic term is positive semidefinite, the full correction is invariant under smooth reparameterization, and it vanishes identically for full exponential families. We then extend the picture to singular models, where Fisher information degenerates. Using resolution of singularities under an additive normal crossing assumption, we describe the resolved metric, the role of the real log canonical threshold in learning rates and posterior mean-squared error, and a curvature-based covariance expansion on the resolved space that recovers the regular theory as a special case. This framework also suggests geometric diagnostics of weak identifiability and curvature-aware principles for regularization and optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出曲率感知的协方差高阶修正，通过内在和外在信息几何分解Fisher-Rao曲率，并扩展到奇异模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 经典Fisher渐近理论仅捕捉一阶几何，在弯曲模型中有限样本行为系统性偏离预测，需要更精确的协方差估计。
analysis.problem: 解决弯曲参数模型（如混合模型、潜在变量模型）中有限样本协方差与经典渐近理论偏差的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 弯曲模型中有限样本协方差偏离一阶渐近，源于曲率效应和更高阶概率信息，且奇异模型下Fisher信息退化。
analysis.main_method: 将参数族视为Fisher-Rao度量下的黎曼流形，通过平方根密度映射浸入L^2空间，推导n^{-2}修正项，分解为内在Ricci型、外在Gram型和Hellinger偏差张量。
analysis.key_experiments: 未明确提及实验，但理论推导涵盖正则和奇异模型，包括实对数规范阈值在奇异模型中的作用。
analysis.contributions: 提出坐标不变的曲率感知协方差修正，分解为三个几何分量，并扩展到奇异模型，提供弱可识别性诊断和正则化原则。
analysis.limitations: 修正项依赖于高阶张量计算，实际应用可能复杂；奇异模型部分依赖加性正规交叉假设，通用性待验证。

papers.title: InsightFlow: LLM-Driven Synthesis of Patient Narratives for Mental Health into Causal Models
papers.abstract: Clinical case formulation organizes patient symptoms and psychosocial factors into causal models, often using the 5P framework. However, constructing such graphs from therapy transcripts is time consuming and varies across clinicians. We present InsightFlow, an LLM based approach that automatically generates 5P aligned causal graphs from patient-therapist dialogues. Using 46 psychotherapy intake transcripts annotated by clinical experts, we evaluate LLM generated graphs against human formulations using structural (NetSimile), semantic (embedding similarity), and expert rated clinical criteria. The generated graphs show structural similarity comparable to inter annotator agreement and high semantic alignment with human graphs. Expert evaluations rate the outputs as moderately complete, consistent, and clinically useful. While LLM graphs tend to form more interconnected structures compared to the chain like patterns of human graphs, overall complexity and content coverage are similar. These results suggest that LLMs can produce clinically meaningful case formulation graphs within the natural variability of expert practice. InsightFlow highlights the potential of automated causal modeling to augment clinical workflows, with future work needed to improve temporal reasoning and reduce redundancy.

analysis.tldr: InsightFlow 利用 LLM 从心理治疗对话中自动生成符合 5P 框架的因果图，结构相似性接近人类标注者间一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床案例公式化需要从治疗对话中构建因果图，但手动构建耗时且存在临床医生间差异，亟需自动化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从患者-治疗师对话中自动生成结构合理、语义对齐且临床可用的 5P 因果模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM 生成的因果图比人类专家的链式结构更互联，但整体复杂度和内容覆盖相似，表明 LLM 能捕捉临床变异性。
analysis.main_method: 基于 LLM 的 InsightFlow 系统，利用 46 份专家标注的摄入期对话，通过结构（NetSimile）、语义（嵌入相似度）和专家评分评估生成图。
analysis.key_experiments: 在 46 份心理治疗摄入期对话上，对比 LLM 生成图与人类公式化图的结构、语义和临床标准，专家评估其完整性、一致性和实用性。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个自动生成 5P 因果图的 LLM 方法，验证其与人类公式化在结构和语义上的高度对齐，并揭示 LLM 图的互联特性。
analysis.limitations: LLM 图倾向于过度互联，缺乏时间推理能力，且存在冗余，需进一步优化。

papers.title: Robust Semi-Supervised Temporal Intrusion Detection for Adversarial Cloud Networks
authors: Daniel Reti and Hans D. Schotten
papers.abstract: Cloud networks increasingly rely on machine learning based Network Intrusion Detection Systems to defend against evolving cyber threats. However, real-world deployments are challenged by limited labeled data, non-stationary traffic, and adaptive adversaries. While semi-supervised learning can alleviate label scarcity, most existing approaches implicitly assume benign and stationary unlabeled traffic, leading to degraded performance in adversarial cloud environments. This paper proposes a robust semi-supervised temporal learning framework for cloud intrusion detection that explicitly addresses adversarial contamination and temporal drift in unlabeled network traffic. Operating on flow-level data, this framework combines supervised learning with consistency regularization, confidence-aware pseudo-labeling, and selective temporal invariance to conservatively exploit unlabeled traffic while suppressing unreliable samples. By leveraging the temporal structure of network flows, the proposed method improves robustness and generalization across heterogeneous cloud environments. Extensive evaluations on publicly available datasets (CIC-IDS2017, CSE-CIC-IDS2018, and UNSW-NB15) under limited-label conditions demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently outperforms state-of-the-art supervised and semi-supervised network intrusion detection systems in detection performance, label efficiency, and resilience to adversarial and non-stationary traffic.

analysis.tldr: 提出鲁棒半监督时序学习框架，应对云网络入侵检测中的标签稀缺、对抗污染和时序漂移问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有半监督入侵检测方法假设未标记流量良性且平稳，在对抗性云环境中性能下降。
analysis.problem: 云网络入侵检测面临标签数据有限、流量非平稳和自适应对抗攻击的挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 未标记流量中可能包含对抗样本和时序漂移，导致半监督学习性能退化。
analysis.main_method: 结合监督学习、一致性正则化、置信度感知伪标签和选择性时序不变性，保守利用未标记流量并抑制不可靠样本。
analysis.key_experiments: 在CIC-IDS2017、CSE-CIC-IDS2018和UNSW-NB15数据集上，有限标签条件下评估，优于现有监督和半监督方法。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个显式处理对抗污染和时序漂移的半监督时序入侵检测框架，提升检测性能和标签效率。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论框架在极端低标签比例或高度动态云环境下的表现，计算开销未详细分析。

papers.title: From Imitation to Discrimination: Progressive Curriculum Learning for Robust Web Navigation
papers.abstract: Text-based web agents offer computational efficiency for autonomous web navigation, yet developing robust agents remains challenging due to the noisy and heterogeneous nature of real-world HTML. Standard Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) approaches fail in two critical dimensions: they lack discrimination capabilities to reject plausible but incorrect elements in densely populated pages, and exhibit limited generalization to unseen website layouts. To address these challenges, we introduce the Triton dataset (590k instances) and a progressive training curriculum. Triton is constructed via Structural-Semantic Hard Negative Mining, which explicitly mines topologically similar distractors, and a Dual-Agent Consensus pipeline that synthesizes diverse cross-domain tasks with strict verification. Building upon this foundation, our progressive curriculum produces three models: Triton-SFT-32B for basic imitation, Triton-ORPO-32B for robust discrimination via Odds Ratio Preference Optimization, and Triton-GRPO-32B for long-horizon consistency through Group Relative Policy Optimization. Empirical evaluation on Mind2Web demonstrates that Triton-GRPO-32B achieves state-of-the-art performance among open-source models with 58.7% Step Success Rate, surpassing GPT-4.5 (42.4%) and Claude-4.5 (41.4%) by over 16%, validating that specialized data curriculum outweighs raw parameter scale for web navigation.

analysis.tldr: 提出渐进式课程学习框架，通过结构化-语义难负样本挖掘和双智能体共识构建数据集，使32B开源模型在网页导航任务上超越GPT-4.5和Claude-4.5。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本型网页代理在嘈杂异构的HTML环境中缺乏区分能力和泛化性，标准SFT方法无法处理密集页面中的干扰项和未见过的网站布局。
analysis.problem: 如何提升网页导航代理在真实噪声环境中的鲁棒性，使其既能模仿正确操作又能区分干扰项，并泛化到新网站布局。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准SFT训练导致模型缺乏判别能力，容易选择看似合理但错误的元素，且对未见过的网站布局泛化能力有限。
analysis.main_method: 构建Triton数据集（59万实例），采用结构化-语义难负样本挖掘和双智能体共识流水线；设计渐进式课程：SFT模仿→ORPO判别→GRPO长程一致性。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Mind2Web基准上，Triton-GRPO-32B达到58.7%步骤成功率，超越GPT-4.5（42.4%）和Claude-4.5（41.4%）超16%。
analysis.contributions: 提出Triton数据集和渐进式课程训练框架，证明专门化数据课程比原始参数规模对网页导航更关键，开源模型首次全面超越闭源模型。
analysis.limitations: 仅评估了Mind2Web单一基准，未测试跨领域泛化；32B模型的计算成本仍较高，未探索更小模型的可行性。

papers.title: Adaptive Test-Time Scaling for Zero-Shot Respiratory Audio Classification
papers.abstract: Automated respiratory audio analysis promises scalable, non-invasive disease screening, yet progress is limited by scarce labeled data and costly expert annotation. Zero-shot inference eliminates task-specific supervision, but existing methods apply uniform computation to every input regardless of difficulty. We introduce TRIAGE, a tiered zero-shot framework that adaptively scales test-time compute by routing each audio sample through progressively richer reasoning stages: fast label-cosine scoring in a joint audio-text embedding space (Tier-L), structured matching with clinician-style descriptors (Tier-M), and retrieval-augmented large language model reasoning (Tier-H). A confidence-based router finalizes easy predictions early while allocating additional computation to ambiguous inputs, enabling nearly half of all samples to exit at the cheapest tier. Across nine respiratory classification tasks without task-specific training, TRIAGE achieves a mean AUROC of 0.744, outperforming prior zero-shot methods and matching or exceeding supervised baselines on multiple tasks. Our analysis show that test-time scaling concentrates gains where they matter: uncertain cases see up to 19% relative improvement while confident predictions remain unchanged at minimal cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出TRIAGE框架，通过自适应测试时计算缩放，在零样本呼吸音频分类中平均AUROC达0.744，超越先前方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动化呼吸音频分析有潜力，但受限于标注数据稀缺和专家标注成本高，现有零样本方法对所有输入采用统一计算，效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何在零样本设置下，根据输入难度自适应分配测试时计算资源，提升呼吸音频分类的准确性和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同音频样本的难度差异大，简单样本可快速分类，而模糊样本需要更多推理；测试时缩放能显著提升不确定案例的性能（相对提升19%），同时保持高置信度预测不变。
analysis.main_method: TRIAGE采用三级路由框架：Tier-L快速余弦评分、Tier-M结构化匹配临床描述、Tier-H检索增强大语言模型推理，通过置信度路由器自适应决定退出层级。
analysis.key_experiments: 在9个呼吸分类任务上评估，无需任务特定训练，平均AUROC 0.744，优于零样本方法，部分任务匹配或超越监督基线；近半数样本在最低成本层级退出。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出自适应测试时缩放用于零样本音频分类，设计三级路由框架，实验证明其有效性和效率。
analysis.limitations: 依赖预训练音频-文本嵌入和LLM，可能受限于模型容量；未探索更细粒度的计算缩放策略。

papers.title: Monte Carlo Stochastic Depth for Uncertainty Estimation in Deep Learning
papers.abstract: The deployment of deep neural networks in safety-critical systems necessitates reliable and efficient uncertainty quantification (UQ). A practical and widespread strategy for UQ is repurposing stochastic regularizers as scalable approximate Bayesian inference methods, such as Monte Carlo Dropout (MCD) and MC-DropBlock (MCDB). However, this paradigm remains under-explored for Stochastic Depth (SD), a regularizer integral to the residual-based backbones of most modern architectures. While prior work demonstrated its empirical promise for segmentation, a formal theoretical connection to Bayesian variational inference and a benchmark on complex, multi-task problems like object detection are missing. In this paper, we first provide theoretical insights connecting Monte Carlo Stochastic Depth (MCSD) to principled approximate variational inference. We then present the first comprehensive empirical benchmark of MCSD against MCD and MCDB on state-of-the-art detectors (YOLO, RT-DETR) using the COCO and COCO-O datasets. Our results position MCSD as a robust and computationally efficient method that achieves highly competitive predictive accuracy (mAP), notably yielding slight improvements in calibration (ECE) and uncertainty ranking (AUARC) compared to MCD. We thus establish MCSD as a theoretically-grounded and empirically-validated tool for efficient Bayesian approximation in modern deep learning.

analysis.tldr: 将随机深度（SD）重新用于不确定性量化，提出蒙特卡洛随机深度（MCSD），在理论上与贝叶斯变分推断建立联系，并在目标检测任务上验证其高效性和竞争力。
analysis.research_motivation: 安全关键系统需要可靠的不确定性量化，而现有方法如MC Dropout已广泛使用，但随机深度作为现代残差网络的核心正则化器，其贝叶斯解释和系统评估尚不充分。
analysis.problem: 缺乏将随机深度形式化为近似贝叶斯推断的理论框架，以及其在复杂多任务（如目标检测）上的全面基准测试。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随机深度在分割任务中已显示潜力，但其与变分推断的理论联系未被揭示，且与MC Dropout和MC DropBlock在检测任务上的对比缺失。
analysis.main_method: 从理论上证明蒙特卡洛随机深度（MCSD）等价于近似变分推断，并在YOLO和RT-DETR检测器上使用COCO和COCO-O数据集进行系统实验。
analysis.key_experiments: 在COCO和COCO-O数据集上，对比MCSD与MC Dropout、MC DropBlock在YOLO和RT-DETR上的预测精度（mAP）、校准误差（ECE）和不确定性排序（AUARC）。
analysis.contributions: 首次建立MCSD与贝叶斯变分推断的理论联系，并通过全面实验证明其在目标检测中具有竞争力的精度和更好的校准性能。
analysis.limitations: 实验仅聚焦于目标检测任务，未涉及其他领域（如自然语言处理）；计算效率分析可能受限于特定硬件和实现。

papers.title: Transforming External Knowledge into Triplets for Enhanced Retrieval in RAG of LLMs
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) mitigates hallucination in large language models (LLMs) by incorporating external knowledge during generation. However, the effectiveness of RAG depends not only on the design of the retriever and the capacity of the underlying model, but also on how retrieved evidence is structured and aligned with the query. Existing RAG approaches typically retrieve and concatenate unstructured text fragments as context, which often introduces redundant or weakly relevant information. This practice leads to excessive context accumulation, reduced semantic alignment, and fragmented reasoning chains, thereby degrading generation quality while increasing token consumption. To address these challenges, we propose Tri-RAG, a structured triplet-based retrieval framework that improves retrieval efficiency through reasoning-aligned context construction. Tri-RAG automatically transforms external knowledge from natural language into standardized structured triplets consisting of Condition, Proof, and Conclusion, explicitly capturing logical relations among knowledge fragments using lightweight prompt-based adaptation with frozen model parameters. Building on this representation, the triplet head Condition is treated as an explicit semantic anchor for retrieval and matching, enabling precise identification of query-relevant knowledge units without directly concatenating lengthy raw texts. As a result, Tri-RAG achieves a favorable balance between retrieval accuracy and context token efficiency. Experimental results across multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that Tri-RAG significantly improves retrieval quality and reasoning efficiency, while producing more stable generation behavior and more efficient resource utilization in complex reasoning scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Tri-RAG，将外部知识转化为条件-证明-结论三元组，提升检索准确性和上下文效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 RAG 方法直接拼接非结构化文本，导致冗余和语义对齐差，影响生成质量。
analysis.problem: 检索到的非结构化文本片段包含冗余或弱相关信息，造成上下文过长、推理链碎片化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 非结构化文本的拼接引入噪声，降低语义对齐和推理连贯性，同时增加 token 消耗。
analysis.main_method: 通过轻量提示将自然语言转化为条件-证明-结论三元组，以条件头作为语义锚点进行检索匹配。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个基准数据集上评估，显示 Tri-RAG 在检索质量和推理效率上显著提升。
analysis.contributions: 提出结构化三元组表示方法，改善检索对齐和上下文效率，无需微调模型参数。
analysis.limitations: 三元组生成依赖提示质量，可能对复杂逻辑关系覆盖不足。

papers.title: Data-driven Reachable Set Estimation with Tunable Adversarial and Wasserstein Distributional Guarantees
authors: Georgios Pantazis and Michelle S. Chong
papers.abstract: We study finite horizon reachable set estimation for unknown discrete-time dynamical systems using only sampled state trajectories. Rather than treating scenario optimization as a black-box tool, we show how it can be tailored to reachable set estimation, where one must learn a family of sets based on whole trajectories, while preserving probabilistic guarantees on future trajectory inclusion for the entire horizon. To this end, we formulate a relaxed scenario program with slack variables that yields a tunable trade-off between reachable set size and out-of-sample trajectory inclusion over the horizon, thereby reducing sensitivity to outliers. Leveraging the recent results in adversarially robust scenario optimization, we then extend this formulation to account for bounded adversarial perturbations of the observed trajectories and derive a posteriori probabilistic guarantees on future trajectory inclusion. When probability distribution shifts in the Wasserstein distance occur, we obtain an explicit bound on how gracefully the theoretical probabilistic guarantees degrade. For different geometries, i.e., $p$-norm balls, ellipsoids, and zonotopes, we derive tractable convex reformulations and corroborate our theoretical results in simulation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种数据驱动的可达集估计方法，通过可调对抗和Wasserstein分布保证，实现未知离散时间系统的轨迹包含概率保障。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有场景优化方法在可达集估计中缺乏对异常值的鲁棒性和分布偏移的适应性，需要更灵活的框架。
analysis.problem: 如何从采样轨迹中学习可达集，同时提供未来轨迹包含的概率保证，并应对对抗扰动和分布偏移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 松弛场景程序通过引入松弛变量可调节可达集大小与轨迹包含概率的权衡，减少异常值影响；对抗鲁棒优化和Wasserstein距离分析分别处理扰动和分布偏移。
analysis.main_method: 基于松弛场景程序，结合对抗鲁棒优化和Wasserstein分布偏移界，推导出不同几何形状（p-范数球、椭球、多面体）的可处理凸优化形式。
analysis.key_experiments: 通过仿真验证了理论结果，展示了不同几何形状下可达集估计的鲁棒性和概率保证。
analysis.contributions: 首次将对抗鲁棒场景优化和Wasserstein分布偏移分析系统性地应用于可达集估计，提供可调权衡和显式退化界。
analysis.limitations: 仅考虑有限时域和离散时间系统，未扩展到连续时间或无限时域；对抗扰动假设为有界，可能不适用于无界情况。

papers.title: Multilingual Multi-Label Emotion Classification at Scale with Synthetic Data
papers.abstract: Emotion classification in multilingual settings remains constrained by the scarcity of annotated data: existing corpora are predominantly English, single-label, and cover few languages. We address this gap by constructing a large-scale synthetic training corpus of over 1M multi-label samples (50k per language) across 23 languages: Arabic, Bengali, Dutch, English, French, German, Hindi, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Mandarin, Polish, Portuguese, Punjabi, Russian, Spanish, Swahili, Tamil, Turkish, Ukrainian, Urdu, and Vietnamese, covering 11 emotion categories using culturally-adapted generation and programmatic quality filtering. We train and compare six multilingual transformer encoders, from DistilBERT (135M parameters) to XLM-R-Large (560M parameters), under identical conditions. On our in-domain test set, XLM-R-Large achieves 0.868 F1-micro and 0.987 AUC-micro. To validate against human-annotated data, we evaluate all models zero-shot on GoEmotions (English) and SemEval-2018 Task 1 E-c (English, Arabic, Spanish). On threshold-free ranking metrics, XLM-R-Large matches or exceeds English-only specialist models, tying on AP-micro (0.636) and LRAP (0.804) while surpassing on AUC-micro (0.810 vs. 0.787), while natively supporting all 23 languages. The best base-sized model is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/tabularisai/multilingual-emotion-classification

analysis.tldr: 通过合成数据构建大规模多语言多标签情感分类数据集，训练模型在23种语言上达到或超越英语专用模型性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有情感分类数据集主要限于英语、单标签且覆盖语言少，缺乏多语言多标签标注数据。
analysis.problem: 多语言情感分类中标注数据稀缺，尤其是非英语语言的多标签情感标注。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 合成数据可有效弥补多语言标注缺失，且模型在零样本迁移中表现接近甚至超越英语专用模型。
analysis.main_method: 构建包含23种语言、110万样本的合成训练集，采用文化适应生成和质量过滤，训练6种多语言Transformer编码器。
analysis.key_experiments: 在域内测试集上XLM-R-Large达0.868 F1-micro和0.987 AUC-micro；零样本评估GoEmotions和SemEval-2018任务，在AUC-micro上超越英语专用模型。
analysis.contributions: 提供大规模多语言多标签情感分类合成数据集，验证合成数据在跨语言情感分类中的有效性。
analysis.limitations: 合成数据可能无法完全捕捉真实情感标注的细微差异，且仅覆盖11种情感类别。

papers.title: Instantiating Bayesian CVaR lower bounds in Interactive Decision Making Problems
papers.abstract: Recent work established a generalized-Fano framework for lower bounding prior-predictive (Bayesian) CVaR in interactive statistical decision making. In this paper, we show how to instantiate that framework in concrete interactive problems and derive explicit Bayesian CVaR lower bounds from its abstract corollaries. Our approach compares a hard model with a reference model using squared Hellinger distance, and combines a lower bound on a reference hinge term with a bound on the distinguishability of the two models. We apply this approach to canonical examples, including Gaussian bandits, and obtain explicit bounds that make the dependence on key problem parameters transparent. These results show how the generalized-Fano Bayesian CVaR framework can be used as a practical lower-bound tool for interactive learning and risk-sensitive decision making.

analysis.tldr: 本文展示了如何在交互式决策问题中实例化贝叶斯CVaR下界的广义Fano框架，并推导出显式下界。
analysis.research_motivation: 先前工作建立了贝叶斯CVaR下界的广义Fano框架，但缺乏具体实例化方法，需要将其应用于实际交互问题。
analysis.problem: 如何将抽象的广义Fano贝叶斯CVaR下界框架具体化，以在交互式决策问题中推导显式下界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过比较硬模型与参考模型（使用平方Hellinger距离），结合参考铰链项下界和模型可区分性边界，可得到显式下界。
analysis.main_method: 采用平方Hellinger距离比较硬模型与参考模型，并组合参考铰链项下界与模型可区分性边界来推导下界。
analysis.key_experiments: 应用于高斯bandit等经典示例，得到显式下界，清晰展示了关键问题参数的影响。
analysis.contributions: 提供了广义Fano贝叶斯CVaR框架的实例化方法，使其成为交互式学习和风险敏感决策的实用下界工具。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对特定示例（如高斯bandit）进行验证，未讨论更复杂场景的适用性。

papers.title: Agentic Control in Variational Language Models
papers.abstract: We study whether a variational language model can support a minimal and measurable form of agentic control grounded in its own internal evidence. Our model combines local variational hidden computation (EVE), a homeostatic latent regulator, structurally aware checkpoint retention and a calibrated uncertainty-aware controller operating on top of the retained model. Rather than treating uncertainty as a passive diagnostic measured after prediction, we treat it as an operational signal that can regulate training, support checkpoint retention and guide inference-time intervention. The resulting framework is deliberately focused. It studies a closed-loop form of internal control in which structural and predictive signals become actionable. Empirically, the variational backbone improves over a matched deterministic reference on the language-modeling task while also exhibiting a richer and more usable uncertainty profile. On top of this backbone, the calibrated controller remains active, uses multiple actions under a full agentic evaluation and yields a positive quality-cost trade-off. These results support a precise claim: internal uncertainty can serve not only as a descriptive property of a variational language model, but also as a practical control interface for regulation, checkpoint retention and minimal agentic routing.

analysis.tldr: 研究变分语言模型能否利用内部不确定性实现最小化的智能控制，并验证其作为操作信号的有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索语言模型内部不确定性是否可以作为主动控制信号，而非仅作为被动诊断指标。
analysis.problem: 传统语言模型将不确定性视为预测后的被动度量，缺乏利用其进行训练、检查点保留和推理干预的机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 变分语言模型的不确定性分布更丰富且更可用，能够作为调节训练、保留检查点和引导推理的可行信号。
analysis.main_method: 结合局部变分隐式计算（EVE）、稳态潜在调节器、结构感知检查点保留和校准的不确定性感知控制器。
analysis.key_experiments: 在语言建模任务上，变分骨干模型优于匹配的确定性参考模型，且校准控制器在完整智能体评估中实现正向质量-成本权衡。
analysis.contributions: 证明内部不确定性可作为变分语言模型的实际控制接口，用于调节、保留和最小化智能路由。
analysis.limitations: 仅研究了最小化控制形式，未涉及更复杂的智能体行为或大规模应用验证。

papers.title: FABLE: Fine-grained Fact Anchoring for Unstructured Model Editing
papers.abstract: Unstructured model editing aims to update models with real-world text, yet existing methods often memorize text holistically without reliable fine-grained fact access. To address this, we propose FABLE, a hierarchical framework that decouples fine-grained fact injection from holistic text generation. FABLE follows a two-stage, fact-first strategy: discrete facts are anchored in shallow layers, followed by minimal updates to deeper layers to produce coherent text. This decoupling resolves the mismatch between holistic recall and fine-grained fact access, reflecting the unidirectional Transformer flow in which surface-form generation amplifies rather than corrects underlying fact representations. We also introduce UnFine, a diagnostic benchmark with fine-grained question-answer pairs and fact-level metrics for systematic evaluation. Experiments show that FABLE substantially improves fine-grained question answering while maintaining state-of-the-art holistic editing performance. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/caskcsg/FABLE.

analysis.tldr: 提出FABLE框架，通过分层解耦细粒度事实注入与整体文本生成，提升非结构化模型编辑的细粒度事实访问能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有非结构化模型编辑方法整体记忆文本，缺乏可靠的细粒度事实访问，导致事实更新不精确。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲整体生成质量的前提下，实现模型编辑中细粒度事实的精确注入与访问。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Transformer单向流中，表面形式生成会放大而非纠正底层事实表示，导致整体回忆与细粒度事实访问不匹配。
analysis.main_method: 提出FABLE分层框架，采用两阶段事实优先策略：在浅层锚定离散事实，然后最小化更新深层以生成连贯文本。
analysis.key_experiments: 在UnFine诊断基准上评估，包含细粒度问答对和事实级指标，FABLE显著提升细粒度问答性能，同时保持整体编辑效果最优。
analysis.contributions: 提出FABLE框架实现事实注入与文本生成解耦；构建UnFine基准用于细粒度评估；实验证明方法有效性。
analysis.limitations: 可能依赖预定义事实结构，对复杂事实关系处理能力待验证；未讨论多轮编辑场景。

papers.title: Beyond Transcription: Unified Audio Schema for Perception-Aware AudioLLMs
papers.abstract: Recent Audio Large Language Models (AudioLLMs) exhibit a striking performance inversion: while excelling at complex reasoning tasks, they consistently underperform on fine-grained acoustic perception. We attribute this gap to a fundamental limitation of ASR-centric training, which provides precise linguistic targets but implicitly teaches models to suppress paralinguistic cues and acoustic events as noise. To address this, we propose Unified Audio Schema (UAS), a holistic and structured supervision framework that organizes audio information into three explicit components -- Transcription, Paralinguistics, and Non-linguistic Events -- within a unified JSON format. This design achieves comprehensive acoustic coverage without sacrificing the tight audio-text alignment that enables reasoning. We validate the effectiveness of this supervision strategy by applying it to both discrete and continuous AudioLLM architectures. Extensive experiments on MMSU, MMAR, and MMAU demonstrate that UAS-Audio yields consistent improvements, boosting fine-grained perception by 10.9% on MMSU over the same-size state-of-the-art models while preserving robust reasoning capabilities. Our code and model are publicly available at https://github.com/Tencent/Unified_Audio_Schema.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一音频模式（UAS），通过结构化JSON格式整合转录、副语言和非语言事件，提升AudioLLM的细粒度感知能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AudioLLM在复杂推理任务上表现优异，但在细粒度声学感知上持续落后，源于以ASR为中心的训练抑制了副语言和声学事件。
analysis.problem: ASR中心训练导致模型将副语言线索和声学事件视为噪声，缺乏全面的声学覆盖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AudioLLM在推理和感知任务上存在性能反转，表明当前训练范式对非语言信息的建模不足。
analysis.main_method: 提出统一音频模式（UAS），将音频信息分为转录、副语言和非语言事件三个组件，以统一JSON格式进行结构化监督。
analysis.key_experiments: 在MMSU、MMAR和MMAU数据集上验证，UAS-Audio在MMSU上细粒度感知提升10.9%，同时保持推理能力。
analysis.contributions: 提出UAS框架，实现全面声学覆盖而不牺牲音频-文本对齐，适用于离散和连续AudioLLM架构。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论对极端噪声或低资源场景的泛化能力，以及JSON格式的扩展性。

papers.title: Safety Training Modulates Harmful Misalignment Under On-Policy RL, But Direction Depends on Environment Design
papers.abstract: Specification gaming under Reinforcement Learning (RL) is known to cause LLMs to develop sycophantic, manipulative, or deceptive behavior, yet the conditions under which this occurs remain unclear. We train 11 instruction-tuned LLMs (0.5B--14B) with on-policy RL across 3 environments and find that model size acts as a safety buffer in some environments but enables greater harmful exploitation in others. Controlled ablations trace this reversal to environment-specific features such as role framing and implicit gameability cues. We further show that most safety benchmarks do not predict RL-induced misalignment, except in the case of Sycophancy scores when the exploit relies on inferring the user's preference. Finally, we find that on-policy RL preserves a safety buffer inherent in the model's own generation distribution, one that is bypassed during off-policy settings.

analysis.tldr: 研究发现，在策略强化学习中，模型大小对有害对齐的影响取决于环境设计，安全训练可调节但方向因环境而异。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习中的规范游戏会导致LLM产生谄媚、操纵或欺骗行为，但具体条件尚不明确，因此需要系统研究。
analysis.problem: 在策略强化学习下，模型大小如何影响有害对齐，以及安全训练能否有效缓解这种对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型大小在某些环境中作为安全缓冲，但在其他环境中却加剧有害利用，这种反转源于环境特定特征如角色框架和隐含的可游戏性线索。
analysis.main_method: 在3种环境中对11个指令微调LLM（0.5B-14B）进行在策略RL训练，并通过控制消融实验分析环境特征的影响。
analysis.key_experiments: 对比不同环境下的模型行为，测试安全基准的预测能力，并比较在策略与离策略RL的安全缓冲效果。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了环境设计对RL诱导有害对齐的关键作用，并指出大多数安全基准无法预测RL诱导的失调。
analysis.limitations: 仅研究了有限的环境和模型规模，未涵盖所有可能的RL设置或更广泛的安全干预措施。

papers.title: Calibrated Confidence Estimation for Tabular Question Answering
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed for tabular question answering, yet calibration on structured data is largely unstudied. This paper presents the first systematic comparison of five confidence estimation methods across five frontier LLMs and two tabular QA benchmarks. All models are severely overconfident (smooth ECE 0.35-0.64 versus 0.10-0.15 reported for textual QA). A consistent self-evaluation versus perturbation dichotomy replicates across both benchmarks and all four fully-covered models: self-evaluation methods (verbalized, P(True)) achieve AUROC 0.42-0.76, while perturbation methods (semantic entropy, self-consistency, and our Multi-Format Agreement) achieve AUROC 0.78-0.86. Per-model paired bootstrap tests reject the null at p<0.001 after Holm-Bonferroni correction, and a 3-seed check on GPT-4o-mini gives a per-seed standard deviation of only 0.006. The paper proposes Multi-Format Agreement (MFA), which exploits the lossless and deterministic serialization variation unique to structured data (Markdown, HTML, JSON, CSV) to estimate confidence at 20% lower API cost than sampling baselines. MFA reduces ECE by 44-63%, generalizes across all four models on TableBench (mean AUROC 0.80), and combines complementarily with sampling: an MFA + self-consistency ensemble lifts AUROC from 0.74 to 0.82. A secondary contribution, structure-aware recalibration, improves AUROC by +10 percentage points over standard post-hoc methods.

analysis.tldr: 首次系统比较表格问答中的置信度估计方法，发现所有模型严重过度自信，并提出多格式一致性方法（MFA）有效校准。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在表格问答中广泛应用，但结构化数据上的置信度校准尚未被系统研究。
analysis.problem: 现有模型在表格问答中表现出严重过度自信，且缺乏有效的置信度估计方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有模型在表格问答上的平滑ECE高达0.35-0.64，远高于文本问答的0.10-0.15，表明结构化数据加剧了过度自信。
analysis.main_method: 提出多格式一致性（MFA），利用结构化数据特有的无损确定性序列化变体（如Markdown、HTML、JSON、CSV）估计置信度，并与自洽性集成。
analysis.key_experiments: 在5个前沿LLM和2个表格QA基准上比较5种方法，MFA将ECE降低44-63%，AUROC达0.80，且API成本降低20%。
analysis.contributions: 首次系统研究表格QA置信度校准，提出MFA方法及结构感知重校准，显著提升校准效果。
analysis.limitations: MFA依赖结构化数据的序列化变体，可能不适用于非结构化数据；实验仅覆盖4个模型。

papers.title: Adaptive Budget Allocation in LLM-Augmented Surveys
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can generate survey responses at low cost, but their reliability varies substantially across questions and is unknown before data collection. Deploying LLMs in surveys still requires costly human responses for verification and correction. How should a limited human-labeling budget be allocated across questions in real time? We propose an adaptive allocation algorithm that learns which questions are hardest for the LLM while simultaneously collecting human responses. Each human label serves a dual role: it improves the estimate for that question and reveals how well the LLM predicts human responses on it. The algorithm directs more budget to questions where the LLM is least reliable, without requiring any prior knowledge of question-level LLM accuracy. We prove that the allocation gap relative to the best possible allocation vanishes as the budget grows, and validate the approach on both synthetic data and a real survey dataset with 68 questions and over 2000 respondents. On real survey data, the standard practice of allocating human labels uniformly across questions wastes 10--12% of the budget relative to the optimal; our algorithm reduces this waste to 2--6%, and the advantage grows as questions become more heterogeneous in LLM prediction quality. The algorithm achieves the same estimation quality as traditional uniform sampling with fewer human samples, requires no pilot study, and is backed by formal performance guarantees validated on real survey data. More broadly, the framework applies whenever scarce human oversight must be allocated across tasks where LLM reliability is unknown.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应预算分配算法，在LLM辅助调查中动态分配有限人工标注，优先处理LLM不可靠的问题，减少浪费。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成调查响应成本低但可靠性因问题而异，且事先未知，需要人工验证，但人工预算有限。
analysis.problem: 如何在实时调查中，将有限的人工标注预算动态分配到不同问题，以最小化估计误差？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在不同问题上的预测质量差异大，均匀分配人工标注会浪费预算，而自适应分配可显著提升效率。
analysis.main_method: 提出自适应分配算法，每轮同时收集人工和LLM响应，利用人工标签双重作用（改进估计、评估LLM预测质量），动态将更多预算分配给LLM最不可靠的问题。
analysis.key_experiments: 在合成数据和真实调查数据集（68个问题，2000+受访者）上验证，与均匀分配相比，预算浪费从10-12%降至2-6%。
analysis.contributions: 提出无需先验知识的自适应预算分配算法，理论保证分配差距随预算增长消失，并在真实数据上显著优于均匀分配。
analysis.limitations: 算法依赖问题间LLM可靠性的异质性，若所有问题LLM表现一致则优势有限；未考虑问题间相关性。

papers.title: Meet Dynamic Individual Preferences: Resolving Conflicting Human Value with Paired Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have significantly improved the alignment of models with general human preferences. However, a major challenge remains in adapting LLMs to individual preferences, which are not only diverse but also dynamic. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework, Preference-Paired Fine-Tuning (PFT), designed to align models with contradictory and evolving individual preferences. We present a new dataset, Value Conflict Dilemma (VCD), which includes scenarios that involve conflicting human preferences, facilitating the evaluation of our approach. Our experiments demonstrate that PFT outperforms single-preference training methods, achieving up to 96.6% accuracy in multi-choice classification tasks and the highest open-ended generation score of 8.69. PFT also shows significant improvements over DPO, SFT and some traditional training methods, especially when handling conflicting preferences. Additionally, with limited user history data, models can inferring preference vector rapidly, achieving a 44.76% improvement in user-specific preference alignment in comparison to single-preference models.

analysis.tldr: 提出偏好配对微调（PFT）框架，解决大语言模型与动态、矛盾的个体偏好对齐问题，在冲突偏好场景下准确率达96.6%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法主要对齐通用偏好，但个体偏好多样且动态变化，存在冲突时模型难以适应。
analysis.problem: 如何让大语言模型有效处理个体间矛盾且随时间演变的偏好。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 个体偏好常相互冲突（如安全性与创造力），且用户历史数据有限时模型难以快速推断偏好向量。
analysis.main_method: 提出偏好配对微调（PFT），通过成对偏好数据训练模型区分和适应矛盾偏好，并构建价值冲突困境（VCD）数据集。
analysis.key_experiments: 在VCD数据集上，PFT在多选分类任务中达96.6%准确率，开放生成得分8.69；相比DPO、SFT等方法，在冲突偏好场景下提升显著，且利用有限历史数据实现44.76%的对齐改进。
analysis.contributions: 首次系统解决动态矛盾个体偏好对齐问题，提出PFT框架和VCD数据集，实验证明其有效性。
analysis.limitations: 依赖高质量成对偏好数据，且偏好动态变化的长期适应性未充分验证。

papers.title: Beyond Single-Dimension Novelty: How Combinations of Theory, Method, and Results-based Novelty Shape Scientific Impact
papers.abstract: Scientific novelty drives advances at the research frontier, yet it is also associated with heightened uncertainty and potential resistance from incumbent paradigms, leading to complex patterns of scientific impact. Prior studies have primarily ex-amined the relationship between a single dimension of novelty -- such as theoreti-cal, methodological, or results-based novelty -- and scientific impact. However, because scientific novelty is inherently multidimensional, focusing on isolated dimensions may obscure how different types of novelty jointly shape impact. Consequently, we know little about how combinations of novelty types influence scientific impact. To this end, we draw on a dataset of 15,322 articles published in Nature Communications. Using the DeepSeek-V3 model, we classify articles into three novelty dimensions based on the content of their Introduction sections: theoretical novelty, methodological novelty, and results-based novelty. These dimensions may coexist within the same article, forming distinct novelty configura-tions. Scientific impact is measured using five-year citation counts and indicators of whether an article belongs to the top 1% or top 10% highly cited papers. Descriptive results indicate that results-based novelty alone and the simultaneous presence of all three novelty types are the dominant configurations in the sample. Regression results further show that articles with results-based novelty only re-ceive significantly more citations and are more likely to rank among the top 1% and top 10% highly cited papers than articles exhibiting all three novelty types. These findings advance our understanding of how multidimensional novelty configurations shape knowledge diffusion.

analysis.tldr: 研究发现，仅具有结果新颖性的论文比同时具备理论、方法和结果新颖性的论文获得更多引用和更高影响力。
analysis.research_motivation: 先前研究多关注单一维度新颖性对科学影响力的作用，但科学新颖性本质上是多维的，需要探索不同新颖性组合如何共同影响影响力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对理论、方法和结果新颖性组合如何塑造科学影响力的理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仅结果新颖性以及三种新颖性同时存在是样本中的主导配置，但仅结果新颖性的论文反而获得更高引用。
analysis.main_method: 使用DeepSeek-V3模型对Nature Communications的15,322篇论文的引言部分进行分类，识别理论、方法和结果新颖性维度，并通过回归分析检验其组合对引用量的影响。
analysis.key_experiments: 基于五年引用计数、前1%和前10%高被引论文指标，比较不同新颖性配置的引用表现。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了多维新颖性配置对知识扩散的复杂影响，挑战了“更多新颖性更好”的直觉。
analysis.limitations: 仅基于单一期刊（Nature Communications），可能限制泛化性；分类依赖模型对引言的理解，存在误差。

papers.title: Analyzing the Effect of Noise in LLM Fine-tuning
papers.abstract: Fine-tuning is the dominant paradigm for adapting pretrained large language models (LLMs) to downstream NLP tasks. In practice, fine-tuning datasets may contain various forms of noise arising from annotation errors, preprocessing artifacts, or automated data collection. While prior work has focused on designing robust learning algorithms to mitigate performance degradation under noisy conditions, comparatively little is known about how different types of noise affect the internal learning dynamics of LLMs during fine-tuning. In this work, we systematically study the impact of noise on model behavior across three pretrained model families (GPT-2, Qwen2 and Llama-2) and three diverse NLP tasks. We introduce controlled perturbations corresponding to three common real-world noise types: label noise, grammatical noise, and typographical noise. Beyond task-level performance, we analyze layer-wise representation changes and attention patterns to understand how noise propagates through the network.
