Our results show that corrupting labels (i.e. label noise) consistently causes the largest performance degradation, whereas grammatical noise and typographical noise can occasionally yield mild regularization benefits. We further find that noise effects are localized primarily to task-specific layers, while attention structures remain comparatively stable.

analysis.tldr: 系统研究标签、语法和拼写噪声对LLM微调的影响，发现标签噪声危害最大，而语法和拼写噪声有时有轻微正则化效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究主要关注设计鲁棒算法缓解噪声导致的性能下降，但对噪声如何影响LLM微调的内部学习动态知之甚少。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对不同类型噪声在LLM微调过程中如何影响模型行为（包括表示变化和注意力模式）的系统理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标签噪声持续导致最大性能下降，而语法和拼写噪声偶尔带来轻微正则化收益；噪声效应主要局限于任务特定层，注意力结构相对稳定。
analysis.main_method: 在GPT-2、Qwen2和Llama-2三个模型家族及三个NLP任务上，引入标签噪声、语法噪声和拼写噪声三种受控扰动，分析层表示变化和注意力模式。
analysis.key_experiments: 在三个预训练模型（GPT-2、Qwen2、Llama-2）和三个不同NLP任务上，系统比较三种噪声类型对任务性能和内部动态的影响。
analysis.contributions: 首次系统揭示不同类型噪声对LLM微调内部学习动态的影响，并发现噪声效应的局部化特性。
analysis.limitations: 仅研究了三种噪声类型和三个任务，可能无法覆盖所有实际场景；未探索噪声强度或混合噪声的影响。

papers.title: Latent-Condensed Transformer for Efficient Long Context Modeling
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) face significant challenges in processing long contexts due to the linear growth of the key-value (KV) cache and quadratic complexity of self-attention. Existing approaches address these bottlenecks separately: Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA) reduces the KV cache by projecting tokens into a low-dimensional latent space, while sparse attention reduces computation. However, sparse methods cannot operate natively on MLA's compressed latent structure, missing opportunities for joint optimization. In this paper, we propose Latent-Condensed Attention (LCA), which directly condenses context within MLA's latent space, where the representation is disentangled into semantic latent vectors and positional keys. LCA separately aggregates semantic vectors via query-aware pooling and preserves positional keys via anchor selection. This approach jointly reduces both computational cost and KV cache without adding parameters. Beyond MLA, LCA's design is architecture-agnostic and readily extends to other attention mechanisms such as GQA. Theoretically, we prove a length-independent error bound. Experiments show LCA achieves up to 2.5$\times$ prefilling speedup and 90% KV cache reduction at 128K context while maintaining competitive performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Latent-Condensed Attention (LCA)，在 MLA 的隐空间中直接压缩上下文，同时降低计算成本和 KV 缓存，实现高效长上下文建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法分别处理 KV 缓存和计算瓶颈，但无法在 MLA 的压缩隐空间中进行联合优化，导致效率受限。
analysis.problem: 长上下文场景下，KV 缓存线性增长和自注意力二次复杂度带来的计算和存储瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MLA 将 token 投影到低维隐空间，但稀疏注意力无法直接操作该结构，错失联合优化机会。
analysis.main_method: LCA 在 MLA 隐空间中通过查询感知池化聚合语义向量，并通过锚点选择保留位置键，实现无参数压缩。
analysis.key_experiments: 在 128K 上下文下，LCA 实现 2.5 倍预填充加速和 90% KV 缓存减少，且性能保持竞争力。
analysis.contributions: 提出架构无关的 LCA 方法，联合优化计算和缓存，并证明长度无关的误差界。
analysis.limitations: 实验仅在特定模型和任务上验证，未讨论对长文本生成质量的影响。

papers.title: A Bayesian Perspective on the Role of Epistemic Uncertainty for Delayed Generalization in In-Context Learning
papers.abstract: In-context learning enables transformers to adapt to new tasks from a few examples at inference time, while grokking highlights that this generalization can emerge abruptly only after prolonged training. We study task generalization and grokking in in-context learning using a Bayesian perspective, asking what enables the delayed transition from memorization to generalization. Concretely, we consider modular arithmetic tasks in which a transformer must infer a latent linear function solely from in-context examples and analyze how predictive uncertainty evolves during training. We combine approximate Bayesian techniques to estimate the posterior distribution and we study how uncertainty behaves across training and under changes in task diversity, context length, and context noise. We find that epistemic uncertainty collapses sharply when the model groks, making uncertainty a practical label-free diagnostic of generalization in transformers. Additionally, we provide theoretical support with a simplified Bayesian linear model, showing that asymptotically both delayed generalization and uncertainty peaks arise from the same underlying spectral mechanism, which links grokking time to uncertainty dynamics.

analysis.tldr: 从贝叶斯视角研究上下文学习中的延迟泛化，发现认知不确定性在模型顿悟时急剧下降，可作为泛化的无标签诊断指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解上下文学习中泛化为何在长时间训练后突然出现（顿悟现象），并探索认知不确定性在其中的作用。
analysis.problem: 上下文学习中从记忆到泛化的延迟转变机制不明确，缺乏有效的泛化诊断指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 认知不确定性在模型顿悟时急剧下降，且延迟泛化与不确定性峰值均源于相同的谱机制。
analysis.main_method: 结合近似贝叶斯技术估计后验分布，分析不确定性在训练过程中的变化，并构建简化贝叶斯线性模型提供理论支持。
analysis.key_experiments: 在模算术任务中，改变任务多样性、上下文长度和噪声，观察不确定性动态与泛化行为的关系。
analysis.contributions: 揭示认知不确定性可作为泛化的无标签诊断指标；从理论上证明延迟泛化与不确定性动态的谱机制联系。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对线性函数任务，未验证更复杂任务；贝叶斯近似可能引入偏差。

papers.title: GLeMM: A large-scale multilingual dataset for morphological research
papers.abstract: In derivational morphology, what mechanisms govern the variation in form-meaning relations between words? The answers to this type of questions are typically based on intuition and on observations drawn from limited data, even when a wide range of languages is considered. Many of these studies are difficult to replicate and generalize. To address this issue, we present GLeMM, a new derivational resource designed for experimentation and data-driven description in morphology. GLeMM is characterized by (i) its large size, (ii) its extensive coverage (currently amounting to seven European languages, i.e., German, English, Spanish, French, Italian, Polish, Russian, (iii) its fully automated design, identical across all languages, (iv) the automatic annotation of morphological features on each entry, as well as (v) the encoding of semantic descriptions for a significant subset of these entries. It enables researchers to address difficult questions, such as the role of form and meaning in word-formation, and to develop and experimentally test computational methods that identify the structures of derivational morphology. The article describes how GLeMM is created using Wiktionary articles and presents various case studies illustrating possible applications of the resource.

analysis.tldr: GLeMM是一个大规模多语言派生形态数据集，覆盖7种欧洲语言，支持形态学数据驱动研究。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有形态学研究依赖直觉和有限数据，难以复制和泛化，需要大规模、可复现的资源。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模、多语言、自动化标注的派生形态资源，限制了对词形-意义关系机制的实验研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 派生形态中词形与意义关系的变化机制复杂，传统研究基于小规模数据，结论可靠性不足。
analysis.main_method: 利用Wiktionary文章自动构建GLeMM，包含全自动标注的形态特征和语义描述，覆盖7种欧洲语言。
analysis.key_experiments: 通过案例研究展示资源在分析词形-意义关系、开发计算方法等方面的应用。
analysis.contributions: 提供了大规模、多语言、自动化标注的派生形态资源，支持可复现的形态学实验和数据驱动描述。
analysis.limitations: 当前仅覆盖7种欧洲语言，语义描述仅覆盖部分条目，可能遗漏非欧洲语言的形态现象。

papers.title: VeriX-Anon: A Multi-Layered Framework for Mathematically Verifiable Outsourced Target-Driven Data Anonymization
authors: Miit Daga and Swarna Priya Ramu
papers.abstract: Organisations increasingly outsource privacy-sensitive data transformations to cloud providers, yet no practical mechanism lets the data owner verify that the contracted algorithm was faithfully executed. VeriX-Anon is a multi-layered verification framework for outsourced Target-Driven k-anonymization combining three orthogonal mechanisms: deterministic verification via Merkle-style hashing of an Authenticated Decision Tree, probabilistic verification via Boundary Sentinels near the Random Forest decision boundary and exact-duplicate Twins with cryptographic identifiers, and utility-based verification via Explainable AI fingerprinting that compares SHAP value distributions before and after anonymization using the Wasserstein distance. Evaluated on three cross-domain datasets against Lazy (drops 5 percent of records), Dumb (random splitting, fake hash), and Approximate (random splitting, valid hash) adversaries, VeriX-Anon correctly detected deviations in 11 of 12 scenarios. No single layer achieved this alone. The XAI layer was the only mechanism that caught the Approximate adversary, succeeding on Adult and Bank but failing on the severely imbalanced Diabetes dataset where class imbalance suppresses the SHAP signal, confirming the need for adaptive thresholding. An 11-point k-sweep showed Target-Driven anonymization preserves significantly more utility than Blind anonymization (Wilcoxon $p = 0.000977$, Cohen's $d = 1.96$, mean F1 gap $+0.1574$). Client-side verification completes under one second at one million rows. The threat model covers three empirically evaluated profiles and one theoretical profile (Informed Attacker) aware of trap embedding but unable to defeat the cryptographic salt. Sentinel evasion probability ranges from near-zero for balanced datasets to 0.52 for imbalanced ones, a limitation the twin layer compensates for in every tested scenario.

analysis.tldr: 提出VeriX-Anon框架，通过多层验证机制确保外包数据匿名化的可验证性，在12个场景中成功检测11个偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 组织将隐私敏感数据转换外包给云服务商，但缺乏实际机制让数据所有者验证算法是否忠实执行。
analysis.problem: 如何在外包目标驱动k-匿名化中，验证云服务商是否按约定算法执行，防止恶意或懒惰行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单一验证层无法检测所有攻击类型，例如XAI层是唯一能捕获近似对手的机制，但在严重不平衡数据集上失效。
analysis.main_method: 结合确定性验证（Merkle哈希认证决策树）、概率验证（边界哨兵和孪生记录）和基于效用的验证（XAI指纹比较SHAP分布）。
analysis.key_experiments: 在三个跨领域数据集上测试懒惰、愚蠢和近似三种对手，11/12场景成功检测；客户端验证在百万行数据下1秒内完成。
analysis.contributions: 首个结合三种正交验证机制的外包匿名化框架，证明目标驱动匿名化比盲目匿名化显著保留更多效用。
analysis.limitations: XAI层在不平衡数据集上失效，哨兵逃避概率在平衡数据集上接近零但在不平衡数据集上达0.52。

papers.title: Do Transformers Use their Depth Adaptively? Evidence from a Relational Reasoning Task
papers.abstract: We investigate whether transformers use their depth adaptively across tasks of increasing difficulty. Using a controlled multi-hop relational reasoning task based on family stories, where difficulty is determined by the number of relationship hops that must be composed, we monitor (i) how predictions evolve across layers via early readouts (the logit lens) and (ii) how task-relevant information is integrated across tokens via causal patching. For pretrained models, we find some limited evidence for adaptive depth use: some larger models need fewer layers to arrive at plausible answers for easier tasks, and models generally use more layers to integrate information across tokens as chain length increases. For models finetuned on the task, we find clearer and more consistent evidence of adaptive depth use, with the effect being stronger for less constrained finetuning regimes that do not preserve general language modeling abilities.

analysis.tldr: 研究Transformer是否根据任务难度自适应调整深度使用，发现微调后模型表现出更明显的自适应深度使用。
analysis.research_motivation: 探究Transformer模型在处理不同难度任务时是否能够自适应地利用其深度，以理解其计算机制。
analysis.problem: Transformer是否根据任务难度动态调整所需层数，以及这种自适应行为在预训练和微调模型中的差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预训练模型在简单任务上部分大模型使用更少层数，且随链长增加使用更多层整合信息；微调模型则表现出更一致的自适应深度使用。
analysis.main_method: 通过多跳关系推理任务控制难度，使用早期读出（logit lens）和因果修补（causal patching）监测预测演变和信息整合。
analysis.key_experiments: 在预训练和微调模型上比较不同链长任务下的层使用模式，并分析不同微调约束的影响。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了Transformer自适应深度使用的证据，并指出微调方式对自适应行为的影响。
analysis.limitations: 仅基于单一关系推理任务，可能不适用于其他类型任务；自适应机制的具体原理未完全解释。

papers.title: Forecasting the Past: Gradient-Based Distribution Shift Detection in Trajectory Prediction
papers.abstract: Trajectory prediction models often fail in real-world automated driving due to distributional shifts between training and test conditions. Such distributional shifts, whether behavioural or environmental, pose a critical risk by causing the model to make incorrect forecasts in unfamiliar situations. We propose a self-supervised method that trains a decoder in a post-hoc fashion on the self-supervised task of forecasting the second half of observed trajectories from the first half. The L2 norm of the gradient of this forecasting loss with respect to the decoder's final layer defines a score to identify distribution shifts. Our approach, first, does not affect the trajectory prediction model, ensuring no interference with original prediction performance and second, demonstrates substantial improvements on distribution shift detection for trajectory prediction on the Shifts and Argoverse datasets. Moreover, we show that this method can also be used to early detect collisions of a deep Q-Network motion planner in the Highway simulator. Source code is available at https://github.com/Michedev/forecasting-the-past.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自监督方法，通过预测轨迹历史的后半段来检测分布偏移，无需修改原预测模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 轨迹预测模型在自动驾驶中常因训练与测试数据分布偏移而失效，需有效检测此类偏移。
analysis.problem: 如何在不影响原模型性能的前提下，检测轨迹预测中的分布偏移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分布偏移（如行为或环境变化）会导致模型在陌生场景下做出错误预测，构成安全风险。
analysis.main_method: 训练一个解码器，以观测轨迹前半段预测后半段，利用该预测损失的L2梯度范数作为分布偏移评分。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Shifts和Argoverse数据集上验证了分布偏移检测性能，并在Highway模拟器中用于早期碰撞检测。
analysis.contributions: 提出一种后验自监督方法，不干扰原模型，有效检测轨迹预测中的分布偏移，并扩展至碰撞检测。
analysis.limitations: 方法依赖解码器训练，可能对特定类型偏移敏感；未讨论计算开销。

papers.title: Agentic Insight Generation in VSM Simulations
papers.abstract: Extracting actionable insights from complex value stream map simulations can be challenging, time-consuming, and error-prone. Recent advances in large language models offer new avenues to support users with this task. While existing approaches excel at processing raw data to gain information, they are structurally unfit to pick up on subtle situational differences needed to distinguish similar data sources in this domain. To address this issue, we propose a decoupled, two-step agentic architecture. By separating orchestration from data analysis, the system leverages progressive data discovery infused with domain expert knowledge. This architecture allows the orchestration to intelligently select data sources and perform multi-hop reasoning across data structures while maintaining a slim internal context. Results from multiple state-of-the-art large language models demonstrate the framework's viability: with top-tier models achieving accuracies of up to 86% and demonstrating high robustness across evaluation runs.

analysis.tldr: 提出解耦的两步智能体架构，通过分离编排与数据分析，提升从复杂价值流图模拟中提取可操作洞察的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 从复杂价值流图模拟中提取可操作洞察既困难又耗时，现有方法难以捕捉细微情境差异。
analysis.problem: 现有方法在处理原始数据时表现良好，但无法区分相似数据源中的细微情境差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 复杂模拟数据中，相似数据源存在细微情境差异，导致传统方法难以准确提取洞察。
analysis.main_method: 提出解耦的两步智能体架构，将编排与数据分析分离，利用渐进式数据发现和领域专家知识。
analysis.key_experiments: 使用多个最先进的大语言模型进行实验，顶级模型准确率达86%，且评估运行中表现出高鲁棒性。
analysis.contributions: 提出一种新颖的解耦架构，有效提升洞察提取的准确性和鲁棒性，并验证了其可行性。
analysis.limitations: 依赖大语言模型性能，可能受限于模型能力；未提及在更复杂场景下的泛化性。

papers.title: KoCo: Conditioning Language Model Pre-training on Knowledge Coordinates
papers.abstract: Standard Large Language Model (LLM) pre-training typically treats corpora as flattened token sequences, often overlooking the real-world context that humans naturally rely on to contextualize information. To bridge this gap, we introduce Knowledge Coordinate Conditioning (KoCo), a simple method that maps every document into a three-dimensional semantic coordinate. By prepending these coordinates as textual prefixes for pre-training, we aim to equip the model with explicit contextual awareness to learn the documents within the real-world knowledge structure. Experiment results demonstrate that KoCo significantly enhances performance across 10 downstream tasks and accelerates pre-training convergence by approximately 30\%. Furthermore, our analysis indicates that explicitly modeling knowledge coordinates helps the model distinguish stable facts from noise, effectively mitigating hallucination in generated outputs.

analysis.tldr: 提出知识坐标条件化（KoCo）方法，将文档映射为三维语义坐标作为前缀，提升LLM预训练效果，加速收敛约30%。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准LLM预训练将语料视为扁平序列，忽略了人类依赖的真实世界上下文，导致模型缺乏显式语境感知。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在预训练中融入文档在真实知识结构中的位置信息，以增强上下文感知和事实区分能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类理解信息时依赖知识坐标（如时间、空间、主题），而现有预训练方法未显式建模这种结构，导致模型易混淆稳定事实与噪声。
analysis.main_method: 将每个文档映射到三维语义坐标（如时间、空间、主题），并以文本前缀形式嵌入预训练输入序列。
analysis.key_experiments: 在10个下游任务上评估，KoCo显著提升性能，预训练收敛速度加快约30%，并有效减少幻觉。
analysis.contributions: 提出KoCo方法，首次将知识坐标显式引入LLM预训练，提升性能与效率，并缓解幻觉问题。
analysis.limitations: 三维坐标的语义定义可能依赖人工设计或外部知识库，泛化到开放域场景需进一步验证。

papers.title: Machine learning for four-dimensional SU(3) lattice gauge theories
papers.abstract: In this review I summarize how machine learning can be used in lattice gauge theory simulations and what ap\-proaches are currently available to improve the sampling of gauge field configurations, with a focus on applications in four-dimensional SU(3) gauge theories. These include approaches based on generative machine-learning models such as (stochastic) normalizing flows and diffusion processes, and an approach based on renormalization group (RG) transformations, more specifically the machine learning of RG-improved gauge actions using gauge-equivariant convolutional neural networks. In particular, I present scaling results for a machine-learned fixed-point action in four-dimensional SU(3) gauge theory towards the continuum limit. The results include observables based on the classically perfect gradient-flow scales, which are free of tree-level lattice artefacts to all orders, and quantities related to the static potential and the deconfinement transition.

analysis.tldr: 综述机器学习在四维SU(3)格点规范理论中的应用，包括生成模型和重正化群改进方法，并展示固定点作用的标度结果。
analysis.research_motivation: 格点规范理论模拟中，传统采样方法面临临界慢化问题，机器学习提供高效生成构型的新途径。
analysis.problem: 如何利用机器学习改进四维SU(3)格点规范理论的构型采样和连续极限外推。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 机器学习模型（如归一化流、扩散过程）可生成独立分布构型，而重正化群改进作用能减少格点离散化误差。
analysis.main_method: 基于规范等变卷积神经网络学习重正化群改进作用，并结合随机归一化流和扩散过程进行生成式采样。
analysis.key_experiments: 在四维SU(3)理论中测试机器学习固定点作用，计算梯度流标度、静态势和退禁闭相变等观测量。
analysis.contributions: 系统总结了机器学习在格点规范理论中的最新进展，并首次展示了四维SU(3)固定点作用的连续极限标度行为。
analysis.limitations: 主要聚焦于SU(3)规范群，未讨论费米子或更复杂理论；生成模型的训练成本可能较高。

papers.title: From Myopic Selection to Long-Horizon Awareness: Sequential LLM Routing for Multi-Turn Dialogue
papers.abstract: Multi-turn dialogue is the predominant form of interaction with large language models (LLMs). While LLM routing is effective in single-turn settings, existing methods fail to maximize cumulative performance in multi-turn dialogue due to interaction dynamics and delayed rewards. To address this challenge, we move from myopic, single-turn selection to long-horizon sequential routing for multi-turn dialogue. Accordingly, we propose DialRouter, which first performs MCTS to explore dialogue branches induced by different LLM selections and collect trajectories with high cumulative rewards. DialRouter then learns a lightweight routing policy from search-derived data, augmented with retrieval-based future state approximation, enabling multi-turn routing without online search. Experiments on both open-domain and domain-specific dialogue tasks across diverse candidate sets of both open-source and closed-source LLMs demonstrate that DialRouter significantly outperforms single LLMs and existing routing baselines in task success rate, while achieving a superior performance-cost trade-off when combined with a cost-aware reward.

analysis.tldr: 提出 DialRouter，将多轮对话中的 LLM 路由从短视单轮选择扩展为长时序列路由，通过 MCTS 和轻量策略提升累积性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 LLM 路由方法仅适用于单轮对话，无法处理多轮对话中的交互动态和延迟奖励，导致累积性能不佳。
analysis.problem: 多轮对话中如何最大化 LLM 路由的累积性能，考虑交互动态和延迟奖励。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多轮对话中，单轮最优选择可能因后续交互导致整体性能下降，存在延迟奖励问题。
analysis.main_method: DialRouter 使用 MCTS 探索不同 LLM 选择导致的对话分支，收集高累积奖励轨迹，然后从搜索数据中学习轻量路由策略，并利用检索增强的未来状态近似实现无在线搜索的多轮路由。
analysis.key_experiments: 在开放域和特定域对话任务上，使用多种开源和闭源 LLM 候选集，评估任务成功率和性能-成本权衡。
analysis.contributions: 首次将多轮对话路由建模为序列决策问题，提出结合 MCTS 和检索增强的轻量策略，显著提升任务成功率并优化成本。
analysis.limitations: 依赖 MCTS 探索质量，可能受限于搜索深度和计算资源；检索增强的未来状态近似在复杂场景下可能不准确。

papers.title: Cross-Domain Transfer with Particle Physics Foundation Models: From Jets to Neutrino Interactions
papers.abstract: Future AI-based studies in particle physics will likely start from a foundation model to accelerate training and enhance sensitivity. As a step towards a general-purpose foundation model for particle physics, we investigate whether the OmniLearned foundation model pre-trained on diverse high-$Q^2$ simulated and real $pp$ and $ep$ collisions can be effectively transferred to a few-GeV fixed-target neutrino experiment. We process MINERvA neutrino--nucleus scattering events and evaluate pre-trained models on two types of tasks: regression of available energy and binary classification of charged-current pion final states ($\mathrm{CC1\pi^{\pm}}$, $\mathrm{CCN\pi^{\pm}}$, and $\mathrm{CC1\pi^{0}}$). Pre-trained OmniLearned models consistently outperform similarly sized models trained from scratch, achieving better overall performance at the same compute budget, as well as achieving better performance at the same number of training steps. These results suggest that particle-level foundation models acquire inductive biases that generalize across large differences in energy scale, detector technology, and underlying physics processes, pointing toward a paradigm of detector-agnostic inference in particle physics.

analysis.tldr: 粒子物理基础模型OmniLearned从高能对撞机迁移到低能中微子实验，在能量回归和分类任务上优于从头训练的模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索粒子物理基础模型能否跨能量尺度和探测器类型迁移，推动通用基础模型的发展。
analysis.problem: 验证预训练于高能对撞机数据的OmniLearned模型能否有效迁移到低能固定靶中微子实验。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预训练模型在低能中微子数据上表现更好，表明其获得了跨能量尺度、探测器技术和物理过程的归纳偏置。
analysis.main_method: 使用OmniLearned基础模型处理MINERvA中微子-核散射事件，进行能量回归和带电电流π末态分类。
analysis.key_experiments: 在MINERvA数据上比较预训练模型与从头训练模型在相同计算预算和训练步数下的性能。
analysis.contributions: 证明粒子级基础模型可迁移到不同能量和探测器场景，支持探测器无关推理范式。
analysis.limitations: 仅测试了单一基础模型和特定中微子实验，泛化性需更多验证。

papers.title: Is Sliding Window All You Need? An Open Framework for Long-Sequence Recommendation
papers.abstract: Long interaction histories are central to modern recommender systems, yet training with long sequences is often dismissed as impractical under realistic memory and latency budgets. This work demonstrates that it is not only practical but also effective-at academic scale. We release a complete, end-to-end framework that implements industrial-style long-sequence training with sliding windows, including all data processing, training, and evaluation scripts. Beyond reproducing prior gains, we contribute two capabilities missing from earlier reports: (i) a runtime-aware ablation study that quantifies the accuracy-compute frontier across windowing regimes and strides, and (ii) a novel k-shift embedding layer that enables million-scale vocabularies on commodity GPUs with negligible accuracy loss. Our implementation trains reliably on modest university clusters while delivering competitive retrieval quality (e.g., up to +6.04% MRR and +6.34% Recall@10 on Retailrocket) with $\sim 4 \times $ training-time overheads. By packaging a robust pipeline, reporting training time costs, and introducing an embedding mechanism tailored for low-resource settings, we transform long-sequence training from a closed, industrial technique into a practical, open, and extensible methodology for the community.

analysis.tldr: 提出开源长序列推荐框架，证明滑动窗口训练在学术规模下高效且有效，并引入k-shift嵌入层支持百万级词表。
analysis.research_motivation: 长交互历史对现代推荐系统至关重要，但长序列训练常被认为不切实际，缺乏开源实现。
analysis.problem: 长序列训练在内存和延迟限制下难以实现，且缺乏可复现的工业级开源框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 滑动窗口训练在学术规模下不仅可行，还能在适度计算开销下显著提升推荐质量。
analysis.main_method: 实现端到端滑动窗口长序列训练框架，包含数据处理、训练和评估脚本，并设计k-shift嵌入层以支持大规模词表。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Retailrocket数据集上，MRR提升6.04%，Recall@10提升6.34%，训练时间开销约4倍。
analysis.contributions: 提供完整开源框架，进行运行时感知的消融研究，并引入低资源场景下的k-shift嵌入机制。
analysis.limitations: 仅在学术规模数据集上验证，未在超大规模工业场景测试；训练时间开销仍存在。

papers.title: ReasonXL: Shifting LLM Reasoning Language Without Sacrificing Performance
papers.abstract: Despite advances in multilingual capabilities, most large language models (LLMs) remain English-centric in their training and, crucially, in their production of reasoning traces. Even when tasked with non-English problems, these models predominantly reason in English, creating a fundamental mismatch for non-English usage scenarios. We address this disparity directly with three contributions. (i) We introduce ReasonXL, the first large-scale parallel corpus of cross-domain reasoning traces spanning five European languages (English, German, French, Italian, and Spanish), with over two million aligned samples per language, each comprising prompts, reasoning traces, and final outputs, enabling direct supervision of language-specific reasoning. (ii) Using ReasonXL, we demonstrate that LLMs can be adapted to reason entirely in a desired target language, using a simple two-stage pipeline of supervised fine-tuning (SFT) followed by reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR). The resulting models match or exceed baseline performance, with minimal loss in general knowledge and broadly preserved cross-lingual transfer. (iii) We conduct an extensive representational analysis of the adaptation and find a clear functional division across model depth: early layers contain an activation bottleneck that causally determines language identity, while upper layers concentrate the weight and activation changes driven by adaptation. We further find that RLVR achieves greater behavioral divergence from the base model with smaller parameter updates than SFT, suggesting a more efficient representational rerouting despite much smaller weight updates.

analysis.tldr: 提出 ReasonXL 多语言推理语料库，通过 SFT+RLVR 使 LLM 用目标语言推理，性能不降，并发现模型深度层功能分工。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 LLM 即使处理非英语任务也主要用英语推理，造成非英语场景的语义不匹配，需解决语言与推理的脱节。
analysis.problem: LLM 在非英语任务中仍倾向英语推理，缺乏直接监督目标语言推理的数据和方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型浅层存在激活瓶颈决定语言身份，上层集中适应引起的权重变化；RLVR 比 SFT 用更小参数更新实现更大行为差异。
analysis.main_method: 构建 ReasonXL 平行语料（5 种语言，200 万样本/语言），采用两阶段流水线：监督微调（SFT）后接可验证奖励强化学习（RLVR）。
analysis.key_experiments: 在 5 种欧洲语言上训练和评估，对比基线模型，测试推理语言一致性、通用知识保留和跨语言迁移能力。
analysis.contributions: 首个大规模跨领域多语言推理语料库；证明 SFT+RLVR 可高效适配目标语言推理；揭示模型深度层功能分工和 RLVR 的表示重路由效率。
analysis.limitations: 仅覆盖 5 种欧洲语言，未验证低资源语言；RLVR 依赖可验证奖励，对开放生成任务可能受限。

papers.title: Compiling Activation Steering into Weights via Null-Space Constraints for Stealthy Backdoors
papers.abstract: Safety-aligned large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in real-world pipelines, yet this deployment also enlarges the supply-chain attack surface: adversaries can distribute backdoored checkpoints that behave normally under standard evaluation but jailbreak when a hidden trigger is present. Recent post-hoc weight-editing methods offer an efficient approach to injecting such backdoors by directly modifying model weights to map a trigger to an attacker-specified response. However, existing methods typically optimize a token-level mapping that forces an affirmative prefix (e.g., ``Sure''), which does not guarantee sustained harmful output -- the model may begin with apparent agreement yet revert to safety-aligned refusal within a few decoding steps. We address this reliability gap by shifting the backdoor objective from surface tokens to internal representations. We extract a steering vector that captures the difference between compliant and refusal behaviors, and compile it into a persistent weight modification that activates only when the trigger is present. To preserve stealthiness and benign utility, we impose a null-space constraint so that the injected edit remains dormant on clean inputs. The method is efficient, requiring only a small set of examples and admitting a closed-form solution. Across multiple safety-aligned LLMs and jailbreak benchmarks, our method achieves high triggered attack success while maintaining non-triggered safety and general utility.

analysis.tldr: 通过将激活引导编译为权重修改并施加零空间约束，实现隐蔽后门攻击，仅在触发时产生有害输出。
analysis.research_motivation: 安全对齐的LLM部署扩大了供应链攻击面，现有后门注入方法无法保证持续有害输出，需要更可靠的后门技术。
analysis.problem: 现有后门方法仅优化表层token映射（如强制输出“Sure”），模型可能在初始同意后恢复安全拒绝，无法确保持续有害输出。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在触发后可能短暂顺从但随后恢复安全对齐行为，表明表层token映射不足以控制内部表示动态。
analysis.main_method: 提取顺从与拒绝行为之间的引导向量，将其编译为仅在触发时激活的持久权重修改，并通过零空间约束确保在干净输入上保持休眠。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个安全对齐LLM和越狱基准上测试，实现了高触发攻击成功率，同时保持非触发安全性和通用效用。
analysis.contributions: 提出基于内部表示的后门目标，解决可靠性差距；引入零空间约束保持隐蔽性；方法高效，仅需少量示例且具有闭式解。
analysis.limitations: 依赖引导向量的质量；零空间约束可能限制编辑强度；未探讨对抗性防御的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Information-Geometric Decomposition of Generalization Error in Unsupervised Learning
papers.abstract: We decompose the Kullback--Leibler generalization error (GE) -- the expected KL divergence from the data distribution to the trained model -- of unsupervised learning into three non-negative components: model error, data bias, and variance. The decomposition is exact for any e-flat model class and follows from two identities of information geometry: the generalized Pythagorean theorem and a dual e-mixture variance identity. As an analytically tractable demonstration, we apply the framework to $\epsilon$-PCA, a regularized principal component analysis in which the empirical covariance is truncated at rank $N_K$ and discarded directions are pinned at a fixed noise floor $\epsilon$. Although rank-constrained $\epsilon$-PCA is not itself e-flat, it admits a technical reformulation with the same total GE on isotropic Gaussian data, under which each component of the decomposition takes closed form. The optimal rank emerges as the cutoff $\lambda_{\mathrm{cut}}^{*} = \epsilon$ -- the model retains exactly those empirical eigenvalues exceeding the noise floor -- with the cutoff reflecting a marginal-rate balance between model-error gain and data-bias cost. A boundary comparison further yields a three-regime phase diagram -- retain-all, interior, and collapse -- separated by the lower Marchenko--Pastur edge and an analytically computable collapse threshold $\epsilon_{*}(\alpha)$, where $\alpha$ is the dimension-to-sample-size ratio. All claims are verified numerically.

analysis.tldr: 用信息几何将无监督学习的KL泛化误差分解为模型误差、数据偏差和方差三项，并在ε-PCA上得到闭式解和最优秩。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解无监督学习中泛化误差的来源和分解，为模型选择提供理论指导。
analysis.problem: 无监督学习的KL泛化误差缺乏精确分解，难以分析各成分对总误差的贡献。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 泛化误差可分解为三个非负成分，且最优秩由特征值阈值ε决定，体现了模型误差与数据偏差的平衡。
analysis.main_method: 利用信息几何的广义勾股定理和对偶e-混合方差恒等式，对e-平坦模型类进行精确分解，并应用于ε-PCA。
analysis.key_experiments: 在等向高斯数据上验证ε-PCA的泛化误差分解，数值实验确认了理论结果。
analysis.contributions: 提出了无监督学习泛化误差的信息几何分解框架，并在ε-PCA上得到闭式解和相图。
analysis.limitations: 分解仅适用于e-平坦模型类，ε-PCA需通过技术重构才能应用，可能限制推广性。

papers.title: Identifying and Mitigating Gender Cues in Academic Recommendation Letters: An Interpretability Case Study
papers.abstract: Letters of recommendation (LoRs) can carry patterns of implicitly gendered language that can inadvertently influence downstream decisions, e.g. in hiring and admissions. In this work, we investigate the extent to which Transformer-based encoder models as well as Large Language Models (LLMs) can infer the gender of applicants in academic LoRs submitted to an U.S. medical-residency program after explicit identifiers like names and pronouns are de-gendered. While using three models (DistilBERT, RoBERTa, and Llama 2) to classify the gender of anonymized and de-gendered LoRs, significant gender leakage was observed as evident from up to 68% classification accuracy. Text interpretation methods, like TF-IDF and SHAP, demonstrate that certain linguistic patterns are strong proxies for gender, e.g. "emotional'' and "humanitarian'' are commonly associated with LoRs from female applicants. As an experiment in creating truly gender-neutral LoRs, these implicit gender cues were remove resulting in a drop of up to 5.5% accuracy and 2.7% macro $F_1$ score on re-training the classifiers. However, applicant gender prediction still remains better than chance. In this case study, our findings highlight that 1) LoRs contain gender-identifying cues that are hard to remove and may activate bias in decision-making and 2) while our technical framework may be a concrete step toward fairer academic and professional evaluations, future work is needed to interrogate the role that gender plays in LoR review. Taken together, our findings motivate upstream auditing of evaluative text in real-world academic letters of recommendation as a necessary complement to model-level fairness interventions.

analysis.tldr: 研究发现学术推荐信中存在难以去除的性别暗示，即使去除显性标识，模型仍能以68%准确率推断性别。
analysis.research_motivation: 推荐信中的隐性性别语言可能影响招聘和录取决策，需要量化并缓解这种偏见。
analysis.problem: 去除显性性别标识后，推荐信中仍存在隐含性别线索，导致性别预测准确率显著高于随机水平。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: TF-IDF和SHAP分析显示，“情感化”“人道主义”等词汇与女性申请者推荐信强相关，成为性别代理特征。
analysis.main_method: 使用DistilBERT、RoBERTa和Llama 2对去标识化推荐信进行性别分类，并通过移除性别线索词进行干预实验。
analysis.key_experiments: 原始分类准确率达68%；移除性别线索后准确率下降5.5%，F1下降2.7%，但仍高于随机水平。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了推荐信中难以消除的性别编码，提出了可操作的文本去偏见框架，并强调上游审计的重要性。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对美国医学住院项目数据，且去性别化后预测仍优于随机，表明完全消除性别线索的困难。

papers.title: PrivEraserVerify: Efficient, Private, and Verifiable Federated Unlearning
papers.abstract: Federated learning (FL) enables collaborative model training without sharing raw data, offering a promising path toward privacy preserving artificial intelligence. However, FL models may still memorize sensitive information from participants, conflicting with the right to be forgotten (RTBF). To meet these requirements, federated unlearning has emerged as a mechanism to remove the contribution of departing clients. Existing solutions only partially address this challenge: FedEraser improves efficiency but lacks privacy protection, FedRecovery ensures differential privacy (DP) but degrades accuracy, and VeriFi enables verifiability but introduces overhead without efficiency or privacy guarantees. We present PrivEraserVerify (PEV), a unified framework that integrates efficiency, privacy, and verifiability into federated unlearning. PEV employs (i) adaptive checkpointing to retain critical historical updates for fast reconstruction, (ii) layer adaptive differentially private calibration to selectively remove client influence while minimizing accuracy loss, and (iii) fingerprint based verification, enabling participants to confirm unlearning in a decentralized and noninvasive manner. Experiments on image, handwritten character, and medical datasets show that PEV achieves up to 2 to 3 times faster unlearning than retraining, provides formal indistinguishability guarantees with reduced performance degradation, and supports scalable verification. To the best of our knowledge, PEV is the first framework to simultaneously deliver efficiency, privacy, and verifiability for federated unlearning, moving FL closer to practical and regulation compliant deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出 PrivEraserVerify，首个同时实现高效、隐私和可验证的联邦遗忘框架，速度比重训练快 2-3 倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有联邦遗忘方法无法同时满足效率、隐私和可验证性，阻碍了法规合规部署。
analysis.problem: 联邦学习模型可能记忆参与者敏感信息，需要移除退出客户端的贡献，但现有方案在效率、隐私或可验证性上存在缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: FedEraser 高效但无隐私保护，FedRecovery 有差分隐私但精度下降，VeriFi 可验证但开销大且缺乏效率与隐私保证。
analysis.main_method: 采用自适应检查点保留关键历史更新、层自适应差分隐私校准选择性移除影响、基于指纹的验证实现去中心化确认。
analysis.key_experiments: 在图像、手写字符和医疗数据集上测试，遗忘速度比重训练快 2-3 倍，提供形式化不可区分性保证并减少性能下降。
analysis.contributions: 首个统一效率、隐私和可验证性的联邦遗忘框架，推动实际合规部署。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论大规模异构客户端场景下的扩展性，指纹验证可能增加额外通信开销。

papers.title: ToxiTrace: Gradient-Aligned Training for Explainable Chinese Toxicity Detection
papers.abstract: Existing Chinese toxic content detection methods mainly target sentence-level classification but often fail to provide readable and contiguous toxic evidence spans. We propose \textbf{ToxiTrace}, an explainability-oriented method for BERT-style encoders with three components: (1) \textbf{CuSA}, which refines encoder-derived saliency cues into fine-grained toxic spans with lightweight LLM guidance; (2) \textbf{GCLoss}, a gradient-constrained objective that concentrates token-level saliency on toxic evidence while suppressing irrelevant activations; and (3) \textbf{ARCL}, which constructs sample-specific contrastive reasoning pairs to sharpen the semantic boundary between toxic and non-toxic content. Experiments show that ToxiTrace improves classification accuracy and toxic span extraction while preserving efficient encoder-based inference and producing more coherent, human-readable explanations. We have released the model at https://huggingface.co/ArdLi/ToxiTrace.

analysis.tldr: 提出 ToxiTrace，一种面向 BERT 编码器的可解释中文毒性检测方法，通过梯度对齐训练提升分类精度和毒性片段提取。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有中文毒性检测方法主要关注句子级分类，缺乏可读且连续的毒性证据片段，限制了模型的可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲效率的前提下，为 BERT 风格编码器提供细粒度、可读的毒性证据片段。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统方法生成的毒性线索稀疏且不连贯，难以形成人类可理解的解释。
analysis.main_method: 包含三个组件：CuSA（轻量级 LLM 引导的细粒度毒性片段）、GCLoss（梯度约束损失聚焦 token 级显著性）、ARCL（对比推理对增强语义边界）。
analysis.key_experiments: 在中文毒性检测数据集上评估，ToxiTrace 在分类准确率和毒性片段提取上均优于基线，且生成更连贯的解释。
analysis.contributions: 首次将梯度对齐训练用于可解释毒性检测，提出结合轻量级 LLM 的细粒度片段提取方法。
analysis.limitations: 依赖 BERT 编码器，可能无法直接迁移到其他架构；轻量级 LLM 引导的泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: CompliBench: Benchmarking LLM Judges for Compliance Violation Detection in Dialogue Systems
papers.abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as task-oriented agents in enterprise environments, ensuring their strict adherence to complex, domain-specific operational guidelines is critical. While utilizing an LLM-as-a-Judge is a promising solution for scalable evaluation, the reliability of these judges in detecting specific policy violations remains largely unexplored. This gap is primarily due to the lack of a systematic data generation method, which has been hindered by the extensive cost of fine-grained human annotation and the difficulty of synthesizing realistic agent violations. In this paper, we introduce CompliBench, a novel benchmark designed to evaluate the ability of LLM judges to detect and localize guideline violations in multi-turn dialogues. To overcome data scarcity, we develop a scalable, automated data generation pipeline that simulates user-agent interactions. Our controllable flaw injection process automatically yields precise ground-truth labels for the violated guideline and the exact conversation turn, while an adversarial search method ensures these introduced perturbations are highly challenging. Our comprehensive evaluation reveals that current state-of-the-art proprietary LLMs struggle significantly with this task. In addition, we demonstrate that a small-scale judge model fine-tuned on our synthesized data outperforms leading LLMs and generalizes well to unseen business domains, highlighting our pipeline as an effective foundation for training robust generative reward models.

analysis.tldr: 提出CompliBench基准，评估LLM裁判检测对话系统违规的能力，并开发自动化数据生成流水线。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM作为任务型代理需遵守复杂规则，但现有裁判模型在检测违规方面可靠性未知，缺乏系统数据生成方法。
analysis.problem: 缺乏评估LLM裁判检测多轮对话中规则违规能力的基准，以及高质量标注数据的生成方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前顶级专有LLM在检测违规任务上表现不佳，而小模型微调后能超越它们并泛化到新领域。
analysis.main_method: 开发自动化数据生成流水线，通过可控缺陷注入和对抗搜索生成带精确标签的违规对话。
analysis.key_experiments: 在CompliBench上评估多种LLM裁判，并微调小模型对比其性能与泛化能力。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个系统基准CompliBench，以及可扩展的自动化数据生成方法，证明小模型微调的有效性。
analysis.limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有业务领域，且对抗搜索的复杂度可能影响生成效率。

papers.title: ContextLens: Modeling Imperfect Privacy and Safety Context for Legal Compliance
papers.abstract: Individuals' concerns about data privacy and AI safety are highly contextualized and extend beyond sensitive patterns. Addressing these issues requires reasoning about the context to identify and mitigate potential risks. Though researchers have widely explored using large language models (LLMs) as evaluators for contextualized safety and privacy assessments, these efforts typically assume the availability of complete and clear context, whereas real-world contexts tend to be ambiguous and incomplete. In this paper, we propose ContextLens, a semi-rule-based framework that leverages LLMs to ground the input context in the legal domain and explicitly identify both known and unknown factors for legal compliance. Instead of directly assessing safety outcomes, our ContextLens instructs LLMs to answer a set of crafted questions that span over applicability, general principles and detailed provisions to assess compliance with pre-defined priorities and rules. We conduct extensive experiments on existing compliance benchmarks that cover the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the EU AI Act. The results suggest that our ContextLens can significantly improve LLMs' compliance assessment and surpass existing baselines without any training. Additionally, our ContextLens can further identify the ambiguous and missing factors.

analysis.tldr: 提出ContextLens框架，通过半规则方法利用LLM评估法律合规性，处理不完美上下文，在GDPR和EU AI Act基准上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM评估假设上下文完整清晰，但现实上下文常模糊不完整，需处理不完美信息以提升法律合规评估的可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不完整和模糊的上下文条件下，准确评估数据隐私和AI安全的法律合规性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现实中的隐私和安全上下文具有高度情境化且常不完整，直接评估易导致误判，需显式识别已知和未知因素。
analysis.main_method: ContextLens框架：基于半规则方法，引导LLM回答一组结构化问题（覆盖适用性、一般原则和详细条款），按预定义优先级和规则评估合规性。
analysis.key_experiments: 在GDPR和EU AI Act合规基准上实验，ContextLens无需训练即显著提升LLM评估性能，并有效识别模糊和缺失因素。
analysis.contributions: 提出处理不完美上下文的合规评估框架；设计结构化问题集和规则优先级；实验证明无需训练即可超越基线。
analysis.limitations: 依赖LLM对法律条款的理解能力；半规则方法可能无法覆盖所有复杂场景；评估基准范围有限。

papers.title: Labeled TrustSet Guided: Batch Active Learning with Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Batch active learning (BAL) is a crucial technique for reducing labeling costs and improving data efficiency in training large-scale deep learning models. Traditional BAL methods often rely on metrics like Mahalanobis Distance to balance uncertainty and diversity when selecting data for annotation. However, these methods predominantly focus on the distribution of unlabeled data and fail to leverage feedback from labeled data or the model's performance. To address these limitations, we introduce TrustSet, a novel approach that selects the most informative data from the labeled dataset, ensuring a balanced class distribution to mitigate the long-tail problem. Unlike CoreSet, which focuses on maintaining the overall data distribution, TrustSet optimizes the model's performance by pruning redundant data and using label information to refine the selection process. To extend the benefits of TrustSet to the unlabeled pool, we propose a reinforcement learning (RL)-based sampling policy that approximates the selection of high-quality TrustSet candidates from the unlabeled data. Combining TrustSet and RL, we introduce the Batch Reinforcement Active Learning with TrustSet (BRAL-T) framework. BRAL-T achieves state-of-the-art results across 10 image classification benchmarks and 2 active fine-tuning tasks, demonstrating its effectiveness and efficiency in various domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出BRAL-T框架，结合TrustSet和强化学习，在批量主动学习中实现最优性能，有效降低标注成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统批量主动学习方法仅关注未标注数据分布，未能利用已标注数据反馈或模型性能，导致效率受限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用已标注数据反馈和模型性能来优化批量主动学习中的样本选择，以降低标注成本并提升数据效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 已标注数据中存在冗余和长尾分布问题，通过筛选信息量大的样本并平衡类别分布可显著提升模型性能。
analysis.main_method: 提出TrustSet从已标注数据中筛选信息样本，并设计基于强化学习的采样策略从未标注池中近似选择高质量候选。
analysis.key_experiments: 在10个图像分类基准和2个主动微调任务上评估，BRAL-T达到最先进结果。
analysis.contributions: 首次将已标注数据反馈与强化学习结合用于批量主动学习，提出BRAL-T框架并验证其有效性。
analysis.limitations: 依赖强化学习训练，可能增加计算开销；未探讨在更大规模或更复杂任务上的泛化性。

papers.title: Beyond Weather Correlation: A Comparative Study of Static and Temporal Neural Architectures for Fine-Grained Residential Energy Consumption Forecasting in Melbourne, Australia
authors: Prasad Nimantha Madusanka Ukwatta Hewage and Hao Wu
papers.abstract: Accurate short-term residential energy consumption forecasting at sub-hourly resolution is critical for smart grid management, demand response programmes, and renewable energy integration. While weather variables are widely acknowledged as key drivers of residential electricity demand, the relative merit of incorporating temporal autocorrelation - the sequential memory of past consumption; over static meteorological features alone remains underexplored at fine-grained (5-minute) temporal resolution for Australian households. This paper presents a rigorous empirical comparison of a Multilayer Perceptron (MLP) and a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) recurrent network applied to two real-world Melbourne households: House 3 (a standard grid-connected dwelling) and House 4 (a rooftop solar photovoltaic-integrated household). Both models are trained on 14 months of 5-minute interval smart meter data (March 2023-April 2024) merged with official Bureau of Meteorology (BOM) daily weather observations, yielding over 117,000 samples per household. The LSTM, operating on 24-step (2-hour) sliding consumption windows, achieves coefficients of determination of R^2 = 0.883 (House 3) and R^2 = 0.865 (House 4), compared to R^2 = -0.055 and R^2 = 0.410 for the corresponding weather-driven MLPs - differences of 93.8 and 45.5 percentage points. These results establish that temporal autocorrelation in the consumption sequence dominates meteorological information for short-term forecasting at 5-minute granularity. Additionally, we demonstrate an asymmetry introduced by solar generation: for the PV-integrated household, the MLP achieves R^2 = 0.410, revealing implicit solar forecasting from weather-time correlations. A persistence baseline analysis and seasonal stratification contextualise model performance. We propose a hybrid weather-augmented LSTM and federated learning extensions as directions for future work.

analysis.tldr: 在5分钟粒度下，LSTM利用时间自相关预测住宅能耗（R²≈0.88），远超仅用天气特征的MLP（R²≈-0.06至0.41）。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究缺乏对细粒度（5分钟）时间分辨率下，时间自相关与静态气象特征在住宅能耗预测中相对重要性的实证比较。
analysis.problem: 评估时间自相关（历史消费序列记忆）相对于静态气象特征，在澳大利亚家庭5分钟级短期能耗预测中的贡献。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 时间自相关主导了细粒度预测，气象信息贡献微弱；光伏家庭中MLP隐含太阳能预测能力（R²=0.41），但LSTM仍显著更优。
analysis.main_method: 对比MLP（仅天气特征）与LSTM（24步滑动消费窗口）在14个月5分钟间隔智能电表数据上的预测性能。
analysis.key_experiments: 使用墨尔本两个家庭（标准与光伏集成）的117,000+样本，结合BOM天气数据，以R²为指标评估。
analysis.contributions: 首次在5分钟粒度下量化时间自相关的主导作用，揭示光伏家庭中天气-时间相关性的不对称性。
analysis.limitations: 仅基于两个家庭数据，未考虑更多变量（如电价、用户行为）；未实现所提混合模型与联邦学习扩展。

papers.title: Fine-tuning Factor Augmented Neural Lasso for Heterogeneous Environments
papers.abstract: Fine-tuning is a widely used strategy for adapting pre-trained models to new tasks, yet its methodology and theoretical properties in high-dimensional nonparametric settings with variable selection have not yet been developed. This paper introduces the fine-tuning factor augmented neural Lasso (FAN-Lasso), a transfer learning framework for high-dimensional nonparametric regression with variable selection that simultaneously handles covariate and posterior shifts. We use a low-rank factor structure to manage high-dimensional dependent covariates and propose a novel residual fine-tuning decomposition in which the target function is expressed as a transformation of a frozen source function and other variables to achieve transfer learning and nonparametric variable selection. This augmented feature from the source predictor allows for the transfer of knowledge to the target domain and reduces model complexity there. We derive minimax-optimal excess risk bounds for the fine-tuning FAN-Lasso, characterizing the precise conditions, in terms of relative sample sizes and function complexities, under which fine-tuning yields statistical acceleration over single-task learning. The proposed framework also provides a theoretical perspective on parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods. Extensive numerical experiments across diverse covariate- and posterior-shift scenarios demonstrate that the fine-tuning FAN-Lasso consistently outperforms standard baselines and achieves near-oracle performance even under severe target sample size constraints, empirically validating the derived rates.

analysis.tldr: 提出FAN-Lasso框架，在高维非参数回归中通过微调实现迁移学习和变量选择，理论最优且实验有效。
analysis.research_motivation: 微调在预训练模型适应新任务中广泛使用，但高维非参数设置下的方法和理论尚未开发。
analysis.problem: 解决高维非参数回归中同时处理协变量偏移和后验偏移的迁移学习与变量选择问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 目标函数可表示为冻结源函数的变换与其他变量的组合，实现知识迁移并降低模型复杂度。
analysis.main_method: 利用低秩因子结构处理高维依赖协变量，提出残差微调分解，结合因子增强神经Lasso进行迁移学习和非参数变量选择。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多种协变量和后验偏移场景下进行数值实验，FAN-Lasso持续优于基线，在目标样本量严重受限时接近最优性能。
analysis.contributions: 首次在高维非参数设置中建立微调的理论框架，导出极小化最优过剩风险界，并验证参数高效微调的理论视角。
analysis.limitations: 依赖低秩因子结构假设，可能不适用于非因子化高维数据；理论分析限于特定函数复杂度条件。

papers.title: The Enforcement and Feasibility of Hate Speech Moderation on Twitter
papers.abstract: Online hate speech is associated with substantial social harms, yet it remains unclear how consistently platforms enforce hate speech policies or whether enforcement is feasible at scale. We address these questions through a global audit of hate speech moderation on Twitter (now X). Using a complete 24-hour snapshot of public tweets, we construct representative samples comprising 540,000 tweets annotated for hate speech by trained annotators across eight major languages. Five months after posting, 80% of hateful tweets remain online, including explicitly violent hate speech. Such tweets are no more likely to be removed than non-hateful tweets, with neither severity nor visibility increasing the likelihood of removal. We then examine whether these enforcement gaps reflect technical limits of large-scale moderation systems. While fully automated detection systems cannot reliably identify hate speech without generating large numbers of false positives, they effectively prioritize likely violations for human review. Simulations of a human-AI moderation pipeline indicate that substantially reducing user exposure to hate speech is economically feasible at a cost below existing regulatory penalties. These results suggest that the persistence of online hate cannot be explained by technical constraints alone but also reflects institutional choices in the allocation of moderation resources.

analysis.tldr: Twitter上80%的仇恨言论在发布五个月后仍未被删除，包括暴力仇恨言论，且删除率与严重性或可见性无关。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线仇恨言论造成严重社会危害，但平台执行仇恨言论政策的一致性和大规模执行的可行性尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 平台是否一致地执行仇恨言论政策，以及大规模执行在技术上和经济上是否可行。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仇恨言论的删除率与非仇恨言论无显著差异，严重性和可见性均不影响删除概率，表明执行存在系统性缺口。
analysis.main_method: 通过全球审计，使用24小时推特快照构建54万条推文样本，由训练有素的标注员在8种语言中标注仇恨言论，并模拟人机审核流程。
analysis.key_experiments: 分析五个月后仇恨言论的在线状态，并模拟自动化检测与人工审核结合的管道，评估减少用户暴露的经济可行性。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了Twitter仇恨言论执行的不一致性，并证明通过人机结合审核可在低于监管罚款的成本下显著减少用户暴露。
analysis.limitations: 仅基于单一平台和特定时间点的数据，可能无法推广到其他平台或长期趋势。

papers.title: Towards Robust Real-World Spreadsheet Understanding with Multi-Agent Multi-Format Reasoning
papers.abstract: Spreadsheets are central to real-world applications such as enterprise reporting, auditing, and scientific data management. Despite their ubiquity, existing large language model based approaches typically treat tables as plain text, overlooking critical layout cues and visual semantics. Moreover, real-world spreadsheets are often massive in scale, exceeding the input length that LLMs can efficiently process. To address these challenges, we propose SpreadsheetAgent, a two-stage multi-agent framework for spreadsheet understanding that adopts a step-by-step reading and reasoning paradigm. Instead of loading the entire spreadsheet at once, SpreadsheetAgent incrementally interprets localized regions through multiple modalities, including code execution results, images, and LaTeX tables. The method first constructs a structural sketch and row/column summaries, and then performs task-driven reasoning over this intermediate representation in the Solving Stage. To further enhance reliability, we design a verification module that validates extracted structures via targeted inspections, reducing error propagation and ensuring trustworthy inputs for downstream reasoning. Extensive experiments on two spreadsheet datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. With GPT-OSS-120B, SpreadsheetAgent achieves 38.16% on Spreadsheet Bench, outperforming the ChatGPT Agent baseline (35.27%) by 2.89 absolute points. These results highlight the potential of SpreadsheetAgent to advance robust and scalable spreadsheet understanding in real-world applications. Code is available at https://github.com/renhouxing/SpreadsheetAgent.git.

analysis.tldr: 提出 SpreadsheetAgent，一种多智能体、多格式推理框架，通过逐步读取和推理实现鲁棒的电子表格理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 LLM 方法将电子表格视为纯文本，忽略布局和视觉语义，且难以处理大规模表格。
analysis.problem: 如何让 LLM 有效理解包含复杂布局和视觉信息的大规模真实电子表格。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 电子表格具有结构化布局和视觉线索，但传统方法将其扁平化为文本，导致信息丢失；同时，表格规模常超出 LLM 输入限制。
analysis.main_method: 两阶段多智能体框架：先构建结构草图和行列摘要，再基于中间表示进行任务驱动推理，并集成验证模块减少错误传播。
analysis.key_experiments: 在 Spreadsheet Bench 数据集上，使用 GPT-OSS-120B 达到 38.16% 准确率，超过 ChatGPT Agent 基线 2.89 个百分点。
analysis.contributions: 提出多模态逐步推理方法，结合代码执行、图像和 LaTeX 表格，并设计验证模块提升可靠性。
analysis.limitations: 依赖外部模型（如 GPT-OSS-120B），可能受限于模型能力；验证模块增加计算开销。

papers.title: RoleMAG: Learning Neighbor Roles in Multimodal Graphs
papers.abstract: Multimodal attributed graphs (MAGs) combine multimodal node attributes with structured relations. However, existing methods usually perform shared message passing on a single graph and implicitly assume that the same neighbors are equally useful for all modalities. In practice, neighbors that benefit one modality may interfere with another, blurring modality-specific signals under shared propagation. To address this issue, we propose RoleMAG, a multimodal graph framework that learns how different neighbors should participate in propagation. Concretely, RoleMAG distinguishes whether a neighbor should provide shared, complementary, or heterophilous signals, and routes them through separate propagation channels. This enables cross-modal completion from complementary neighbors while keeping heterophilous ones out of shared smoothing. Extensive experiments on three graph-centric MAG benchmarks show that RoleMAG achieves the best results on RedditS and Bili\_Dance, while remaining competitive on Toys. Ablation, robustness, and efficiency analyses further support the effectiveness of the proposed role-aware propagation design. Our code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/RoleMAG-7EE0/

analysis.tldr: 提出RoleMAG框架，通过区分邻居角色（共享、互补、异质）实现多模态图上的分离传播，提升节点分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法在多模态图上对所有邻居进行统一消息传递，忽略了不同模态对邻居角色的差异化需求。
analysis.problem: 多模态图中，同一邻居对不同模态可能产生干扰，导致模态特定信号模糊。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 有益于一个模态的邻居可能干扰另一模态，共享传播会模糊模态间差异。
analysis.main_method: 设计角色感知传播机制，将邻居分为共享、互补、异质三类，通过分离通道进行消息传递。
analysis.key_experiments: 在RedditS、Bili_Dance和Toys三个基准上评估，RedditS和Bili_Dance取得最佳结果，并进行了消融、鲁棒性和效率分析。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出多模态图中的邻居角色区分方法，实现跨模态互补与异质抑制。
analysis.limitations: 未在更大规模或更多模态的数据集上验证，角色分类的泛化性有待探索。

papers.title: Models Know Their Shortcuts: Deployment-Time Shortcut Mitigation
papers.abstract: Pretrained language models often rely on superficial features that appear predictive during training yet fail to generalize at test time, a phenomenon known as shortcut learning. Existing mitigation methods generally operate at training time and require heavy supervision such as access to the original training data or prior knowledge of shortcut type. We propose Shortcut Guardrail, a deployment-time framework that mitigates token-level shortcuts without access to the original training data or shortcut annotations. Our key insight is that gradient-based attribution on a biased model highlights shortcut tokens. Building on this finding, we train a lightweight LoRA-based debiasing module with a Masked Contrastive Learning (MaskCL) objective that encourages consistent representations with or without individual tokens. Across sentiment classification, toxicity detection, and natural language inference under both naturally occurring and controlled shortcuts, Shortcut Guardrail improves overall accuracy and worst-group accuracy over the unmitigated model under distribution shifts while preserving in-distribution performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出部署时框架Shortcut Guardrail，无需训练数据或先验知识，通过梯度归因识别并缓解语言模型中的捷径学习问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有捷径缓解方法依赖训练时干预和大量监督，难以在部署阶段应用。
analysis.problem: 预训练语言模型在测试时因依赖训练中的表面特征（捷径）导致泛化失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 梯度归因在偏置模型上能突出显示捷径标记，表明模型自身隐含捷径知识。
analysis.main_method: 利用梯度归因定位捷径标记，训练轻量LoRA去偏模块，通过掩码对比学习（MaskCL）使有无单个标记的表征一致。
analysis.key_experiments: 在情感分类、毒性检测和自然语言推理任务上，针对自然和受控捷径场景，评估分布偏移下的整体准确率和最差组准确率。
analysis.contributions: 首个无需训练数据和捷径先验的部署时捷径缓解方法，有效提升分布偏移下的鲁棒性且保持分布内性能。
analysis.limitations: 依赖梯度归因的准确性，可能对复杂或隐式捷径效果有限；LoRA模块需额外计算开销。

papers.title: CodeSpecBench: Benchmarking LLMs for Executable Behavioral Specification Generation
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can generate code from natural language, but the extent to which they capture intended program behavior remains unclear. Executable behavioral specifications, defined via preconditions and postconditions, provide a concrete means to assess such understanding. However, existing work on specification generation is constrained in evaluation methodology, task settings, and specification expressiveness. We introduce CodeSpecBench, a benchmark for executable behavioral specification generation under an execution-based evaluation protocol. CodeSpecBench supports both function-level and repository-level tasks and encodes specifications as executable Python functions. Constructed from diverse real-world codebases, it enables a realistic assessment of both correctness (accepting valid behaviors) and completeness (rejecting invalid behaviors). Evaluating 15 state-of-the-art LLMs on CodeSpecBench, we observe a sharp performance degradation on repository-level tasks, where the best model attains only a 20.2% pass rate. We further find that specification generation is substantially more challenging than code generation, indicating that strong coding performance does not necessarily reflect deep understanding of intended program semantics. Our data and code are available at https://github.com/SparksofAGI/CodeSpecBench.

analysis.tldr: 提出 CodeSpecBench 基准，评估 LLM 生成可执行行为规范的能力，发现仓库级任务性能显著下降，规范生成比代码生成更具挑战性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有规范生成工作在评估方法、任务设置和表达力上存在局限，需要更全面的基准来评估 LLM 对程序行为的理解。
analysis.problem: LLM 从自然语言生成代码时，是否真正理解预期程序行为尚不明确，缺乏可执行行为规范生成的标准化评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在仓库级任务中，最佳模型通过率仅 20.2%，且规范生成比代码生成困难得多，表明强编码能力不反映深层语义理解。
analysis.main_method: 构建 CodeSpecBench 基准，支持函数级和仓库级任务，将规范编码为可执行 Python 函数，通过执行验证正确性和完整性。
analysis.key_experiments: 评估 15 个 SOTA LLM，在仓库级任务中最佳模型通过率仅 20.2%，并对比规范生成与代码生成性能差异。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个支持仓库级可执行规范生成的基准，揭示 LLM 在规范生成上的显著不足，提供公开数据和代码。
analysis.limitations: 基准仅覆盖 Python 语言，规范形式限于前置/后置条件，可能未涵盖所有行为规范类型。

papers.title: Decentralized Learning via Random Walk with Jumps
papers.abstract: We study decentralized learning over networks where data are distributed across nodes without a central coordinator. Random walk learning is a token-based approach in which a single model is propagated across the network and updated at each visited node using local data, thereby incurring low communication and computational overheads. In weighted random-walk learning, the transition matrix is designed to achieve a desired sampling distribution, thereby speeding up convergence under data heterogeneity. We show that implementing weighted sampling via the Metropolis-Hastings algorithm can lead to a previously unexplored phenomenon we term entrapment. The random walk may become trapped in a small region of the network, resulting in highly correlated updates and severely degraded convergence. To address this issue, we propose Metropolis-Hastings with Levy jumps, which introduces occasional long-range transitions to restore exploration while respecting local information constraints. We establish a convergence rate that explicitly characterizes the roles of data heterogeneity, network spectral gap, and jump probability, and demonstrate through experiments that MHLJ effectively eliminates entrapment and significantly speeds up decentralized learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出带跳跃的随机游走方法解决去中心化学习中的“困陷”问题，加速收敛。
analysis.research_motivation: 去中心化学习中，加权随机游走虽能加速收敛，但可能因Metropolis-Hastings采样导致模型困陷于局部网络，降低性能。
analysis.problem: 加权随机游走学习中的“困陷”现象，即随机游走被限制在小区域，导致更新高度相关、收敛严重退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Metropolis-Hastings算法实现的加权采样可能使随机游走陷入网络局部区域，产生高度相关的模型更新，阻碍全局探索。
analysis.main_method: 提出Metropolis-Hastings with Levy Jumps (MHLJ)，通过引入偶尔的长距离跳跃来恢复探索能力，同时保持局部信息约束。
analysis.key_experiments: 实验验证MHLJ能有效消除困陷，显著加速去中心化学习，并明确刻画了数据异质性、网络谱间隙和跳跃概率对收敛率的影响。
analysis.contributions: 首次揭示加权随机游走学习中的困陷现象，并提出MHLJ方法解决该问题，同时给出包含关键参数的收敛率分析。
analysis.limitations: 跳跃概率的选择可能依赖网络结构，且长距离跳跃在极端稀疏网络中可能增加通信开销。

papers.title: Thought-Retriever: Don't Just Retrieve Raw Data, Retrieve Thoughts for Memory-Augmented Agentic Systems
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have transformed AI research thanks to their powerful internal capabilities and knowledge. However, existing LLMs still fail to effectively incorporate the massive external knowledge when interacting with the world. Although retrieval-augmented LLMs are proposed to mitigate the issue, they are still fundamentally constrained by the context length of LLMs, as they can only retrieve top-K raw data chunks from the external knowledge base which often consists of millions of data chunks. Here we propose Thought-Retriever, a novel model-agnostic algorithm that helps LLMs generate output conditioned on arbitrarily long external data, without being constrained by the context length or number of retrieved data chunks. Our key insight is to let an LLM fully leverage its intermediate responses generated when solving past user queries (thoughts), filtering meaningless and redundant thoughts, organizing them in thought memory, and retrieving the relevant thoughts when addressing new queries. This effectively equips LLM-based agents with a self-evolving long-term memory that grows more capable through continuous interaction. Besides algorithmic innovation, we further meticulously prepare a novel benchmark, AcademicEval, which requires an LLM to faithfully leverage ultra-long context to answer queries based on real-world academic papers. Extensive experiments on AcademicEval and two other public datasets validate that Thought-Retriever remarkably outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving an average increase of at least 7.6% in F1 score and 16% in win rate across various tasks. More importantly, we further demonstrate two exciting findings: (1) Thought-Retriever can indeed help LLM self-evolve after solving more user queries; (2) Thought-Retriever learns to leverage deeper thoughts to answer more abstract user queries.

analysis.tldr: 提出Thought-Retriever，通过检索LLM历史中间思考而非原始数据，突破上下文长度限制，实现超长外部知识的有效利用。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM无法有效整合海量外部知识，检索增强方法受限于上下文长度，只能检索少量原始数据块。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在不受上下文长度和检索数量限制下，利用任意长的外部数据生成输出。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在解决历史查询时产生的中间思考（thoughts）包含有价值信息，但被浪费；直接检索原始数据效率低且受长度限制。
analysis.main_method: 设计模型无关算法，让LLM生成并过滤历史中间思考，组织成思考记忆，在新查询时检索相关思考。
analysis.key_experiments: 在自建AcademicEval和两个公开数据集上，F1分数平均提升7.6%，胜率提升16%，并验证了自我进化能力和抽象思考利用。
analysis.contributions: 提出思考记忆机制突破上下文限制，构建AcademicEval基准，展示LLM通过思考记忆自我进化。
analysis.limitations: 依赖LLM生成思考的质量，思考记忆的存储和检索效率可能随规模增长下降。

papers.title: LLM-Enhanced Log Anomaly Detection: A Comprehensive Benchmark of Large Language Models for Automated System Diagnostics
papers.abstract: System log anomaly detection is critical for maintaining the reliability of large-scale software systems, yet traditional methods struggle with the heterogeneous and evolving nature of modern log data. Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) offer promising new approaches to log understanding, but a systematic comparison of LLM-based methods against established techniques remains lacking. In this paper, we present a comprehensive benchmark study evaluating both LLM-based and traditional approaches for log anomaly detection across four widely-used public datasets: HDFS, BGL, Thunderbird, and Spirit. We evaluate three categories of methods: (1) classical log parsers (Drain, Spell, AEL) combined with machine learning classifiers, (2) fine-tuned transformer models (BERT, RoBERTa), and (3) prompt-based LLM approaches (GPT-3.5, GPT-4, LLaMA-3) in zero-shot and few-shot settings. Our experiments reveal that while fine-tuned transformers achieve the highest F1-scores (0.96-0.99), prompt-based LLMs demonstrate remarkablezero-shot capabilities (F1: 0.82-0.91) without requiring any labeled training data -- a significant advantage for real-world deployment where labeled anomalies are scarce. We further analyze the cost-accuracy trade-offs, latency characteristics, and failure modes of each approach. Our findings provide actionable guidelines for practitioners choosing log anomaly detection methods based on their specific constraints regarding accuracy, latency, cost, and label availability. All code and experimental configurations are publicly available to facilitate reproducibility.

analysis.tldr: 系统日志异常检测中，微调Transformer模型F1最高(0.96-0.99)，但提示式LLM在零样本下表现优异(0.82-0.91)，无需标注数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统日志异常检测方法难以应对现代日志数据的异构性和演化性，而LLM虽展现出潜力，但缺乏系统性的对比研究。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对LLM与传统方法在日志异常检测上的全面基准比较，无法为实际部署提供选择依据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 微调Transformer在标注数据充足时性能最优，而提示式LLM在零样本场景下展现出惊人的泛化能力，适合标注稀缺的实际情况。
analysis.main_method: 在四个公开数据集上，对比三类方法：经典日志解析器+ML分类器、微调Transformer(BERT/RoBERTa)、提示式LLM(GPT-3.5/GPT-4/LLaMA-3)的零样本和少样本性能。
analysis.key_experiments: 使用HDFS、BGL、Thunderbird、Spirit数据集，评估F1分数、成本-准确率权衡、延迟特性和失败模式。
analysis.contributions: 提供了首个全面的LLM与传统方法基准，揭示了零样本LLM的实用优势，并给出了基于准确率、延迟、成本和标签可用性的实践指南。
analysis.limitations: 仅评估了有限的数据集和LLM版本，未深入探讨模型规模对性能的影响，且零样本LLM的F1仍低于微调模型。

papers.title: A Residual-Shell-Based Lower Bound for Ollivier-Ricci Curvature
papers.abstract: Ollivier-Ricci curvature (ORC), defined via the Wasserstein distance that captures rich geometric information, has received growing attention in both theory and applications. However, the high computational cost of Wasserstein distance evaluation has significantly limited the broader practical use of ORC. To alleviate this issue, previous work introduced a computationally efficient lower bound as a proxy for ORC based on 1-hop random walks, but this approach empirically exhibits large gaps from the exact ORC. In this paper, we establish a substantially tighter lower bound for ORC than the existing lower bound, while retaining much lower computational cost than exact ORC computation, with practical speedups of tens of times. Moreover, our bound is not restricted to 1-hop random walks, but also applies to k-hop random walks (k > 1). Experiments on several fundamental graph structures demonstrate the effectiveness of our bound in terms of both approximation accuracy and computational efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于残差壳的Ollivier-Ricci曲率下界，比现有方法更紧且计算快数十倍，支持多跳随机游走。
analysis.research_motivation: Ollivier-Ricci曲率因Wasserstein距离计算成本高而难以广泛应用，现有下界近似精度不足。
analysis.problem: 现有ORC下界与真实曲率差距大，且仅适用于1跳随机游走，限制了其实际应用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有1跳下界在复杂图结构上误差显著，而精确ORC计算代价过高，存在精度与效率的权衡。
analysis.main_method: 基于残差壳结构推导更紧的下界，支持k跳随机游走，通过优化局部信息计算降低复杂度。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多种基础图结构上验证，对比精确ORC和现有下界，展示数十倍加速和更高近似精度。
analysis.contributions: 提出更紧的ORC下界，支持多跳随机游走，显著提升计算效率与近似质量。
analysis.limitations: 未在真实大规模图或动态图上验证，且下界紧性可能依赖图结构特性。

papers.title: TimeMark: A Trustworthy Time Watermarking Framework for Exact Generation-Time Recovery from AIGC
papers.abstract: The widespread use of Large Language Models (LLMs) in text generation has raised increasing concerns about intellectual property disputes. Watermarking techniques, which embed meta information into AI-generated content (AIGC), have the potential to serve as judicial evidence. However, existing methods rely on statistical signals in token distributions, leading to inherently probabilistic detection and reduced reliability, especially in multi-bit encoding (e.g., timestamps). Moreover, such methods introduce detectable statistical patterns, making them vulnerable to forgery attacks and enabling model providers to fabricate arbitrary watermarks. To address these issues, we propose the concept of trustworthy watermark, which achieves reliable recovery with 100% identification accuracy while resisting both user-side statistical attacks and provider-side forgery. We focus on trustworthy time watermarking for use as judicial evidence. Our framework integrates cryptographic techniques and encodes time information into time-dependent secret keys under regulatory supervision, preventing arbitrary timestamp fabrication. The watermark payload is decoupled from time and generated as a random, non-stored bit sequence for each instance, eliminating statistical patterns. To ensure verifiability, we design a two-stage encoding mechanism, which, combined with error-correcting codes, enables reliable recovery of generation time with theoretically perfect accuracy. Both theoretical analysis and experiments demonstrate that our framework satisfies the reliability requirements for judicial evidence and offers a practical solution for future AIGC-related intellectual property disputes.

analysis.tldr: 提出TimeMark框架，通过密码学和时间依赖密钥实现AI生成文本的100%准确时间水印恢复，抵抗伪造攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有水印方法依赖统计信号，导致概率性检测和易受伪造攻击，无法满足司法证据的可靠性要求。
analysis.problem: 解决AI生成文本水印中多比特编码（如时间戳）恢复不可靠、易被伪造的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 统计水印引入可检测模式，使攻击者能伪造任意水印；多比特编码时概率性检测导致准确率下降。
analysis.main_method: 集成密码学技术，将时间信息编码为时间依赖密钥，设计两阶段编码机制结合纠错码，实现无统计模式的水印嵌入与完美恢复。
analysis.key_experiments: 通过理论分析和实验验证，证明框架在时间恢复上达到100%准确率，并抵抗用户端统计攻击和提供端伪造攻击。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出可信水印概念，实现100%准确的时间恢复；消除统计模式，抵抗双向攻击；满足司法证据可靠性要求。
analysis.limitations: 依赖监管方参与密钥管理，可能增加部署复杂度；未讨论长文本或低熵场景下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Representing expertise accelerates learning from pedagogical interaction data
authors: Karthikeya Kaushik and Bill D. Thompson
papers.abstract: Work in cognitive science and artificial intelligence has suggested that exposing learning agents to traces of interaction between multiple individuals can improve performance in a variety of settings, yet it remains unknown which features of interactions contribute to this improvement. We examined the factors that support the effectiveness of interaction data, using a controlled paradigm that allowed us to precisely operationalize key distinctions between interaction and an expert acting alone. We generated synthetic datasets of simple interactions between an expert and a novice in a spatial navigation task, and then trained transformer models on those datasets, evaluating performance after exposure to different datasets. Our experiments showed that models trained on pedagogical interactions were more robust across a variety of scenarios compared to models trained only on expert demonstrations, and that having the ability to represent epistemically distinct agents led to expert-like behavior even when expert behavior was rarely observed.

analysis.tldr: 研究发现，教学交互数据中的专家表征能提升模型学习效果，即使专家行为很少被观察到。
analysis.research_motivation: 认知科学和AI研究表明交互数据能提升学习性能，但具体哪些交互特征起作用尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 确定交互数据中哪些特征（如专家表征）对学习效果有贡献。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 教学交互数据比纯专家演示更鲁棒，且能表征认知差异的模型在专家行为罕见时仍能表现出专家级行为。
analysis.main_method: 生成专家-新手在空间导航任务中的合成交互数据集，训练Transformer模型并比较不同数据集的性能。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多种场景下测试模型鲁棒性，对比教学交互数据与纯专家演示的训练效果。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了专家表征能力是交互数据提升学习效果的关键因素。
analysis.limitations: 使用合成数据，可能无法完全反映真实交互的复杂性。

papers.title: Automated co-design of high-performance thermodynamic cycles via graph-based hierarchical reinforcement learning
papers.abstract: Thermodynamic cycles are pivotal in determining the efficacy of energy conversion systems. Traditional design methodologies, which rely on expert knowledge or exhaustive enumeration, are inefficient and lack scalability, thereby constraining the discovery of high-performance cycles. In this study, we introduce a graph-based hierarchical reinforcement learning approach for the co-design of structure parameters in thermodynamic cycles. These cycles are encoded as graphs, with components and connections depicted as nodes and edges, adhering to grammatical constraints. A deep learning-based thermophysical surrogate facilitates stable graph decoding and the simultaneous resolution of global parameters. Building on this foundation, we develop a hierarchical reinforcement learning framework wherein a high-level manager explores structural evolution and proposes candidate configurations, whereas a low-level worker optimizes parameters and provides performance rewards to steer the search towards high-performance regions. By integrating graph representation, thermophysical surrogate, and manager-worker learning, this method establishes a fully automated pipeline for encoding, decoding, and co-optimization. Using heat pump and heat engine cycles as case studies, the results demonstrate that the proposed method not only replicates classical cycle configurations but also identifies 18 and 21 novel heat pump and heat engine cycles, respectively. Relative to classical cycles, the novel configurations exhibit performance improvements of 4.6% and 133.3%, respectively, surpassing the traditional designs. This method effectively balances efficiency with broad applicability, providing a practical and scalable intelligent alternative to expert-driven thermodynamic cycle design.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于图的分层强化学习方法，自动协同设计热力学循环结构与参数，发现性能更优的新型循环。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统热力学循环设计依赖专家知识或穷举法，效率低且难以扩展，限制了高性能循环的发现。
analysis.problem: 如何自动、高效地协同优化热力学循环的结构和参数，以发现超越传统设计的高性能循环。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 热力学循环可编码为图结构，其性能受拓扑和参数共同影响，但搜索空间巨大，传统方法难以平衡探索与优化。
analysis.main_method: 采用图编码循环结构，结合深度学习热物理代理模型，构建分层强化学习框架：高层管理者探索结构，低层工作者优化参数并提供奖励。
analysis.key_experiments: 以热泵和热机循环为案例，方法不仅复现经典循环，还分别发现18种和21种新型循环，性能提升4.6%和133.3%。
analysis.contributions: 首次实现热力学循环结构与参数的完全自动化协同设计，显著提升性能并发现大量新型循环。
analysis.limitations: 依赖代理模型精度，且当前仅验证两类循环，通用性需进一步测试。

papers.title: Beyond Majority Voting: Efficient Best-Of-N with Radial Consensus Score
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) frequently generate multiple candidate responses for a given prompt, yet selecting the most reliable one remains challenging, especially when correctness diverges from surface-level majority agreement. Existing approaches, such as self-consistency, rely on discrete voting, while probability-based methods often fail to capture relationships among candidate answers or tend to underweight high-quality but less frequent responses, and do not fully leverage the geometric structure of answer representations. To address these limitations, we introduce Radial Consensus Score (RCS), a simple, efficient, and training-free method for best-of-N selection. RCS models semantic consensus by computing a weighted Fr\'echet mean (semantic center) of answer embeddings and ranking candidates by their radial distance to this center. Importantly, RCS provides a general framework that supports multiple weighting schemes, including uniform, frequency-based, and probability-based variants, enabling flexible integration of agreement signals and model confidence while remaining fully applicable in black-box settings. Extensive experiments across seven benchmarks covering short-form QA and long-form reasoning tasks, and five open-weight models, demonstrate that RCS variants consistently outperform strong baselines, with gains becoming more pronounced as the sampling budget increases. RCS also serves as an effective drop-in replacement for majority voting in multi-agent debate and exhibits strong robustness in black-box scenarios. Overall, these results highlight geometric consensus as a scalable and broadly applicable principle for reliable answer selection, extending beyond majority voting to more expressive and robust aggregation in LLM inference.

analysis.tldr: 提出径向共识评分（RCS），通过计算答案嵌入的加权弗雷歇均值并排序，实现无需训练的高效最佳答案选择，超越多数投票。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法如自一致性依赖离散投票，概率方法忽略答案间关系或低估高质量低频答案，未充分利用几何结构。
analysis.problem: 如何在大语言模型生成多个候选答案时，高效选择最可靠的一个，尤其是当正确性与表面多数一致相悖时。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 答案嵌入的几何结构（如语义中心）能反映共识，径向距离可区分可靠与不可靠答案，且高频答案不一定最优。
analysis.main_method: 计算候选答案嵌入的加权弗雷歇均值作为语义中心，按径向距离排序，支持均匀、频率和概率等多种加权方案。
analysis.key_experiments: 在7个基准（短问答和长推理）和5个开源模型上测试，RCS变体一致优于基线，且采样预算越大优势越明显。
analysis.contributions: 提出训练无关的RCS框架，灵活集成共识信号和模型置信度，可替代多数投票用于多智能体辩论，黑盒场景鲁棒。
analysis.limitations: 依赖嵌入质量，未在闭源模型或极端长文本场景验证，加权方案选择需进一步指导。

papers.title: Knowledge Is Not Static: Order-Aware Hypergraph RAG for Language Models
papers.abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) enhances large language models by grounding outputs in retrieved knowledge. However, existing RAG methods including graph- and hypergraph-based approaches treat retrieved evidence as an unordered set, implicitly assuming permutation invariance. This assumption is misaligned with many real-world reasoning tasks, where outcomes depend not only on which interactions occur, but also on the order in which they unfold. We propose Order-Aware Knowledge Hypergraph RAG (OKH-RAG), which treats order as a first-class structural property. OKH-RAG represents knowledge as higher-order interactions within a hypergraph augmented with precedence structure, and reformulates retrieval as sequence inference over hyperedges. Instead of selecting independent facts, it recovers coherent interaction trajectories that reflect underlying reasoning processes. A learned transition model infers precedence directly from data without requiring explicit temporal supervision. We evaluate OKH-RAG on order-sensitive question answering and explanation tasks, including tropical cyclone and port operation scenarios. OKH-RAG consistently outperforms permutation-invariant baselines, and ablations show that these gains arise specifically from modeling interaction order. These results highlight a key limitation of set-based retrieval: effective reasoning requires not only retrieving relevant evidence, but organizing it into structured sequences.

analysis.tldr: 提出OKH-RAG，将顺序作为超图RAG的一等结构属性，通过恢复交互轨迹提升顺序敏感推理任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RAG方法将检索证据视为无序集合，隐含置换不变性假设，与许多现实推理任务中顺序关键的特性不符。
analysis.problem: 解决现有RAG方法无法建模知识交互顺序，导致在顺序敏感推理任务中性能受限的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 许多现实推理任务（如热带气旋、港口操作）的结果不仅取决于哪些交互发生，还取决于交互发生的顺序，无序集合假设导致推理错误。
analysis.main_method: 构建带优先结构的超图表示知识，将检索重构为超边上的序列推理，并学习转移模型从数据中推断顺序，无需显式时间监督。
analysis.key_experiments: 在热带气旋和港口操作等顺序敏感问答与解释任务上评估，OKH-RAG持续优于置换不变基线，消融实验表明增益来自顺序建模。
analysis.contributions: 首次将顺序作为RAG的一等结构属性，提出超图序列检索方法，揭示集合式检索的关键局限。
analysis.limitations: 依赖超图构建质量，顺序推断可能受数据稀疏性影响，未在更广泛任务上验证。

papers.title: AgenticAI-DialogGen: Topic-Guided Conversation Generation for Fine-Tuning and Evaluating Short- and Long-Term Memories of LLMs
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) have improved their ability to process extended conversational contexts, yet fine-tuning and evaluating short- and long-term memories remain difficult due to the absence of datasets that encode both short- and long-term conversational history. Existing conversational datasets lack memory grounding, overlook topic continuity, or rely on costly human annotation. To address these gaps, we introduce AgenticAI-DialogGen, a modular agent-based framework that generates persona-grounded and topic-guided conversations without human supervision. The framework uses LLM agents to extract knowledge graphs, identify topics, build speaker personas, and simulate topic-guided conversations from unstructured conversations. A QA module generates memory-grounded Question Answer (QA) pairs drawn from short- and long-term conversational histories. We also generated a new dataset entitled, TopicGuidedChat (TGC), where long-term memory is encoded as speaker-specific knowledge graphs and short-term memory as newly generated topic-guided conversations. Evaluations depict that AgenticAI-DialogGen yields higher conversational quality and LLMs fine-tuned on TGC dataset achieve improved performance on memory-grounded QA tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出无监督的AgenticAI-DialogGen框架，生成主题引导对话数据集TGC，用于微调与评估LLM的短期与长期记忆。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对话数据集缺乏记忆基础、忽视主题连续性或依赖昂贵人工标注，难以支持LLM短期与长期记忆的微调与评估。
analysis.problem: 缺乏同时编码短期与长期对话历史的数据集，导致LLM记忆能力微调与评估困难。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM处理长对话能力提升，但现有数据集无法有效区分短期与长期记忆，且主题连续性不足。
analysis.main_method: 使用LLM代理从非结构化对话中提取知识图谱、识别主题、构建说话人画像，并模拟主题引导对话；QA模块生成基于短期与长期记忆的问答对。
